Pali: Upasampanno upasampannassa sutvā upasampannassa pesuññaṁ upasaṁharati— “itthannāmo ‘na mayaṁ caṇḍālā venā nesādā rathakārā pukkusā’ti bhaṇati, na so aññaṁ bhaṇati, taññeva bhaṇatī”ti. Āpatti vācāya, vācāya dukkaṭassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc3:2.2.27
Pali: Upasampanno upasampannassa sutvā upasampannassa pesuññaṁ upasaṁharati— “itthannāmo ‘na mayaṁ paṇḍitā byattā medhāvī bahussutā dhammakathikā, natthamhākaṁ duggati, sugatiyeva amhākaṁ pāṭikaṅkhā’ti bhaṇati, na so aññaṁ bhaṇati, taññeva bhaṇatī”ti. Āpatti vācāya, vācāya dukkaṭassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc3:2.3.1
Pali: Upasampanno upasampannassa sutvā upasampannassa pesuññaṁ upasaṁharati; āpatti vācāya, vācāya pācittiyassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc3:2.3.2
Pali: Upasampanno upasampannassa sutvā anupasampannassa pesuññaṁ upasaṁharati, āpatti dukkaṭassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc3:2.3.3
Pali: Upasampanno anupasampannassa sutvā upasampannassa pesuññaṁ upasaṁharati, āpatti dukkaṭassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc3:2.3.4
Pali: Upasampanno anupasampannassa sutvā anupasampannassa pesuññaṁ upasaṁharati, āpatti dukkaṭassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc3:2.4.1
Pali: Anāpatti—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc3:2.4.2
Pali: napiyakamyassa, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc3:2.4.3
Pali: nabhedādhippāyassa, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc3:2.4.4
Pali: ummattakassa, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc3:2.4.5
Pali: ādikammikassāti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc3:2.4.6
Pali: Pesuññasikkhāpadaṁ niṭṭhitaṁ tatiyaṁ.

Pali: 4. Padasodhammasikkhāpada 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc4:1.1
Pali: Tena samayena buddho bhagavā sāvatthiyaṁ viharati jetavane anāthapiṇḍikassa ārāme. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc4:1.2
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena chabbaggiyā bhikkhū upāsake padaso dhammaṁ vācenti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc4:1.3
Pali: Upāsakā bhikkhūsu agāravā appatissā asabhāgavuttikā viharanti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc4:1.4
Pali: Ye te bhikkhū appicchā …pe… te ujjhāyanti khiyyanti vipācenti—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc4:1.5
Pali: “kathañhi nāma chabbaggiyā bhikkhū upāsake padaso dhammaṁ vācessanti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc4:1.6
Pali: Upāsakā bhikkhūsu agāravā appatissā asabhāgavuttikā viharantī”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc4:1.7
Pali: Atha kho te bhikkhū chabbaggiye bhikkhū anekapariyāyena vigarahitvā bhagavato etamatthaṁ ārocesuṁ …pe… 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc4:1.8
Pali: “saccaṁ kira tumhe, bhikkhave, upāsake padaso dhammaṁ vācetha; 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc4:1.9
Pali: upāsakā bhikkhūsu agāravā appatissā asabhāgavuttikā viharantī”ti? 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc4:1.10
Pali: “Saccaṁ, bhagavā”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc4:1.11
Pali: Vigarahi buddho bhagavā …pe… 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc4:1.12
Pali: kathañhi nāma tumhe, moghapurisā, upāsake padaso dhammaṁ vācessatha. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc4:1.13
Pali: Upāsakā bhikkhūsu agāravā appatissā asabhāgavuttikā viharanti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc4:1.14
Pali: Netaṁ, moghapurisā, appasannānaṁ vā pasādāya pasannānaṁ vā bhiyyobhāvāya …pe… 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc4:1.15
Pali: evañca pana, bhikkhave, imaṁ sikkhāpadaṁ uddiseyyātha—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc4:1.16.1
Pali: “Yo pana bhikkhu anupasampannaṁ padaso dhammaṁ vāceyya pācittiyan”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc4:2.1.1
Pali: Yo panāti 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc4:2.1.2
Pali: yo yādiso …pe… 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc4:2.1.3
Pali: bhikkhūti 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc4:2.1.4
Pali: …pe… ayaṁ imasmiṁ atthe adhippeto bhikkhūti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc4:2.1.5
Pali: Anupasampanno nāma 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc4:2.1.6
Pali: bhikkhuñca bhikkhuniñca ṭhapetvā avaseso anupasampanno nāma. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc4:2.1.7
Pali: Padaso nāma 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc4:2.1.8
Pali: padaṁ, anupadaṁ, anvakkharaṁ, anubyañjanaṁ. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc4:2.1.9
Pali: Padaṁ nāma 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc4:2.1.10
Pali: ekato paṭṭhapetvā ekato osāpenti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc4:2.1.11
Pali: Anupadaṁ nāma 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc4:2.1.12
Pali: pāṭekkaṁ paṭṭhapetvā ekato osāpenti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc4:2.1.13
Pali: Anvakkharaṁ nāma 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc4:2.1.14
Pali: “rūpaṁ aniccan”ti vuccamāno, “run”ti opāteti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc4:2.1.15
Pali: Anubyañjanaṁ nāma 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc4:2.1.16
Pali: “rūpaṁ aniccan”ti vuccamāno, “vedanā aniccā”ti saddaṁ nicchāreti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc4:2.1.17
Pali: Yañca padaṁ, yañca anupadaṁ, yañca anvakkharaṁ, yañca anubyañjanaṁ—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc4:2.1.18
Pali: sabbametaṁ padaso nāma. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc4:2.1.19
Pali: Dhammo nāma 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc4:2.1.20
Pali: buddhabhāsito, sāvakabhāsito, isibhāsito, devatābhāsito, atthūpasañhito, dhammūpasañhito. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc4:2.1.21
Pali: Vāceyyāti 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc4:2.1.22
Pali: padena vāceti, pade pade āpatti pācittiyassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc4:2.1.23
Pali: Akkharāya vāceti, akkharakkharāya āpatti pācittiyassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc4:2.2.1
Pali: Anupasampanne anupasampannasaññī padaso dhammaṁ vāceti, āpatti pācittiyassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc4:2.2.2

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc4:2.2.3

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc4:2.2.5
Pali: Upasampanne vematiko, āpatti dukkaṭassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc4:2.2.6

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc4:2.3.1
Pali: Anāpatti—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc4:2.3.2
Pali: ekato uddisāpento, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc4:2.3.3
Pali: ekato sajjhāyaṁ karonto, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc4:2.3.4
Pali: yebhuyyena paguṇaṁ ganthaṁ bhaṇantaṁ opāteti, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc4:2.3.5
Pali: osārentaṁ opāteti, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc4:2.3.6
Pali: ummattakassa, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc4:2.3.7
Pali: ādikammikassāti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc4:2.3.8
Pali: Padasodhammasikkhāpadaṁ niṭṭhitaṁ catutthaṁ.

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc5:1.1
Pali: Tena samayena buddho bhagavā āḷaviyaṁ viharati aggāḷave cetiye. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc5:1.2
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena upāsakā ārāmaṁ āgacchanti dhammassavanāya. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc5:1.3
Pali: Dhamme bhāsite therā bhikkhū yathāvihāraṁ gacchanti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc5:1.4
Pali: Navakā bhikkhū tattheva upaṭṭhānasālāyaṁ upāsakehi saddhiṁ muṭṭhassatī, asampajānā, naggā, vikūjamānā, kākacchamānā seyyaṁ kappenti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc5:1.5
Pali: Upāsakā ujjhāyanti khiyyanti vipācenti—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc5:1.6
Pali: “kathañhi nāma bhadantā muṭṭhassatī asampajānā naggā vikūjamānā kākacchamānā seyyaṁ kappessantī”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc5:1.7
Pali: Assosuṁ kho bhikkhū tesaṁ upāsakānaṁ ujjhāyantānaṁ khiyyantānaṁ vipācentānaṁ. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc5:1.8
Pali: Ye te bhikkhū appicchā …pe… te ujjhāyanti khiyyanti vipācenti—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc5:1.9
Pali: “kathañhi nāma bhikkhū anupasampannena sahaseyyaṁ kappessantī”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc5:1.10
Pali: Atha kho te bhikkhū te navake bhikkhū anekapariyāyena vigarahitvā bhagavato etamatthaṁ ārocesuṁ …pe… 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc5:1.11
Pali: “saccaṁ kira, bhikkhave, bhikkhū anupasampannena sahaseyyaṁ kappentī”ti? 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc5:1.12
Pali: “Saccaṁ, bhagavā”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc5:1.13
Pali: Vigarahi buddho bhagavā …pe… 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc5:1.14
Pali: kathañhi nāma te, bhikkhave, moghapurisā anupasampannena sahaseyyaṁ kappessanti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc5:1.15
Pali: Netaṁ, bhikkhave, appasannānaṁ vā pasādāya …pe…

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc5:1.17.1
Pali: “Yo pana bhikkhu anupasampannena sahaseyyaṁ kappeyya pācittiyan”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc5:1.18
Pali: Evañcidaṁ bhagavatā bhikkhūnaṁ sikkhāpadaṁ paññattaṁ hoti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc5:2.1
Pali: Atha kho bhagavā āḷaviyaṁ yathābhirantaṁ viharitvā yena kosambī tena cārikaṁ pakkāmi. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc5:2.2
Pali: Anupubbena cārikaṁ caramāno yena kosambī tadavasari. Tatra sudaṁ bhagavā kosambiyaṁ viharati badarikārāme. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc5:2.3
Pali: Bhikkhū āyasmantaṁ rāhulaṁ etadavocuṁ—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc5:2.4
Pali: “bhagavatā, āvuso rāhula, sikkhāpadaṁ paññattaṁ—‘na anupasampannena sahaseyyā kappetabbā’ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc5:2.5
Pali: Seyyaṁ, āvuso rāhula, jānāhī”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc5:2.6
Pali: Atha kho āyasmā rāhulo seyyaṁ alabhamāno vaccakuṭiyā seyyaṁ kappesi. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc5:2.7
Pali: Atha kho bhagavā rattiyā paccūsasamayaṁ paccuṭṭhāya yena vaccakuṭi tenupasaṅkami; upasaṅkamitvā ukkāsi. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc5:2.8
Pali: Āyasmāpi rāhulo ukkāsi. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc5:2.9
Pali: “Ko etthā”ti? 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc5:2.10
Pali: “Ahaṁ, bhagavā, rāhulo”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc5:2.11
Pali: “Kissa tvaṁ, rāhula, idha nisinnosī”ti? 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc5:2.12
Pali: Atha kho āyasmā rāhulo bhagavato etamatthaṁ ārocesi. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc5:2.13
Pali: Atha kho bhagavā etasmiṁ nidāne etasmiṁ pakaraṇe dhammiṁ kathaṁ katvā bhikkhū āmantesi—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc5:2.14
Pali: “anujānāmi, bhikkhave, anupasampannena dirattatirattaṁ sahaseyyaṁ kappetuṁ. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc5:2.15
Pali: Evañca pana, bhikkhave, imaṁ sikkhāpadaṁ uddiseyyātha—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc5:2.16.1

Pali: Theravāda Vinaya 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc6:0.2
Pali: Mahāvibhaṅga

Pali: Pācittiyakaṇḍa 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc6:0.4
Pali: Musāvādavagga 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc6:0.5
Pali: 6. Dutiyasahaseyyasikkhāpada 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc6:1.1
Pali: Tena samayena buddho bhagavā sāvatthiyaṁ viharati jetavane anāthapiṇḍikassa ārāme. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc6:1.2
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena āyasmā anuruddho kosalesu janapade sāvatthiṁ gacchanto sāyaṁ aññataraṁ gāmaṁ upagacchi. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc6:1.3
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena tasmiṁ gāme aññatarissā itthiyā āvasathāgāraṁ paññattaṁ hoti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc6:1.4
Pali: Atha kho āyasmā anuruddho yena sā itthī tenupasaṅkami; upasaṅkamitvā taṁ itthiṁ etadavoca—“sace te, bhagini, agaru, vaseyyāma ekarattaṁ āvasathāgāre”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc6:1.5
Pali: “Vaseyyātha, bhante”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc6:1.6
Pali: Aññepi addhikā yena sā itthī tenupasaṅkamiṁsu; upasaṅkamitvā taṁ itthiṁ etadavocuṁ—“sace te, ayye, agaru vaseyyāma ekarattaṁ āvasathāgāre”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc6:1.7
Pali: “Eso kho ayyo samaṇo paṭhamaṁ upagato; sace so anujānāti, vaseyyāthā”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc6:1.8
Pali: Atha kho te addhikā yenāyasmā anuruddho tenupasaṅkamiṁsu; upasaṅkamitvā āyasmantaṁ anuruddhaṁ etadavocuṁ—“sace te, bhante, agaru, vaseyyāma ekarattaṁ āvasathāgāre”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc6:1.9
Pali: “Vaseyyātha, āvuso”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc6:1.10
Pali: Atha kho sā itthī āyasmante anuruddhe saha dassanena paṭibaddhacittā ahosi. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc6:1.11
Pali: Atha kho sā itthī yenāyasmā anuruddho tenupasaṅkami; upasaṅkamitvā āyasmantaṁ anuruddhaṁ etadavoca—“ayyo, bhante, imehi manussehi ākiṇṇo na phāsu viharissati. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc6:1.12
Pali: Sādhāhaṁ, bhante, ayyassa mañcakaṁ abbhantaraṁ paññapeyyan”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc6:1.13
Pali: Adhivāsesi kho āyasmā anuruddho tuṇhībhāvena. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc6:1.14
Pali: Atha kho sā itthī āyasmato anuruddhassa mañcakaṁ abbhantaraṁ paññapetvā alaṅkatappaṭiyattā gandhagandhinī yenāyasmā anuruddho tenupasaṅkami; upasaṅkamitvā āyasmantaṁ anuruddhaṁ etadavoca—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc6:1.15
Pali: “ayyo, bhante, abhirūpo dassanīyo pāsādiko, ahañcamhi abhirūpā dassanīyā pāsādikā. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc6:1.16
Pali: Sādhāhaṁ, bhante, ayyassa pajāpati bhaveyyan”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc6:1.17
Pali: Evaṁ vutte, āyasmā anuruddho tuṇhī ahosi. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc6:1.18
Pali: Dutiyampi kho …pe… 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc6:1.19
Pali: tatiyampi kho sā itthī āyasmantaṁ anuruddhaṁ etadavoca—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc6:1.20
Pali: “ayyo, bhante, abhirūpo dassanīyo pāsādiko, ahañcamhi abhirūpā dassanīyā pāsādikā. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc6:1.21
Pali: Sādhu, bhante, ayyo mañceva paṭicchatu sabbañca sāpateyyan”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc6:1.22
Pali: Tatiyampi kho āyasmā anuruddho tuṇhī ahosi. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc6:1.23
Pali: Atha kho sā itthī sāṭakaṁ nikkhipitvā āyasmato anuruddhassa purato caṅkamatipi tiṭṭhatipi nisīdatipi seyyampi kappeti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc6:1.24
Pali: Atha kho āyasmā anuruddho indriyāni okkhipitvā taṁ itthiṁ neva olokesi napi ālapi. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc6:1.25
Pali: Atha kho sā itthī—“acchariyaṁ vata bho, abbhutaṁ vata bho. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc6:1.26
Pali: Bahū me manussā satenapi sahassenapi pahiṇanti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc6:1.27
Pali: Ayaṁ pana samaṇo—mayā sāmaṁ yāciyamāno—na icchati mañceva paṭicchituṁ sabbañca sāpateyyan”ti 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc6:1.28
Pali: sāṭakaṁ nivāsetvā āyasmato anuruddhassa pādesu sirasā nipatitvā āyasmantaṁ anuruddhaṁ etadavoca—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc6:1.29
Pali: “accayo maṁ, bhante, accagamā yathābālaṁ yathāmūḷhaṁ yathāakusalaṁ yāhaṁ evamakāsiṁ. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc6:1.30
Pali: Tassā me, bhante, ayyo accayaṁ accayato paṭiggaṇhātu āyatiṁ saṁvarāyā”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc6:1.31
Pali: “Taggha tvaṁ, bhagini, accayo accagamā yathābālaṁ yathāmūḷhaṁ yathāakusalaṁ yā tvaṁ evamakāsi. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc6:1.32
Pali: Yato ca kho tvaṁ, bhagini, accayaṁ accayato disvā yathādhammaṁ paṭikarosi, taṁ te mayaṁ paṭiggaṇhāma. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc6:1.33
Pali: Vuddhi hesā, bhagini, ariyassa vinaye yo accayaṁ accayato disvā yathādhammaṁ paṭikaroti āyatiñca saṁvaraṁ āpajjatī”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc6:1.34
Pali: Atha kho sā itthī tassā rattiyā accayena āyasmantaṁ anuruddhaṁ paṇītena khādanīyena bhojanīyena sahatthā santappetvā sampavāretvā, āyasmantaṁ anuruddhaṁ bhuttāviṁ onītapattapāṇiṁ abhivādetvā ekamantaṁ nisīdi. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc6:1.35
Pali: Ekamantaṁ nisinnaṁ kho taṁ itthiṁ āyasmā anuruddho dhammiyā kathāya sandassesi samādapesi samuttejesi sampahaṁsesi. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc6:1.36
Pali: Atha kho sā itthī—āyasmatā anuruddhena dhammiyā kathāya sandassitā samādapitā samuttejitā sampahaṁsitā—āyasmantaṁ anuruddhaṁ etadavoca—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc6:1.37
Pali: “abhikkantaṁ, bhante, abhikkantaṁ, bhante. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc6:1.38
Pali: Seyyathāpi, bhante, nikkujjitaṁ vā ukkujjeyya, paṭicchannaṁ vā vivareyya, mūḷhassa vā maggaṁ ācikkheyya, andhakāre vā telapajjotaṁ dhāreyya—‘cakkhumanto rūpāni dakkhantī’ti; 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc6:1.39
Pali: evamevaṁ ayyena anuruddhena anekapariyāyena dhammo pakāsito. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc6:1.40
Pali: Esāhaṁ, bhante, taṁ bhagavantaṁ saraṇaṁ gacchāmi dhammañca bhikkhusaṅghañca. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc6:1.41
Pali: Upāsikaṁ maṁ ayyo dhāretu ajjatagge pāṇupetaṁ saraṇaṁ gatan”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc6:1.42
Pali: Atha kho āyasmā anuruddho sāvatthiṁ gantvā bhikkhūnaṁ etamatthaṁ ārocesi. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc6:1.43
Pali: Ye te bhikkhū appicchā …pe… te ujjhāyanti khiyyanti vipācenti—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc6:1.44
Pali: “kathañhi nāma āyasmā anuruddho mātugāmena sahaseyyaṁ kappessatī”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc6:1.45
Pali: Atha kho te bhikkhū āyasmantaṁ anuruddhaṁ anekapariyāyena vigarahitvā bhagavato etamatthaṁ ārocesuṁ …pe… 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc6:1.46
Pali: “saccaṁ kira tvaṁ, anuruddha, mātugāmena sahaseyyaṁ kappesī”ti? 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc6:1.47
Pali: “Saccaṁ, bhagavā”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc6:1.48
Pali: Vigarahi buddho bhagavā …pe… kathañhi nāma tvaṁ, anuruddha, mātugāmena sahaseyyaṁ kappessasi. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc6:1.49
Pali: Netaṁ, anuruddha, appasannānaṁ vā pasādāya …pe… 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc6:1.50
Pali: evañca pana, bhikkhave, imaṁ sikkhāpadaṁ uddiseyyātha—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc6:1.51.1
Pali: “Yo pana bhikkhu mātugāmena sahaseyyaṁ kappeyya pācittiyan”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc6:2.1.1
Pali: Yo panāti 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc6:2.1.2
Pali: yo yādiso …pe… 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc6:2.1.3
Pali: bhikkhūti 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc6:2.1.4
Pali: …pe… ayaṁ imasmiṁ atthe adhippeto bhikkhūti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc6:2.1.5
Pali: Mātugāmo nāma 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc6:2.1.6
Pali: manussitthī, na yakkhī, na petī, na tiracchānagatā; antamaso tadahujātāpi dārikā, pageva mahattarī. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc6:2.1.7
Pali: Sahāti 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc6:2.1.8
Pali: ekato. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc6:2.1.9
Pali: Seyyā nāma 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc6:2.1.10
Pali: sabbacchannā, sabbaparicchannā, yebhuyyenacchannā, yebhuyyena paricchannā. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc6:2.1.11
Pali: Seyyaṁ kappeyyāti 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc6:2.1.12
Pali: atthaṅgate sūriye—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc6:2.1.13
Pali: Mātugāme nipanne bhikkhu nipajjati, āpatti pācittiyassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc6:2.1.14
Pali: Bhikkhu nipanne mātugāmo nipajjati, āpatti pācittiyassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc6:2.1.15
Pali: Ubho vā nipajjanti, āpatti pācittiyassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc6:2.1.16
Pali: Uṭṭhahitvā punappunaṁ nipajjanti, āpatti pācittiyassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc6:2.2.1
Pali: Mātugāme mātugāmasaññī sahaseyyaṁ kappeti, āpatti pācittiyassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc6:2.2.2
Pali: Mātugāme vematiko sahaseyyaṁ kappeti, āpatti pācittiyassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc6:2.2.3
Pali: Mātugāme amātugāmasaññī sahaseyyaṁ kappeti, āpatti pācittiyassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc6:2.2.4
Pali: Upaḍḍhacchanne upaḍḍhaparicchanne, āpatti dukkaṭassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc6:2.2.5
Pali: Yakkhiyā vā petiyā vā paṇḍakena vā tiracchānagatitthiyā vā sahaseyyaṁ kappeti, āpatti dukkaṭassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc6:2.2.6
Pali: Amātugāme mātugāmasaññī, āpatti dukkaṭassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc6:2.2.7
Pali: Amātugāme vematiko, āpatti dukkaṭassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc6:2.2.8
Pali: Amātugāme amātugāmasaññī, anāpatti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc6:2.3.1
Pali: Anāpatti—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc6:2.3.2
Pali: sabbacchanne sabbaaparicchanne, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc6:2.3.3
Pali: sabbaparicchanne sabbaacchanne, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc6:2.3.4
Pali: yebhuyyena acchanne, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc6:2.3.5
Pali: yebhuyyena aparicchanne, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc6:2.3.6
Pali: mātugāme nipanne bhikkhu nisīdati, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc6:2.3.7
Pali: bhikkhu nipanne mātugāmo nisīdati, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc6:2.3.8
Pali: ubho vā nisīdanti, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc6:2.3.9
Pali: ummattakassa, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc6:2.3.10
Pali: ādikammikassāti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc6:2.3.11
Pali: Dutiyasahaseyyasikkhāpadaṁ niṭṭhitaṁ chaṭṭhaṁ.

Pali: Musāvādavagga 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc7:0.5
Pali: 7. Dhammadesanāsikkhāpada 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc7:1.1
Pali: Tena samayena buddho bhagavā sāvatthiyaṁ viharati jetavane anāthapiṇḍikassa ārāme. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc7:1.2
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena āyasmā udāyī sāvatthiyaṁ kulūpako hoti, bahukāni kulāni upasaṅkamati. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc7:1.3
Pali: Atha kho āyasmā udāyī pubbaṇhasamayaṁ nivāsetvā pattacīvaramādāya yena aññataraṁ kulaṁ tenupasaṅkami. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc7:1.4
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena gharaṇī nivesanadvāre nisinnā hoti, gharasuṇhā āvasathadvāre nisinnā hoti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc7:1.5
Pali: Atha kho āyasmā udāyī yena gharaṇī tenupasaṅkami; upasaṅkamitvā gharaṇiyā upakaṇṇake dhammaṁ desesi. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc7:1.6
Pali: Atha kho gharasuṇhāya etadahosi—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc7:1.7
Pali: “kiṁ nu kho so samaṇo sassuyā jāro udāhu obhāsatī”ti? 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc7:1.8
Pali: Atha kho āyasmā udāyī gharaṇiyā upakaṇṇake dhammaṁ desetvā yena gharasuṇhā tenupasaṅkami; upasaṅkamitvā gharasuṇhāya upakaṇṇake dhammaṁ desesi. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc7:1.9
Pali: Atha kho gharaṇiyā etadahosi—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc7:1.10
Pali: “kiṁ nu kho so samaṇo gharasuṇhāya jāro udāhu obhāsatī”ti? 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc7:1.11
Pali: Atha kho āyasmā udāyī gharasuṇhāya upakaṇṇake dhammaṁ desetvā pakkāmi. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc7:1.12
Pali: Atha kho gharaṇī gharasuṇhaṁ etadavoca—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc7:1.13
Pali: “he je, kiṁ te eso samaṇo avocā”ti? 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc7:1.14
Pali: “Dhammaṁ me, ayye, desesi”. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc7:1.15
Pali: “Ayyāya pana kiṁ avocā”ti? 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc7:1.16
Pali: “Mayhampi dhammaṁ desesī”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc7:1.17
Pali: Tā ujjhāyanti khiyyanti vipācenti—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc7:1.18
Pali: “kathañhi nāma ayyo udāyī upakaṇṇake dhammaṁ desessati. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc7:1.19
Pali: Nanu nāma vissaṭṭhena vivaṭena dhammo desetabbo”ti? 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc7:1.20
Pali: Assosuṁ kho bhikkhū tāsaṁ itthīnaṁ ujjhāyantīnaṁ khiyyantīnaṁ vipācentīnaṁ. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc7:1.21
Pali: Ye te bhikkhū appicchā …pe… te ujjhāyanti khiyyanti vipācenti—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc7:1.22
Pali: “kathañhi nāma āyasmā udāyī mātugāmassa dhammaṁ desessatī”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc7:1.23
Pali: Atha kho te bhikkhū āyasmantaṁ udāyiṁ anekapariyāyena vigarahitvā bhagavato etamatthaṁ ārocesuṁ …pe… 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc7:1.24
Pali: “saccaṁ kira tvaṁ, udāyi, mātugāmassa dhammaṁ desesī”ti? 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc7:1.25
Pali: “Saccaṁ, bhagavā”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc7:1.26
Pali: Vigarahi buddho bhagavā …pe… 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc7:1.27
Pali: kathañhi nāma tvaṁ, moghapurisa, mātugāmassa dhammaṁ desessasi. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc7:1.28
Pali: Netaṁ moghapurisa, appasannānaṁ vā pasādāya …pe… 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc7:1.29
Pali: evañca pana, bhikkhave, imaṁ sikkhāpadaṁ uddiseyyātha—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc7:1.30.1
Pali: “Yo pana bhikkhu mātugāmassa dhammaṁ deseyya pācittiyan”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc7:1.31
Pali: Evañcidaṁ bhagavatā bhikkhūnaṁ sikkhāpadaṁ paññattaṁ hoti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc7:2.1
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena upāsikā bhikkhū passitvā etadavocuṁ—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc7:2.2
Pali: “iṅghāyyā, dhammaṁ desethā”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc7:2.3
Pali: “Na, bhaginī, kappati mātugāmassa dhammaṁ desetun”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc7:2.4
Pali: “Iṅghāyyā, chappañcavācāhi dhammaṁ desetha, sakkā ettakenapi dhammo aññātun”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc7:2.5
Pali: “Na, bhaginī, kappati mātugāmassa dhammaṁ desetun”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc7:2.6
Pali: Kukkuccāyantā na desesuṁ. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc7:2.7
Pali: Upāsikā ujjhāyanti khiyyanti vipācenti—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc7:2.8
Pali: “kathañhi nāma, ayyā, amhehi yācīyamānā dhammaṁ na desessantī”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc7:2.9
Pali: Assosuṁ kho bhikkhū tāsaṁ upāsikānaṁ ujjhāyantīnaṁ khiyyantīnaṁ vipācentīnaṁ. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc7:2.10
Pali: Atha kho te bhikkhū bhagavato etamatthaṁ ārocesuṁ. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc7:2.11
Pali: Atha kho bhagavā etasmiṁ nidāne etasmiṁ pakaraṇe dhammiṁ kathaṁ katvā bhikkhū āmantesi—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc7:2.12
Pali: “anujānāmi, bhikkhave, mātugāmassa chappañcavācāhi dhammaṁ desetuṁ. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc7:2.13
Pali: Evañca pana, bhikkhave, imaṁ sikkhāpadaṁ uddiseyyātha—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc7:2.14.1
Pali: “Yo pana bhikkhū mātugāmassa uttarichappañcavācāhi dhammaṁ deseyya, pācittiyan”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc7:2.15
Pali: Evañcidaṁ bhagavatā bhikkhūnaṁ sikkhāpadaṁ paññattaṁ hoti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc7:3.1
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena chabbaggiyā bhikkhū—“bhagavatā anuññātaṁ mātugāmassa chappañcavācāhi dhammaṁ desetun”ti te aviññuṁ purisaviggahaṁ upanisīdāpetvā mātugāmassa uttarichappañcavācāhi dhammaṁ desenti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc7:3.2
Pali: Ye te bhikkhū appicchā …pe… te ujjhāyanti khiyyanti vipācenti—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc7:3.3

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc7:3.4
Pali: Atha kho te bhikkhū chabbaggiye bhikkhū anekapariyāyena vigarahitvā bhagavato etamatthaṁ ārocesuṁ …pe… 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc7:3.5
Pali: “saccaṁ kira tumhe, bhikkhave, aviññuṁ purisaviggahaṁ upanisīdāpetvā mātugāmassa uttarichappañcavācāhi dhammaṁ desethā”ti? 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc7:3.6
Pali: “Saccaṁ, bhagavā”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc7:3.7
Pali: Vigarahi buddho bhagavā …pe… 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc7:3.8
Pali: kathañhi nāma tumhe, moghapurisā, aviññuṁ purisaviggahaṁ upanisīdāpetvā mātugāmassa uttarichappañcavācāhi dhammaṁ desessatha. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc7:3.9
Pali: Netaṁ, moghapurisā, appasannānaṁ vā pasādāya …pe… 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc7:3.10
Pali: evañca pana, bhikkhave, imaṁ sikkhāpadaṁ uddiseyyātha—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc7:3.11.1
Pali: “Yo pana bhikkhu mātugāmassa uttarichappañcavācāhi dhammaṁ deseyya, aññatra viññunā purisaviggahena, pācittiyan”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc7:4.1.1
Pali: Yo panāti 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc7:4.1.2
Pali: yo yādiso …pe… 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc7:4.1.3
Pali: bhikkhūti 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc7:4.1.4
Pali: …pe… ayaṁ imasmiṁ atthe adhippeto bhikkhūti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc7:4.1.5
Pali: Mātugāmo nāma 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc7:4.1.6
Pali: manussitthī; na yakkhī na petī na tiracchānagatā; viññū, paṭibalā subhāsitadubbhāsitaṁ duṭṭhullāduṭṭhullaṁ ājānituṁ. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc7:4.1.7
Pali: Uttarichappañcavācāhīti 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc7:4.1.8
Pali: atirekachappañcavācāhi. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc7:4.1.9
Pali: Dhammo nāma 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc7:4.1.10
Pali: buddhabhāsito, sāvakabhāsito, isibhāsito, devatābhāsito, atthūpasañhito, dhammūpasañhito. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc7:4.1.11
Pali: Deseyyāti 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc7:4.1.12
Pali: padena deseti, pade pade āpatti pācittiyassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc7:4.1.13
Pali: Akkharāya deseti, akkharakkharāya āpatti pācittiyassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc7:4.1.14
Pali: Aññatra viññunā purisaviggahenāti 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc7:4.1.15
Pali: ṭhapetvā viññuṁ purisaviggahaṁ. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc7:4.1.16
Pali: Viññū nāma purisaviggaho, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc7:4.1.17
Pali: paṭibalo hoti subhāsitadubbhāsitaṁ duṭṭhullāduṭṭhullaṁ ājānituṁ. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc7:4.2.1
Pali: Mātugāme mātugāmasaññī uttarichappañcavācāhi dhammaṁ deseti, aññatra viññunā purisaviggahena, āpatti pācittiyassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc7:4.2.2
Pali: Mātugāme vematiko uttarichappañcavācāhi dhammaṁ deseti, aññatra viññunā purisaviggahena, āpatti pācittiyassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc7:4.2.3
Pali: Mātugāme amātugāmasaññī uttarichappañcavācāhi dhammaṁ deseti, aññatra viññunā purisaviggahena, āpatti pācittiyassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc7:4.2.4
Pali: Yakkhiyā vā petiyā vā paṇḍakassa vā tiracchānagatamanussaviggahitthiyā vā uttarichappañcavācāhi dhammaṁ deseti, aññatra viññunā purisaviggahena, āpatti dukkaṭassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc7:4.2.5
Pali: Amātugāme mātugāmasaññī, āpatti dukkaṭassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc7:4.2.6
Pali: Amātugāme vematiko, āpatti dukkaṭassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc7:4.2.7
Pali: Amātugāme amātugāmasaññī, anāpatti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc7:4.3.1
Pali: Anāpatti—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc7:4.3.2
Pali: viññunā purisaviggahena, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc7:4.3.3
Pali: chappañcavācāhi dhammaṁ deseti, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc7:4.3.4
Pali: ūnakachappañcavācāhi dhammaṁ deseti, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc7:4.3.5
Pali: uṭṭhahitvā puna nisīditvā deseti, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc7:4.3.6
Pali: mātugāmo uṭṭhahitvā puna nisīdati tasmiṁ deseti, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc7:4.3.7
Pali: aññassa mātugāmassa deseti, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc7:4.3.8
Pali: pañhaṁ pucchati, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc7:4.3.9
Pali: pañhaṁ puṭṭho katheti, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc7:4.3.10
Pali: aññassatthāya bhaṇantaṁ mātugāmo suṇāti, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc7:4.3.11
Pali: ummattakassa, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc7:4.3.12
Pali: ādikammikassāti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc7:4.3.13
Pali: Dhammadesanāsikkhāpadaṁ niṭṭhitaṁ sattamaṁ.

Pali: Musāvādavagga 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc8:0.5
Pali: 8. Bhūtārocanasikkhāpada 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc8:1.1.1
Pali: Tena samayena buddho bhagavā vesāliyaṁ viharati mahāvane kūṭāgārasālāyaṁ. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc8:1.1.2
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena sambahulā sandiṭṭhā sambhattā bhikkhū vaggumudāya nadiyā tīre vassaṁ upagacchiṁsu. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc8:1.1.3
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena vajjī dubbhikkhā hoti—dvīhitikā setaṭṭhikā salākāvuttā, na sukarā uñchena paggahena yāpetuṁ. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc8:1.1.4
Pali: Atha kho tesaṁ bhikkhūnaṁ etadahosi—“etarahi kho vajjī dubbhikkhā—dvīhitikā setaṭṭhikā salākāvuttā, na sukarā uñchena paggahena yāpetuṁ. Kena nu kho mayaṁ upāyena samaggā sammodamānā avivadamānā phāsukaṁ vassaṁ vaseyyāma, na ca piṇḍakena kilameyyāmā”ti? 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc8:1.1.5
Pali: Ekacce evamāhaṁsu—“handa mayaṁ, āvuso, gihīnaṁ kammantaṁ adhiṭṭhema. Evaṁ te amhākaṁ dātuṁ maññissanti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc8:1.1.6
Pali: Evaṁ mayaṁ samaggā sammodamānā avivadamānā phāsukaṁ vassaṁ vasissāma, na ca piṇḍakena kilamissāmā”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc8:1.1.7
Pali: Ekacce evamāhaṁsu—“alaṁ, āvuso, kiṁ gihīnaṁ kammantaṁ adhiṭṭhitena? 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc8:1.1.8
Pali: Handa mayaṁ, āvuso, gihīnaṁ dūteyyaṁ harāma. Evaṁ te amhākaṁ dātuṁ maññissanti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc8:1.1.9
Pali: Evaṁ mayaṁ samaggā sammodamānā avivadamānā phāsukaṁ vassaṁ vasissāma, na ca piṇḍakena kilamissāmā”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc8:1.1.10
Pali: Ekacce evamāhaṁsu—“alaṁ, āvuso; kiṁ gihīnaṁ kammantaṁ adhiṭṭhitena. Kiṁ gihīnaṁ dūteyyaṁ haṭena. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc8:1.1.11
Pali: Handa mayaṁ, āvuso, gihīnaṁ aññamaññassa uttarimanussadhammassa vaṇṇaṁ bhāsissāma—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc8:1.1.12
Pali: ‘asuko bhikkhu paṭhamassa jhānassa lābhī, asuko bhikkhu dutiyassa jhānassa lābhī, asuko bhikkhu tatiyassa jhānassa lābhī, asuko bhikkhu catutthassa jhānassa lābhī, asuko bhikkhu sotāpanno, asuko bhikkhu sakadāgāmī, asuko bhikkhu anāgāmī, asuko bhikkhu arahā, asuko bhikkhu tevijjo, asuko bhikkhu chaḷabhiñño’ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc8:1.1.13
Pali: Evaṁ te amhākaṁ dātuṁ maññissanti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc8:1.1.14
Pali: Evaṁ mayaṁ samaggā sammodamānā avivadamānā phāsukaṁ vassaṁ vasissāma, na ca piṇḍakena kilamissāmā”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc8:1.1.15
Pali: “Eso yeva kho, āvuso, seyyo, yo amhākaṁ gihīnaṁ aññamaññassa uttarimanussadhammassa vaṇṇo bhāsito”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc8:1.1.16
Pali: Atha kho te bhikkhū gihīnaṁ aññamaññassa uttarimanussadhammassa vaṇṇaṁ bhāsiṁsu—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc8:1.1.17
Pali: “asuko bhikkhu paṭhamassa jhānassa lābhī …pe… asuko bhikkhu chaḷabhiñño”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc8:1.1.18
Pali: Atha kho te manussā—“lābhā vata no, suladdhaṁ vata no, yesaṁ no evarūpā bhikkhū vassaṁ upagatā, na vata no ito pubbe evarūpā bhikkhū vassaṁ upagatā, yathayime bhikkhū sīlavanto kalyāṇadhammā”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc8:1.1.19
Pali: Te na tādisāni bhojanāni attanā bhuñjanti, mātāpitūnaṁ denti puttadārassa denti dāsakammakaraporisassa denti mittāmaccānaṁ denti ñātisālohitānaṁ denti yādisāni bhikkhūnaṁ denti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc8:1.1.20
Pali: Na tādisāni khādanīyāni sāyanīyāni pānāni attanā khādanti sāyanti pivanti mātāpitūnaṁ denti puttadārassa denti dāsakammakaraporisassa denti mittāmaccānaṁ denti ñātisālohitānaṁ denti, yādisāni bhikkhūnaṁ denti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc8:1.1.21
Pali: Atha kho te bhikkhū vaṇṇavā ahesuṁ pīṇindriyā pasannamukhavaṇṇā vippasannachavivaṇṇā. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc8:1.2.1
Pali: Āciṇṇaṁ kho panetaṁ vassaṁvuṭṭhānaṁ bhikkhūnaṁ bhagavantaṁ dassanāya upasaṅkamituṁ. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc8:1.2.2
Pali: Atha kho te bhikkhū vassaṁvuṭṭhā temāsaccayena senāsanaṁ saṁsāmetvā pattacīvaramādāya yena vesālī tena pakkamiṁsu. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc8:1.2.3
Pali: Anupubbena yena vesālī mahāvanaṁ kūṭāgārasālā yena bhagavā tenupasaṅkamiṁsu; 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc8:1.2.4
Pali: upasaṅkamitvā bhagavantaṁ abhivādetvā ekamantaṁ nisīdiṁsu. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc8:1.2.5
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena disāsu vassaṁvuṭṭhā bhikkhū kisā honti lūkhā dubbaṇṇā uppaṇḍuppaṇḍukajātā dhamanisanthatagattā. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc8:1.2.6
Pali: Vaggumudātīriyā pana bhikkhū vaṇṇavā honti pīṇindriyā pasannamukhavaṇṇā vippasannachavivaṇṇā. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc8:1.2.7
Pali: Āciṇṇaṁ kho panetaṁ buddhānaṁ bhagavantānaṁ āgantukehi bhikkhūhi saddhiṁ paṭisammodituṁ. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc8:1.2.8
Pali: Atha kho bhagavā vaggumudātīriye bhikkhū etadavoca—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc8:1.2.9
Pali: “kacci, bhikkhave, khamanīyaṁ, kacci yāpanīyaṁ, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc8:1.2.10
Pali: kacci samaggā sammodamānā avivadamānā phāsukaṁ vassaṁ vasittha, na ca piṇḍakena kilamitthā”ti? 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc8:1.2.11
Pali: “Khamanīyaṁ, bhagavā, yāpanīyaṁ, bhagavā. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc8:1.2.12
Pali: Samaggā ca mayaṁ, bhante, sammodamānā avivadamānā phāsukaṁ vassaṁ vasimhā, na ca piṇḍakena kilamimhā”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc8:1.2.13
Pali: Jānantāpi tathāgatā pucchanti, jānantāpi na pucchanti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc8:1.2.14
Pali: Kālaṁ viditvā pucchanti, kālaṁ viditvā na pucchanti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc8:1.2.15
Pali: Atthasañhitaṁ tathāgatā pucchanti, no anatthasañhitaṁ. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc8:1.2.16
Pali: Anatthasañhite setughāto tathāgatānaṁ. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc8:1.2.17
Pali: Dvīhākārehi buddhā bhagavanto bhikkhū paṭipucchanti—“dhammaṁ vā desessāma, sāvakānaṁ vā sikkhāpadaṁ paññapessāmā”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc8:1.2.18
Pali: Atha kho bhagavā vaggumudātīriye bhikkhū etadavoca—“yathā kathaṁ pana tumhe, bhikkhave, samaggā sammodamānā avivadamānā phāsukaṁ vassaṁ vasittha, na ca piṇḍakena kilamitthā”ti? 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc8:1.2.19
Pali: Atha kho te bhikkhū bhagavato etamatthaṁ ārocesuṁ. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc8:1.2.20
Pali: “Kacci pana vo, bhikkhave, bhūtan”ti? 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc8:1.2.21
Pali: “Bhūtaṁ, bhagavā”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc8:1.2.22
Pali: Vigarahi buddho bhagavā …pe… 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc8:1.2.23
Pali: kathañhi nāma tumhe, bhikkhave, udarassa kāraṇā gihīnaṁ aññamaññassa uttarimanussadhammassa vaṇṇaṁ bhāsissatha. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc8:1.2.24
Pali: Netaṁ, bhikkhave, appasannānaṁ vā pasādāya …pe… 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc8:1.2.25
Pali: evañca pana, bhikkhave, imaṁ sikkhāpadaṁ uddiseyyātha—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc8:1.2.26.1
Pali: “Yo pana bhikkhu anupasampannassa uttarimanussadhammaṁ āroceyya bhūtasmiṁ, pācittiyan”ti.

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc8:2.1.7
Pali: Uttarimanussadhammo nāma

Pali: anupasampannassa— “mohā me cittaṁ vinīvaraṇan”ti vattukāmo—“dosā me cittaṁ vinīvaraṇan”ti bhaṇantassa paṭivijānantassa āpatti pācittiyassa, na paṭivijānantassa āpatti dukkaṭassa …pe…. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc8:2.4.43
Pali: Āroceyyāti 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc8:2.4.44
Pali: anupasampannassa— “paṭhamañca jhānaṁ dutiyañca jhānaṁ tatiyañca jhānaṁ catutthañca jhānaṁ …pe… dosā ca me cittaṁ vinīvaraṇan”ti vattukāmo—“mohā me cittaṁ vinīvaraṇan”ti bhaṇantassa paṭivijānantassa āpatti pācittiyassa, na paṭivijānantassa āpatti dukkaṭassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc8:2.4.45
Pali: Āroceyyāti 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc8:2.4.46
Pali: anupasampannassa— “dutiyañca jhānaṁ tatiyañca jhānaṁ catutthañca jhānaṁ …pe… mohā ca me cittaṁ vinīvaraṇan”ti vattukāmo—“paṭhamaṁ jhānaṁ samāpajjin”ti bhaṇantassa paṭivijānantassa āpatti pācittiyassa, na paṭivijānantassa āpatti dukkaṭassa …pe…. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc8:2.5.1
Pali: Āroceyyāti 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc8:2.5.2
Pali: anupasampannassa— “yo te vihāre vasi so bhikkhu paṭhamaṁ jhānaṁ samāpajji, samāpajjati, samāpanno; so bhikkhu paṭhamassa jhānassa lābhī, vasī; tena bhikkhunā paṭhamaṁ jhānaṁ sacchikatan”ti bhaṇantassa āpatti dukkaṭassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc8:2.5.3
Pali: Āroceyyāti 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc8:2.5.4
Pali: anupasampannassa— “yo te vihāre vasi so bhikkhu dutiyaṁ jhānaṁ …pe… 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc8:2.5.5
Pali: tatiyaṁ jhānaṁ … 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc8:2.5.6
Pali: catutthaṁ jhānaṁ samāpajji, samāpajjati, samāpanno; so bhikkhu catutthassa jhānassa lābhī, vasī; tena bhikkhunā catutthaṁ jhānaṁ sacchikatan”ti bhaṇantassa āpatti dukkaṭassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc8:2.5.7
Pali: Āroceyyāti 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc8:2.5.8
Pali: anupasampannassa— “yo te vihāre vasi so bhikkhu suññataṁ vimokkhaṁ …pe… 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc8:2.5.9
Pali: animittaṁ vimokkhaṁ 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc8:2.5.10
Pali: appaṇihitaṁ vimokkhaṁ 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc8:2.5.11
Pali: suññataṁ samādhiṁ 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc8:2.5.12
Pali: animittaṁ samādhiṁ 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc8:2.5.13

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc8:2.5.14
Pali: Āroceyyāti 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc8:2.5.15

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc8:2.5.17

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc8:2.5.18
Pali: Āroceyyāti 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc8:2.5.19
Pali: anupasampannassa— “yo te vihāre vasi so bhikkhu tisso vijjā …pe… 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc8:2.5.20
Pali: cattāro satipaṭṭhāne, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc8:2.5.21
Pali: cattāro sammappadhāne, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc8:2.5.22
Pali: cattāro iddhipāde, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc8:2.5.23
Pali: pañcindriyāni, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc8:2.5.24
Pali: pañca balāni, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc8:2.5.25
Pali: satta bojjhaṅge, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc8:2.5.26
Pali: ariyaṁ aṭṭhaṅgikaṁ maggaṁ, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc8:2.5.27
Pali: sotāpattiphalaṁ, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc8:2.5.28
Pali: sakadāgāmiphalaṁ, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc8:2.5.29
Pali: anāgāmiphalaṁ, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc8:2.5.30
Pali: arahattaṁ samāpajji … samāpajjati, samāpanno …pe… 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc8:2.5.31
Pali: tassa bhikkhuno rāgo catto, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc8:2.5.32
Pali: doso catto, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc8:2.5.33

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc8:2.5.34

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc8:2.5.35

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc8:2.5.36
Pali: mohā cittaṁ vinīvaraṇan”ti bhaṇantassa āpatti dukkaṭassa.

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc8:2.5.45

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc8:2.5.50

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc8:2.5.58

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc8:2.5.59

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc8:2.6.2

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc8:2.6.3
Pali: ādikammikassāti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc8:2.6.4
Pali: Bhūtārocanasikkhāpadaṁ niṭṭhitaṁ aṭṭhamaṁ.

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc9:0.1
Pali: Theravāda Vinaya 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc9:0.2
Pali: Mahāvibhaṅga

Pali: Pācittiyakaṇḍa 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc9:0.4
Pali: Musāvādavagga 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc9:0.5
Pali: 9. Duṭṭhullārocanasikkhāpada 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc9:1.1
Pali: Tena samayena buddho bhagavā sāvatthiyaṁ viharati jetavane anāthapiṇḍikassa ārāme. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc9:1.2
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena āyasmā upanando sakyaputto chabbaggiyehi bhikkhūhi saddhiṁ bhaṇḍanakato hoti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc9:1.3
Pali: So sañcetanikaṁ sukkavissaṭṭhiṁ āpattiṁ āpajjitvā saṅghaṁ tassā āpattiyā parivāsaṁ yāci. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc9:1.4
Pali: Tassa saṅgho tassā āpattiyā parivāsaṁ adāsi. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc9:1.5
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena sāvatthiyaṁ aññatarassa pūgassa saṅghabhattaṁ hoti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc9:1.6
Pali: So parivasanto bhattagge āsanapariyante nisīdi. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc9:1.7
Pali: Chabbaggiyā bhikkhū te upāsake etadavocuṁ—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc9:1.8
Pali: “eso, āvuso, āyasmā upanando sakyaputto tumhākaṁ sambhāvito kulūpako; yeneva hatthena saddhādeyyaṁ bhuñjati teneva hatthena upakkamitvā asuciṁ mocesi. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc9:1.9
Pali: So sañcetanikaṁ sukkavissaṭṭhiṁ āpattiṁ āpajjitvā saṅghaṁ tassā āpattiyā parivāsaṁ yāci. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc9:1.10
Pali: Tassa saṅgho tassā āpattiyā parivāsaṁ adāsi. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc9:1.11
Pali: So parivasanto āsanapariyante nisinno”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc9:1.12
Pali: Ye te bhikkhū appicchā …pe… te ujjhāyanti khiyyanti vipācenti—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc9:1.13
Pali: “kathañhi nāma chabbaggiyā bhikkhū bhikkhussa duṭṭhullaṁ āpattiṁ anupasampannassa ārocessantī”ti …pe… 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc9:1.14
Pali: “saccaṁ kira tumhe, bhikkhave, bhikkhussa duṭṭhullaṁ āpattiṁ anupasampannassa ārocethā”ti? 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc9:1.15
Pali: “Saccaṁ, bhagavā”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc9:1.16
Pali: Vigarahi buddho bhagavā …pe… 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc9:1.17
Pali: kathañhi nāma tumhe, moghapurisā, bhikkhussa duṭṭhullaṁ āpattiṁ anupasampannassa ārocessatha. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc9:1.18
Pali: Netaṁ, moghapurisā, appasannānaṁ vā pasādāya …pe… 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc9:1.19
Pali: evañca pana, bhikkhave, imaṁ sikkhāpadaṁ uddiseyyātha—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc9:1.20.1
Pali: “Yo pana bhikkhu bhikkhussa duṭṭhullaṁ āpattiṁ anupasampannassa āroceyya, aññatra bhikkhusammutiyā, pācittiyan”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc9:2.1.1
Pali: Yo panāti 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc9:2.1.2
Pali: yo yādiso …pe… 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc9:2.1.3
Pali: bhikkhūti 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc9:2.1.4
Pali: …pe… ayaṁ imasmiṁ atthe adhippeto bhikkhūti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc9:2.1.5
Pali: Bhikkhussāti 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc9:2.1.6
Pali: aññassa bhikkhussa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc9:2.1.7
Pali: Duṭṭhullā nāma āpatti—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc9:2.1.8
Pali: cattāri ca pārājikāni, terasa ca saṅghādisesā. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc9:2.1.9
Pali: Anupasampanno nāma 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc9:2.1.10
Pali: bhikkhuñca bhikkhuniñca ṭhapetvā avaseso anupasampanno nāma. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc9:2.1.11
Pali: Āroceyyāti 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc9:2.1.12
Pali: āroceyya itthiyā vā purisassa vā gahaṭṭhassa vā pabbajitassa vā. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc9:2.1.13
Pali: Aññatra bhikkhusammutiyāti 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc9:2.1.14
Pali: ṭhapetvā bhikkhusammutiṁ. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc9:2.1.15.1
Pali: Atthi bhikkhusammuti āpattipariyantā, na kulapariyantā. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc9:2.1.16
Pali: Atthi bhikkhusammuti kulapariyantā, na āpattipariyantā, atthi bhikkhusammuti āpattipariyantā ca kulapariyantā ca, atthi bhikkhusammuti neva āpattipariyantā na kulapariyantā. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc9:2.1.17.1
Pali: Āpattipariyantā nāma 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc9:2.1.18
Pali: āpattiyo pariggahitāyo honti— “ettakāhi āpattīhi ārocetabbo”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc9:2.1.19
Pali: Kulapariyantā nāma 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc9:2.1.20
Pali: kulāni pariggahitāni honti— “ettakesu kulesu ārocetabbo”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc9:2.1.21
Pali: Āpattipariyantā ca kulapariyantā ca nāma 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc9:2.1.22
Pali: āpattiyo ca pariggahitāyo honti, kulāni ca pariggahitāni honti— “ettakāhi āpattīhi ettakesu kulesu ārocetabbo”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc9:2.1.23
Pali: Neva āpattipariyantā na kulapariyantā nāma 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc9:2.1.24
Pali: āpattiyo ca apariggahitāyo honti, kulāni ca apariggahitāni honti— “ettakāhi āpattīhi ettakesu kulesu ārocetabbo”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc9:2.1.25.1
Pali: Āpattipariyante yā āpattiyo pariggahitāyo honti, tā āpattiyo ṭhapetvā aññāhi āpattīhi āroceti, āpatti pācittiyassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc9:2.1.26
Pali: Kulapariyante yāni kulāni pariggahitāni honti, tāni kulāni ṭhapetvā aññesu kulesu āroceti, āpatti pācittiyassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc9:2.1.27
Pali: Āpattipariyante ca kulapariyante ca yā āpattiyo pariggahitāyo honti, tā āpattiyo ṭhapetvā yāni kulāni pariggahitāni honti, tāni kulāni ṭhapetvā aññāhi āpattīhi aññesu kulesu āroceti, āpatti pācittiyassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc9:2.1.28
Pali: Neva āpattipariyante na kulapariyante, anāpatti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc9:2.2.1
Pali: Duṭṭhullāya āpattiyā duṭṭhullāpattisaññī anupasampannassa āroceti, aññatra bhikkhusammutiyā, āpatti pācittiyassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc9:2.2.2
Pali: Duṭṭhullāya āpattiyā vematiko anupasampannassa āroceti, aññatra bhikkhusammutiyā, āpatti pācittiyassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc9:2.2.3
Pali: Duṭṭhullāya āpattiyā aduṭṭhullāpattisaññī anupasampannassa āroceti, aññatra bhikkhusammutiyā, āpatti pācittiyassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc9:2.2.4
Pali: Aduṭṭhullaṁ āpattiṁ āroceti, āpatti dukkaṭassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc9:2.2.5
Pali: Anupasampannassa duṭṭhullaṁ vā aduṭṭhullaṁ vā ajjhācāraṁ āroceti, āpatti dukkaṭassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc9:2.2.6
Pali: Aduṭṭhullāya āpattiyā duṭṭhullāpattisaññī, āpatti dukkaṭassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc9:2.2.7
Pali: Aduṭṭhullāya āpattiyā vematiko, āpatti dukkaṭassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc9:2.2.8
Pali: Aduṭṭhullāya āpattiyā aduṭṭhullāpattisaññī, āpatti dukkaṭassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc9:2.3.1
Pali: Anāpatti—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc9:2.3.2
Pali: vatthuṁ āroceti no āpattiṁ, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc9:2.3.3
Pali: āpattiṁ āroceti no vatthuṁ, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc9:2.3.4
Pali: bhikkhusammutiyā, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc9:2.3.5
Pali: ummattakassa, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc9:2.3.6
Pali: ādikammikassāti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc9:2.3.7
Pali: Duṭṭhullārocanasikkhāpadaṁ niṭṭhitaṁ navamaṁ.

Pali segments

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc10:0.1
Pali: Theravāda Vinaya 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc10:0.2
Pali: Mahāvibhaṅga 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc10:0.3
Pali: Pācittiyakaṇḍa 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc10:0.4
Pali: Musāvādavagga 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc10:0.5
Pali: 10. Pathavīkhaṇanasikkhāpada 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc10:1.1
Pali: Tena samayena buddho bhagavā āḷaviyaṁ viharati aggāḷave cetiye. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc10:1.2
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena āḷavakā bhikkhū navakammaṁ karontā pathaviṁ khaṇantipi khaṇāpentipi. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc10:1.3
Pali: Manussā ujjhāyanti khiyyanti vipācenti—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc10:1.4
Pali: “kathañhi nāma samaṇā sakyaputtiyā pathaviṁ khaṇissantipi khaṇāpessantipi. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc10:1.5
Pali: Ekindriyaṁ samaṇā sakyaputtiyā jīvaṁ viheṭhentī”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc10:1.6
Pali: Assosuṁ kho bhikkhū tesaṁ manussānaṁ ujjhāyantānaṁ khiyyantānaṁ vipācentānaṁ. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc10:1.7
Pali: Ye te bhikkhū appicchā …pe… te ujjhāyanti khiyyanti vipācenti—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc10:1.8
Pali: “kathañhi nāma āḷavakā bhikkhū pathaviṁ khaṇissantipi khaṇāpessantipī”ti …pe… 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc10:1.9
Pali: “saccaṁ kira tumhe, bhikkhave, pathaviṁ khaṇathapi khaṇāpethapī”ti? 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc10:1.10
Pali: “Saccaṁ, bhagavā”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc10:1.11
Pali: Vigarahi buddho bhagavā …pe… 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc10:1.12
Pali: kathañhi nāma tumhe, moghapurisā, pathaviṁ khaṇissathapi khaṇāpessathapi. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc10:1.13
Pali: Jīvasaññino hi, moghapurisā, manussā pathaviyā. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc10:1.14
Pali: Netaṁ, moghapurisā, appasannānaṁ vā pasādāya …pe… 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc10:1.15
Pali: evañca pana, bhikkhave, imaṁ sikkhāpadaṁ uddiseyyātha—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc10:1.16.1
Pali: “Yo pana bhikkhu pathaviṁ khaṇeyya vā khaṇāpeyya vā, pācittiyan”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc10:2.1.1
Pali: Yo panāti 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc10:2.1.2
Pali: yo yādiso …pe… 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc10:2.1.3
Pali: bhikkhūti 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc10:2.1.4
Pali: …pe… ayaṁ imasmiṁ atthe adhippeto bhikkhūti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc10:2.1.5
Pali: Pathavī nāma 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc10:2.1.6
Pali: dve pathaviyo— jātā ca pathavī ajātā ca pathavī. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc10:2.1.7
Pali: Jātā nāma pathavī—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc10:2.1.8
Pali: suddhapaṁsu suddhamattikā appapāsāṇā appasakkharā appakaṭhalā appamarumbā appavālikā, yebhuyyenapaṁsukā, yebhuyyenamattikā. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc10:2.1.9
Pali: Adaḍḍhāpi vuccati jātā pathavī. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc10:2.1.10
Pali: Yopi paṁsupuñjo vā mattikāpuñjo vā atirekacātumāsaṁ ovaṭṭho, ayampi vuccati jātā pathavī. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc10:2.1.11
Pali: Ajātā nāma pathavī—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc10:2.1.12
Pali: suddhapāsāṇā suddhasakkharā suddhakaṭhalā suddhamarumbā suddhavālikā appapaṁsukā appamattikā, yebhuyyenapāsāṇā, yebhuyyenasakkharā, yebhuyyenakaṭhalā, yebhuyyenamarumbā, yebhuyyenavālikā. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc10:2.1.13
Pali: Daḍḍhāpi vuccati ajātā pathavī. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc10:2.1.14
Pali: Yopi paṁsupuñjo vā mattikāpuñjo vā omakacātumāsaṁ ovaṭṭho, ayampi vuccati ajātā pathavī. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc10:2.1.15
Pali: Khaṇeyyāti 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc10:2.1.16
Pali: sayaṁ khaṇati, āpatti pācittiyassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc10:2.1.17
Pali: Khaṇāpeyyāti 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc10:2.1.18
Pali: aññaṁ āṇāpeti, āpatti pācittiyassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc10:2.1.19
Pali: Sakiṁ āṇatto bahukampi khaṇati, āpatti pācittiyassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc10:2.2.1
Pali: Pathaviyā pathavisaññī khaṇati vā khaṇāpeti vā, bhindati vā bhedāpeti vā, dahati vā dahāpeti vā, āpatti pācittiyassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc10:2.2.2
Pali: Pathaviyā vematiko khaṇati vā khaṇāpeti vā, bhindati vā bhedāpeti vā, dahati vā dahāpeti vā, āpatti dukkaṭassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc10:2.2.3
Pali: Pathaviyā apathavisaññī khaṇati vā khaṇāpeti vā, bhindati vā bhedāpeti vā, dahati vā dahāpeti vā, anāpatti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc10:2.2.4
Pali: Apathaviyā pathavisaññī, āpatti dukkaṭassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc10:2.2.5
Pali: Apathaviyā vematiko, āpatti dukkaṭassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc10:2.2.6
Pali: Apathaviyā apathavisaññī, anāpatti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc10:2.3.1
Pali: Anāpatti—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc10:2.3.2
Pali: “imaṁ jāna, imaṁ dehi, imaṁ āhara, iminā attho, imaṁ kappiyaṁ karohī”ti bhaṇati, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc10:2.3.3
Pali: asañcicca, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc10:2.3.4
Pali: asatiyā, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc10:2.3.5
Pali: ajānantassa, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc10:2.3.6
Pali: ummattakassa, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc10:2.3.7
Pali: ādikammikassāti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc10:2.3.8
Pali: Pathavīkhaṇanasikkhāpadaṁ niṭṭhitaṁ dasamaṁ. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc10:2.3.9
Pali: Musāvādavaggo paṭhamo. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc10:2.3.10
Pali: Tassuddānaṁ 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc10:2.3.11
Pali: Musā omasapesuññaṁ, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc10:2.3.12
Pali: padaseyyāya ve duve; 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc10:2.3.13
Pali: Aññatra viññunā bhūtā, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc10:2.3.14
Pali: duṭṭhullāpatti khaṇanāti.

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc11:0.1
Pali: Theravāda Vinaya

Pali: Mahāvibhaṅga

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc11:0.4
Pali: Bhūtagāmavagga 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc11:0.5
Pali: 11. Bhūtagāmasikkhāpada 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc11:1.1
Pali: Tena samayena buddho bhagavā āḷaviyaṁ viharati aggāḷave cetiye. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc11:1.2
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena āḷavakā bhikkhū navakammaṁ karontā rukkhaṁ chindantipi chedāpentipi. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc11:1.3
Pali: Aññataropi āḷavako bhikkhu rukkhaṁ chindati. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc11:1.4
Pali: Tasmiṁ rukkhe adhivatthā devatā taṁ bhikkhuṁ etadavoca—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc11:1.5
Pali: “mā, bhante, attano bhavanaṁ kattukāmo mayhaṁ bhavanaṁ chindī”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc11:1.6
Pali: So bhikkhu anādiyanto chindiyeva, tassā ca devatāya dārakassa bāhuṁ ākoṭesi. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc11:1.7
Pali: Atha kho tassā devatāya etadahosi—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc11:1.8
Pali: “yannūnāhaṁ imaṁ bhikkhuṁ idheva jīvitā voropeyyan”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc11:1.9
Pali: Atha kho tassā devatāya etadahosi—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc11:1.10
Pali: “na kho metaṁ patirūpaṁ yāhaṁ imaṁ bhikkhuṁ idheva jīvitā voropeyyaṁ. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc11:1.11
Pali: Yannūnāhaṁ bhagavato etamatthaṁ āroceyyan”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc11:1.12
Pali: Atha kho sā devatā yena bhagavā tenupasaṅkami; upasaṅkamitvā bhagavato etamatthaṁ ārocesi. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc11:1.13
Pali: “Sādhu sādhu, devate. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc11:1.14
Pali: Sādhu kho tvaṁ, devate, taṁ bhikkhuṁ jīvitā na voropesi. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc11:1.15
Pali: Sacajja tvaṁ, devate, taṁ bhikkhuṁ jīvitā voropeyyāsi, bahuñca tvaṁ, devate, apuññaṁ pasaveyyāsi. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc11:1.16
Pali: Gaccha tvaṁ, devate, amukasmiṁ okāse rukkho vivitto tasmiṁ upagacchā”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc11:1.17
Pali: Manussā ujjhāyanti khiyyanti vipācenti—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc11:1.18
Pali: “kathañhi nāma samaṇā sakyaputtiyā rukkhaṁ chindissantipi chedāpessantipi ekindriyaṁ samaṇā sakyaputtiyā jīvaṁ viheṭhentī”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc11:1.19
Pali: Assosuṁ kho bhikkhū tesaṁ manussānaṁ ujjhāyantānaṁ khiyyantānaṁ vipācentānaṁ. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc11:1.20
Pali: Ye te bhikkhū appicchā …pe… te ujjhāyanti khiyyanti vipācenti—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc11:1.21
Pali: “kathañhi nāma āḷavakā bhikkhū rukkhaṁ chindissantipi chedāpessantipī”ti …pe… 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc11:1.22
Pali: “saccaṁ kira tumhe, bhikkhave, rukkhaṁ chindathāpi chedāpethāpī”ti? 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc11:1.23
Pali: “Saccaṁ, bhagavā”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc11:1.24
Pali: Vigarahi buddho bhagavā …pe… 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc11:1.25
Pali: kathañhi nāma tumhe, moghapurisā, rukkhaṁ chindissathāpi, chedāpessathāpi. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc11:1.26
Pali: Jīvasaññino hi, moghapurisā, manussā rukkhasmiṁ. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc11:1.27
Pali: Netaṁ, moghapurisā, appasannānaṁ vā pasādāya …pe… 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc11:1.28
Pali: evañca pana, bhikkhave, imaṁ sikkhāpadaṁ uddiseyyātha—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc11:1.29.1
Pali: “Bhūtagāmapātabyatāya pācittiyan”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc11:2.1.1
Pali: Bhūtagāmo nāma 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc11:2.1.2
Pali: pañca bījajātāni— mūlabījaṁ, khandhabījaṁ, phaḷubījaṁ, aggabījaṁ, bījabījameva pañcamaṁ. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc11:2.1.3
Pali: Mūlabījaṁ nāma—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc11:2.1.4
Pali: haliddi, siṅgiveraṁ, vacā, vacattaṁ, ativisā, kaṭukarohiṇī, usīraṁ, bhaddamuttakaṁ, yāni vā panaññānipi atthi mūle jāyanti, mūle sañjāyanti, etaṁ mūlabījaṁ nāma. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc11:2.1.5
Pali: Khandhabījaṁ nāma—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc11:2.1.6
Pali: assattho, nigrodho, pilakkho, udumbaro, kacchako, kapitthano, yāni vā panaññānipi atthi khandhe jāyanti, khandhe sañjāyanti, etaṁ khandhabījaṁ nāma. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc11:2.1.7
Pali: Phaḷubījaṁ nāma—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc11:2.1.8
Pali: ucchu, veḷu, naḷo, yāni vā panaññānipi atthi pabbe jāyanti, pabbe sañjāyanti, etaṁ phaḷubījaṁ nāma. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc11:2.1.9
Pali: Aggabījaṁ nāma—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc11:2.1.10
Pali: ajjukaṁ, phaṇijjakaṁ, hiriveraṁ, yāni vā panaññānipi atthi agge jāyanti, agge sañjāyanti, etaṁ aggabījaṁ nāma. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc11:2.1.11
Pali: Bījabījaṁ nāma—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc11:2.1.12
Pali: pubbaṇṇaṁ, aparaṇṇaṁ, yāni vā panaññānipi atthi bīje jāyanti, bīje sañjāyanti, etaṁ bījabījaṁ nāma. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc11:2.2.1
Pali: Bīje bījasaññī chindati vā chedāpeti vā, bhindati vā bhedāpeti vā, pacati vā pacāpeti vā, āpatti pācittiyassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc11:2.2.2
Pali: Bīje vematiko chindati vā chedāpeti vā, bhindati vā bhedāpeti vā, pacati vā pacāpeti vā, āpatti dukkaṭassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc11:2.2.3
Pali: Bīje abījasaññī chindati vā chedāpeti vā, bhindati vā bhedāpeti vā, pacati vā pacāpeti vā, anāpatti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc11:2.2.4
Pali: Abīje bījasaññī āpatti dukkaṭassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc11:2.2.5
Pali: Abīje vematiko, āpatti dukkaṭassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc11:2.2.6
Pali: Abīje abījasaññī, anāpatti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc11:2.3.1
Pali: Anāpatti—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc11:2.3.2
Pali: “imaṁ jāna, imaṁ dehi, imaṁ āhara, iminā attho, imaṁ kappiyaṁ karohī”ti bhaṇati, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc11:2.3.3
Pali: asañcicca, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc11:2.3.4
Pali: assatiyā, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc11:2.3.5
Pali: ajānantassa, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc11:2.3.6
Pali: ummattakassa, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc11:2.3.7
Pali: ādikammikassāti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc11:2.3.8
Pali: Bhūtagāmasikkhāpadaṁ niṭṭhitaṁ paṭhamaṁ.

Pali: 12. Aññavādakasikkhāpada 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc12:1.1

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc12:1.2
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena āyasmā channo anācāraṁ ācaritvā saṅghamajjhe āpattiyā anuyuñjīyamāno aññenaññaṁ paṭicarati—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc12:1.12

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc12:1.16

Pali: Evañca pana, bhikkhave, ropetabbaṁ. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc12:1.18
Pali: Byattena bhikkhunā paṭibalena saṅgho ñāpetabbo—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc12:1.19

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc12:1.20
Pali: Ayaṁ channo bhikkhu saṅghamajjhe āpattiyā anuyuñjīyamāno aññenaññaṁ paṭicarati. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc12:1.21
Pali: Yadi saṅghassa pattakallaṁ, saṅgho channassa bhikkhuno aññavādakaṁ ropeyya. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc12:1.22
Pali: Esā ñatti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc12:1.23
Pali: Suṇātu me, bhante, saṅgho. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc12:1.24
Pali: Ayaṁ channo bhikkhu saṅghamajjhe āpattiyā anuyuñjīyamāno aññenaññaṁ paṭicarati. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc12:1.25
Pali: Saṅgho channassa bhikkhuno aññavādakaṁ ropeti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc12:1.26
Pali: Yassāyasmato khamati channassa bhikkhuno aññavādakassa ropanā, so tuṇhassa; 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc12:1.27
Pali: yassa nakkhamati, so bhāseyya. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc12:1.28
Pali: Ropitaṁ saṅghena channassa bhikkhuno aññavādakaṁ. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc12:1.29
Pali: Khamati saṅghassa, tasmā tuṇhī, evametaṁ dhārayāmī’”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc12:1.30
Pali: Atha kho bhagavā āyasmantaṁ channaṁ anekapariyāyena vigarahitvā dubbharatāya …pe… 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc12:1.31
Pali: evañca pana, bhikkhave, imaṁ sikkhāpadaṁ uddiseyyātha—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc12:1.32.1
Pali: “Aññavādake pācittiyan”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc12:1.33
Pali: Evañcidaṁ bhagavatā bhikkhūnaṁ sikkhāpadaṁ paññattaṁ hoti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc12:2.1
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena āyasmā channo saṅghamajjhe āpattiyā anuyuñjīyamāno aññenaññaṁ paṭicaranto—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc12:2.2
Pali: “āpattiṁ āpajjissāmī”ti tuṇhībhūto saṅghaṁ viheseti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc12:2.3
Pali: Ye te bhikkhū appicchā …pe… te ujjhāyanti khiyyanti vipācenti—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc12:2.4
Pali: “kathañhi nāma āyasmā channo saṅghamajjhe āpattiyā anuyuñjīyamāno tuṇhībhūto saṅghaṁ vihesessatī”ti …pe… 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc12:2.5
Pali: “saccaṁ kira tvaṁ, channa, saṅghamajjhe āpattiyā anuyuñjīyamāno tuṇhībhūto saṅghaṁ vihesesī”ti? 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc12:2.6
Pali: “Saccaṁ, bhagavā”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc12:2.7
Pali: Vigarahi buddho bhagavā …pe… 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc12:2.8
Pali: kathañhi nāma tvaṁ, moghapurisa, saṅghamajjhe āpattiyā anuyuñjīyamāno tuṇhībhūto saṅghaṁ vihesessasi. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc12:2.9
Pali: Netaṁ, moghapurisa, appasannānaṁ vā pasādāya …pe… 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc12:2.10
Pali: vigarahitvā …pe… 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc12:2.11
Pali: dhammiṁ kathaṁ katvā bhikkhū āmantesi—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc12:2.12
Pali: “tena hi, bhikkhave, saṅgho channassa bhikkhuno vihesakaṁ ropetu. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc12:2.13
Pali: Evañca pana, bhikkhave, ropetabbaṁ. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc12:2.14
Pali: Byattena bhikkhunā paṭibalena saṅgho ñāpetabbo—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc12:2.15
Pali: ‘Suṇātu me, bhante, saṅgho. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc12:2.16
Pali: Ayaṁ channo bhikkhu saṅghamajjhe āpattiyā anuyuñjīyamāno tuṇhībhūto saṅghaṁ viheseti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc12:2.17
Pali: Yadi saṅghassa pattakallaṁ, saṅgho channassa bhikkhuno vihesakaṁ ropeyya. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc12:2.18
Pali: Esā ñatti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc12:2.19
Pali: Suṇātu me, bhante, saṅgho. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc12:2.20
Pali: Ayaṁ channo bhikkhu saṅghamajjhe āpattiyā anuyuñjīyamāno tuṇhībhūto saṅghaṁ viheseti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc12:2.21
Pali: Saṅgho channassa bhikkhuno vihesakaṁ ropeti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc12:2.22
Pali: Yassāyasmato khamati channassa bhikkhuno vihesakassa ropanā, so tuṇhassa; 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc12:2.23
Pali: yassa nakkhamati, so bhāseyya. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc12:2.24
Pali: Ropitaṁ saṅghena channassa bhikkhuno vihesakaṁ. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc12:2.25
Pali: Khamati saṅghassa, tasmā tuṇhī, evametaṁ dhārayāmī’”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc12:2.26
Pali: Atha kho bhagavā āyasmantaṁ channaṁ anekapariyāyena vigarahitvā dubbharatāya …pe… 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc12:2.27
Pali: evañca pana, bhikkhave, imaṁ sikkhāpadaṁ uddiseyyātha—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc12:2.28.1
Pali: “Aññavādake vihesake pācittiyan”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc12:3.1.1
Pali: Aññavādako nāma 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc12:3.1.2
Pali: saṅghamajjhe vatthusmiṁ vā āpattiyā vā anuyuñjīyamāno taṁ na kathetukāmo taṁ na ugghāṭetukāmo aññenaññaṁ paṭicarati— “ko āpanno, kiṁ āpanno, kismiṁ āpanno, kathaṁ āpanno, kaṁ bhaṇatha, kiṁ bhaṇathā”ti. Eso aññavādako nāma. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc12:3.1.3
Pali: Vihesako nāma 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc12:3.1.4
Pali: saṅghamajjhe vatthusmiṁ vā āpattiyā vā anuyuñjīyamāno taṁ na kathetukāmo taṁ na ugghāṭetukāmo tuṇhībhūto saṅghaṁ viheseti. Eso vihesako nāma. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc12:3.1.5.1
Pali: Aropite aññavādake saṅghamajjhe vatthusmiṁ vā āpattiyā vā anuyuñjīyamāno taṁ na kathetukāmo taṁ na ugghāṭetukāmo aññenaññaṁ paṭicarati—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc12:3.1.6
Pali: “ko āpanno, kiṁ āpanno, kismiṁ āpanno, kathaṁ āpanno, kaṁ bhaṇatha, kiṁ bhaṇathā”ti, āpatti dukkaṭassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc12:3.1.7
Pali: Aropite vihesake saṅghamajjhe vatthusmiṁ vā āpattiyā vā anuyuñjīyamāno taṁ na kathetukāmo taṁ na ugghāṭetukāmo tuṇhībhūto saṅghaṁ viheseti, āpatti dukkaṭassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc12:3.1.8
Pali: Ropite aññavādake saṅghamajjhe vatthusmiṁ vā āpattiyā vā anuyuñjīyamāno taṁ na kathetukāmo taṁ na ugghāṭetukāmo aññenaññaṁ paṭicarati—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc12:3.1.9
Pali: “ko āpanno, kiṁ āpanno, kismiṁ āpanno, kathaṁ āpanno, kaṁ bhaṇatha, kiṁ bhaṇathā”ti, āpatti pācittiyassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc12:3.1.10
Pali: Ropite vihesake saṅghamajjhe vatthusmiṁ vā āpattiyā vā anuyuñjīyamāno taṁ na kathetukāmo taṁ na ugghāṭetukāmo tuṇhībhūto saṅghaṁ viheseti, āpatti pācittiyassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc12:3.2.1
Pali: Dhammakamme dhammakammasaññī aññavādake vihesake, āpatti pācittiyassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc12:3.2.2
Pali: Dhammakamme vematiko aññavādake vihesake, āpatti pācittiyassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc12:3.2.3
Pali: Dhammakamme adhammakammasaññī aññavādake vihesake, āpatti pācittiyassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc12:3.2.4
Pali: Adhammakamme dhammakammasaññī, āpatti dukkaṭassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc12:3.2.5
Pali: Adhammakamme vematiko, āpatti dukkaṭassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc12:3.2.6
Pali: Adhammakamme adhammakammasaññī, āpatti dukkaṭassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc12:3.3.1
Pali: Anāpatti—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc12:3.3.2
Pali: ajānanto pucchati, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc12:3.3.3
Pali: gilāno vā na katheti; 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc12:3.3.4
Pali: “saṅghassa bhaṇḍanaṁ vā kalaho vā viggaho vā vivādo vā bhavissatī”ti na katheti; 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc12:3.3.5
Pali: “saṅghabhedo vā saṅgharāji vā bhavissatī”ti na katheti; 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc12:3.3.6
Pali: “adhammena vā vaggena vā nakammārahassa vā kammaṁ karissatī”ti na katheti; 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc12:3.3.7
Pali: ummattakassa, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc12:3.3.8
Pali: ādikammikassāti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc12:3.3.9
Pali: Aññavādakasikkhāpadaṁ niṭṭhitaṁ dutiyaṁ.

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc13:0.5
Pali: 13. Ujjhāpanakasikkhāpada 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc13:1.1
Pali: Tena samayena buddho bhagavā rājagahe viharati veḷuvane kalandakanivāpe. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc13:1.2
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena āyasmā dabbo mallaputto saṅghassa senāsanañca paññapeti bhattāni ca uddisati. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc13:1.3
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena mettiyabhūmajakā bhikkhū navakā ceva honti appapuññā ca. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc13:1.4
Pali: Yāni saṅghassa lāmakāni senāsanāni tāni tesaṁ pāpuṇanti lāmakāni ca bhattāni. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc13:1.5
Pali: Te āyasmantaṁ dabbaṁ mallaputtaṁ bhikkhū ujjhāpenti—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc13:1.6
Pali: “chandāya dabbo mallaputto senāsanaṁ paññapeti, chandāya ca bhattāni uddisatī”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc13:1.7
Pali: Ye te bhikkhū appicchā …pe… te ujjhāyanti khiyyanti vipācenti—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc13:1.8
Pali: “kathañhi nāma mettiyabhūmajakā bhikkhū āyasmantaṁ dabbaṁ mallaputtaṁ bhikkhū ujjhāpessantī”ti …pe… 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc13:1.9
Pali: “saccaṁ kira tumhe, bhikkhave, dabbaṁ mallaputtaṁ bhikkhū ujjhāpethā”ti? 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc13:1.10
Pali: “Saccaṁ, bhagavā”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc13:1.11
Pali: Vigarahi buddho bhagavā …pe… 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc13:1.12
Pali: kathañhi nāma tumhe, moghapurisā, dabbaṁ mallaputtaṁ bhikkhū ujjhāpessatha. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc13:1.13
Pali: Netaṁ, moghapurisā, appasannānaṁ vā pasādāya …pe… 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc13:1.14
Pali: evañca pana, bhikkhave, imaṁ sikkhāpadaṁ uddiseyyātha—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc13:1.15.1
Pali: “Ujjhāpanake pācittiyan”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc13:1.16
Pali: Evañcidaṁ bhagavatā bhikkhūnaṁ sikkhāpadaṁ paññattaṁ hoti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc13:2.1
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena mettiyabhūmajakā bhikkhū—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc13:2.2
Pali: “‘bhagavatā ujjhāpanakaṁ paṭikkhittan’ti ‘ettāvatā bhikkhū sossantī’”ti bhikkhūnaṁ sāmantā āyasmantaṁ dabbaṁ mallaputtaṁ khiyyanti—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc13:2.3
Pali: “chandāya dabbo mallaputto senāsanaṁ paññapeti, chandāya ca bhattāni uddisatī”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc13:2.4
Pali: Ye te bhikkhū appicchā …pe… te ujjhāyanti khiyyanti vipācenti—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc13:2.5
Pali: “kathañhi nāma mettiyabhūmajakā bhikkhū āyasmantaṁ dabbaṁ mallaputtaṁ khiyyissantī”ti …pe… 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc13:2.6
Pali: “saccaṁ kira tumhe, bhikkhave, dabbaṁ mallaputtaṁ khiyyathā”ti? 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc13:2.7
Pali: “Saccaṁ, bhagavā”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc13:2.8
Pali: Vigarahi buddho bhagavā …pe… 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc13:2.9
Pali: kathañhi nāma tumhe, moghapurisā, dabbaṁ mallaputtaṁ khiyyissatha. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc13:2.10
Pali: Netaṁ, moghapurisā, appasannānaṁ vā pasādāya …pe… 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc13:2.11
Pali: evañca pana, bhikkhave, imaṁ sikkhāpadaṁ uddiseyyātha—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc13:2.12.1
Pali: “Ujjhāpanake khiyyanake pācittiyan”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc13:3.1.1
Pali: Ujjhāpanakaṁ nāma 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc13:3.1.2
Pali: upasampannaṁ saṅghena sammataṁ senāsanapaññāpakaṁ vā bhattuddesakaṁ vā yāgubhājakaṁ vā phalabhājakaṁ vā khajjabhājakaṁ vā appamattakavissajjakaṁ vā avaṇṇaṁ kattukāmo, ayasaṁ kattukāmo, maṅkukattukāmo, upasampannaṁ ujjhāpeti vā khiyyati vā, āpatti pācittiyassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc13:3.1.3.1
Pali: Dhammakamme dhammakammasaññī ujjhāpanake khiyyanake āpatti pācittiyassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc13:3.1.4
Pali: Dhammakamme vematiko ujjhāpanake khiyyanake āpatti pācittiyassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc13:3.1.5
Pali: Dhammakamme adhammakammasaññī ujjhāpanake khiyyanake āpatti pācittiyassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc13:3.2.1
Pali: Anupasampannaṁ ujjhāpeti vā khiyyati vā, āpatti dukkaṭassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc13:3.2.2
Pali: Upasampannaṁ saṅghena asammataṁ senāsanapaññāpakaṁ vā bhattuddesakaṁ vā yāgubhājakaṁ vā phalabhājakaṁ vā khajjabhājakaṁ vā appamattakavissajjakaṁ vā avaṇṇaṁ kattukāmo, ayasaṁ kattukāmo, maṅkukattukāmo, upasampannaṁ vā anupasampannaṁ vā ujjhāpeti vā khiyyati vā, āpatti dukkaṭassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc13:3.2.3
Pali: Anupasampannaṁ saṅghena sammataṁ vā asammataṁ vā senāsanapaññāpakaṁ vā bhattuddesakaṁ vā yāgubhājakaṁ vā phalabhājakaṁ vā khajjabhājakaṁ vā appamattakavissajjakaṁ vā avaṇṇaṁ kattukāmo, ayasaṁ kattukāmo, maṅkukattukāmo, upasampannaṁ vā anupasampannaṁ vā ujjhāpeti vā khiyyati vā, āpatti dukkaṭassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc13:3.2.4
Pali: Adhammakamme dhammakammasaññī, āpatti dukkaṭassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc13:3.2.5
Pali: Adhammakamme vematiko, āpatti dukkaṭassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc13:3.2.6
Pali: Adhammakamme adhammakammasaññī āpatti dukkaṭassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc13:3.3.1
Pali: Anāpatti—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc13:3.3.2
Pali: pakatiyā chandā dosā mohā bhayā karontaṁ ujjhāpeti vā khiyyati vā, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc13:3.3.3
Pali: ummattakassa, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc13:3.3.4
Pali: ādikammikassāti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc13:3.3.5
Pali: Ujjhāpanakasikkhāpadaṁ niṭṭhitaṁ tatiyaṁ.

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc14:0.1
Pali: Theravāda Vinaya 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc14:0.2
Pali: Mahāvibhaṅga 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc14:0.3

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc14:0.4
Pali: Bhūtagāmavagga 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc14:0.5
Pali: 14. Senāsanasikkhāpada 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc14:1.1.1
Pali: Tena samayena buddho bhagavā sāvatthiyaṁ viharati jetavane anāthapiṇḍikassa ārāme. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc14:1.1.2
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena bhikkhū hemantike kāle ajjhokāse senāsanaṁ paññapetvā kāyaṁ otāpentā kāle ārocite taṁ pakkamantā neva uddhariṁsu na uddharāpesuṁ, anāpucchā pakkamiṁsu. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc14:1.1.3
Pali: Senāsanaṁ ovaṭṭhaṁ hoti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc14:1.1.4
Pali: Ye te bhikkhū appicchā …pe… te ujjhāyanti khiyyanti vipācenti—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc14:1.1.5
Pali: “kathaṁ hi nāma bhikkhū ajjhokāse senāsanaṁ paññapetvā taṁ pakkamantā neva uddharissanti na uddharāpessanti, anāpucchā pakkamissanti, senāsanaṁ ovaṭṭhan”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc14:1.1.6
Pali: Atha kho te bhikkhū te anekapariyāyena vigarahitvā bhagavato etamatthaṁ ārocesuṁ …pe… 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc14:1.1.7
Pali: “saccaṁ kira, bhikkhave, bhikkhū ajjhokāse …pe… 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc14:1.1.8
Pali: evañca pana, bhikkhave, imaṁ sikkhāpadaṁ uddiseyyātha—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc14:1.1.9.1
Pali: “Yo pana bhikkhu saṅghikaṁ mañcaṁ vā pīṭhaṁ vā bhisiṁ vā kocchaṁ vā ajjhokāse santharitvā vā santharāpetvā vā taṁ pakkamanto neva uddhareyya na uddharāpeyya, anāpucchaṁ vā gaccheyya, pācittiyan”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc14:1.1.10
Pali: Evañcidaṁ bhagavatā bhikkhūnaṁ sikkhāpadaṁ paññattaṁ hoti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc14:1.2.1
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena bhikkhū ajjhokāse vasitvā kālasseva senāsanaṁ abhiharanti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc14:1.2.2
Pali: Addasā kho bhagavā te bhikkhū kālasseva senāsanaṁ abhiharante. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc14:1.2.3
Pali: Disvāna etasmiṁ nidāne etasmiṁ pakaraṇe dhammiṁ kathaṁ katvā bhikkhū āmantesi—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc14:1.2.4
Pali: “anujānāmi, bhikkhave, aṭṭha māse avassikasaṅkete maṇḍape vā rukkhamūle vā yattha kākā vā kulalā vā na ūhadanti tattha senāsanaṁ nikkhipitun”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc14:2.1.1
Pali: Yo panāti 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc14:2.1.2
Pali: yo yādiso …pe… 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc14:2.1.3
Pali: bhikkhūti 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc14:2.1.4
Pali: …pe… ayaṁ imasmiṁ atthe adhippeto bhikkhūti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc14:2.1.5
Pali: Saṅghikaṁ nāma 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc14:2.1.6
Pali: saṅghassa dinnaṁ hoti pariccattaṁ. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc14:2.1.7
Pali: Mañco nāma 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc14:2.1.8
Pali: cattāro mañcā—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc14:2.1.9
Pali: masārako, bundikābaddho, kuḷīrapādako, āhaccapādako. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc14:2.1.10
Pali: Pīṭhaṁ nāma 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc14:2.1.11
Pali: cattāri pīṭhāni— masārakaṁ, bundikābaddhaṁ, kuḷīrapādakaṁ, āhaccapādakaṁ. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc14:2.1.12
Pali: Bhisi nāma 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc14:2.1.13
Pali: pañca bhisiyo— uṇṇabhisi, coḷabhisi, vākabhisi, tiṇabhisi, paṇṇabhisi. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc14:2.1.14
Pali: Kocchaṁ nāma—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc14:2.1.15
Pali: vākamayaṁ vā usīramayaṁ vā muñjamayaṁ vā pabbajamayaṁ vā anto saṁveṭhetvā baddhaṁ hoti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc14:2.1.16
Pali: Santharitvāti 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc14:2.1.17
Pali: sayaṁ santharitvā. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc14:2.1.18
Pali: Santharāpetvāti 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc14:2.1.19
Pali: aññaṁ santharāpetvā. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc14:2.1.20
Pali: Anupasampannaṁ santharāpeti, tassa palibodho. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc14:2.1.21
Pali: Upasampannaṁ santharāpeti, santhārakassa palibodho. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc14:2.1.22
Pali: Taṁ pakkamanto neva uddhareyyāti 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc14:2.1.23
Pali: na sayaṁ uddhareyya. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc14:2.1.24
Pali: Na uddharāpeyyāti 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc14:2.1.25
Pali: na aññaṁ uddharāpeyya. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc14:2.1.26
Pali: Anāpucchaṁ vā gaccheyyāti 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc14:2.1.27
Pali: bhikkhuṁ vā sāmaṇeraṁ vā ārāmikaṁ vā anāpucchā majjhimassa purisassa leḍḍupātaṁ atikkamantassa āpatti pācittiyassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc14:2.2.1
Pali: Saṅghike saṅghikasaññī ajjhokāse santharitvā vā santharāpetvā vā taṁ pakkamanto neva uddhareyya na uddharāpeyya anāpucchaṁ vā gaccheyya, āpatti pācittiyassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc14:2.2.2
Pali: Saṅghike vematiko …pe… 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc14:2.2.3
Pali: saṅghike puggalikasaññī ajjhokāse santharitvā vā santharāpetvā vā taṁ pakkamanto neva uddhareyya na uddharāpeyya, anāpucchaṁ vā gaccheyya, āpatti pācittiyassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc14:2.2.4
Pali: Cimilikaṁ vā uttarattharaṇaṁ vā bhūmattharaṇaṁ vā taṭṭikaṁ vā cammakhaṇḍaṁ vā pādapuñchaniṁ vā phalakapīṭhaṁ vā ajjhokāse santharitvā vā santharāpetvā vā taṁ pakkamanto neva uddhareyya na uddharāpeyya, anāpucchaṁ vā gaccheyya, āpatti dukkaṭassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc14:2.2.5
Pali: Puggalike saṅghikasaññī, āpatti dukkaṭassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc14:2.2.6
Pali: Puggalike vematiko, āpatti dukkaṭassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc14:2.2.7
Pali: Puggalike puggalikasaññī aññassa puggalike, āpatti dukkaṭassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc14:2.2.8
Pali: Attano puggalike anāpatti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc14:2.3.1
Pali: Anāpatti—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc14:2.3.2
Pali: uddharitvā gacchati, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc14:2.3.3
Pali: uddharāpetvā gacchati, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc14:2.3.4
Pali: āpucchaṁ gacchati, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc14:2.3.5
Pali: otāpento gacchati, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc14:2.3.6
Pali: kenaci palibuddhaṁ hoti, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc14:2.3.7
Pali: āpadāsu, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc14:2.3.8
Pali: ummattakassa, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc14:2.3.9
Pali: ādikammikassāti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc14:2.3.10
Pali: Senāsanasikkhāpadaṁ niṭṭhitaṁ catutthaṁ.

Pali: Bhūtagāmavagga 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc15:0.5
Pali: 15. Dutiyasenāsanasikkhāpada 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc15:1.1
Pali: Tena samayena buddho bhagavā sāvatthiyaṁ viharati jetavane anāthapiṇḍikassa ārāme. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc15:1.2
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena sattarasavaggiyā bhikkhū sahāyakā honti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc15:1.3
Pali: Te vasantāpi ekatova vasanti, pakkamantāpi ekatova pakkamanti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc15:1.4
Pali: Te aññatarasmiṁ saṅghike vihāre seyyaṁ santharitvā taṁ pakkamantā neva uddhariṁsu na uddharāpesuṁ, anāpucchā pakkamiṁsu. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc15:1.5
Pali: Senāsanaṁ upacikāhi khāyitaṁ hoti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc15:1.6
Pali: Ye te bhikkhū appicchā …pe… te ujjhāyanti khiyyanti vipācenti—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc15:1.7
Pali: “kathañhi nāma sattarasavaggiyā bhikkhū saṅghike vihāre seyyaṁ santharitvā taṁ pakkamantā neva uddharissanti na uddharāpessanti, anāpucchā pakkamissanti, senāsanaṁ upacikāhi khāyitan”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc15:1.8
Pali: Atha kho te bhikkhū sattarasavaggiye bhikkhū anekapariyāyena vigarahitvā bhagavato etamatthaṁ ārocesuṁ …pe… 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc15:1.9
Pali: “saccaṁ kira, bhikkhave, sattarasavaggiyā bhikkhū saṅghike vihāre seyyaṁ santharitvā taṁ pakkamantā neva uddhariṁsu na uddharāpesuṁ, anāpucchā pakkamiṁsu, senāsanaṁ upacikāhi khāyitan”ti? 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc15:1.10
Pali: “Saccaṁ, bhagavā”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc15:1.11
Pali: Vigarahi buddho bhagavā …pe… 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc15:1.12
Pali: kathañhi nāma te, bhikkhave, moghapurisā saṅghike vihāre seyyaṁ santharitvā taṁ pakkamantā neva uddharissanti na uddharāpessanti, anāpucchā pakkamissanti, senāsanaṁ upacikāhi khāyitaṁ. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc15:1.13
Pali: Netaṁ, bhikkhave, appasannānaṁ vā pasādāya …pe… 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc15:1.14
Pali: evañca pana, bhikkhave, imaṁ sikkhāpadaṁ uddiseyyātha—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc15:1.15.1
Pali: “Yo pana bhikkhu saṅghike vihāre seyyaṁ santharitvā vā santharāpetvā vā taṁ pakkamanto neva uddhareyya na uddharāpeyya, anāpucchaṁ vā gaccheyya, pācittiyan”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc15:2.1.1
Pali: Yo panāti 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc15:2.1.2
Pali: yo yādiso …pe… 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc15:2.1.3
Pali: bhikkhūti 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc15:2.1.4
Pali: …pe… ayaṁ imasmiṁ atthe adhippeto bhikkhūti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc15:2.1.5
Pali: Saṅghiko nāma vihāro 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc15:2.1.6
Pali: saṅghassa dinno hoti pariccatto. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc15:2.1.7
Pali: Seyyaṁ nāma 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc15:2.1.8
Pali: bhisi, cimilikā uttarattharaṇaṁ, bhūmattharaṇaṁ, taṭṭikā, cammakhaṇḍo, nisīdanaṁ, paccattharaṇaṁ, tiṇasanthāro, paṇṇasanthāro. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc15:2.1.9
Pali: Santharitvāti 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc15:2.1.10
Pali: sayaṁ santharitvā. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc15:2.1.11
Pali: Santharāpetvāti 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc15:2.1.12
Pali: aññaṁ santharāpetvā. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc15:2.1.13
Pali: Taṁ pakkamanto neva uddhareyyāti 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc15:2.1.14
Pali: na sayaṁ uddhareyya. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc15:2.1.15
Pali: Na uddharāpeyyāti 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc15:2.1.16
Pali: na aññaṁ uddharāpeyya. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc15:2.1.17
Pali: Anāpucchaṁ vā gaccheyyāti 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc15:2.1.18
Pali: bhikkhuṁ vā sāmaṇeraṁ vā ārāmikaṁ vā anāpucchā parikkhittassa ārāmassa parikkhepaṁ atikkamantassa āpatti pācittiyassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc15:2.1.19
Pali: Aparikkhittassa ārāmassa upacāraṁ atikkamantassa āpatti pācittiyassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc15:2.2.1
Pali: Saṅghike saṅghikasaññī seyyaṁ santharitvā vā santharāpetvā vā taṁ pakkamanto neva uddhareyya na uddharāpeyya, anāpucchaṁ vā gaccheyya, āpatti pācittiyassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc15:2.2.2
Pali: Saṅghike vematiko seyyaṁ santharitvā vā santharāpetvā vā taṁ pakkamanto neva uddhareyya na uddharāpeyya, anāpucchaṁ vā gaccheyya, āpatti pācittiyassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc15:2.2.3
Pali: Saṅghike puggalikasaññī seyyaṁ santharitvā vā santharāpetvā vā taṁ pakkamanto neva uddhareyya na uddharāpeyya, anāpucchaṁ vā gaccheyya, āpatti pācittiyassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc15:2.2.4
Pali: Vihārassa upacāre vā upaṭṭhānasālāyaṁ vā maṇḍape vā rukkhamūle vā seyyaṁ santharitvā vā santharāpetvā vā taṁ pakkamanto neva uddhareyya na uddharāpeyya, anāpucchaṁ vā gaccheyya, āpatti dukkaṭassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc15:2.2.5
Pali: Mañcaṁ vā pīṭhaṁ vā vihāre vā vihārassūpacāre vā upaṭṭhānasālāyaṁ vā maṇḍape vā rukkhamūle vā santharitvā vā santharāpetvā vā taṁ pakkamanto neva uddhareyya na uddharāpeyya, anāpucchaṁ vā gaccheyya, āpatti dukkaṭassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc15:2.2.6
Pali: Puggalike saṅghikasaññī, āpatti dukkaṭassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc15:2.2.7
Pali: Puggalike vematiko, āpatti dukkaṭassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc15:2.2.8
Pali: Puggalike puggalikasaññī aññassa puggalike āpatti dukkaṭassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc15:2.2.9
Pali: Attano puggalike anāpatti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc15:2.3.1
Pali: Anāpatti—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc15:2.3.2
Pali: uddharitvā gacchati, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc15:2.3.3
Pali: uddharāpetvā gacchati, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc15:2.3.4
Pali: āpucchaṁ gacchati, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc15:2.3.5
Pali: kenaci palibuddhaṁ hoti, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc15:2.3.6
Pali: sāpekkho gantvā tattha ṭhito āpucchati, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc15:2.3.7
Pali: kenaci palibuddho hoti, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc15:2.3.8
Pali: āpadāsu, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc15:2.3.9
Pali: ummattakassa, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc15:2.3.10
Pali: ādikammikassāti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc15:2.3.11
Pali: Dutiyasenāsanasikkhāpadaṁ niṭṭhitaṁ pañcamaṁ.

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc16:0.4
Pali: Bhūtagāmavagga 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc16:0.5
Pali: 16. Anupakhajjasikkhāpada 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc16:1.1
Pali: Tena samayena buddho bhagavā sāvatthiyaṁ viharati jetavane anāthapiṇḍikassa ārāme. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc16:1.2
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena chabbaggiyā bhikkhū varaseyyāyo palibundhenti, therā bhikkhū vuṭṭhāpenti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc16:1.3
Pali: Atha kho chabbaggiyānaṁ bhikkhūnaṁ etadahosi—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc16:1.4
Pali: “kena nu kho mayaṁ upāyena idheva vassaṁ vaseyyāmā”ti? 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc16:1.5
Pali: Atha kho chabbaggiyā bhikkhū there bhikkhū anupakhajja seyyaṁ kappenti—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc16:1.6
Pali: “yassa sambādho bhavissati so pakkamissatī”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc16:1.7
Pali: Ye te bhikkhū appicchā …pe… te ujjhāyanti khiyyanti vipācenti—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc16:1.8
Pali: “kathañhi nāma chabbaggiyā bhikkhū there bhikkhū anupakhajja seyyaṁ kappessantī”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc16:1.9
Pali: Atha kho te bhikkhū chabbaggiye bhikkhū anekapariyāyena vigarahitvā bhagavato etamatthaṁ ārocesuṁ …pe… 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc16:1.10
Pali: “saccaṁ kira tumhe, bhikkhave, there bhikkhū anupakhajja seyyaṁ kappethā”ti? 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc16:1.11
Pali: “Saccaṁ, bhagavā”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc16:1.12
Pali: Vigarahi buddho bhagavā …pe… 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc16:1.13
Pali: kathañhi nāma tumhe, moghapurisā, there bhikkhū anupakhajja seyyaṁ kappessatha. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc16:1.14
Pali: Netaṁ, moghapurisā, appasannānaṁ vā pasādāya …pe… 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc16:1.15
Pali: evañca pana, bhikkhave, imaṁ sikkhāpadaṁ uddiseyyātha—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc16:1.16.1
Pali: “Yo pana bhikkhu saṅghike vihāre jānaṁ pubbupagataṁ bhikkhuṁ anupakhajja seyyaṁ kappeyya— yassa sambādho bhavissati so pakkamissatī’ti, etadeva paccayaṁ karitvā anaññaṁ, pācittiyan”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc16:2.1.1
Pali: Yo panāti 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc16:2.1.2
Pali: yo yādiso …pe… 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc16:2.1.3
Pali: bhikkhūti 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc16:2.1.4
Pali: …pe… ayaṁ imasmiṁ atthe adhippeto bhikkhūti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc16:2.1.5
Pali: Saṅghiko nāma vihāro 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc16:2.1.6
Pali: saṅghassa dinno hoti pariccatto. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc16:2.1.7
Pali: Jānāti nāma 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc16:2.1.8
Pali: vuḍḍhoti jānāti, gilānoti jānāti, saṅghena dinnoti jānāti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc16:2.1.9
Pali: Anupakhajjāti 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc16:2.1.10
Pali: anupavisitvā. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc16:2.1.11
Pali: Seyyaṁ kappeyyāti 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc16:2.1.12
Pali: mañcassa vā pīṭhassa vā pavisantassa vā nikkhamantassa vā upacāre seyyaṁ santharati vā santharāpeti vā, āpatti dukkaṭassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc16:2.1.13
Pali: Abhinisīdati vā abhinipajjati vā, āpatti pācittiyassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc16:2.1.14
Pali: Etadeva paccayaṁ karitvā anaññanti 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc16:2.1.15
Pali: na añño koci paccayo hoti anupakhajja seyyaṁ kappetuṁ. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc16:2.2.1
Pali: Saṅghike saṅghikasaññī anupakhajja seyyaṁ kappeti, āpatti pācittiyassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc16:2.2.2
Pali: Saṅghike vematiko anupakhajja seyyaṁ kappeti, āpatti pācittiyassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc16:2.2.3
Pali: Saṅghike puggalikasaññī anupakhajja seyyaṁ kappeti, āpatti pācittiyassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc16:2.2.4
Pali: Mañcassa vā pīṭhassa vā pavisantassa vā nikkhamantassa vā upacāraṁ ṭhapetvā seyyaṁ santharati vā santharāpeti vā, āpatti dukkaṭassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc16:2.2.5
Pali: Abhinisīdati vā abhinipajjati vā, āpatti dukkaṭassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc16:2.2.6
Pali: Vihārassa upacāre vā upaṭṭhānasālāyaṁ vā maṇḍape vā rukkhamūle vā ajjhokāse vā seyyaṁ santharati vā santharāpeti vā, āpatti dukkaṭassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc16:2.2.7
Pali: Abhinisīdati vā abhinipajjati vā, āpatti dukkaṭassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc16:2.2.8
Pali: Puggalike saṅghikasaññī, āpatti dukkaṭassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc16:2.2.9
Pali: Puggalike vematiko, āpatti dukkaṭassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc16:2.2.10
Pali: Puggalike puggalikasaññī aññassa puggalike āpatti dukkaṭassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc16:2.2.11
Pali: Attano puggalike anāpatti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc16:2.3.1
Pali: Anāpatti—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc16:2.3.2
Pali: gilāno pavisati, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc16:2.3.3
Pali: sītena vā uṇhena vā pīḷito pavisati, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc16:2.3.4
Pali: āpadāsu, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc16:2.3.5
Pali: ummattakassa, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc16:2.3.6
Pali: ādikammikassāti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc16:2.3.7
Pali: Anupakhajjasikkhāpadaṁ niṭṭhitaṁ chaṭṭhaṁ.
