Root: root/pli/ms/vinaya/pli-tv-bu-vb/pli-tv-bu-vb-pc/pli-tv-bu-vb-pc17_root-pli-ms.json

Chinese translations: 0

Pali segments

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc17:0.1
Pali: Theravāda Vinaya 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc17:0.2
Pali: Mahāvibhaṅga 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc17:0.3
Pali: Pācittiyakaṇḍa 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc17:0.4
Pali: Bhūtagāmavagga 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc17:0.5
Pali: 17. Nikkaḍḍhanasikkhāpada 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc17:1.1
Pali: Tena samayena buddho bhagavā sāvatthiyaṁ viharati jetavane anāthapiṇḍikassa ārāme. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc17:1.2
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena sattarasavaggiyā bhikkhū aññataraṁ paccantimaṁ mahāvihāraṁ paṭisaṅkharonti—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc17:1.3
Pali: “idha mayaṁ vassaṁ vasissāmā”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc17:1.4
Pali: Addasaṁsu kho chabbaggiyā bhikkhū sattarasavaggiye bhikkhū vihāraṁ paṭisaṅkharonte. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc17:1.5
Pali: Disvāna evamāhaṁsu—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc17:1.6
Pali: “ime, āvuso, sattarasavaggiyā bhikkhū vihāraṁ paṭisaṅkharonti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc17:1.7
Pali: Handa ne vuṭṭhāpessāmā”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc17:1.8
Pali: Ekacce evamāhaṁsu—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc17:1.9
Pali: “āgamethāvuso, yāva paṭisaṅkharonti; paṭisaṅkhate vuṭṭhāpessāmā”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc17:1.10
Pali: Atha kho chabbaggiyā bhikkhū sattarasavaggiye bhikkhū etadavocuṁ—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc17:1.11
Pali: “uṭṭhethāvuso, amhākaṁ vihāro pāpuṇātī”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc17:1.12
Pali: “Nanu, āvuso, paṭikacceva ācikkhitabbaṁ, mayañcaññaṁ paṭisaṅkhareyyāmā”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc17:1.13
Pali: “Nanu, āvuso, saṅghiko vihāro”ti? 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc17:1.14
Pali: “Āmāvuso, saṅghiko vihāro”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc17:1.15
Pali: “Uṭṭhethāvuso, amhākaṁ vihāro pāpuṇātī”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc17:1.16
Pali: “Mahallako, āvuso, vihāro. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc17:1.17
Pali: Tumhepi vasatha, mayampi vasissāmā”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc17:1.18
Pali: “Uṭṭhethāvuso, amhākaṁ vihāro pāpuṇātī”ti kupitā anattamanā gīvāyaṁ gahetvā nikkaḍḍhanti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc17:1.19
Pali: Te nikkaḍḍhīyamānā rodanti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc17:1.20
Pali: Bhikkhū evamāhaṁsu—“kissa tumhe, āvuso, rodathā”ti? 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc17:1.21
Pali: “Ime, āvuso, chabbaggiyā bhikkhū kupitā anattamanā amhe saṅghikā vihārā nikkaḍḍhantī”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc17:1.22
Pali: Ye te bhikkhū appicchā …pe… te ujjhāyanti khiyyanti vipācenti—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc17:1.23
Pali: “kathañhi nāma chabbaggiyā bhikkhū kupitā anattamanā bhikkhū saṅghikā vihārā nikkaḍḍhissantī”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc17:1.24
Pali: Atha kho te bhikkhū chabbaggiye bhikkhū anekapariyāyena vigarahitvā bhagavato etamatthaṁ ārocesuṁ …pe… 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc17:1.25
Pali: “saccaṁ kira tumhe, bhikkhave, kupitā anattamanā bhikkhū saṅghikā vihārā nikkaḍḍhathā”ti? 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc17:1.26
Pali: “Saccaṁ, bhagavā”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc17:1.27
Pali: Vigarahi buddho bhagavā …pe… 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc17:1.28
Pali: kathañhi nāma tumhe, moghapurisā, kupitā anattamanā bhikkhū saṅghikā vihārā nikkaḍḍhissatha? 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc17:1.29
Pali: Netaṁ, moghapurisā, appasannānaṁ vā pasādāya …pe… 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc17:1.30
Pali: evañca pana, bhikkhave, imaṁ sikkhāpadaṁ uddiseyyātha—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc17:1.31.1
Pali: “Yo pana bhikkhu bhikkhuṁ kupito anattamano saṅghikā vihārā nikkaḍḍheyya vā nikkaḍḍhāpeyya vā, pācittiyan”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc17:2.1.1
Pali: Yo panāti 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc17:2.1.2
Pali: yo yādiso …pe… 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc17:2.1.3
Pali: bhikkhūti 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc17:2.1.4
Pali: …pe… ayaṁ imasmiṁ atthe adhippeto bhikkhūti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc17:2.1.5
Pali: Bhikkhunti 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc17:2.1.6
Pali: aññaṁ bhikkhuṁ. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc17:2.1.7
Pali: Kupito anattamanoti 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc17:2.1.8
Pali: anabhiraddho āhatacitto khilajāto. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc17:2.1.9
Pali: Saṅghiko nāma vihāro 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc17:2.1.10
Pali: saṅghassa dinno hoti pariccatto. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc17:2.1.11
Pali: Nikkaḍḍheyyāti 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc17:2.1.12
Pali: gabbhe gahetvā pamukhaṁ nikkaḍḍhati, āpatti pācittiyassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc17:2.1.13
Pali: Pamukhe gahetvā bahi nikkaḍḍhati, āpatti pācittiyassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc17:2.1.14
Pali: Ekena payogena bahukepi dvāre atikkāmeti, āpatti pācittiyassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc17:2.1.15
Pali: Nikkaḍḍhāpeyyāti 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc17:2.1.16
Pali: aññaṁ āṇāpeti, āpatti pācittiyassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc17:2.1.17
Pali: Sakiṁ āṇatto bahukepi dvāre atikkāmeti, āpatti pācittiyassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc17:2.2.1
Pali: Saṅghike saṅghikasaññī kupito anattamano nikkaḍḍhati vā nikkaḍḍhāpeti vā, āpatti pācittiyassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc17:2.2.2
Pali: Saṅghike vematiko kupito anattamano nikkaḍḍhati vā nikkaḍḍhāpeti vā, āpatti pācittiyassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc17:2.2.3
Pali: Saṅghike puggalikasaññī kupito anattamano nikkaḍḍhati vā nikkaḍḍhāpeti vā, āpatti pācittiyassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc17:2.2.4
Pali: Tassa parikkhāraṁ nikkaḍḍhati vā nikkaḍḍhāpeti vā, āpatti dukkaṭassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc17:2.2.5
Pali: Vihārassa upacārā vā upaṭṭhānasālāya vā maṇḍapā vā rukkhamūlā vā ajjhokāsā vā nikkaḍḍhati vā nikkaḍḍhāpeti vā, āpatti dukkaṭassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc17:2.2.6
Pali: Tassa parikkhāraṁ nikkaḍḍhati vā nikkaḍḍhāpeti vā, āpatti dukkaṭassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc17:2.2.7
Pali: Anupasampannaṁ vihārā vā vihārassa upacārā vā upaṭṭhānasālāya vā maṇḍapā vā rukkhamūlā vā ajjhokāsā vā nikkaḍḍhati vā nikkaḍḍhāpeti vā, āpatti dukkaṭassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc17:2.2.8
Pali: Tassa parikkhāraṁ nikkaḍḍhati vā nikkaḍḍhāpeti vā, āpatti dukkaṭassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc17:2.2.9
Pali: Puggalike saṅghikasaññī, āpatti dukkaṭassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc17:2.2.10
Pali: Puggalike vematiko, āpatti dukkaṭassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc17:2.2.11
Pali: Puggalike puggalikasaññī aññassa puggalike āpatti dukkaṭassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc17:2.2.12
Pali: Attano puggalike anāpatti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc17:2.3.1
Pali: Anāpatti—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc17:2.3.2
Pali: alajjiṁ nikkaḍḍhati vā nikkaḍḍhāpeti vā, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc17:2.3.3
Pali: tassa parikkhāraṁ nikkaḍḍhati vā nikkaḍḍhāpeti vā, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc17:2.3.4
Pali: ummattakaṁ nikkaḍḍhati vā nikkaḍḍhāpeti vā, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc17:2.3.5
Pali: tassa parikkhāraṁ nikkaḍḍhati vā nikkaḍḍhāpeti vā, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc17:2.3.6
Pali: bhaṇḍanakārakaṁ kalahakārakaṁ vivādakārakaṁ bhassakārakaṁ saṅghe adhikaraṇakārakaṁ nikkaḍḍhati vā nikkaḍḍhāpeti vā, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc17:2.3.7
Pali: tassa parikkhāraṁ nikkaḍḍhati vā nikkaḍḍhāpeti vā, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc17:2.3.8
Pali: antevāsikaṁ vā saddhivihārikaṁ vā na sammā vattantaṁ nikkaḍḍhati vā nikkaḍḍhāpeti vā, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc17:2.3.9
Pali: tassa parikkhāraṁ nikkaḍḍhati vā nikkaḍḍhāpeti vā, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc17:2.3.10
Pali: ummattakassa, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc17:2.3.11
Pali: ādikammikassāti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc17:2.3.12
Pali: Nikkaḍḍhanasikkhāpadaṁ niṭṭhitaṁ sattamaṁ.

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc18:0.4
Pali: Bhūtagāmavagga 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc18:0.5
Pali: 18. Vehāsakuṭisikkhāpada 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc18:1.1
Pali: Tena samayena buddho bhagavā sāvatthiyaṁ viharati jetavane anāthapiṇḍikassa ārāme. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc18:1.2
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena dve bhikkhū saṅghike vihāre uparivehāsakuṭiyā eko heṭṭhā viharati, eko upari. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc18:1.3
Pali: Uparimo bhikkhu āhaccapādakaṁ mañcaṁ sahasā abhinisīdi. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc18:1.4
Pali: Mañcapādo nippatitvā heṭṭhimassa bhikkhuno matthake avatthāsi. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc18:1.5
Pali: So bhikkhu vissaramakāsi. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc18:1.6
Pali: Bhikkhū upadhāvitvā taṁ bhikkhuṁ etadavocuṁ—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc18:1.7
Pali: “kissa tvaṁ, āvuso, vissaramakāsī”ti? 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc18:1.8
Pali: Atha kho so bhikkhu bhikkhūnaṁ etamatthaṁ ārocesi. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc18:1.9
Pali: Ye te bhikkhū appicchā …pe… te ujjhāyanti khiyyanti vipācenti—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc18:1.10
Pali: “kathañhi nāma bhikkhu saṅghike vihāre uparivehāsakuṭiyā āhaccapādakaṁ mañcaṁ sahasā abhinisīdissatī”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc18:1.11
Pali: Atha kho te bhikkhū taṁ bhikkhuṁ anekapariyāyena vigarahitvā bhagavato etamatthaṁ ārocesuṁ …pe… 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc18:1.12
Pali: “saccaṁ kira tvaṁ, bhikkhu, saṅghike vihāre uparivehāsakuṭiyā āhaccapādakaṁ mañcaṁ sahasā abhinisīdasī”ti? 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc18:1.13
Pali: “Saccaṁ, bhagavā”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc18:1.14
Pali: Vigarahi buddho bhagavā …pe… 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc18:1.15
Pali: kathañhi nāma tvaṁ, moghapurisa, saṅghike vihāre uparivehāsakuṭiyā āhaccapādakaṁ mañcaṁ sahasā abhinisīdissasi. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc18:1.16
Pali: Netaṁ, moghapurisa, appasannānaṁ vā pasādāya …pe… 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc18:1.17
Pali: evañca pana, bhikkhave, imaṁ sikkhāpadaṁ uddiseyyātha—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc18:1.18.1
Pali: “Yo pana bhikkhu saṅghike vihāre uparivehāsakuṭiyā āhaccapādakaṁ mañcaṁ vā pīṭhaṁ vā abhinisīdeyya vā abhinipajjeyya vā, pācittiyan”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc18:2.1.1
Pali: Yo panāti 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc18:2.1.2
Pali: yo yādiso …pe… 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc18:2.1.3
Pali: bhikkhūti 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc18:2.1.4
Pali: …pe… ayaṁ imasmiṁ atthe adhippeto bhikkhūti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc18:2.1.5
Pali: Saṅghiko nāma vihāro 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc18:2.1.6
Pali: saṅghassa dinno hoti pariccatto. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc18:2.1.7
Pali: Vehāsakuṭi nāma 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc18:2.1.8
Pali: majjhimassa purisassa asīsaghaṭṭā. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc18:2.1.9
Pali: Āhaccapādako nāma mañco 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc18:2.1.10
Pali: aṅge vijjhitvā ṭhito hoti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc18:2.1.11
Pali: Āhaccapādakaṁ nāma pīṭhaṁ 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc18:2.1.12
Pali: aṅge vijjhitvā ṭhitaṁ hoti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc18:2.1.13
Pali: Abhinisīdeyyāti 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc18:2.1.14
Pali: tasmiṁ abhinisīdati, āpatti pācittiyassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc18:2.1.15
Pali: Abhinipajjeyyāti 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc18:2.1.16
Pali: tasmiṁ abhinipajjati, āpatti pācittiyassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc18:2.2.1
Pali: Saṅghike saṅghikasaññī uparivehāsakuṭiyā āhaccapādakaṁ mañcaṁ vā pīṭhaṁ vā abhinisīdati vā abhinipajjati vā, āpatti pācittiyassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc18:2.2.2
Pali: Saṅghike vematiko …pe… 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc18:2.2.3
Pali: saṅghike puggalikasaññī uparivehāsakuṭiyā āhaccapādakaṁ mañcaṁ vā pīṭhaṁ vā abhinisīdati vā abhinipajjati vā, āpatti pācittiyassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc18:2.2.4
Pali: Puggalike saṅghikasaññī, āpatti dukkaṭassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc18:2.2.5
Pali: Puggalike vematiko, āpatti dukkaṭassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc18:2.2.6
Pali: Puggalike puggalikasaññī aññassa puggalike, āpatti dukkaṭassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc18:2.2.7
Pali: Attano puggalike, anāpatti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc18:2.3.1
Pali: Anāpatti—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc18:2.3.2
Pali: avehāsakuṭiyā 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc18:2.3.3
Pali: sīsaghaṭṭāya 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc18:2.3.4
Pali: heṭṭhā aparibhogaṁ hoti, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc18:2.3.5
Pali: padarasañcitaṁ hoti, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc18:2.3.6
Pali: paṭāṇi dinnā hoti, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc18:2.3.7
Pali: tasmiṁ ṭhito gaṇhati vā laggeti vā, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc18:2.3.8
Pali: ummattakassa, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc18:2.3.9
Pali: ādikammikassāti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc18:2.3.10
Pali: Vehāsakuṭisikkhāpadaṁ niṭṭhitaṁ aṭṭhamaṁ.

Pali segments

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc19:0.1
Pali: Theravāda Vinaya 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc19:0.2
Pali: Mahāvibhaṅga 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc19:0.3
Pali: Pācittiyakaṇḍa 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc19:0.4
Pali: Bhūtagāmavagga 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc19:0.5
Pali: 19. Mahallakavihārasikkhāpada 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc19:1.1
Pali: Tena samayena buddho bhagavā kosambiyaṁ viharati ghositārāme. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc19:1.2
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena āyasmato channassa upaṭṭhāko mahāmatto āyasmato channassa vihāraṁ kārāpeti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc19:1.3
Pali: Atha kho āyasmā channo katapariyositaṁ vihāraṁ punappunaṁ chādāpeti, punappunaṁ lepāpeti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc19:1.4
Pali: Atibhārito vihāro paripati. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc19:1.5
Pali: Atha kho āyasmā channo tiṇañca kaṭṭhañca saṅkaḍḍhanto aññatarassa brāhmaṇassa yavakhettaṁ dūsesi. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc19:1.6
Pali: Atha kho so brāhmaṇo ujjhāyati khiyyati vipāceti—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc19:1.7
Pali: “kathañhi nāma bhadantā amhākaṁ yavakhettaṁ dūsessantī”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc19:1.8
Pali: Assosuṁ kho bhikkhū tassa brāhmaṇassa ujjhāyantassa khiyyantassa vipācentassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc19:1.9
Pali: Ye te bhikkhū appicchā …pe… te ujjhāyanti khiyyanti vipācenti—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc19:1.10
Pali: “kathañhi nāma āyasmā channo katapariyositaṁ vihāraṁ punappunaṁ chādāpessati, punappunaṁ lepāpessati, atibhārito vihāro paripatī”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc19:1.11
Pali: Atha kho te bhikkhū āyasmantaṁ channaṁ anekapariyāyena vigarahitvā bhagavato etamatthaṁ ārocesuṁ …pe… 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc19:1.12
Pali: “saccaṁ kira tvaṁ, channa, katapariyositaṁ vihāraṁ punappunaṁ chādāpesi, punappunaṁ lepāpesi, atibhārito vihāro paripatī”ti? 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc19:1.13
Pali: “Saccaṁ, bhagavā”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc19:1.14
Pali: Vigarahi buddho bhagavā …pe… 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc19:1.15
Pali: kathañhi nāma tvaṁ, moghapurisa, katapariyositaṁ vihāraṁ punappunaṁ chādāpessasi, punappunaṁ lepāpessasi, atibhārito vihāro paripati. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc19:1.16
Pali: Netaṁ, moghapurisa, appasannānaṁ vā pasādāya …pe… 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc19:1.17
Pali: evañca pana, bhikkhave, imaṁ sikkhāpadaṁ uddiseyyātha—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc19:1.18.1
Pali: “Mahallakaṁ pana bhikkhunā vihāraṁ kārayamānena yāva dvārakosā aggaḷaṭṭhapanāya ālokasandhiparikammāya dvatticchadanassa pariyāyaṁ appaharite ṭhitena adhiṭṭhātabbaṁ. Tato ce uttari appaharitepi ṭhito adhiṭṭhaheyya pācittiyan”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc19:2.1.1
Pali: Mahallako nāma vihāro 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc19:2.1.2
Pali: sassāmiko vuccati. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc19:2.1.3
Pali: Vihāro nāma 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc19:2.1.4
Pali: ullitto vā hoti avalitto vā ullittāvalitto vā. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc19:2.1.5
Pali: Kārayamānenāti 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc19:2.1.6
Pali: karonto vā kārāpento vā. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc19:2.1.7
Pali: Yāva dvārakosāti 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc19:2.1.8
Pali: piṭṭhasaṅghāṭassa samantā hatthapāsā. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc19:2.1.9
Pali: Aggaḷaṭṭhapanāyāti 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc19:2.1.10
Pali: dvāraṭṭhapanāya. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc19:2.1.11
Pali: Ālokasandhiparikammāyāti 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc19:2.1.12
Pali: vātapānaparikammāya setavaṇṇaṁ kāḷavaṇṇaṁ gerukaparikammaṁ mālākammaṁ latākammaṁ makaradantakaṁ pañcapaṭikaṁ. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc19:2.1.13
Pali: Dvatticchadanassa pariyāyaṁ appaharite ṭhitena adhiṭṭhātabbanti—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc19:2.1.14
Pali: haritaṁ nāma pubbaṇṇaṁ aparaṇṇaṁ. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc19:2.1.15
Pali: Sace harite ṭhito adhiṭṭhāti, āpatti dukkaṭassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc19:2.1.16
Pali: Maggena chādentassa dve magge adhiṭṭhahitvā tatiyaṁ maggaṁ āṇāpetvā pakkamitabbaṁ. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc19:2.1.17
Pali: Pariyāyena chādentassa dve pariyāye adhiṭṭhahitvā tatiyaṁ pariyāyaṁ āṇāpetvā pakkamitabbaṁ. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc19:2.1.18
Pali: Tato ce uttari appaharitepi ṭhito adhiṭṭhaheyyāti 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc19:2.1.19
Pali: iṭṭhakāya chādentassa iṭṭhakiṭṭhakāya āpatti pācittiyassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc19:2.1.20
Pali: Silāya chādentassa silāya silāya āpatti pācittiyassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc19:2.1.21
Pali: Sudhāya chādentassa piṇḍe piṇḍe āpatti pācittiyassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc19:2.1.22
Pali: Tiṇena chādentassa karaḷe karaḷe āpatti pācittiyassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc19:2.1.23
Pali: Paṇṇena chādentassa paṇṇe paṇṇe āpatti pācittiyassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc19:2.2.1
Pali: Atirekadvattipariyāye atirekasaññī adhiṭṭhāti, āpatti pācittiyassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc19:2.2.2
Pali: Atirekadvattipariyāye vematiko adhiṭṭhāti, āpatti pācittiyassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc19:2.2.3
Pali: Atirekadvattipariyāye ūnakasaññī adhiṭṭhāti, āpatti pācittiyassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc19:2.2.4
Pali: Ūnakadvattipariyāye atirekasaññī, āpatti dukkaṭassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc19:2.2.5
Pali: Ūnakadvattipariyāye vematiko, āpatti dukkaṭassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc19:2.2.6
Pali: Ūnakadvattipariyāye ūnakasaññī, anāpatti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc19:2.3.1
Pali: Anāpatti—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc19:2.3.2
Pali: dvattipariyāye, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc19:2.3.3
Pali: ūnakadvattipariyāye, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc19:2.3.4
Pali: leṇe, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc19:2.3.5
Pali: guhāya, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc19:2.3.6
Pali: tiṇakuṭikāya, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc19:2.3.7
Pali: aññassatthāya, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc19:2.3.8
Pali: attano dhanena, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc19:2.3.9
Pali: vāsāgāraṁ ṭhapetvā sabbattha anāpatti, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc19:2.3.10
Pali: ummattakassa, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc19:2.3.11
Pali: ādikammikassāti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc19:2.3.12
Pali: Mahallakavihārasikkhāpadaṁ niṭṭhitaṁ navamaṁ.

Pali: 20. Sappāṇakasikkhāpada 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc20:1.1
Pali: Tena samayena buddho bhagavā āḷaviyaṁ viharati aggāḷave cetiye. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc20:1.2
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena āḷavakā bhikkhū navakammaṁ karontā jānaṁ sappāṇakaṁ udakaṁ tiṇampi mattikampi siñcantipi siñcāpentipi. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc20:1.3
Pali: Ye te bhikkhū appicchā …pe… te ujjhāyanti khiyyanti vipācenti—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc20:1.4
Pali: “kathañhi nāma āḷavakā bhikkhū jānaṁ sappāṇakaṁ udakaṁ tiṇampi mattikampi siñcissantipi siñcāpessantipī”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc20:1.5
Pali: Atha kho te bhikkhū āḷavake bhikkhū anekapariyāyena vigarahitvā bhagavato etamatthaṁ ārocesuṁ …pe… 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc20:1.6
Pali: “saccaṁ kira tumhe, bhikkhave, jānaṁ sappāṇakaṁ udakaṁ tiṇampi mattikampi siñcathapi siñcāpethapī”ti? 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc20:1.7
Pali: “Saccaṁ, bhagavā”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc20:1.8
Pali: Vigarahi buddho bhagavā …pe… 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc20:1.9
Pali: kathañhi nāma tumhe, moghapurisā, jānaṁ sappāṇakaṁ udakaṁ tiṇampi mattikampi siñcissathapi siñcāpessathapi. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc20:1.10
Pali: Netaṁ, moghapurisā, appasannānaṁ vā pasādāya …pe… 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc20:1.11

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc20:1.12.1
Pali: “Yo pana bhikkhu jānaṁ sappāṇakaṁ udakaṁ tiṇaṁ vā mattikaṁ vā siñceyya vā siñcāpeyya vā, pācittiyan”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc20:2.1.1
Pali: Yo panāti 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc20:2.1.2

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc20:2.1.3
Pali: bhikkhūti 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc20:2.1.4
Pali: …pe… ayaṁ imasmiṁ atthe adhippeto bhikkhūti.

Pali: Jānāti nāma 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc20:2.1.6

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc20:2.2.1
Pali: Sappāṇake sappāṇakasaññī tiṇaṁ vā mattikaṁ vā siñcati vā siñcāpeti vā, āpatti pācittiyassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc20:2.2.2
Pali: Sappāṇake vematiko tiṇaṁ vā mattikaṁ vā siñcati vā siñcāpeti vā, āpatti dukkaṭassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc20:2.2.3
Pali: Sappāṇake appāṇakasaññī tiṇaṁ vā mattikaṁ vā siñcati vā siñcāpeti vā, anāpatti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc20:2.2.4
Pali: Appāṇake sappāṇakasaññī, āpatti dukkaṭassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc20:2.2.5
Pali: Appāṇake vematiko, āpatti dukkaṭassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc20:2.2.6

Pali: 21. Ovādasikkhāpada 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc21:1.1
Pali: Tena samayena buddho bhagavā sāvatthiyaṁ viharati jetavane anāthapiṇḍikassa ārāme. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc21:1.2
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena therā bhikkhū bhikkhuniyo ovadantā lābhino honti cīvarapiṇḍapātasenāsanagilānappaccayabhesajjaparikkhārānaṁ. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc21:1.3
Pali: Atha kho chabbaggiyānaṁ bhikkhūnaṁ etadahosi—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc21:1.4
Pali: “etarahi kho, āvuso, therā bhikkhū bhikkhuniyo ovadantā lābhino honti cīvarapiṇḍapātasenāsanagilānappaccayabhesajjaparikkhārānaṁ. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc21:1.5
Pali: Handāvuso, mayampi bhikkhuniyo ovadāmā”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc21:1.6
Pali: Atha kho chabbaggiyā bhikkhū bhikkhuniyo upasaṅkamitvā etadavocuṁ—“amhepi, bhaginiyo, upasaṅkamatha; mayampi ovadissāmā”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc21:1.7
Pali: Atha kho tā bhikkhuniyo yena chabbaggiyā bhikkhū tenupasaṅkamiṁsu; 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc21:1.8
Pali: upasaṅkamitvā chabbaggiye bhikkhū abhivādetvā ekamantaṁ nisīdiṁsu. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc21:1.9
Pali: Atha kho chabbaggiyā bhikkhū bhikkhunīnaṁ parittaññeva dhammiṁ kathaṁ katvā divasaṁ tiracchānakathāya vītināmetvā uyyojesuṁ—“gacchatha, bhaginiyo”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc21:1.10
Pali: Atha kho tā bhikkhuniyo yena bhagavā tenupasaṅkamiṁsu; upasaṅkamitvā bhagavantaṁ abhivādetvā ekamantaṁ aṭṭhaṁsu. Ekamantaṁ ṭhitā kho tā bhikkhuniyo bhagavā etadavoca—“kacci, bhikkhuniyo, ovādo iddho ahosī”ti? 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc21:1.11
Pali: “Kuto, bhante, ovādo iddho bhavissati. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc21:1.12
Pali: Ayyā chabbaggiyā parittaññeva dhammiṁ kathaṁ katvā divasaṁ tiracchānakathāya vītināmetvā uyyojesun”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc21:1.13
Pali: Atha kho bhagavā tā bhikkhuniyo dhammiyā kathāya sandassesi samādapesi samuttejesi sampahaṁsesi. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc21:1.14

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc21:1.15

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc21:1.16

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc21:1.17

Pali: “anujānāmi, bhikkhave, aṭṭhahaṅgehi samannāgataṁ bhikkhuṁ bhikkhunovādakaṁ sammannituṁ. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc21:2.27
Pali: Sīlavā hoti, pātimokkhasaṁvarasaṁvuto viharati ācāragocarasampanno aṇumattesu vajjesu bhayadassāvī, samādāya sikkhati sikkhāpadesu; 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc21:2.28
Pali: bahussuto hoti sutadharo sutasannicayo, ye te dhammā ādikalyāṇā majjhekalyāṇā pariyosānakalyāṇā sātthaṁ sabyañjanaṁ kevalaparipuṇṇaṁ parisuddhaṁ brahmacariyaṁ abhivadanti tathārūpāssa dhammā bahussutā honti dhātā vacasā paricitā manasā anupekkhitā diṭṭhiyā suppaṭividdhā; 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc21:2.29
Pali: ubhayāni kho panassa pātimokkhāni vitthārena svāgatāni honti suvibhattāni suppavattīni suvinicchitāni suttaso anubyañjanaso; 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc21:2.30
Pali: kalyāṇavāco hoti kalyāṇavākkaraṇo; 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc21:2.31
Pali: yebhuyyena bhikkhunīnaṁ piyo hoti manāpo; 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc21:2.32
Pali: paṭibalo hoti bhikkhuniyo ovadituṁ; 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc21:2.33
Pali: na kho panetaṁ bhagavantaṁ uddissa pabbajitāya kāsāyavatthavasanāya garudhammaṁ ajjhāpannapubbo hoti; 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc21:2.34
Pali: vīsativasso vā hoti atirekavīsativasso vā—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc21:2.35
Pali: anujānāmi, bhikkhave, imehi aṭṭhahaṅgehi samannāgataṁ bhikkhuṁ bhikkhunovādakaṁ sammannitun”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc21:3.1.1
Pali: Yo panāti 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc21:3.1.2

Pali: ubhatosaṅghe upasampannā.

Pali: Ovadeyyāti 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc21:3.1.10
Pali: aṭṭhahi garudhammehi ovadati, āpatti pācittiyassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc21:3.1.11
Pali: Aññena dhammena ovadati, āpatti dukkaṭassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc21:3.1.12
Pali: Ekatoupasampannaṁ ovadati, āpatti dukkaṭassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc21:3.1.13
Pali: Tena sammatena bhikkhunā pariveṇaṁ sammajjitvā pānīyaṁ paribhojanīyaṁ upaṭṭhāpetvā āsanaṁ paññapetvā dutiyaṁ gahetvā nisīditabbaṁ. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc21:3.1.14
Pali: Bhikkhunīhi tattha gantvā taṁ bhikkhuṁ abhivādetvā ekamantaṁ nisīditabbaṁ. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc21:3.1.15
Pali: Tena bhikkhunā pucchitabbā—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc21:3.1.16
Pali: “samaggāttha, bhaginiyo”ti? 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc21:3.1.17
Pali: Sace “samaggāmhāyyā”ti bhaṇanti, “vattanti, bhaginiyo, aṭṭha garudhammā”ti? 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc21:3.1.18
Pali: Sace “vattantāyyā”ti bhaṇanti, “eso, bhaginiyo, ovādo”ti niyyādetabbo. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc21:3.1.19
Pali: Sace “na vattantāyyā”ti bhaṇanti, osāretabbā. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc21:3.1.20
Pali: “Vassasatūpasampannāya bhikkhuniyā tadahupasampannassa bhikkhuno abhivādanaṁ paccuṭṭhānaṁ añjalikammaṁ sāmīcikammaṁ kātabbaṁ; 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc21:3.1.21
Pali: ayampi dhammo sakkatvā garukatvā mānetvā pūjetvā yāvajīvaṁ anatikkamanīyo. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc21:3.1.22
Pali: Na bhikkhuniyā abhikkhuke āvāse vassaṁ vasitabbaṁ; 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc21:3.1.23
Pali: ayampi dhammo sakkatvā garukatvā mānetvā pūjetvā yāvajīvaṁ anatikkamanīyo. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc21:3.1.24
Pali: Anvaddhamāsaṁ bhikkhuniyā bhikkhusaṅghato dve dhammā paccāsīsitabbā 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc21:3.1.25
Pali: uposathapucchakañca ovādūpasaṅkamanañca, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc21:3.1.26
Pali: ayampi dhammo …pe… 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc21:3.1.27
Pali: vassaṁ vuṭṭhāya bhikkhuniyā ubhatosaṅghe tīhi ṭhānehi pavāretabbaṁ 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc21:3.1.28
Pali: diṭṭhena vā sutena vā parisaṅkāya vā; 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc21:3.1.29
Pali: ayampi dhammo …pe… 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc21:3.1.30
Pali: garudhammaṁ ajjhāpannāya bhikkhuniyā ubhatosaṅghe pakkhamānattaṁ caritabbaṁ; 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc21:3.1.31
Pali: ayampi dhammo …pe… 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc21:3.1.32
Pali: dve vassāni chasu dhammesu sikkhitasikkhāya sikkhamānāya ubhatosaṅghe upasampadā pariyesitabbā; 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc21:3.1.33
Pali: ayampi dhammo …pe… 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc21:3.1.34
Pali: na bhikkhuniyā kenaci pariyāyena bhikkhu akkositabbo paribhāsitabbo; 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc21:3.1.35
Pali: ayampi dhammo …pe… 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc21:3.1.36
Pali: ajjatagge ovaṭo bhikkhunīnaṁ bhikkhūsu vacanapatho, anovaṭo bhikkhūnaṁ bhikkhunīsu vacanapatho; 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc21:3.1.37
Pali: ayampi dhammo sakkatvā garukatvā mānetvā pūjetvā yāvajīvaṁ anatikkamanīyo”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc21:3.1.38
Pali: Sace “samaggāmhāyyā”ti bhaṇantaṁ aññaṁ dhammaṁ bhaṇati, āpatti dukkaṭassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc21:3.1.39
Pali: Sace “vaggāmhāyyā”ti bhaṇantaṁ aṭṭha garudhamme bhaṇati, āpatti dukkaṭassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc21:3.1.40
Pali: Ovādaṁ aniyyādetvā aññaṁ dhammaṁ bhaṇati, āpatti dukkaṭassa.

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc22:0.1
Pali: Theravāda Vinaya

Pali: Mahāvibhaṅga

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc22:0.4
Pali: Ovādavagga 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc22:0.5
Pali: 22. Atthaṅgatasikkhāpada 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc22:1.1
Pali: Tena samayena buddho bhagavā sāvatthiyaṁ viharati jetavane anāthapiṇḍikassa ārāme. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc22:1.2
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena therā bhikkhū bhikkhuniyo ovadanti pariyāyena. Tena kho pana samayena āyasmato cūḷapanthakassa pariyāyo hoti bhikkhuniyo ovadituṁ. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc22:1.3
Pali: Bhikkhuniyo evamāhaṁsu—“na dāni ajja ovādo iddho bhavissati, taññeva dāni udānaṁ ayyo cūḷapanthako punappunaṁ bhaṇissatī”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc22:1.4
Pali: Atha kho tā bhikkhuniyo yenāyasmā cūḷapanthako tenupasaṅkamiṁsu; upasaṅkamitvā āyasmantaṁ cūḷapanthakaṁ abhivādetvā ekamantaṁ nisīdiṁsu. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc22:1.5
Pali: Ekamantaṁ nisinnā kho tā bhikkhuniyo āyasmā cūḷapanthako etadavoca—“samaggāttha, bhaginiyo”ti? 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc22:1.6
Pali: “Samaggāmhāyyā”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc22:1.7
Pali: “Vattanti, bhaginiyo, aṭṭha garudhammā”ti? 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc22:1.8
Pali: “Vattantāyyā”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc22:1.9
Pali: “Eso, bhaginiyo, ovādo”ti niyyādetvā imaṁ udānaṁ punappunaṁ abhāsi—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc22:1.10
Pali: “Adhicetaso appamajjato, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc22:1.11
Pali: Munino monapathesu sikkhato; 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc22:1.12
Pali: Sokā na bhavanti tādino, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc22:1.13
Pali: Upasantassa sadā satīmato”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc22:1.14
Pali: Bhikkhuniyo evamāhaṁsu—“nanu avocumhā—na dāni ajja ovādo iddho bhavissati, taññeva dāni udānaṁ ayyo cūḷapanthako punappunaṁ bhaṇissatī”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc22:1.15
Pali: Assosi kho āyasmā cūḷapanthako tāsaṁ bhikkhunīnaṁ imaṁ kathāsallāpaṁ. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc22:1.16
Pali: Atha kho āyasmā cūḷapanthako vehāsaṁ abbhuggantvā ākāse antalikkhe caṅkamatipi tiṭṭhatipi nisīdatipi seyyampi kappeti dhūmāyatipi pajjalatipi antaradhāyatipi, tañceva udānaṁ bhaṇati aññañca bahuṁ buddhavacanaṁ. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc22:1.17
Pali: Bhikkhuniyo evamāhaṁsu—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc22:1.18
Pali: “acchariyaṁ vata bho, abbhutaṁ vata bho. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc22:1.19
Pali: Na vata no ito pubbe ovādo evaṁ iddho bhūtapubbo yathā ayyassa cūḷapanthakassā”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc22:1.20
Pali: Atha kho āyasmā cūḷapanthako tā bhikkhuniyo yāva samandhakārā ovaditvā uyyojesi—“gacchatha, bhaginiyo”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc22:1.21
Pali: Atha kho tā bhikkhuniyo nagaradvāre thakite bahinagare vasitvā kālasseva nagaraṁ pavisanti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc22:1.22
Pali: Manussā ujjhāyanti khiyyanti vipācenti—“abrahmacāriniyo imā bhikkhuniyo; 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc22:1.23
Pali: ārāme bhikkhūhi saddhiṁ vasitvā idāni nagaraṁ pavisantī”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc22:1.24
Pali: Assosuṁ kho bhikkhū tesaṁ manussānaṁ ujjhāyantānaṁ khiyyantānaṁ vipācentānaṁ. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc22:1.25
Pali: Ye te bhikkhū appicchā …pe… te ujjhāyanti khiyyanti vipācenti—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc22:1.26
Pali: “kathañhi nāma āyasmā cūḷapanthako atthaṅgate sūriye bhikkhuniyo ovadissatī”ti …pe… 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc22:1.27
Pali: “saccaṁ kira tvaṁ, cūḷapanthaka, atthaṅgate sūriye bhikkhuniyo ovadasī”ti? 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc22:1.28
Pali: “Saccaṁ, bhagavā”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc22:1.29
Pali: Vigarahi buddho bhagavā …pe… 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc22:1.30
Pali: kathañhi nāma tvaṁ, cūḷapanthaka, atthaṅgate sūriye bhikkhuniyo ovadissasi. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc22:1.31
Pali: Netaṁ, cūḷapanthaka, appasannānaṁ vā pasādāya …pe… 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc22:1.32
Pali: evañca pana, bhikkhave, imaṁ sikkhāpadaṁ uddiseyyātha—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc22:1.33.1
Pali: “Sammatopi ce bhikkhu atthaṅgate sūriye bhikkhuniyo ovadeyya, pācittiyan”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc22:2.1.1
Pali: Sammato nāma 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc22:2.1.2
Pali: ñatticatutthena kammena sammato. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc22:2.1.3
Pali: Atthaṅgate sūriyeti 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc22:2.1.4
Pali: oggate sūriye. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc22:2.1.5
Pali: Bhikkhunī nāma 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc22:2.1.6
Pali: ubhatosaṅghe upasampannā. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc22:2.1.7
Pali: Ovadeyyāti 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc22:2.1.8
Pali: aṭṭhahi vā garudhammehi aññena vā dhammena ovadati, āpatti pācittiyassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc22:2.2.1
Pali: Atthaṅgate atthaṅgatasaññī ovadati, āpatti pācittiyassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc22:2.2.2
Pali: Atthaṅgate vematiko ovadati, āpatti pācittiyassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc22:2.2.3
Pali: Atthaṅgate anatthaṅgatasaññī ovadati, āpatti pācittiyassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc22:2.2.4
Pali: Ekatoupasampannāya ovadati, āpatti dukkaṭassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc22:2.2.5
Pali: Anatthaṅgate atthaṅgatasaññī, āpatti dukkaṭassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc22:2.2.6
Pali: Anatthaṅgate vematiko, āpatti dukkaṭassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc22:2.2.7
Pali: Anatthaṅgate anatthaṅgatasaññī, anāpatti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc22:2.3.1
Pali: Anāpatti—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc22:2.3.2
Pali: uddesaṁ dento, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc22:2.3.3
Pali: paripucchaṁ dento, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc22:2.3.4
Pali: “osārehi ayyā”ti vuccamāno, osāreti, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc22:2.3.5
Pali: pañhaṁ pucchati, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc22:2.3.6
Pali: pañhaṁ puṭṭho katheti, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc22:2.3.7
Pali: aññassatthāya bhaṇantaṁ bhikkhuniyo suṇanti, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc22:2.3.8
Pali: sikkhamānāya, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc22:2.3.9
Pali: sāmaṇeriyā, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc22:2.3.10
Pali: ummattakassa, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc22:2.3.11
Pali: ādikammikassāti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc22:2.3.12
Pali: Atthaṅgatasikkhāpadaṁ niṭṭhitaṁ dutiyaṁ.

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc23:0.5
Pali: 23. Bhikkhunupassayasikkhāpada 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc23:1.1
Pali: Tena samayena buddho bhagavā sakkesu viharati kapilavatthusmiṁ nigrodhārāme. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc23:1.2
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena chabbaggiyā bhikkhū bhikkhunupassayaṁ upasaṅkamitvā chabbaggiyā bhikkhuniyo ovadanti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc23:1.3
Pali: Bhikkhuniyo chabbaggiyā bhikkhuniyo etadavocuṁ—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc23:1.4
Pali: “ethāyye, ovādaṁ gamissāmā”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc23:1.5
Pali: “Yampi mayaṁ, ayye, gaccheyyāma ovādassa kāraṇā, ayyā chabbaggiyā idheva āgantvā amhe ovadantī”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc23:1.6
Pali: Bhikkhuniyo ujjhāyanti khiyyanti vipācenti—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc23:1.7
Pali: “kathañhi nāma chabbaggiyā bhikkhū bhikkhunupassayaṁ upasaṅkamitvā bhikkhuniyo ovadissantī”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc23:1.8
Pali: Atha kho tā bhikkhuniyo bhikkhūnaṁ etamatthaṁ ārocesuṁ. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc23:1.9
Pali: Ye te bhikkhū appicchā …pe… te ujjhāyanti khiyyanti vipācenti—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc23:1.10
Pali: “kathañhi nāma chabbaggiyā bhikkhū bhikkhunupassayaṁ upasaṅkamitvā bhikkhuniyo ovadissantī”ti …pe… 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc23:1.11
Pali: “saccaṁ kira tumhe, bhikkhave, bhikkhunupassayaṁ upasaṅkamitvā bhikkhuniyo ovadathā”ti? 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc23:1.12
Pali: “Saccaṁ, bhagavā”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc23:1.13
Pali: Vigarahi buddho bhagavā …pe… 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc23:1.14
Pali: kathañhi nāma tumhe, moghapurisā, bhikkhunupassayaṁ upasaṅkamitvā bhikkhuniyo ovadissatha. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc23:1.15
Pali: Netaṁ, moghapurisā, appasannānaṁ vā pasādāya …pe… 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc23:1.16
Pali: evañca pana, bhikkhave, imaṁ sikkhāpadaṁ uddiseyyātha—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc23:1.17.1
Pali: “Yo pana bhikkhu bhikkhunupassayaṁ upasaṅkamitvā bhikkhuniyo ovadeyya, pācittiyan”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc23:1.18
Pali: Evañcidaṁ bhagavatā bhikkhūnaṁ sikkhāpadaṁ paññattaṁ hoti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc23:2.1
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena mahāpajāpati gotamī gilānā hoti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc23:2.2
Pali: Therā bhikkhū yena mahāpajāpati gotamī tenupasaṅkamiṁsu; 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc23:2.3
Pali: upasaṅkamitvā mahāpajāpatiṁ gotamiṁ etadavocuṁ—“ 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc23:2.4
Pali: kacci, gotami, khamanīyaṁ, kacci yāpanīyan”ti? 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc23:2.5
Pali: “Na me, ayyā, khamanīyaṁ na yāpanīyaṁ”. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc23:2.6
Pali: “Iṅghayyā, dhammaṁ desethā”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc23:2.7
Pali: “Na, bhagini, kappati bhikkhunupassayaṁ upasaṅkamitvā bhikkhuniyo dhammaṁ desetun”ti kukkuccāyantā na desesuṁ. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc23:2.8
Pali: Atha kho bhagavā pubbaṇhasamayaṁ nivāsetvā pattacīvaramādāya yena mahāpajāpati gotamī tenupasaṅkami; upasaṅkamitvā paññatte āsane nisīdi. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc23:2.9
Pali: Nisajja kho bhagavā mahāpajāpatiṁ gotamiṁ etadavoca—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc23:2.10
Pali: “kacci, gotami, khamanīyaṁ, kacci yāpanīyan”ti? 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc23:2.11
Pali: “Pubbe me, bhante, therā bhikkhū āgantvā dhammaṁ desenti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc23:2.12
Pali: Tena me phāsu hoti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc23:2.13
Pali: Idāni pana—‘bhagavatā paṭikkhittan’ti, kukkuccāyantā na desenti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc23:2.14
Pali: Tena me na phāsu hotī”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc23:2.15
Pali: Atha kho bhagavā mahāpajāpatiṁ gotamiṁ dhammiyā kathāya sandassetvā samādapetvā samuttejetvā sampahaṁsetvā uṭṭhāyāsanā pakkāmi. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc23:2.16
Pali: Atha kho bhagavā etasmiṁ nidāne etasmiṁ pakaraṇe dhammiṁ kathaṁ katvā bhikkhū āmantesi—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc23:2.17
Pali: “anujānāmi, bhikkhave, bhikkhunupassayaṁ upasaṅkamitvā gilānaṁ bhikkhuniṁ ovadituṁ. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc23:2.18
Pali: Evañca pana, bhikkhave, imaṁ sikkhāpadaṁ uddiseyyātha—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc23:2.19.1
Pali: “Yo pana bhikkhu bhikkhunupassayaṁ upasaṅkamitvā bhikkhuniyo ovadeyya, aññatra samayā, pācittiyaṁ. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc23:2.20
Pali: Tatthāyaṁ samayo. Gilānā hoti bhikkhunī—ayaṁ tattha samayo”ti.

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc23:3.2.1

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc24:2.2.5

Root: root/pli/ms/vinaya/pli-tv-bu-vb/pli-tv-bu-vb-pc/pli-tv-bu-vb-pc25_root-pli-ms.json

Chinese translations: 0

Pali segments

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc25:0.1
Pali: Theravāda Vinaya 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc25:0.2
Pali: Mahāvibhaṅga 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc25:0.3
Pali: Pācittiyakaṇḍa 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc25:0.4
Pali: Ovādavagga 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc25:0.5
Pali: 25. Cīvaradānasikkhāpada 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc25:1.1
Pali: Tena samayena buddho bhagavā sāvatthiyaṁ viharati jetavane anāthapiṇḍikassa ārāme. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc25:1.2
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena aññataro bhikkhu sāvatthiyaṁ aññatarissā visikhāya piṇḍāya carati. Aññatarāpi bhikkhunī tassā visikhāya piṇḍāya carati. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc25:1.3
Pali: Atha kho so bhikkhu taṁ bhikkhuniṁ etadavoca—“gaccha, bhagini, amukasmiṁ okāse bhikkhā diyyatī”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc25:1.4
Pali: Sāpi kho evamāha—“gacchāyya, amukasmiṁ okāse bhikkhā diyyatī”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc25:1.5
Pali: Te abhiṇhadassanena sandiṭṭhā ahesuṁ. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc25:1.6
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena saṅghassa cīvaraṁ bhājīyati. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc25:1.7
Pali: Atha kho sā bhikkhunī ovādaṁ gantvā yena so bhikkhu tenupasaṅkami; upasaṅkamitvā taṁ bhikkhuṁ abhivādetvā ekamantaṁ aṭṭhāsi. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc25:1.8
Pali: Ekamantaṁ ṭhitaṁ kho taṁ bhikkhuniṁ so bhikkhu etadavoca—“ ayaṁ me, bhagini, cīvarapaṭivīso; sādiyissasī”ti? 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc25:1.9
Pali: “Āmāyya, dubbalacīvarāmhī”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc25:1.10
Pali: Atha kho so bhikkhu tassā bhikkhuniyā cīvaraṁ adāsi. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc25:1.11
Pali: Sopi kho bhikkhu dubbalacīvaro hoti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc25:1.12
Pali: Bhikkhū taṁ bhikkhuṁ etadavocuṁ—“karohi dāni te, āvuso, cīvaran”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc25:1.13
Pali: Atha kho so bhikkhu bhikkhūnaṁ etamatthaṁ ārocesi. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc25:1.14
Pali: Ye te bhikkhū appicchā …pe… te ujjhāyanti khiyyanti vipācenti—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc25:1.15
Pali: “kathañhi nāma bhikkhu bhikkhuniyā cīvaraṁ dassatī”ti …pe… 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc25:1.16
Pali: “saccaṁ kira tvaṁ, bhikkhu, bhikkhuniyā cīvaraṁ adāsī”ti? 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc25:1.17
Pali: “Saccaṁ, bhagavā”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc25:1.18
Pali: “Ñātikā te, bhikkhu, aññātikā”ti? 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc25:1.19
Pali: “Aññātikā, bhagavā”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc25:1.20
Pali: “Aññātako, moghapurisa, aññātikāya na jānāti patirūpaṁ vā appatirūpaṁ vā santaṁ vā asantaṁ vā. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc25:1.21
Pali: Kathañhi nāma tvaṁ, moghapurisa, aññātikāya bhikkhuniyā cīvaraṁ dassasi. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc25:1.22
Pali: Netaṁ, moghapurisa, appasannānaṁ vā pasādāya …pe… 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc25:1.23
Pali: evañca pana, bhikkhave, imaṁ sikkhāpadaṁ uddiseyyātha—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc25:1.24.1
Pali: “Yo pana bhikkhu aññātikāya bhikkhuniyā cīvaraṁ dadeyya, pācittiyan”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc25:1.25
Pali: Evañcidaṁ bhagavatā bhikkhūnaṁ sikkhāpadaṁ paññattaṁ hoti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc25:2.1
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena bhikkhū kukkuccāyantā bhikkhunīnaṁ pārivattakaṁ cīvaraṁ na denti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc25:2.2
Pali: Bhikkhuniyo ujjhāyanti khiyyanti vipācenti—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc25:2.3
Pali: “kathañhi nāma ayyā amhākaṁ pārivattakaṁ cīvaraṁ na dassantī”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc25:2.4
Pali: Assosuṁ kho bhikkhū tāsaṁ bhikkhunīnaṁ ujjhāyantīnaṁ khiyyantīnaṁ vipācentīnaṁ. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc25:2.5
Pali: Atha kho te bhikkhū bhagavato etamatthaṁ ārocesuṁ. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc25:2.6
Pali: Atha kho bhagavā etasmiṁ nidāne etasmiṁ pakaraṇe dhammiṁ kathaṁ katvā bhikkhū āmantesi—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc25:2.7
Pali: “anujānāmi, bhikkhave, pañcannaṁ pārivattakaṁ dātuṁ. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc25:2.8
Pali: Bhikkhussa, bhikkhuniyā, sikkhamānāya, sāmaṇerassa, sāmaṇeriyā—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc25:2.9
Pali: anujānāmi, bhikkhave, imesaṁ pañcannaṁ pārivattakaṁ dātuṁ. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc25:2.10
Pali: Evañca pana, bhikkhave, imaṁ sikkhāpadaṁ uddiseyyātha—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc25:2.11.1
Pali: “Yo pana bhikkhu aññātikāya bhikkhuniyā cīvaraṁ dadeyya, aññatra pārivattakā, pācittiyan”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc25:3.1.1
Pali: Yo panāti 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc25:3.1.2
Pali: yo yādiso …pe… 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc25:3.1.3
Pali: bhikkhūti 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc25:3.1.4
Pali: …pe… ayaṁ imasmiṁ atthe adhippeto bhikkhūti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc25:3.1.5
Pali: Aññātikā nāma 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc25:3.1.6
Pali: mātito vā pitito vā yāva sattamā pitāmahayugā asambaddhā. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc25:3.1.7
Pali: Bhikkhunī nāma 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc25:3.1.8
Pali: ubhatosaṅghe upasampannā. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc25:3.1.9
Pali: Cīvaraṁ nāma 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc25:3.1.10
Pali: channaṁ cīvarānaṁ aññataraṁ cīvaraṁ vikappanupagaṁ pacchimaṁ. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc25:3.1.11
Pali: Aññatra pārivattakāti 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc25:3.1.12
Pali: ṭhapetvā pārivattakaṁ deti, āpatti pācittiyassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc25:3.2.1
Pali: Aññātikāya aññātikasaññī cīvaraṁ deti, aññatra pārivattakā, āpatti pācittiyassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc25:3.2.2
Pali: Aññātikāya vematiko cīvaraṁ deti, aññatra pārivattakā, āpatti pācittiyassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc25:3.2.3
Pali: Aññātikāya ñātikasaññī cīvaraṁ deti, aññatra pārivattakā, āpatti pācittiyassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc25:3.2.4
Pali: Ekato upasampannāya cīvaraṁ deti, aññatra pārivattakā, āpatti dukkaṭassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc25:3.2.5
Pali: Ñātikāya aññātikasaññī, āpatti dukkaṭassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc25:3.2.6
Pali: Ñātikāya vematiko, āpatti dukkaṭassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc25:3.2.7
Pali: Ñātikāya ñātikasaññī, anāpatti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc25:3.3.1
Pali: Anāpatti—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc25:3.3.2
Pali: ñātikāya, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc25:3.3.3
Pali: pārivattakaṁ parittena vā vipulaṁ, vipulena vā parittaṁ, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc25:3.3.4
Pali: bhikkhunī vissāsaṁ gaṇhāti, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc25:3.3.5
Pali: tāvakālikaṁ gaṇhāti, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc25:3.3.6
Pali: cīvaraṁ ṭhapetvā aññaṁ parikkhāraṁ deti, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc25:3.3.7
Pali: sikkhamānāya, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc25:3.3.8
Pali: sāmaṇeriyā, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc25:3.3.9
Pali: ummattakassa, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc25:3.3.10
Pali: ādikammikassāti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc25:3.3.11
Pali: Cīvaradānasikkhāpadaṁ niṭṭhitaṁ pañcamaṁ.

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc26:0.5
Pali: 26. Cīvarasibbanasikkhāpada 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc26:1.1
Pali: Tena samayena buddho bhagavā sāvatthiyaṁ viharati jetavane anāthapiṇḍikassa ārāme. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc26:1.2
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena āyasmā udāyī paṭṭo hoti cīvarakammaṁ kātuṁ. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc26:1.3
Pali: Aññatarā bhikkhunī yenāyasmā udāyī tenupasaṅkami; upasaṅkamitvā āyasmantaṁ udāyiṁ etadavoca—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc26:1.4
Pali: “sādhu me, bhante, ayyo cīvaraṁ sibbatū”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc26:1.5
Pali: Atha kho āyasmā udāyī tassā bhikkhuniyā cīvaraṁ sibbitvā surattaṁ suparikammakataṁ katvā majjhe paṭibhānacittaṁ vuṭṭhāpetvā saṁharitvā nikkhipi. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc26:1.6
Pali: Atha kho sā bhikkhunī yenāyasmā udāyī tenupasaṅkami; upasaṅkamitvā āyasmantaṁ udāyiṁ etadavoca—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc26:1.7
Pali: “kahaṁ taṁ, bhante, cīvaran”ti? 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc26:1.8
Pali: “Handa, bhagini, imaṁ cīvaraṁ yathāsaṁhaṭaṁ haritvā nikkhipitvā yadā bhikkhunisaṅgho ovādaṁ āgacchati tadā imaṁ cīvaraṁ pārupitvā bhikkhunisaṅghassa piṭṭhito piṭṭhito āgacchā”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc26:1.9
Pali: Atha kho sā bhikkhunī taṁ cīvaraṁ yathāsaṁhaṭaṁ haritvā nikkhipitvā yadā bhikkhunisaṅgho ovādaṁ āgacchati tadā taṁ cīvaraṁ pārupitvā bhikkhunisaṅghassa piṭṭhito piṭṭhito āgacchati. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc26:1.10
Pali: Manussā ujjhāyanti khiyyanti vipācenti—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc26:1.11
Pali: “yāva chinnikā imā bhikkhuniyo dhuttikā ahirikāyo, yatra hi nāma cīvare paṭibhānacittaṁ vuṭṭhāpessantī”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc26:1.12
Pali: Bhikkhuniyo evamāhaṁsu—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc26:1.13
Pali: “kassidaṁ kamman”ti? 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc26:1.14
Pali: “Ayyassa udāyissā”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc26:1.15
Pali: “Yepi te chinnakā dhuttakā ahirikā tesampi evarūpaṁ na sobheyya, kiṁ pana ayyassa udāyissā”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc26:1.16
Pali: Atha kho tā bhikkhuniyo bhikkhūnaṁ etamatthaṁ ārocesuṁ. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc26:1.17
Pali: Ye te bhikkhū appicchā …pe… te ujjhāyanti khiyyanti vipācenti—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc26:1.18

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc26:1.19
Pali: “saccaṁ kira tvaṁ, udāyi, bhikkhuniyā cīvaraṁ sibbasī”ti? 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc26:1.20
Pali: “Saccaṁ, bhagavā”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc26:1.21
Pali: “Ñātikā te, udāyi, aññātikā”ti? 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc26:1.22
Pali: “Aññātikā, bhagavā”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc26:1.23
Pali: “Aññātako, moghapurisa, aññātikāya na jānāti patirūpaṁ vā appatirūpaṁ vā pāsādikaṁ vā apāsādikaṁ vā. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc26:1.24
Pali: Kathañhi nāma tvaṁ, moghapurisa, aññātikāya bhikkhuniyā cīvaraṁ sibbissasi. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc26:1.25
Pali: Netaṁ, moghapurisa, appasannānaṁ vā pasādāya …pe… 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc26:1.26
Pali: evañca pana, bhikkhave, imaṁ sikkhāpadaṁ uddiseyyātha—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc26:1.27.1
Pali: “Yo pana bhikkhu aññātikāya bhikkhuniyā cīvaraṁ sibbeyya vā sibbāpeyya vā, pācittiyan”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc26:2.1.1
Pali: Yo panāti 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc26:2.1.2
Pali: yo yādiso …pe… 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc26:2.1.3
Pali: bhikkhūti 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc26:2.1.4
Pali: …pe… ayaṁ imasmiṁ atthe adhippeto bhikkhūti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc26:2.1.5
Pali: Aññātikā nāma 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc26:2.1.6
Pali: mātito vā pitito vā yāva sattamā pitāmahayugā asambaddhā. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc26:2.1.7
Pali: Bhikkhunī nāma 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc26:2.1.8
Pali: ubhatosaṅghe upasampannā. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc26:2.1.9
Pali: Cīvaraṁ nāma

Pali: channaṁ cīvarānaṁ aññataraṁ cīvaraṁ. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc26:2.1.11
Pali: Sibbeyyāti 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc26:2.1.12
Pali: sayaṁ sibbati ārāpathe ārāpathe āpatti pācittiyassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc26:2.1.13
Pali: Sibbāpeyyāti 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc26:2.1.14
Pali: aññaṁ āṇāpeti, āpatti pācittiyassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc26:2.1.15
Pali: Sakiṁ āṇatto bahukampi sibbati, āpatti pācittiyassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc26:2.2.1
Pali: Aññātikāya aññātikasaññī cīvaraṁ sibbati vā sibbāpeti vā, āpatti pācittiyassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc26:2.2.2
Pali: Aññātikāya vematiko cīvaraṁ sibbati vā sibbāpeti vā, āpatti pācittiyassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc26:2.2.3
Pali: Aññātikāya ñātikasaññī cīvaraṁ sibbati vā sibbāpeti vā, āpatti pācittiyassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc26:2.2.4
Pali: Ekatoupasampannāya cīvaraṁ sibbati vā sibbāpeti vā, āpatti dukkaṭassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc26:2.2.5
Pali: Ñātikāya aññātikasaññī, āpatti dukkaṭassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc26:2.2.6
Pali: Ñātikāya vematiko, āpatti dukkaṭassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc26:2.2.7
Pali: Ñātikāya ñātikasaññī, anāpatti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc26:2.3.1
Pali: Anāpatti—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc26:2.3.2
Pali: ñātikāya, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc26:2.3.3
Pali: cīvaraṁ ṭhapetvā aññaṁ parikkhāraṁ sibbati vā sibbāpeti vā, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc26:2.3.4
Pali: sikkhamānāya, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc26:2.3.5
Pali: sāmaṇeriyā, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc26:2.3.6
Pali: ummattakassa, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc26:2.3.7
Pali: ādikammikassāti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc26:2.3.8
Pali: Cīvarasibbanasikkhāpadaṁ niṭṭhitaṁ chaṭṭhaṁ.

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc27:0.5
Pali: 27. Saṁvidhānasikkhāpada 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc27:1.1
Pali: Tena samayena buddho bhagavā sāvatthiyaṁ viharati jetavane anāthapiṇḍikassa ārāme. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc27:1.2
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena chabbaggiyā bhikkhū bhikkhunīhi saddhiṁ saṁvidhāya ekaddhānamaggaṁ paṭipajjanti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc27:1.3
Pali: Manussā ujjhāyanti khiyyanti vipācenti—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc27:1.4
Pali: “yatheva mayaṁ sapajāpatikā āhiṇḍāma, evamevime samaṇā sakyaputtiyā bhikkhunīhi saddhiṁ saṁvidhāya āhiṇḍantī”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc27:1.5
Pali: Assosuṁ kho bhikkhū tesaṁ manussānaṁ ujjhāyantānaṁ khiyyantānaṁ vipācentānaṁ. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc27:1.6
Pali: Ye te bhikkhū appicchā …pe… te ujjhāyanti khiyyanti vipācenti—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc27:1.7
Pali: “kathañhi nāma chabbaggiyā bhikkhū bhikkhunīhi saddhiṁ saṁvidhāya ekaddhānamaggaṁ paṭipajjissantī”ti …pe… 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc27:1.8
Pali: “saccaṁ kira tumhe, bhikkhave, bhikkhunīhi saddhiṁ saṁvidhāya ekaddhānamaggaṁ paṭipajjathā”ti? 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc27:1.9
Pali: “Saccaṁ, bhagavā”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc27:1.10
Pali: Vigarahi buddho bhagavā …pe… 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc27:1.11
Pali: kathañhi nāma tumhe, moghapurisā, bhikkhunīhi saddhiṁ saṁvidhāya ekaddhānamaggaṁ paṭipajjissatha. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc27:1.12
Pali: Netaṁ, moghapurisā, appasannānaṁ vā pasādāya …pe… 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc27:1.13
Pali: evañca pana, bhikkhave, imaṁ sikkhāpadaṁ uddiseyyātha. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc27:1.14.1
Pali: “Yo pana bhikkhu bhikkhuniyā saddhiṁ saṁvidhāya ekaddhānamaggaṁ paṭipajjeyya, antamaso gāmantarampi, pācittiyan”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc27:1.15
Pali: Evañcidaṁ bhagavatā bhikkhūnaṁ sikkhāpadaṁ paññattaṁ hoti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc27:2.1
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena sambahulā bhikkhū ca bhikkhuniyo ca sāketā sāvatthiṁ addhānamaggappaṭipannā honti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc27:2.2
Pali: Atha kho tā bhikkhuniyo te bhikkhū etadavocuṁ—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc27:2.3
Pali: “mayampi ayyehi saddhiṁ gamissāmā”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc27:2.4
Pali: “Na, bhaginī, kappati bhikkhuniyā saddhiṁ saṁvidhāya ekaddhānamaggaṁ paṭipajjituṁ. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc27:2.5
Pali: Tumhe vā paṭhamaṁ gacchatha mayaṁ vā gamissāmā”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc27:2.6
Pali: “Ayyā, bhante, aggapurisā. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc27:2.7
Pali: Ayyāva paṭhamaṁ gacchantū”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc27:2.8
Pali: Atha kho tāsaṁ bhikkhunīnaṁ pacchā gacchantīnaṁ antarāmagge corā acchindiṁsu ca dūsesuñca. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc27:2.9
Pali: Atha kho tā bhikkhuniyo sāvatthiṁ gantvā bhikkhunīnaṁ etamatthaṁ ārocesuṁ. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc27:2.10
Pali: Bhikkhuniyo bhikkhūnaṁ etamatthaṁ ārocesuṁ. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc27:2.11
Pali: Bhikkhū bhagavato etamatthaṁ ārocesuṁ. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc27:2.12
Pali: Atha kho bhagavā etasmiṁ nidāne etasmiṁ pakaraṇe dhammiṁ kathaṁ katvā bhikkhū āmantesi—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc27:2.13
Pali: “anujānāmi, bhikkhave, satthagamanīye magge sāsaṅkasammate sappaṭibhaye bhikkhuniyā saddhiṁ saṁvidhāya ekaddhānamaggaṁ paṭipajjituṁ. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc27:2.14
Pali: Evañca pana, bhikkhave, imaṁ sikkhāpadaṁ uddiseyyātha—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc27:2.15.1
Pali: “Yo pana bhikkhu bhikkhuniyā saddhiṁ saṁvidhāya ekaddhānamaggaṁ paṭipajjeyya, antamaso gāmantarampi, aññatra samayā, pācittiyaṁ. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc27:2.16
Pali: Tatthāyaṁ samayo. Satthagamanīyo hoti maggo sāsaṅkasammato sappaṭibhayo—ayaṁ tattha samayo”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc27:3.1.1
Pali: Yo panāti 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc27:3.1.2
Pali: yo yādiso …pe… 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc27:3.1.3
Pali: bhikkhūti 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc27:3.1.4
Pali: …pe… ayaṁ imasmiṁ atthe adhippeto bhikkhūti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc27:3.1.5
Pali: Bhikkhunī nāma 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc27:3.1.6
Pali: ubhatosaṅghe upasampannā. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc27:3.1.7
Pali: Saddhinti 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc27:3.1.8
Pali: ekato. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc27:3.1.9
Pali: Saṁvidhāyāti—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc27:3.1.10
Pali: “gacchāma, bhagini, gacchāmāyya; gacchāmāyya, gacchāma, bhagini; ajja vā hiyyo vā pare vā gacchāmā”ti saṁvidahati, āpatti dukkaṭassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc27:3.1.11
Pali: Antamaso gāmantarampīti 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc27:3.1.12
Pali: kukkuṭasampāte gāme, gāmantare gāmantare āpatti pācittiyassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc27:3.1.13
Pali: Agāmake araññe, addhayojane addhayojane āpatti pācittiyassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc27:3.1.14
Pali: Aññatra samayāti 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc27:3.1.15
Pali: ṭhapetvā samayaṁ. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc27:3.1.16
Pali: Satthagamanīyo nāma maggo 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc27:3.1.17
Pali: na sakkā hoti vinā satthena gantuṁ. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc27:3.1.18
Pali: Sāsaṅkaṁ nāma 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc27:3.1.19
Pali: tasmiṁ magge corānaṁ niviṭṭhokāso dissati, bhuttokāso dissati, ṭhitokāso dissati, nisinnokāso dissati, nipannokāso dissati. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc27:3.1.20
Pali: Sappaṭibhayaṁ nāma 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc27:3.1.21
Pali: tasmiṁ magge corehi manussā hatā dissanti, viluttā dissanti, ākoṭitā dissanti, sappaṭibhayaṁ gantvā appaṭibhayaṁ dassetvā uyyojetabbā— “gacchatha, bhaginiyo”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc27:3.2.1
Pali: Saṁvidahite saṁvidahitasaññī ekaddhānamaggaṁ paṭipajjati, antamaso gāmantarampi, aññatra samayā, āpatti pācittiyassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc27:3.2.2
Pali: Saṁvidahite vematiko ekaddhānamaggaṁ paṭipajjati, antamaso gāmantarampi, aññatra samayā, āpatti pācittiyassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc27:3.2.3
Pali: Saṁvidahite, asaṁvidahitasaññī ekaddhānamaggaṁ paṭipajjati, antamaso gāmantarampi, aññatra samayā, āpatti pācittiyassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc27:3.2.4
Pali: Bhikkhu saṁvidahati bhikkhunī na saṁvidahati, āpatti dukkaṭassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc27:3.2.5
Pali: Asaṁvidahite saṁvidahitasaññī, āpatti dukkaṭassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc27:3.2.6
Pali: Asaṁvidahite vematiko, āpatti dukkaṭassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc27:3.2.7
Pali: Asaṁvidahite asaṁvidahitasaññī, anāpatti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc27:3.3.1
Pali: Anāpatti—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc27:3.3.2
Pali: samaye, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc27:3.3.3
Pali: asaṁvidahitvā gacchati, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc27:3.3.4
Pali: bhikkhunī saṁvidahati, bhikkhu na saṁvidahati, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc27:3.3.5
Pali: visaṅketena gacchanti, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc27:3.3.6
Pali: āpadāsu, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc27:3.3.7
Pali: ummattakassa, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc27:3.3.8
Pali: ādikammikassāti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc27:3.3.9
Pali: Saṁvidhānasikkhāpadaṁ niṭṭhitaṁ sattamaṁ.

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc28:0.5
Pali: 28. Nāvābhiruhanasikkhāpada 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc28:1.1
Pali: Tena samayena buddho bhagavā sāvatthiyaṁ viharati jetavane anāthapiṇḍikassa ārāme. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc28:1.2
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena chabbaggiyā bhikkhū bhikkhunīhi saddhiṁ saṁvidhāya ekaṁ nāvaṁ abhiruhanti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc28:1.3
Pali: Manussā ujjhāyanti khiyyanti vipācenti—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc28:1.4
Pali: “yatheva mayaṁ sapajāpatikā nāvāya kīḷāma, evamevime samaṇā sakyaputtiyā bhikkhunīhi saddhiṁ saṁvidhāya nāvāya kīḷantī”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc28:1.5
Pali: Assosuṁ kho bhikkhū tesaṁ manussānaṁ ujjhāyantānaṁ khiyyantānaṁ vipācentānaṁ. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc28:1.6
Pali: Ye te bhikkhū appicchā …pe… te ujjhāyanti khiyyanti vipācenti—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc28:1.7
Pali: “kathañhi nāma chabbaggiyā bhikkhū bhikkhunīhi saddhiṁ saṁvidhāya ekaṁ nāvaṁ abhiruhissantī”ti …pe… 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc28:1.8
Pali: “saccaṁ kira tumhe, bhikkhave, bhikkhunīhi saddhiṁ saṁvidhāya ekaṁ nāvaṁ abhiruhathā”ti? 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc28:1.9
Pali: “Saccaṁ, bhagavā”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc28:1.10
Pali: Vigarahi buddho bhagavā …pe… 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc28:1.11
Pali: kathañhi nāma tumhe, moghapurisā, bhikkhunīhi saddhiṁ saṁvidhāya ekaṁ nāvaṁ abhiruhissatha. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc28:1.12
Pali: Netaṁ, moghapurisā, appasannānaṁ vā pasādāya …pe… 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc28:1.13
Pali: evañca pana, bhikkhave, imaṁ sikkhāpadaṁ uddiseyyātha—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc28:1.14.1
Pali: “Yo pana bhikkhu bhikkhuniyā saddhiṁ saṁvidhāya ekaṁ nāvaṁ abhiruheyya, uddhaṅgāminiṁ vā adhogāminiṁ vā, pācittiyan”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc28:1.15
Pali: Evañcidaṁ bhagavatā bhikkhūnaṁ sikkhāpadaṁ paññattaṁ hoti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc28:2.1
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena sambahulā bhikkhū ca bhikkhuniyo ca sāketā sāvatthiṁ addhānamaggappaṭipannā honti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc28:2.2
Pali: Antarāmagge nadī taritabbā hoti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc28:2.3
Pali: Atha kho tā bhikkhuniyo te bhikkhū etadavocuṁ—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc28:2.4
Pali: “mayampi ayyehi saddhiṁ uttarissāmā”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc28:2.5
Pali: “Na, bhaginī, kappati bhikkhuniyā saddhiṁ saṁvidhāya ekaṁ nāvaṁ abhiruhituṁ; 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc28:2.6
Pali: tumhe vā paṭhamaṁ uttaratha mayaṁ vā uttarissāmā”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc28:2.7
Pali: “Ayyā, bhante, aggapurisā. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc28:2.8
Pali: Ayyāva paṭhamaṁ uttarantū”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc28:2.9
Pali: Atha kho tāsaṁ bhikkhunīnaṁ pacchā uttarantīnaṁ corā acchindiṁsu ca dūsesuñca. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc28:2.10
Pali: Atha kho tā bhikkhuniyo sāvatthiṁ gantvā bhikkhunīnaṁ etamatthaṁ ārocesuṁ. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc28:2.11
Pali: Bhikkhuniyo bhikkhūnaṁ etamatthaṁ ārocesuṁ. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc28:2.12
Pali: Bhikkhū bhagavato etamatthaṁ ārocesuṁ. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc28:2.13
Pali: Atha kho bhagavā etasmiṁ nidāne etasmiṁ pakaraṇe dhammiṁ kathaṁ katvā bhikkhū āmantesi—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc28:2.14
Pali: “anujānāmi, bhikkhave, tiriyaṁ taraṇāya bhikkhuniyā saddhiṁ saṁvidhāya ekaṁ nāvaṁ abhiruhituṁ. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc28:2.15
Pali: Evañca pana, bhikkhave, imaṁ sikkhāpadaṁ uddiseyyātha—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc28:2.16.1
Pali: “Yo pana bhikkhu bhikkhuniyā saddhiṁ saṁvidhāya ekaṁ nāvaṁ abhiruheyya uddhaṅgāminiṁ vā adhogāminiṁ vā, aññatra tiriyaṁ taraṇāya, pācittiyan”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc28:3.1.1
Pali: Yo panāti 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc28:3.1.2
Pali: yo yādiso …pe… 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc28:3.1.3
Pali: bhikkhūti 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc28:3.1.4

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc28:3.1.11

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc28:3.1.12

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc28:3.1.13
Pali: Ubho vā abhiruhanti, āpatti pācittiyassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc28:3.1.14
Pali: Uddhaṅgāmininti 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc28:3.1.15

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc28:3.1.20
Pali: Kukkuṭasampāte gāme, gāmantare gāmantare āpatti pācittiyassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc28:3.1.21
Pali: Agāmake araññe, aḍḍhayojane aḍḍhayojane āpatti pācittiyassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc28:3.2.1
Pali: Saṁvidahite saṁvidahitasaññī ekaṁ nāvaṁ abhiruhati uddhaṅgāminiṁ vā adhogāminiṁ vā, aññatra tiriyaṁ taraṇāya, āpatti pācittiyassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc28:3.2.2
Pali: Saṁvidahite vematiko ekaṁ nāvaṁ abhiruhati uddhaṅgāminiṁ vā adhogāminiṁ vā, aññatra tiriyaṁ taraṇāya, āpatti pācittiyassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc28:3.2.3
Pali: Saṁvidahite asaṁvidahitasaññī ekaṁ nāvaṁ abhiruhati uddhaṅgāminiṁ vā adhogāminiṁ vā, aññatra tiriyaṁ taraṇāya, āpatti pācittiyassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc28:3.2.4
Pali: Bhikkhu saṁvidahati, bhikkhunī na saṁvidahati, āpatti dukkaṭassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc28:3.2.5
Pali: Asaṁvidahite saṁvidahitasaññī, āpatti dukkaṭassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc28:3.2.6
Pali: Asaṁvidahite vematiko, āpatti dukkaṭassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc28:3.2.7
Pali: Asaṁvidahite, asaṁvidahitasaññī, anāpatti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc28:3.3.1
Pali: Anāpatti—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc28:3.3.2
Pali: tiriyaṁ taraṇāya, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc28:3.3.3
Pali: asaṁvidahitvā abhiruhanti, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc28:3.3.4
Pali: bhikkhunī saṁvidahati, bhikkhu na saṁvidahati, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc28:3.3.5
Pali: visaṅketena abhiruhanti, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc28:3.3.6
Pali: āpadāsu, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc28:3.3.7
Pali: ummattakassa, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc28:3.3.8
Pali: ādikammissāti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc28:3.3.9
Pali: Nāvābhiruhanasikkhāpadaṁ niṭṭhitaṁ aṭṭhamaṁ.

Pali: Theravāda Vinaya 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc29:0.2
Pali: Mahāvibhaṅga 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc29:0.3
Pali: Pācittiyakaṇḍa 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc29:0.4
Pali: Ovādavagga 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc29:0.5
Pali: 29. Paripācitasikkhāpada 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc29:1.1
Pali: Tena samayena buddho bhagavā rājagahe viharati veḷuvane kalandakanivāpe. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc29:1.2
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena thullanandā bhikkhunī aññatarassa kulassa kulūpikā hoti niccabhattikā. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc29:1.3
Pali: Tena ca gahapatinā therā bhikkhū nimantitā honti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc29:1.4
Pali: Atha kho thullanandā bhikkhunī pubbaṇhasamayaṁ nivāsetvā pattacīvaramādāya yena taṁ kulaṁ tenupasaṅkami; upasaṅkamitvā taṁ gahapatiṁ etadavoca—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc29:1.5
Pali: “kimidaṁ, gahapati, pahūtaṁ khādanīyaṁ bhojanīyaṁ paṭiyattan”ti? 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc29:1.6
Pali: “Therā mayā, ayye, nimantitā”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc29:1.7
Pali: “Ke pana te, gahapati, therā”ti? 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc29:1.8
Pali: “Ayyo sāriputto ayyo mahāmoggallāno ayyo mahākaccāno ayyo mahākoṭṭhiko ayyo mahākappino ayyo mahācundo ayyo anuruddho ayyo revato ayyo upāli ayyo ānando ayyo rāhulo”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc29:1.9
Pali: “Kiṁ pana tvaṁ, gahapati, mahānāge tiṭṭhamāne ceṭake nimantesī”ti? 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc29:1.10
Pali: “Ke pana te, ayye, mahānāgā”ti? 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc29:1.11
Pali: “Ayyo devadatto ayyo kokāliko ayyo kaṭamodakatissako ayyo khaṇḍadeviyā putto ayyo samuddadatto”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc29:1.12
Pali: Ayaṁ carahi thullanandāya bhikkhuniyā antarā kathā vippakatā, atha te therā bhikkhū pavisiṁsu. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc29:1.13
Pali: “Saccaṁ mahānāgā kho tayā, gahapati, nimantitā”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc29:1.14
Pali: “Idāneva kho tvaṁ, ayye, ceṭake akāsi; idāni mahānāge”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc29:1.15
Pali: Gharato ca nikkaḍḍhi, niccabhattañca pacchindi. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc29:1.16
Pali: Ye te bhikkhū appicchā …pe… te ujjhāyanti khiyyanti vipācenti—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc29:1.17
Pali: “kathañhi nāma devadatto jānaṁ bhikkhuniparipācitaṁ piṇḍapātaṁ bhuñjissatī”ti …pe… 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc29:1.18
Pali: “saccaṁ kira tvaṁ, devadatta, jānaṁ bhikkhuniparipācitaṁ piṇḍapātaṁ bhuñjasī”ti? 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc29:1.19
Pali: “Saccaṁ, bhagavā”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc29:1.20
Pali: Vigarahi buddho bhagavā …pe… 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc29:1.21
Pali: kathañhi nāma tvaṁ, moghapurisa, jānaṁ bhikkhuniparipācitaṁ piṇḍapātaṁ bhuñjissasi. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc29:1.22
Pali: Netaṁ, moghapurisa, appasannānaṁ vā pasādāya …pe… 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc29:1.23
Pali: evañca pana, bhikkhave, imaṁ sikkhāpadaṁ uddiseyyātha—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc29:1.24.1
Pali: “Yo pana bhikkhu jānaṁ bhikkhuniparipācitaṁ piṇḍapātaṁ bhuñjeyya, pācittiyan”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc29:1.25
Pali: Evañcidaṁ bhagavatā bhikkhūnaṁ sikkhāpadaṁ paññattaṁ hoti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc29:2.1
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena aññataro bhikkhu rājagahā pabbajito ñātikulaṁ agamāsi. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc29:2.2
Pali: Manussā—“cirassampi bhadanto āgato”ti sakkaccaṁ bhattaṁ akaṁsu. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc29:2.3
Pali: Tassa kulassa kulūpikā bhikkhunī te manusse etadavoca—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc29:2.4
Pali: “dethayyassa, āvuso, bhattan”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc29:2.5
Pali: Atha kho so bhikkhu—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc29:2.6
Pali: “bhagavatā paṭikkhittaṁ jānaṁ bhikkhuniparipācitaṁ piṇḍapātaṁ bhuñjitun”ti kukkuccāyanto na paṭiggahesi. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc29:2.7
Pali: Nāsakkhi piṇḍāya carituṁ, chinnabhatto ahosi. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc29:2.8
Pali: Atha kho so bhikkhu ārāmaṁ gantvā bhikkhūnaṁ etamatthaṁ ārocesi. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc29:2.9
Pali: Bhikkhū bhagavato etamatthaṁ ārocesuṁ. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc29:2.10
Pali: Atha kho bhagavā etasmiṁ nidāne etasmiṁ pakaraṇe dhammiṁ kathaṁ katvā bhikkhū āmantesi—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc29:2.11
Pali: “anujānāmi, bhikkhave, pubbe gihisamārambhe jānaṁ bhikkhuniparipācitaṁ piṇḍapātaṁ bhuñjituṁ. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc29:2.12
Pali: Evañca pana, bhikkhave, imaṁ sikkhāpadaṁ uddiseyyātha—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc29:2.13.1
Pali: “Yo pana bhikkhu jānaṁ bhikkhuniparipācitaṁ piṇḍapātaṁ bhuñjeyya, aññatra pubbe gihisamārambhā, pācittiyan”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc29:3.1.1
Pali: Yo panāti 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc29:3.1.2
Pali: yo yādiso …pe… 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc29:3.1.3
Pali: bhikkhūti 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc29:3.1.4
Pali: …pe… ayaṁ imasmiṁ atthe adhippeto bhikkhūti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc29:3.1.5
Pali: Jānāti nāma 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc29:3.1.6
Pali: sāmaṁ vā jānāti aññe vā tassa ārocenti sā vā āroceti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc29:3.1.7
Pali: Bhikkhunī nāma 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc29:3.1.8
Pali: ubhatosaṅghe upasampannā. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc29:3.1.9
Pali: Paripāceti nāma 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc29:3.1.10
Pali: pubbe adātukāmānaṁ akattukāmānaṁ— “ayyo bhāṇako, ayyo bahussuto, ayyo suttantiko, ayyo vinayadharo, ayyo dhammakathiko, detha ayyassa, karotha ayyassā”ti esā paripāceti nāma. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc29:3.1.11
Pali: Piṇḍapāto nāma 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc29:3.1.12
Pali: pañcannaṁ bhojanānaṁ aññataraṁ bhojanaṁ. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc29:3.1.13
Pali: Aññatra pubbe gihisamārambhāti 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc29:3.1.14
Pali: ṭhapetvā gihisamārambhaṁ. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc29:3.1.15
Pali: Gihisamārambho nāma 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc29:3.1.16
Pali: ñātakā vā honti pavāritā vā pakatipaṭiyattaṁ vā. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc29:3.1.17
Pali: Aññatra pubbe gihisamārambhā bhuñjissāmīti paṭiggaṇhāti, āpatti dukkaṭassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc29:3.1.18
Pali: Ajjhohāre ajjhohāre, āpatti pācittiyassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc29:3.2.1
Pali: Paripācite paripācitasaññī bhuñjati, aññatra pubbe gihisamārambhā, āpatti pācittiyassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc29:3.2.2
Pali: Paripācite vematiko bhuñjati, aññatra pubbe gihisamārambhā, āpatti dukkaṭassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc29:3.2.3
Pali: Paripācite aparipācitasaññī bhuñjati, aññatra pubbe gihisamārambhā, anāpatti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc29:3.2.4
Pali: Ekatoupasampannāya paripācitaṁ bhuñjati, aññatra pubbe gihisamārambhā, āpatti dukkaṭassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc29:3.2.5
Pali: Aparipācite paripācitasaññī, āpatti dukkaṭassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc29:3.2.6
Pali: Aparipācite vematiko, āpatti dukkaṭassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc29:3.2.7
Pali: Aparipācite aparipācitasaññī, anāpatti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc29:3.3.1
Pali: Anāpatti—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc29:3.3.2
Pali: pubbe gihisamārambhe, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc29:3.3.3
Pali: sikkhamānā paripāceti, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc29:3.3.4
Pali: sāmaṇerī paripāceti, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc29:3.3.5
Pali: pañca bhojanāni ṭhapetvā sabbattha anāpatti, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc29:3.3.6
Pali: ummattakassa, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc29:3.3.7
Pali: ādikammikassāti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc29:3.3.8
Pali: Paripācitasikkhāpadaṁ niṭṭhitaṁ navamaṁ.

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc30:0.5
Pali: 30. Rahonisajjasikkhāpada 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc30:1.1
Pali: Tena samayena buddho bhagavā sāvatthiyaṁ viharati jetavane anāthapiṇḍikassa ārāme. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc30:1.2
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena āyasmato udāyissa purāṇadutiyikā bhikkhunīsu pabbajitā hoti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc30:1.3
Pali: Sā āyasmato udāyissa santike abhikkhaṇaṁ āgacchati, āyasmāpi udāyī tassā bhikkhuniyā santike abhikkhaṇaṁ gacchati. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc30:1.4
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena āyasmā udāyī tassā bhikkhuniyā saddhiṁ eko ekāya raho nisajjaṁ kappesi. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc30:1.5
Pali: Ye te bhikkhū appicchā …pe… te ujjhāyanti khiyyanti vipācenti—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc30:1.6
Pali: “kathañhi nāma āyasmā udāyī bhikkhuniyā saddhiṁ eko ekāya raho nisajjaṁ kappessatī”ti …pe… 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc30:1.7
Pali: “saccaṁ kira tvaṁ, udāyi, bhikkhuniyā saddhiṁ eko ekāya raho nisajjaṁ kappesī”ti? 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc30:1.8
Pali: “Saccaṁ, bhagavā”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc30:1.9
Pali: Vigarahi buddho bhagavā …pe… 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc30:1.10
Pali: kathañhi nāma tvaṁ, moghapurisa, bhikkhuniyā saddhiṁ eko ekāya raho nisajjaṁ kappessasi. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc30:1.11
Pali: Netaṁ, moghapurisa, appasannānaṁ vā pasādāya …pe… 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc30:1.12
Pali: evañca pana, bhikkhave, imaṁ sikkhāpadaṁ uddiseyyātha—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc30:1.13.1
Pali: “Yo pana bhikkhu bhikkhuniyā saddhiṁ eko ekāya raho nisajjaṁ kappeyya, pācittiyan”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc30:2.1.1
Pali: Yo panāti 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc30:2.1.2
Pali: yo yādiso …pe… 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc30:2.1.3
Pali: bhikkhūti 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc30:2.1.4
Pali: …pe… ayaṁ imasmiṁ atthe adhippeto bhikkhūti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc30:2.1.5
Pali: Bhikkhunī nāma 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc30:2.1.6
Pali: ubhatosaṅghe upasampannā. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc30:2.1.7
Pali: Saddhinti 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc30:2.1.8
Pali: ekato. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc30:2.1.9
Pali: Eko ekāyāti 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc30:2.1.10
Pali: bhikkhu ceva hoti bhikkhunī ca. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc30:2.1.11
Pali: Raho nāma 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc30:2.1.12
Pali: cakkhussa raho sotassa raho. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc30:2.1.13
Pali: Cakkhussa raho nāma 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc30:2.1.14
Pali: na sakkā hoti akkhiṁ vā nikhaṇīyamāne bhamukaṁ vā ukkhipīyamāne sīsaṁ vā ukkhipīyamāne passituṁ. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc30:2.1.15
Pali: Sotassa raho nāma 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc30:2.1.16
Pali: na sakkā hoti pakatikathā sotuṁ. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc30:2.1.17
Pali: Nisajjaṁ kappeyyāti 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc30:2.1.18
Pali: bhikkhuniyā nisinnāya bhikkhu upanisinno vā hoti upanipanno vā, āpatti pācittiyassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc30:2.1.19
Pali: Bhikkhu nisinne bhikkhunī upanisinnā vā hoti upanipannā vā, āpatti pācittiyassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc30:2.1.20
Pali: Ubho vā nisinnā honti ubho vā nipannā, āpatti pācittiyassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc30:2.2.1
Pali: Raho rahosaññī eko ekāya nisajjaṁ kappeti, āpatti pācittiyassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc30:2.2.2
Pali: Raho vematiko eko ekāya nisajjaṁ kappeti, āpatti pācittiyassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc30:2.2.3
Pali: Raho arahosaññī eko ekāya nisajjaṁ kappeti, āpatti pācittiyassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc30:2.2.4
Pali: Araho rahosaññī, āpatti dukkaṭassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc30:2.2.5
Pali: Araho vematiko, āpatti dukkaṭassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc30:2.2.6
Pali: Araho arahosaññī, anāpatti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc30:2.3.1
Pali: Anāpatti—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc30:2.3.2
Pali: yo koci viññū dutiyo hoti, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc30:2.3.3
Pali: tiṭṭhati na nisīdati, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc30:2.3.4
Pali: arahopekkho, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc30:2.3.5
Pali: aññavihito nisīdati, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc30:2.3.6
Pali: ummattakassa, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc30:2.3.7
Pali: ādikammikassāti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc30:2.3.8
Pali: Rahonisajjasikkhāpadaṁ niṭṭhitaṁ dasamaṁ. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc30:2.3.9
Pali: Ovādavaggo tatiyo. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc30:2.3.10
Pali: Tassuddānaṁ 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc30:2.3.11
Pali: Asammataatthaṅgatū, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc30:2.3.12
Pali: Passayāmisadānena; 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc30:2.3.13
Pali: Sibbati addhānaṁ nāvaṁ bhuñjeyya, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc30:2.3.14
Pali: Eko ekāya te dasāti.

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc31:0.1
Pali: Theravāda Vinaya 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc31:0.2
Pali: Mahāvibhaṅga

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc31:0.4
Pali: Bhojanavagga 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc31:0.5
Pali: 31. Āvasathapiṇḍasikkhāpada 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc31:1.1
Pali: Tena samayena buddho bhagavā sāvatthiyaṁ viharati jetavane anāthapiṇḍikassa ārāme. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc31:1.2
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena sāvatthiyā avidūre aññatarassa pūgassa āvasathapiṇḍo paññatto hoti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc31:1.3
Pali: Chabbaggiyā bhikkhū pubbaṇhasamayaṁ nivāsetvā pattacīvaramādāya sāvatthiṁ piṇḍāya pavisitvā piṇḍaṁ alabhamānā āvasathaṁ agamaṁsu. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc31:1.4
Pali: Manussā—“cirassampi bhadantā āgatā”ti sakkaccaṁ parivisiṁsu. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc31:1.5
Pali: Atha kho chabbaggiyā bhikkhū dutiyampi divasaṁ …pe… tatiyampi divasaṁ pubbaṇhasamayaṁ nivāsetvā pattacīvaramādāya sāvatthiṁ piṇḍāya pavisitvā piṇḍaṁ alabhamānā āvasathaṁ gantvā bhuñjiṁsu. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc31:1.6
Pali: Atha kho chabbaggiyānaṁ bhikkhūnaṁ etadahosi—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc31:1.7
Pali: “kiṁ mayaṁ karissāma ārāmaṁ gantvā. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc31:1.8
Pali: Hiyyopi idheva āgantabbaṁ bhavissatī”ti, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc31:1.9
Pali: tattheva anuvasitvā anuvasitvā āvasathapiṇḍaṁ bhuñjanti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc31:1.10
Pali: Titthiyā apasakkanti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc31:1.11
Pali: Manussā ujjhāyanti khiyyanti vipācenti—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc31:1.12
Pali: “kathañhi nāma samaṇā sakyaputtiyā anuvasitvā anuvasitvā āvasathapiṇḍaṁ bhuñjissanti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc31:1.13
Pali: Nayimesaññeva āvasathapiṇḍo paññatto; 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc31:1.14
Pali: sabbesaññeva āvasathapiṇḍo paññatto”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc31:1.15
Pali: Assosuṁ kho bhikkhū tesaṁ manussānaṁ ujjhāyantānaṁ khiyyantānaṁ vipācentānaṁ. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc31:1.16
Pali: Ye te bhikkhū appicchā …pe… te ujjhāyanti khiyyanti vipācenti—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc31:1.17
Pali: “kathañhi nāma chabbaggiyā bhikkhū anuvasitvā anuvasitvā āvasathapiṇḍaṁ bhuñjissantī”ti …pe… 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc31:1.18
Pali: “saccaṁ kira tumhe, bhikkhave, anuvasitvā anuvasitvā āvasathapiṇḍaṁ bhuñjathā”ti? 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc31:1.19
Pali: “Saccaṁ, bhagavā”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc31:1.20
Pali: Vigarahi buddho bhagavā …pe… 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc31:1.21
Pali: kathañhi nāma tumhe, moghapurisā, anuvasitvā anuvasitvā āvasathapiṇḍaṁ bhuñjissatha. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc31:1.22
Pali: Netaṁ, moghapurisā, appasannānaṁ vā pasādāya …pe… 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc31:1.23
Pali: evañca pana, bhikkhave, imaṁ sikkhāpadaṁ uddiseyyātha—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc31:1.24.1
Pali: “Eko āvasathapiṇḍo bhuñjitabbo. Tato ce uttari bhuñjeyya, pācittiyan”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc31:1.25
Pali: Evañcidaṁ bhagavatā bhikkhūnaṁ sikkhāpadaṁ paññattaṁ hoti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc31:2.1
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena āyasmā sāriputto kosalesu janapade sāvatthiṁ gacchanto yena aññataro āvasatho tenupasaṅkami. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc31:2.2
Pali: Manussā—“cirassampi thero āgato”ti sakkaccaṁ parivisiṁsu. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc31:2.3
Pali: Atha kho āyasmato sāriputtassa bhuttāvissa kharo ābādho uppajji, nāsakkhi tamhā āvasathā pakkamituṁ. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc31:2.4
Pali: Atha kho te manussā dutiyampi divasaṁ āyasmantaṁ sāriputtaṁ etadavocuṁ—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc31:2.5
Pali: “bhuñjatha, bhante”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc31:2.6
Pali: Atha kho āyasmā sāriputto—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc31:2.7
Pali: “bhagavatā paṭikkhittaṁ anuvasitvā anuvasitvā āvasathapiṇḍaṁ bhuñjitun”ti kukkuccāyanto na paṭiggahesi; 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc31:2.8
Pali: chinnabhatto ahosi. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc31:2.9
Pali: Atha kho āyasmā sāriputto sāvatthiṁ gantvā bhikkhūnaṁ etamatthaṁ ārocesi. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc31:2.10
Pali: Bhikkhū bhagavato etamatthaṁ ārocesuṁ. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc31:2.11
Pali: Atha kho bhagavā etasmiṁ nidāne etasmiṁ pakaraṇe dhammiṁ kathaṁ katvā bhikkhū āmantesi—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc31:2.12
Pali: “anujānāmi, bhikkhave, gilānena bhikkhunā anuvasitvā anuvasitvā āvasathapiṇḍaṁ bhuñjituṁ. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc31:2.13
Pali: Evañca pana, bhikkhave, imaṁ sikkhāpadaṁ uddiseyyātha—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc31:2.14.1
Pali: “Agilānena bhikkhunā eko āvasathapiṇḍo bhuñjitabbo. Tato ce uttari bhuñjeyya, pācittiyan”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc31:3.1.1
Pali: Agilāno nāma 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc31:3.1.2
Pali: sakkoti tamhā āvasathā pakkamituṁ. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc31:3.1.3
Pali: Gilāno nāma 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc31:3.1.4
Pali: na sakkoti tamhā āvasathā pakkamituṁ. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc31:3.1.5
Pali: Āvasathapiṇḍo nāma 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc31:3.1.6
Pali: pañcannaṁ bhojanānaṁ aññataraṁ bhojanaṁ— sālāya vā maṇḍape vā rukkhamūle vā ajjhokāse vā anodissa yāvadattho paññatto hoti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc31:3.1.7
Pali: Agilānena bhikkhunā sakiṁ bhuñjitabbo. Tato ce uttari “bhuñjissāmī”ti paṭiggaṇhāti, āpatti dukkaṭassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc31:3.1.8
Pali: Ajjhohāre ajjhohāre āpatti pācittiyassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc31:3.2.1
Pali: Agilāno agilānasaññī tatuttari āvasathapiṇḍaṁ bhuñjati, āpatti pācittiyassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc31:3.2.2
Pali: Agilāno vematiko tatuttari āvasathapiṇḍaṁ bhuñjati, āpatti pācittiyassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc31:3.2.3
Pali: Agilāno gilānasaññī tatuttari āvasathapiṇḍaṁ bhuñjati, āpatti pācittiyassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc31:3.2.4
Pali: Gilāno agilānasaññī, āpatti dukkaṭassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc31:3.2.5
Pali: Gilāno vematiko āpatti dukkaṭassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc31:3.2.6
Pali: Gilāno gilānasaññī, anāpatti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc31:3.3.1
Pali: Anāpatti—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc31:3.3.2
Pali: gilānassa, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc31:3.3.3
Pali: agilāno sakiṁ bhuñjati, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc31:3.3.4
Pali: gacchanto, vā āgacchanto vā bhuñjati, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc31:3.3.5
Pali: sāmikā nimantetvā bhojenti, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc31:3.3.6
Pali: odissa paññatto hoti, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc31:3.3.7
Pali: na yāvadattho paññatto hoti, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc31:3.3.8
Pali: pañca bhojanāni ṭhapetvā sabbattha anāpatti, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc31:3.3.9
Pali: ummattakassa, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc31:3.3.10
Pali: ādikammikassāti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc31:3.3.11
Pali: Āvasathapiṇḍasikkhāpadaṁ niṭṭhitaṁ paṭhamaṁ.

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc32
Root: root/pli/ms/vinaya/pli-tv-bu-vb/pli-tv-bu-vb-pc/pli-tv-bu-vb-pc32_root-pli-ms.json

Chinese translations: 0

Pali segments

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc32:0.1
Pali: Theravāda Vinaya 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc32:0.2
Pali: Mahāvibhaṅga 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc32:0.3
Pali: Pācittiyakaṇḍa 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc32:0.4
Pali: Bhojanavagga 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc32:0.5
Pali: 32. Gaṇabhojanasikkhāpada 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc32:1.1
Pali: Tena samayena buddho bhagavā rājagahe viharati veḷuvane kalandakanivāpe. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc32:1.2
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena devadatto parihīnalābhasakkāro sapariso kulesu viññāpetvā viññāpetvā bhuñjati. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc32:1.3
Pali: Manussā ujjhāyanti khiyyanti vipācenti—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc32:1.4
Pali: “kathañhi nāma samaṇā sakyaputtiyā kulesu viññāpetvā viññāpetvā bhuñjissanti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc32:1.5
Pali: Kassa sampannaṁ na manāpaṁ, kassa sāduṁ na ruccatī”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc32:1.6
Pali: Assosuṁ kho bhikkhū tesaṁ manussānaṁ ujjhāyantānaṁ khiyyantānaṁ vipācentānaṁ. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc32:1.7
Pali: Ye te bhikkhū appicchā …pe… te ujjhāyanti khiyyanti vipācenti—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc32:1.8
Pali: “kathañhi nāma devadatto sapariso kulesu viññāpetvā viññāpetvā bhuñjissatī”ti …pe… 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc32:1.9
Pali: “saccaṁ kira tvaṁ, devadatta, sapariso kulesu viññāpetvā viññāpetvā bhuñjasī”ti? 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc32:1.10
Pali: “Saccaṁ, bhagavā”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc32:1.11
Pali: Vigarahi buddho bhagavā …pe… 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc32:1.12
Pali: kathañhi nāma tvaṁ, moghapurisa, sapariso kulesu viññāpetvā viññāpetvā bhuñjissasi. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc32:1.13
Pali: Netaṁ, moghapurisa, appasannānaṁ vā pasādāya …pe… 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc32:1.14
Pali: evañca pana, bhikkhave, imaṁ sikkhāpadaṁ uddiseyyātha—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc32:1.15.1
Pali: “Gaṇabhojane pācittiyan”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc32:1.16
Pali: Evañcidaṁ bhagavatā bhikkhūnaṁ sikkhāpadaṁ paññattaṁ hoti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc32:2.1
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena manussā gilāne bhikkhū bhattena nimantenti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc32:2.2
Pali: Bhikkhū kukkuccāyantā nādhivāsenti—“paṭikkhittaṁ bhagavatā gaṇabhojanan”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc32:2.3
Pali: Bhagavato etamatthaṁ ārocesuṁ. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc32:2.4
Pali: Atha kho bhagavā etasmiṁ nidāne etasmiṁ pakaraṇe dhammiṁ kathaṁ katvā bhikkhū āmantesi—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc32:2.5
Pali: “anujānāmi, bhikkhave, gilānena bhikkhunā gaṇabhojanaṁ bhuñjituṁ. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc32:2.6
Pali: Evañca pana, bhikkhave, imaṁ sikkhāpadaṁ uddiseyyātha—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc32:2.7.1
Pali: “Gaṇabhojane, aññatra samayā, pācittiyaṁ. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc32:2.8
Pali: Tatthāyaṁ samayo. Gilānasamayo—ayaṁ tattha samayo”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc32:2.9
Pali: Evañcidaṁ bhagavatā bhikkhūnaṁ sikkhāpadaṁ paññattaṁ hoti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc32:3.1

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc32:3.2
Pali: “bhojetvā cīvarena acchādessāmā”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc32:3.3

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc32:3.4
Pali: Cīvaraṁ parittaṁ uppajjati.

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc32:5.4
Pali: Te evamāhaṁsu—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc32:5.5
Pali: “idheva, bhante, bhuñjathā”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc32:5.6
Pali: Bhikkhū kukkuccāyantā na paṭiggaṇhanti—“paṭikkhittaṁ bhagavatā gaṇabhojanan”ti.

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc32:6.3
Pali: Te evamāhaṁsu—“idheva, bhante, bhuñjathā”ti.

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc32:6.10
Pali: Evañcidaṁ bhagavatā bhikkhūnaṁ sikkhāpadaṁ paññattaṁ hoti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc32:7.1
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena disāsu vassaṁvuṭṭhā bhikkhū rājagahaṁ āgacchanti bhagavantaṁ dassanāya. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc32:7.2
Pali: Manussā nānāverajjake bhikkhū passitvā bhattena nimantenti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc32:7.3
Pali: Bhikkhū kukkuccāyantā nādhivāsenti—“paṭikkhittaṁ bhagavatā gaṇabhojanan”ti.

Pali: Bhagavato etamatthaṁ ārocesuṁ …pe…

Pali: anujānāmi, bhikkhave, mahāsamaye gaṇabhojanaṁ bhuñjituṁ. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc32:7.6
Pali: Evañca pana, bhikkhave, imaṁ sikkhāpadaṁ uddiseyyātha—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc32:7.7.1
Pali: “Gaṇabhojane, aññatra samayā, pācittiyaṁ. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc32:7.8
Pali: Tatthāyaṁ samayo. Gilānasamayo, cīvaradānasamayo, cīvarakārasamayo, addhānagamanasamayo, nāvābhiruhanasamayo, mahāsamayo—ayaṁ tattha samayo”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc32:7.9
Pali: Evañcidaṁ bhagavatā bhikkhūnaṁ sikkhāpadaṁ paññattaṁ hoti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc32:8.1
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena rañño māgadhassa seniyassa bimbisārassa ñātisālohito ājīvakesu pabbajito hoti. Atha kho so ājīvako yena rājā māgadho seniyo bimbisāro tenupasaṅkami; upasaṅkamitvā rājānaṁ māgadhaṁ seniyaṁ bimbisāraṁ etadavoca—“icchāmahaṁ, mahārāja, sabbapāsaṇḍikabhattaṁ kātun”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc32:8.2
Pali: “Sace tvaṁ, bhante, buddhappamukhaṁ bhikkhusaṅghaṁ paṭhamaṁ bhojeyyāsi”. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc32:8.3
Pali: “Evaṁ kareyyāmī”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc32:8.4
Pali: Atha kho so ājīvako bhikkhūnaṁ santike dūtaṁ pāhesi—“adhivāsentu me bhikkhū svātanāya bhattan”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc32:8.5
Pali: Bhikkhū kukkuccāyantā nādhivāsenti—“paṭikkhittaṁ bhagavatā gaṇabhojanan”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc32:8.6
Pali: Atha kho so ājīvako yena bhagavā tenupasaṅkami; upasaṅkamitvā bhagavatā saddhiṁ sammodi, sammodanīyaṁ kathaṁ sāraṇīyaṁ vītisāretvā ekamantaṁ aṭṭhāsi. Ekamantaṁ ṭhito kho so ājīvako bhagavantaṁ etadavoca—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc32:8.7
Pali: “bhavampi gotamo pabbajito, ahampi pabbajito; 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc32:8.8
Pali: arahati pabbajito pabbajitassa piṇḍaṁ paṭiggahetuṁ. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc32:8.9
Pali: Adhivāsetu me bhavaṁ gotamo svātanāya bhattaṁ saddhiṁ bhikkhusaṅghenā”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc32:8.10
Pali: Adhivāsesi bhagavā tuṇhībhāvena. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc32:8.11
Pali: Atha kho so ājīvako bhagavato adhivāsanaṁ viditvā pakkāmi. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc32:8.12
Pali: Atha kho bhagavā etasmiṁ nidāne etasmiṁ pakaraṇe dhammiṁ kathaṁ katvā bhikkhū āmantesi—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc32:8.13
Pali: “anujānāmi, bhikkhave, samaṇabhattasamaye gaṇabhojanaṁ bhuñjituṁ. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc32:8.14
Pali: Evañca pana, bhikkhave, imaṁ sikkhāpadaṁ uddiseyyātha—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc32:8.15.1
Pali: Gaṇabhojane, aññatra samayā, pācittiyaṁ. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc32:8.16
Pali: Tatthāyaṁ samayo. Gilānasamayo, cīvaradānasamayo, cīvarakārasamayo, addhānagamanasamayo, nāvābhiruhanasamayo, mahāsamayo, samaṇabhattasamayo—ayaṁ tattha samayo”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc32:9.1.1
Pali: Gaṇabhojanaṁ nāma 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc32:9.1.2
Pali: yattha cattāro bhikkhū pañcannaṁ bhojanānaṁ aññatarena bhojanena nimantitā bhuñjanti. Etaṁ gaṇabhojanaṁ nāma. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc32:9.1.3
Pali: Aññatra samayāti 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc32:9.1.4
Pali: ṭhapetvā samayaṁ. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc32:9.1.5
Pali: Gilānasamayo nāma 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc32:9.1.6
Pali: antamaso pādāpi phalitā honti. “Gilānasamayo”ti bhuñjitabbaṁ. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc32:9.1.7
Pali: Cīvaradānasamayo nāma 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc32:9.1.8
Pali: anatthate kathine vassānassa pacchimo māso, atthate kathine pañcamāsā. “Cīvaradānasamayo”ti bhuñjitabbaṁ. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc32:9.1.9
Pali: Cīvarakārasamayo nāma 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc32:9.1.10
Pali: cīvare kayiramāne. “Cīvarakārasamayo”ti bhuñjitabbaṁ. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc32:9.1.11
Pali: Addhānagamanasamayo nāma 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc32:9.1.12
Pali: “addhayojanaṁ gacchissāmī”ti bhuñjitabbaṁ, gacchantena bhuñjitabbaṁ, gatena bhuñjitabbaṁ. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc32:9.1.13
Pali: Nāvābhiruhanasamayo nāma 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc32:9.1.14
Pali: “nāvaṁ abhiruhissāmī”ti bhuñjitabbaṁ, āruḷhena bhuñjitabbaṁ, oruḷhena bhuñjitabbaṁ. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc32:9.1.15
Pali: Mahāsamayo nāma 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc32:9.1.16
Pali: yattha dve tayo bhikkhū piṇḍāya caritvā yāpenti, catutthe āgate na yāpenti. “Mahāsamayo”ti bhuñjitabbaṁ. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc32:9.1.17
Pali: Samaṇabhattasamayo nāma 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc32:9.1.18
Pali: yo koci paribbājakasamāpanno bhattaṁ karoti. “Samaṇabhattasamayo”ti bhuñjitabbaṁ. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc32:9.1.19
Pali: “Aññatra samayā bhuñjissāmī”ti paṭiggaṇhāti, āpatti dukkaṭassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc32:9.1.20
Pali: Ajjhohāre ajjhohāre āpatti pācittiyassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc32:9.2.1
Pali: Gaṇabhojane gaṇabhojanasaññī, aññatra samayā, bhuñjati, āpatti pācittiyassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc32:9.2.2
Pali: Gaṇabhojane vematiko, aññatra samayā, bhuñjati, āpatti pācittiyassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc32:9.2.3
Pali: Gaṇabhojane nagaṇabhojanasaññī, aññatra samayā, bhuñjati, āpatti pācittiyassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc32:9.2.4
Pali: Nagaṇabhojane gaṇabhojanasaññī, āpatti dukkaṭassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc32:9.2.5
Pali: Nagaṇabhojane vematiko, āpatti dukkaṭassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc32:9.2.6
Pali: Nagaṇabhojane nagaṇabhojanasaññī, anāpatti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc32:9.3.1
Pali: Anāpatti—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc32:9.3.2
Pali: samaye, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc32:9.3.3
Pali: dve tayo ekato bhuñjanti, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc32:9.3.4
Pali: piṇḍāya caritvā ekato sannipatitvā bhuñjanti, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc32:9.3.5
Pali: niccabhattaṁ, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc32:9.3.6
Pali: salākabhattaṁ, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc32:9.3.7
Pali: pakkhikaṁ, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc32:9.3.8
Pali: uposathikaṁ, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc32:9.3.9
Pali: pāṭipadikaṁ, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc32:9.3.10
Pali: pañca bhojanāni ṭhapetvā sabbattha anāpatti, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc32:9.3.11
Pali: ummattakassa, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc32:9.3.12
Pali: ādikammikassāti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc32:9.3.13
Pali: Gaṇabhojanasikkhāpadaṁ niṭṭhitaṁ dutiyaṁ.
