pli-tv-bu-vb-pc47:0.5
Pali: 47. Mahānāmasikkhāpada 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc47:1.1.1
Pali: Tena samayena buddho bhagavā sakkesu viharati kapilavatthusmiṁ nigrodhārāme. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc47:1.1.2
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena mahānāmassa sakkassa bhesajjaṁ ussannaṁ hoti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc47:1.1.3
Pali: Atha kho mahānāmo sakko yena bhagavā tenupasaṅkami; upasaṅkamitvā bhagavantaṁ abhivādetvā ekamantaṁ nisīdi. Ekamantaṁ nisinno kho mahānāmo sakko bhagavantaṁ etadavoca—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc47:1.1.4
Pali: “icchāmahaṁ, bhante, saṅghaṁ catumāsaṁ bhesajjena pavāretun”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc47:1.1.5
Pali: “Sādhu sādhu, mahānāma. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc47:1.1.6
Pali: Tena hi tvaṁ, mahānāma, saṅghaṁ catumāsaṁ bhesajjena pavārehī”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc47:1.1.7
Pali: Bhikkhū kukkuccāyantā nādhivāsenti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc47:1.1.8
Pali: Bhagavato etamatthaṁ ārocesuṁ …pe… 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc47:1.1.9
Pali: anujānāmi, bhikkhave, catumāsaṁ bhesajjappaccayapavāraṇaṁ sāditun”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc47:1.2.1
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena bhikkhū mahānāmaṁ sakkaṁ parittaṁ bhesajjaṁ viññāpenti. Tatheva mahānāmassa sakkassa bhesajjaṁ ussannaṁ hoti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc47:1.2.2
Pali: Dutiyampi kho mahānāmo sakko yena bhagavā tenupasaṅkami; upasaṅkamitvā bhagavantaṁ abhivādetvā ekamantaṁ nisīdi. Ekamantaṁ nisinno kho mahānāmo sakko bhagavantaṁ etadavoca—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc47:1.2.3
Pali: “icchāmahaṁ, bhante, saṅghaṁ aparampi catumāsaṁ bhesajjena pavāretun”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc47:1.2.4
Pali: “Sādhu sādhu, mahānāma. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc47:1.2.5
Pali: Tena hi tvaṁ, mahānāma, saṅghaṁ aparampi catumāsaṁ bhesajjena pavārehī”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc47:1.2.6
Pali: Bhikkhū kukkuccāyantā nādhivāsenti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc47:1.2.7
Pali: Bhagavato etamatthaṁ ārocesuṁ …pe… 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc47:1.2.8
Pali: anujānāmi, bhikkhave, puna pavāraṇampi sāditun”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc47:1.3.1
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena bhikkhū mahānāmaṁ sakkaṁ parittaṁyeva bhesajjaṁ viññāpenti. Tatheva mahānāmassa sakkassa bhesajjaṁ ussannaṁ hoti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc47:1.3.2
Pali: Tatiyampi kho mahānāmo sakko yena bhagavā tenupasaṅkami; upasaṅkamitvā bhagavantaṁ abhivādetvā ekamantaṁ nisīdi. Ekamantaṁ nisinno kho mahānāmo sakko bhagavantaṁ etadavoca—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc47:1.3.3
Pali: “icchāmahaṁ, bhante, saṅghaṁ yāvajīvaṁ bhesajjena pavāretun”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc47:1.3.4
Pali: “Sādhu sādhu, mahānāma. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc47:1.3.5
Pali: Tena hi tvaṁ, mahānāma, saṅghaṁ yāvajīvaṁ bhesajjena pavārehī”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc47:1.3.6
Pali: Bhikkhū kukkuccāyantā nādhivāsenti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc47:1.3.7

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc47:1.3.8
Pali: anujānāmi, bhikkhave, niccapavāraṇampi sāditun”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc47:1.4.1
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena chabbaggiyā bhikkhū dunnivatthā honti duppārutā anākappasampannā. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc47:1.4.2
Pali: Mahānāmo sakko vattā hoti—“kissa tumhe, bhante, dunnivatthā duppārutā anākappasampannā? 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc47:1.4.3
Pali: Nanu nāma pabbajitena sunivatthena bhavitabbaṁ supārutena ākappasampannenā”ti? 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc47:1.4.4
Pali: Chabbaggiyā bhikkhū mahānāme sakke upanandhiṁsu. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc47:1.4.5
Pali: Atha kho chabbaggiyānaṁ bhikkhūnaṁ etadahosi—“kena nu kho mayaṁ upāyena mahānāmaṁ sakkaṁ maṅkuṁ kareyyāmā”ti? Atha kho chabbaggiyānaṁ bhikkhūnaṁ etadahosi—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc47:1.4.6
Pali: “mahānāmena kho, āvuso, sakkena saṅgho bhesajjena pavārito. Handa mayaṁ, āvuso, mahānāmaṁ sakkaṁ sappiṁ viññāpemā”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc47:1.4.7
Pali: Atha kho chabbaggiyā bhikkhū yena mahānāmo sakko tenupasaṅkamiṁsu; upasaṅkamitvā mahānāmaṁ sakkaṁ etadavocuṁ—“doṇena, āvuso, sappinā attho”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc47:1.4.8
Pali: “Ajjaṇho, bhante, āgametha. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc47:1.4.9
Pali: Manussā vajaṁ gatā sappiṁ āharituṁ. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc47:1.4.10
Pali: Kālaṁ āharissathā”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc47:1.4.11
Pali: Dutiyampi kho …pe… 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc47:1.4.12
Pali: tatiyampi kho chabbaggiyā bhikkhū mahānāmaṁ sakkaṁ etadavocuṁ—“doṇena, āvuso, sappinā attho”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc47:1.4.13
Pali: “Ajjaṇho, bhante, āgametha. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc47:1.4.14
Pali: Manussā vajaṁ gatā sappiṁ āharituṁ. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc47:1.4.15
Pali: Kālaṁ āharissathā”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc47:1.4.16
Pali: “Kiṁ pana tayā, āvuso, adātukāmena pavāritena, yaṁ tvaṁ pavāretvā na desī”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc47:1.4.17
Pali: Atha kho mahānāmo sakko ujjhāyati khiyyati vipāceti—“kathañhi nāma bhadantā—‘ajjaṇho, bhante, āgamethā’ti vuccamānā nāgamessantī”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc47:1.4.18
Pali: Assosuṁ kho bhikkhū mahānāmassa sakkassa ujjhāyantassa khiyyantassa vipācentassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc47:1.4.19
Pali: Ye te bhikkhū appicchā …pe… te ujjhāyanti khiyyanti vipācenti—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc47:1.4.20
Pali: “kathañhi nāma chabbaggiyā bhikkhū mahānāmena sakkena—‘ajjaṇho, bhante, āgamethā’ti vuccamānā nāgamessantī”ti …pe… 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc47:1.4.21
Pali: “saccaṁ kira tumhe, bhikkhave, mahānāmena sakkena—‘ajjaṇho, bhante, āgamethā’ti vuccamānā nāgamethā”ti? 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc47:1.4.22
Pali: “Saccaṁ, bhagavā”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc47:1.4.23
Pali: Vigarahi buddho bhagavā …pe… 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc47:1.4.24
Pali: kathañhi nāma tumhe, moghapurisā, mahānāmena sakkena—“ajjaṇho, bhante, āgamethā”ti vuccamānā nāgamessatha. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc47:1.4.25
Pali: Netaṁ, moghapurisā, appasannānaṁ vā pasādāya …pe… 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc47:1.4.26
Pali: evañca pana, bhikkhave, imaṁ sikkhāpadaṁ uddiseyyātha—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc47:1.4.27.1
Pali: “Agilānena bhikkhunā catumāsappaccayapavāraṇā sāditabbā, aññatra punapavāraṇāya, aññatra niccapavāraṇāya; tato ce uttari sādiyeyya, pācittiyan”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc47:2.1.1
Pali: Agilānena bhikkhunā catumāsappaccayapavāraṇā sāditabbāti 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc47:2.1.2
Pali: gilānappaccayapavāraṇā sāditabbā. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc47:2.1.3
Pali: Punapavāraṇāpi sāditabbāti 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc47:2.1.4
Pali: yadā gilāno bhavissāmi tadā viññāpessāmīti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc47:2.1.5
Pali: Niccapavāraṇāpi sāditabbāti 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc47:2.1.6
Pali: yadā gilāno bhavissāmi tadā viññāpessāmīti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc47:2.1.7
Pali: Tato ce uttari sādiyeyyāti 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc47:2.1.8
Pali: atthi pavāraṇā bhesajjapariyantā na rattipariyantā, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc47:2.1.9
Pali: atthi pavāraṇā rattipariyantā na bhesajjapariyantā, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc47:2.1.10
Pali: atthi pavāraṇā bhesajjapariyantā ca rattipariyantā ca, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc47:2.1.11
Pali: atthi pavāraṇā neva bhesajjapariyantā na rattipariyantā. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc47:2.1.12
Pali: Bhesajjapariyantā nāma 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc47:2.1.13
Pali: bhesajjāni pariggahitāni honti—“ettakehi bhesajjehi pavāremī”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc47:2.1.14
Pali: Rattipariyantā nāma 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc47:2.1.15
Pali: rattiyo pariggahitāyo honti—“ettakāsu rattīsu pavāremī”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc47:2.1.16
Pali: Bhesajjapariyantā ca rattipariyantā ca nāma 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc47:2.1.17
Pali: bhesajjāni ca pariggahitāni honti rattiyo ca pariggahitāyo honti—“ettakehi bhesajjehi ettakāsu rattīsu pavāremī”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc47:2.1.18
Pali: Neva bhesajjapariyantā na rattipariyantā nāma 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc47:2.1.19
Pali: bhesajjāni ca apariggahitāni honti rattiyo ca apariggahitāyo honti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc47:2.1.20
Pali: Bhesajjapariyante—yehi bhesajjehi pavārito hoti tāni bhesajjāni ṭhapetvā aññāni bhesajjāni viññāpeti, āpatti pācittiyassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc47:2.1.21
Pali: Rattipariyante—yāsu rattīsu pavārito hoti, tā rattiyo ṭhapetvā aññāsu rattīsu viññāpeti, āpatti pācittiyassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc47:2.1.22
Pali: Bhesajjapariyante ca rattipariyante ca—yehi bhesajjehi pavārito hoti, tāni bhesajjāni ṭhapetvā yāsu rattīsu pavārito hoti, tā rattiyo ṭhapetvā aññāni bhesajjāni aññāsu rattīsu viññāpeti, āpatti pācittiyassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc47:2.1.23
Pali: Neva bhesajjapariyante na rattipariyante, anāpatti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc47:2.2.1
Pali: Na bhesajjena karaṇīyena bhesajjaṁ viññāpeti, āpatti pācittiyassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc47:2.2.2
Pali: Aññena bhesajjena karaṇīyena aññaṁ bhesajjaṁ viññāpeti, āpatti pācittiyassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc47:2.2.3.1
Pali: Tatuttari tatuttarisaññī bhesajjaṁ viññāpeti, āpatti pācittiyassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc47:2.2.4
Pali: Tatuttari vematiko bhesajjaṁ viññāpeti, āpatti pācittiyassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc47:2.2.5
Pali: Tatuttari natatuttarisaññī bhesajjaṁ viññāpeti, āpatti pācittiyassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc47:2.2.6
Pali: Natatuttari tatuttarisaññī, āpatti dukkaṭassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc47:2.2.7
Pali: Natatuttari vematiko, āpatti dukkaṭassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc47:2.2.8
Pali: Natatuttari natatuttarisaññī, anāpatti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc47:2.3.1
Pali: Anāpatti—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc47:2.3.2
Pali: yehi bhesajjehi pavārito hoti tāni bhesajjāni viññāpeti, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc47:2.3.3
Pali: yāsu rattīsu pavārito hoti tāsu rattīsu viññāpeti, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc47:2.3.4
Pali: “imehi tayā bhesajjehi pavāritāmha, amhākañca iminā ca iminā ca bhesajjena attho”ti ācikkhitvā viññāpeti, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc47:2.3.5
Pali: “yāsu tayā rattīsu pavāritāmha tāyo ca rattiyo vītivattā amhākañca bhesajjena attho”ti ācikkhitvā viññāpeti, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc47:2.3.6
Pali: ñātakānaṁ 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc47:2.3.7
Pali: pavāritānaṁ, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc47:2.3.8
Pali: aññassatthāya, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc47:2.3.9
Pali: attano dhanena, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc47:2.3.10
Pali: ummattakassa, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc47:2.3.11
Pali: ādikammikassāti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc47:2.3.12
Pali: Mahānāmasikkhāpadaṁ niṭṭhitaṁ sattamaṁ.

Pali: Acelakavagga 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc48:0.5
Pali: 48. Uyyuttasenāsikkhāpada 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc48:1.1
Pali: Tena samayena buddho bhagavā sāvatthiyaṁ viharati jetavane anāthapiṇḍikassa ārāme. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc48:1.2
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena rājā pasenadi kosalo senāya abbhuyyāto hoti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc48:1.3
Pali: Chabbaggiyā bhikkhū uyyuttaṁ senaṁ dassanāya agamaṁsu. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc48:1.4
Pali: Addasā kho rājā pasenadi kosalo chabbaggiye bhikkhū dūratova āgacchante. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc48:1.5
Pali: Disvāna pakkosāpetvā etadavoca—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc48:1.6
Pali: “kissa tumhe, bhante, āgatatthā”ti? 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc48:1.7
Pali: “Mahārājānaṁ mayaṁ daṭṭhukāmā”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc48:1.8
Pali: “Kiṁ, bhante, maṁ diṭṭhena yuddhābhinandinaṁ; 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc48:1.9
Pali: nanu bhagavā passitabbo”ti? 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc48:1.10
Pali: Manussā ujjhāyanti khiyyanti vipācenti—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc48:1.11
Pali: “kathañhi nāma samaṇā sakyaputtiyā uyyuttaṁ senaṁ dassanāya āgacchissanti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc48:1.12
Pali: Amhākampi alābhā, amhākampi dulladdhaṁ, ye mayaṁ ājīvassa hetu puttadārassa kāraṇā senāya āgacchāmā”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc48:1.13
Pali: Assosuṁ kho bhikkhū tesaṁ manussānaṁ ujjhāyantānaṁ khiyyantānaṁ vipācentānaṁ. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc48:1.14
Pali: Ye te bhikkhū appicchā …pe… te ujjhāyanti khiyyanti vipācenti—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc48:1.15
Pali: “kathañhi nāma chabbaggiyā bhikkhū uyyuttaṁ senaṁ dassanāya gacchissantī”ti …pe… 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc48:1.16
Pali: “saccaṁ kira tumhe, bhikkhave, uyyuttaṁ senaṁ dassanāya gacchathā”ti? 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc48:1.17
Pali: “Saccaṁ, bhagavā”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc48:1.18
Pali: Vigarahi buddho bhagavā …pe… 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc48:1.19
Pali: kathañhi nāma tumhe, moghapurisā, uyyuttaṁ senaṁ dassanāya gacchissatha. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc48:1.20
Pali: Netaṁ, moghapurisā, appasannānaṁ vā pasādāya …pe… 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc48:1.21
Pali: evañca pana, bhikkhave, imaṁ sikkhāpadaṁ uddiseyyātha—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc48:1.22.1
Pali: “Yo pana bhikkhu uyyuttaṁ senaṁ dassanāya gaccheyya, pācittiyan”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc48:1.23
Pali: Evañcidaṁ bhagavatā bhikkhūnaṁ sikkhāpadaṁ paññattaṁ hoti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc48:2.1
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena aññatarassa bhikkhuno mātulo senāya gilāno hoti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc48:2.2
Pali: So tassa bhikkhuno santike dūtaṁ pāhesi—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc48:2.3
Pali: “ahañhi senāya gilāno. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc48:2.4
Pali: Āgacchatu bhadanto. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc48:2.5
Pali: Icchāmi bhadantassa āgatan”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc48:2.6
Pali: Atha kho tassa bhikkhuno etadahosi—“bhagavatā sikkhāpadaṁ paññattaṁ—‘na uyyuttaṁ senaṁ dassanāya gantabban’ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc48:2.7
Pali: Ayañca me mātulo senāya gilāno. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc48:2.8
Pali: Kathaṁ nu kho mayā paṭipajjitabban”ti? 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc48:2.9
Pali: Bhagavato etamatthaṁ ārocesi. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc48:2.10
Pali: Atha kho bhagavā etasmiṁ nidāne etasmiṁ pakaraṇe dhammiṁ kathaṁ katvā bhikkhū āmantesi—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc48:2.11
Pali: “anujānāmi, bhikkhave, tathārūpappaccayā senāya gantuṁ. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc48:2.12
Pali: Evañca pana, bhikkhave, imaṁ sikkhāpadaṁ uddiseyyātha—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc48:2.13.1
Pali: “Yo pana bhikkhu uyyuttaṁ senaṁ dassanāya gaccheyya, aññatra tathārūpappaccayā, pācittiyan”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc48:3.1.1
Pali: Yo panāti 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc48:3.1.2
Pali: yo yādiso …pe… 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc48:3.1.3
Pali: bhikkhūti 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc48:3.1.4
Pali: …pe… ayaṁ imasmiṁ atthe adhippeto bhikkhūti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc48:3.1.5
Pali: Uyyuttā nāma senā 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc48:3.1.6
Pali: gāmato nikkhamitvā niviṭṭhā vā hoti payātā vā. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc48:3.1.7
Pali: Senā nāma 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc48:3.1.8
Pali: hatthī assā rathā pattī. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc48:3.1.9
Pali: Dvādasapuriso hatthī, tipuriso asso, catupuriso ratho, cattāro purisā sarahatthā patti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc48:3.1.10
Pali: Dassanāya gacchati, āpatti dukkaṭassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc48:3.1.11
Pali: Yattha ṭhito passati, āpatti pācittiyassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc48:3.1.12
Pali: Dassanūpacāraṁ vijahitvā punappunaṁ passati, āpatti pācittiyassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc48:3.1.13
Pali: Aññatra tathārūpappaccayāti 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc48:3.1.14
Pali: ṭhapetvā tathārūpappaccayaṁ. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc48:3.2.1
Pali: Uyyutte uyyuttasaññī dassanāya gacchati, aññatra tathārūpappaccayā, āpatti pācittiyassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc48:3.2.2
Pali: Uyyutte vematiko dassanāya gacchati, aññatra tathārūpappaccayā, āpatti pācittiyassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc48:3.2.3
Pali: Uyyutte anuyyuttasaññī dassanāya gacchati, aññatra tathārūpappaccayā, āpatti pācittiyassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc48:3.2.4
Pali: Ekamekaṁ dassanāya gacchati, āpatti dukkaṭassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc48:3.2.5
Pali: Yattha ṭhito passati, āpatti dukkaṭassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc48:3.2.6
Pali: Dassanūpacāraṁ vijahitvā punappunaṁ passati, āpatti dukkaṭassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc48:3.2.7
Pali: Anuyyutte uyyuttasaññī, āpatti dukkaṭassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc48:3.2.8
Pali: Anuyyutte vematiko, āpatti dukkaṭassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc48:3.2.9
Pali: Anuyyutte anuyyuttasaññī, anāpatti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc48:3.3.1
Pali: Anāpatti—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc48:3.3.2
Pali: ārāme ṭhito passati, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc48:3.3.3
Pali: bhikkhussa ṭhitokāsaṁ vā nisinnokāsaṁ vā nipannokāsaṁ vā āgacchati, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc48:3.3.4
Pali: paṭipathaṁ gacchanto passati, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc48:3.3.5
Pali: tathārūpappaccayā, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc48:3.3.6
Pali: āpadāsu, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc48:3.3.7
Pali: ummattakassa, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc48:3.3.8
Pali: ādikammikassāti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc48:3.3.9
Pali: Uyyuttasenāsikkhāpadaṁ niṭṭhitaṁ aṭṭhamaṁ.

Pali: 49. Senāvāsasikkhāpada

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc49:1.2
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena chabbaggiyā bhikkhū sati karaṇīye senaṁ gantvā atirekatirattaṁ senāya vasanti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc49:1.3
Pali: Manussā ujjhāyanti khiyyanti vipācenti—

Pali: Ye te bhikkhū appicchā …pe… te ujjhāyanti khiyyanti vipācenti—

Pali: “Saccaṁ, bhagavā”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc49:1.11
Pali: Vigarahi buddho bhagavā …pe… 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc49:1.12

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc49:1.14
Pali: evañca pana, bhikkhave, imaṁ sikkhāpadaṁ uddiseyyātha—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc49:1.15.1
Pali: “Siyā ca tassa bhikkhuno kocideva paccayo senaṁ gamanāya, dirattatirattaṁ tena bhikkhunā senāya vasitabbaṁ. Tato ce uttari vaseyya, pācittiyan”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc49:2.1.1
Pali: Siyā ca tassa bhikkhuno kocideva paccayo senaṁ gamanāyāti 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc49:2.1.2
Pali: siyā paccayo siyā karaṇīyaṁ. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc49:2.1.3
Pali: Dirattatirattaṁ tena bhikkhunā senāya vasitabbanti 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc49:2.1.4
Pali: dvetisso rattiyo vasitabbaṁ. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc49:2.1.5
Pali: Tato ce uttari vaseyyāti 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc49:2.1.6
Pali: catutthe divase atthaṅgate sūriye senāya vasati, āpatti pācittiyassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc49:2.2.1
Pali: Atirekatiratte atirekasaññī senāya vasati, āpatti pācittiyassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc49:2.2.2
Pali: Atirekatiratte vematiko senāya vasati, āpatti pācittiyassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc49:2.2.3

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc49:2.2.4
Pali: Ūnakatiratte atirekasaññī, āpatti dukkaṭassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc49:2.2.5
Pali: Ūnakatiratte vematiko, āpatti dukkaṭassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc49:2.2.6
Pali: Ūnakatiratte ūnakasaññī, anāpatti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc49:2.3.1
Pali: Anāpatti—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc49:2.3.2
Pali: dvetisso rattiyo vasati, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc49:2.3.3
Pali: ūnakadvetisso rattiyo vasati, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc49:2.3.4
Pali: dve rattiyo vasitvā tatiyāya rattiyā purāruṇā nikkhamitvā puna vasati, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc49:2.3.5
Pali: gilāno vasati, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc49:2.3.6
Pali: gilānassa karaṇīyena vasati, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc49:2.3.7
Pali: senā vā paṭisenāya ruddhā hoti, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc49:2.3.8
Pali: kenaci palibuddho hoti, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc49:2.3.9
Pali: āpadāsu, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc49:2.3.10
Pali: ummattakassa, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc49:2.3.11
Pali: ādikammikassāti.

Pali segments

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc50:0.1
Pali: Theravāda Vinaya 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc50:0.2
Pali: Mahāvibhaṅga 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc50:0.3
Pali: Pācittiyakaṇḍa 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc50:0.4
Pali: Acelakavagga 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc50:0.5
Pali: 50. Uyyodhikasikkhāpada 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc50:1.1
Pali: Tena samayena buddho bhagavā sāvatthiyaṁ viharati jetavane anāthapiṇḍikassa ārāme. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc50:1.2
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena chabbaggiyā bhikkhū dirattatirattaṁ senāya vasamānā uyyodhikampi balaggampi senābyūhampi anīkadassanampi gacchanti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc50:1.3
Pali: Aññataropi chabbaggiyo bhikkhu uyyodhikaṁ gantvā kaṇḍena paṭividdho hoti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc50:1.4
Pali: Manussā taṁ bhikkhuṁ uppaṇḍesuṁ—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc50:1.5
Pali: “kacci, bhante, suyuddhaṁ ahosi, kati te lakkhāni laddhānī”ti? 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc50:1.6
Pali: So bhikkhu tehi manussehi uppaṇḍiyamāno maṅku ahosi. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc50:1.7
Pali: Manussā ujjhāyanti khiyyanti vipācenti—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc50:1.8
Pali: “kathañhi nāma samaṇā sakyaputtiyā uyyodhikaṁ dassanāya āgacchissanti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc50:1.9
Pali: Amhākampi alābhā, amhākampi dulladdhaṁ, ye mayaṁ ājīvassa hetu puttadārassa kāraṇā uyyodhikaṁ āgacchāmā”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc50:1.10
Pali: Assosuṁ kho bhikkhū tesaṁ manussānaṁ ujjhāyantānaṁ khiyyantānaṁ vipācentānaṁ. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc50:1.11
Pali: Ye te bhikkhū appicchā …pe… te ujjhāyanti khiyyanti vipācenti—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc50:1.12
Pali: “kathañhi nāma chabbaggiyā bhikkhū uyyodhikaṁ dassanāya gacchissantī”ti …pe… 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc50:1.13
Pali: “saccaṁ kira tumhe, bhikkhave, uyyodhikaṁ dassanāya gacchathā”ti? 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc50:1.14
Pali: “Saccaṁ, bhagavā”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc50:1.15
Pali: Vigarahi buddho bhagavā …pe… 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc50:1.16
Pali: kathañhi nāma tumhe, moghapurisā, uyyodhikaṁ dassanāya gacchissatha. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc50:1.17
Pali: Netaṁ, moghapurisā, appasannānaṁ vā pasādāya …pe… 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc50:1.18
Pali: evañca pana, bhikkhave, imaṁ sikkhāpadaṁ uddiseyyātha—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc50:1.19.1
Pali: “Dirattatirattañce bhikkhu senāya vasamāno uyyodhikaṁ vā balaggaṁ vā senābyūhaṁ vā anīkadassanaṁ vā gaccheyya, pācittiyan”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc50:2.1.1
Pali: Dirattatirattañce bhikkhu senāya vasamānoti 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc50:2.1.2
Pali: dvetisso rattiyo vasamāno. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc50:2.1.3
Pali: Uyyodhikaṁ nāma 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc50:2.1.4
Pali: yattha sampahāro dissati. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc50:2.1.5
Pali: Balaggaṁ nāma 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc50:2.1.6
Pali: ettakā hatthī, ettakā assā, ettakā rathā, ettakā pattī. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc50:2.1.7
Pali: Senābyūhaṁ nāma 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc50:2.1.8
Pali: ito hatthī hontu, ito assā hontu, ito rathā hontu, ito pattikā hontu. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc50:2.1.9
Pali: Anīkaṁ nāma 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc50:2.1.10
Pali: hatthānīkaṁ, assānīkaṁ, rathānīkaṁ, pattānīkaṁ. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc50:2.1.11
Pali: Tayo hatthī pacchimaṁ hatthānīkaṁ, tayo assā pacchimaṁ assānīkaṁ, tayo rathā pacchimaṁ rathānīkaṁ, cattāro purisā sarahatthā pattī pacchimaṁ pattānīkaṁ. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc50:2.1.12
Pali: Dassanāya gacchati, āpatti dukkaṭassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc50:2.1.13
Pali: Yattha ṭhito passati, āpatti pācittiyassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc50:2.1.14
Pali: Dassanūpacāraṁ vijahitvā punappunaṁ passati, āpatti pācittiyassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc50:2.2.1
Pali: Ekamekaṁ dassanāya gacchati, āpatti dukkaṭassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc50:2.2.2
Pali: Yattha ṭhito passati, āpatti dukkaṭassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc50:2.2.3
Pali: Dassanūpacāraṁ vijahitvā punappunaṁ passati, āpatti dukkaṭassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc50:2.3.1
Pali: Anāpatti—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc50:2.3.2
Pali: ārāme ṭhito passati, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc50:2.3.3
Pali: bhikkhussa ṭhitokāsaṁ vā nisinnokāsaṁ vā nipannokāsaṁ vā āgantvā sampahāro dissati, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc50:2.3.4
Pali: paṭipathaṁ gacchanto passati, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc50:2.3.5
Pali: sati karaṇīye gantvā passati, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc50:2.3.6
Pali: āpadāsu, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc50:2.3.7
Pali: ummattakassa, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc50:2.3.8
Pali: ādikammikassāti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc50:2.3.9
Pali: Uyyodhikasikkhāpadaṁ niṭṭhitaṁ dasamaṁ. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc50:2.3.10
Pali: Acelakavaggo pañcamo. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc50:2.3.11
Pali: Tassuddānaṁ 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc50:2.3.12
Pali: Pūvaṁ kathopanandassa, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc50:2.3.13
Pali: tayaṁpaṭṭhākameva ca; 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc50:2.3.14
Pali: Mahānāmo pasenadi, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc50:2.3.15
Pali: senāviddho ime dasāti.

Pali segments

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc51:0.1
Pali: Theravāda Vinaya 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc51:0.2
Pali: Mahāvibhaṅga 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc51:0.3
Pali: Pācittiyakaṇḍa 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc51:0.4
Pali: Surāpānavagga 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc51:0.5
Pali: 51. Surāpānasikkhāpada 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc51:1.1
Pali: Tena samayena buddho bhagavā cetiyesu cārikaṁ caramāno yena bhaddavatikā tena pāyāsi. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc51:1.2
Pali: Addasaṁsu kho gopālakā pasupālakā kassakā pathāvino bhagavantaṁ dūratova āgacchantaṁ. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc51:1.3
Pali: Disvāna bhagavantaṁ etadavocuṁ—“mā kho, bhante, bhagavā ambatitthaṁ agamāsi. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc51:1.4
Pali: Ambatitthe, bhante, jaṭilassa assame nāgo paṭivasati iddhimā āsiviso ghoraviso. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc51:1.5
Pali: So bhagavantaṁ mā viheṭhesī”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc51:1.6
Pali: Evaṁ vutte, bhagavā tuṇhī ahosi. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc51:1.7
Pali: Dutiyampi kho …pe… 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc51:1.8
Pali: tatiyampi kho gopālakā pasupālakā kassakā pathāvino bhagavantaṁ etadavocuṁ—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc51:1.9
Pali: “mā kho, bhante, bhagavā ambatitthaṁ agamāsi. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc51:1.10
Pali: Ambatitthe, bhante, jaṭilassa assame nāgo paṭivasati iddhimā āsiviso ghoraviso. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc51:1.11
Pali: So bhagavantaṁ mā viheṭhesī”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc51:1.12
Pali: Tatiyampi kho bhagavā tuṇhī ahosi. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc51:1.13
Pali: Atha kho bhagavā anupubbena cārikaṁ caramāno yena bhaddavatikā tadavasari. Tatra sudaṁ bhagavā bhaddavatikāyaṁ viharati. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc51:1.14
Pali: Atha kho āyasmā sāgato yena ambatitthassa jaṭilassa assamo tenupasaṅkami; upasaṅkamitvā agyāgāraṁ pavisitvā tiṇasanthārakaṁ paññapetvā nisīdi pallaṅkaṁ ābhujitvā ujuṁ kāyaṁ paṇidhāya parimukhaṁ satiṁ upaṭṭhapetvā. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc51:1.15
Pali: Addasā kho so nāgo āyasmantaṁ sāgataṁ paviṭṭhaṁ. Disvāna dummano padhūpāyi. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc51:1.16
Pali: Āyasmāpi sāgato padhūpāyi. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc51:1.17
Pali: Atha kho so nāgo makkhaṁ asahamāno pajjali. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc51:1.18
Pali: Āyasmāpi sāgato tejodhātuṁ samāpajjitvā pajjali. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc51:1.19
Pali: Atha kho āyasmā sāgato tassa nāgassa tejasā tejaṁ pariyādiyitvā yena bhaddavatikā tenupasaṅkami. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc51:1.20
Pali: Atha kho bhagavā bhaddavatikāyaṁ yathābhirantaṁ viharitvā yena kosambī tena cārikaṁ pakkāmi. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc51:1.21
Pali: Assosuṁ kho kosambikā upāsakā—“ayyo kira sāgato ambatitthikena nāgena saddhiṁ saṅgāmesī”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc51:1.22
Pali: Atha kho bhagavā anupubbena cārikaṁ caramāno yena kosambī tadavasari. Atha kho kosambikā upāsakā bhagavato paccuggamanaṁ karitvā yenāyasmā sāgato tenupasaṅkamiṁsu; 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc51:1.23
Pali: upasaṅkamitvā āyasmantaṁ sāgataṁ abhivādetvā ekamantaṁ aṭṭhaṁsu. Ekamantaṁ ṭhitā kho kosambikā upāsakā āyasmantaṁ sāgataṁ etadavocuṁ—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc51:1.24
Pali: “kiṁ, bhante, ayyānaṁ dullabhañca manāpañca, kiṁ paṭiyādemā”ti? 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc51:1.25
Pali: Evaṁ vutte, chabbaggiyā bhikkhū kosambike upāsake etadavocuṁ—“atthāvuso, kāpotikā nāma pasannā bhikkhūnaṁ dullabhā ca manāpā ca, taṁ paṭiyādethā”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc51:1.26
Pali: Atha kho kosambikā upāsakā ghare ghare kāpotikaṁ pasannaṁ paṭiyādetvā āyasmantaṁ sāgataṁ piṇḍāya paviṭṭhaṁ disvāna āyasmantaṁ sāgataṁ etadavocuṁ—“pivatu, bhante, ayyo sāgato kāpotikaṁ pasannaṁ, pivatu, bhante, ayyo sāgato kāpotikaṁ pasannan”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc51:1.27
Pali: Atha kho āyasmā sāgato ghare ghare kāpotikaṁ pasannaṁ pivitvā nagaramhā nikkhamanto nagaradvāre paripati. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc51:1.28
Pali: Atha kho bhagavā sambahulehi bhikkhūhi saddhiṁ nagaramhā nikkhamanto addasa āyasmantaṁ sāgataṁ nagaradvāre paripatantaṁ. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc51:1.29
Pali: Disvāna bhikkhū āmantesi—“gaṇhatha, bhikkhave, sāgatan”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc51:1.30
Pali: “Evaṁ, bhante”ti kho te bhikkhū bhagavato paṭissuṇitvā āyasmantaṁ sāgataṁ ārāmaṁ netvā yena bhagavā tena sīsaṁ katvā nipātesuṁ. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc51:1.31
Pali: Atha kho āyasmā sāgato parivattitvā yena bhagavā tena pāde karitvā seyyaṁ kappesi. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc51:1.32
Pali: Atha kho bhagavā bhikkhū āmantesi—“nanu, bhikkhave, pubbe sāgato tathāgate sagāravo ahosi sappatisso”ti? 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc51:1.33
Pali: “Evaṁ, bhante”. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc51:1.34
Pali: “Api nu kho, bhikkhave, sāgato etarahi tathāgate sagāravo sappatisso”ti? 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc51:1.35
Pali: “No hetaṁ, bhante”. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc51:1.36
Pali: “Nanu, bhikkhave, sāgato ambatitthikena nāgena saddhiṁ saṅgāmesī”ti? 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc51:1.37
Pali: “Evaṁ, bhante”. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc51:1.38
Pali: “Api nu kho, bhikkhave, sāgato etarahi pahoti nāgena saddhiṁ saṅgāmetun”ti? 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc51:1.39
Pali: “No hetaṁ, bhante”. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc51:1.40
Pali: “Api nu kho, bhikkhave, taṁ pātabbaṁ yaṁ pivitvā visaññī assā”ti? 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc51:1.41
Pali: “No hetaṁ, bhante”. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc51:1.42
Pali: “Ananucchavikaṁ, bhikkhave, sāgatassa ananulomikaṁ appatirūpaṁ assāmaṇakaṁ akappiyaṁ akaraṇīyaṁ. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc51:1.43
Pali: Kathañhi nāma, bhikkhave, sāgato majjaṁ pivissati. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc51:1.44
Pali: Netaṁ, bhikkhave, appasannānaṁ vā pasādāya …pe… 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc51:1.45
Pali: evañca pana, bhikkhave, imaṁ sikkhāpadaṁ uddiseyyātha—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc51:1.46.1
Pali: “Surāmerayapāne pācittiyan”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc51:2.1.1
Pali: Surā nāma 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc51:2.1.2
Pali: piṭṭhasurā pūvasurā odanasurā kiṇṇapakkhittā sambhārasaṁyuttā. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc51:2.1.3
Pali: Merayo nāma 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc51:2.1.4
Pali: pupphāsavo phalāsavo madhvāsavo guḷāsavo sambhārasaṁyutto. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc51:2.1.5
Pali: Piveyyāti 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc51:2.1.6
Pali: antamaso kusaggenapi pivati, āpatti pācittiyassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc51:2.2.1
Pali: Majje majjasaññī pivati, āpatti pācittiyassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc51:2.2.2
Pali: Majje vematiko pivati, āpatti pācittiyassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc51:2.2.3
Pali: Majje amajjasaññī pivati, āpatti pācittiyassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc51:2.2.4
Pali: Amajje majjasaññī, āpatti dukkaṭassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc51:2.2.5
Pali: Amajje vematiko, āpatti dukkaṭassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc51:2.2.6
Pali: Amajje amajjasaññī, anāpatti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc51:2.3.1
Pali: Anāpatti—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc51:2.3.2
Pali: amajjañca hoti majjavaṇṇaṁ majjagandhaṁ majjarasaṁ taṁ pivati, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc51:2.3.3
Pali: sūpasampāke, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc51:2.3.4
Pali: maṁsasampāke, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc51:2.3.5
Pali: telasampāke, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc51:2.3.6
Pali: āmalakaphāṇite, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc51:2.3.7
Pali: amajjaṁ ariṭṭhaṁ pivati, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc51:2.3.8
Pali: ummattakassa, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc51:2.3.9
Pali: ādikammikassāti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc51:2.3.10
Pali: Surāpānasikkhāpadaṁ niṭṭhitaṁ paṭhamaṁ.

Pali segments

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc52:0.1
Pali: Theravāda Vinaya 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc52:0.2
Pali: Mahāvibhaṅga 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc52:0.3
Pali: Pācittiyakaṇḍa 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc52:0.4
Pali: Surāpānavagga 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc52:0.5
Pali: 52. Aṅgulipatodakasikkhāpada 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc52:1.1
Pali: Tena samayena buddho bhagavā sāvatthiyaṁ viharati jetavane anāthapiṇḍikassa ārāme. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc52:1.2
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena chabbaggiyā bhikkhū sattarasavaggiyaṁ bhikkhuṁ aṅgulipatodakena hāsesuṁ. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc52:1.3
Pali: So bhikkhu uttanto anassāsako kālamakāsi. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc52:1.4
Pali: Ye te bhikkhū appicchā …pe… te ujjhāyanti khiyyanti vipācenti—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc52:1.5
Pali: “kathañhi nāma chabbaggiyā bhikkhū bhikkhuṁ aṅgulipatodakena hāsessantī”ti …pe… 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc52:1.6
Pali: “saccaṁ kira tumhe, bhikkhave, bhikkhuṁ aṅgulipatodakena hāsethā”ti? 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc52:1.7
Pali: “Saccaṁ, bhagavā”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc52:1.8
Pali: Vigarahi buddho bhagavā …pe… 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc52:1.9
Pali: kathañhi nāma tumhe, moghapurisā, bhikkhuṁ aṅgulipatodakena hāsessatha. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc52:1.10
Pali: Netaṁ, moghapurisā, appasannānaṁ vā pasādāya …pe… 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc52:1.11
Pali: evañca pana, bhikkhave, imaṁ sikkhāpadaṁ uddiseyyātha—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc52:1.12.1
Pali: “Aṅgulipatodake pācittiyan”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc52:2.1.1
Pali: Aṅgulipatodako nāma 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc52:2.1.2
Pali: upasampanno upasampannaṁ hasādhippāyo kāyena kāyaṁ āmasati, āpatti pācittiyassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc52:2.2.1
Pali: Upasampanne upasampannasaññī aṅgulipatodakena hāseti, āpatti pācittiyassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc52:2.2.2
Pali: Upasampanne vematiko aṅgulipatodakena hāseti, āpatti pācittiyassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc52:2.2.3
Pali: Upasampanne anupasampannasaññī aṅgulipatodakena hāseti, āpatti pācittiyassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc52:2.2.4
Pali: Kāyena kāyapaṭibaddhaṁ āmasati, āpatti dukkaṭassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc52:2.2.5
Pali: Kāyapaṭibaddhena kāyaṁ āmasati, āpatti dukkaṭassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc52:2.2.6
Pali: Kāyapaṭibaddhena kāyapaṭibaddhaṁ āmasati, āpatti dukkaṭassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc52:2.2.7
Pali: Nissaggiyena kāyaṁ āmasati, āpatti dukkaṭassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc52:2.2.8
Pali: Nissaggiyena kāyapaṭibaddhaṁ āmasati, āpatti dukkaṭassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc52:2.2.9
Pali: Nissaggiyena nissaggiyaṁ āmasati, āpatti dukkaṭassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc52:2.2.10
Pali: Anupasampannaṁ kāyena kāyaṁ āmasati, āpatti dukkaṭassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc52:2.2.11
Pali: Kāyena kāyapaṭibaddhaṁ āmasati, āpatti dukkaṭassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc52:2.2.12
Pali: Kāyapaṭibaddhena kāyaṁ āmasati, āpatti dukkaṭassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc52:2.2.13
Pali: Kāyapaṭibaddhena kāyapaṭibaddhaṁ āmasati, āpatti dukkaṭassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc52:2.2.14
Pali: Nissaggiyena kāyaṁ āmasati, āpatti dukkaṭassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc52:2.2.15
Pali: Nissaggiyena kāyapaṭibaddhaṁ āmasati, āpatti dukkaṭassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc52:2.2.16
Pali: Nissaggiyena nissaggiyaṁ āmasati, āpatti dukkaṭassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc52:2.2.17
Pali: Anupasampanne upasampannasaññī, āpatti dukkaṭassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc52:2.2.18
Pali: Anupasampanne vematiko, āpatti dukkaṭassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc52:2.2.19
Pali: Anupasampanne anupasampannasaññī, āpatti dukkaṭassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc52:2.3.1
Pali: Anāpatti—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc52:2.3.2
Pali: na hasādhippāyo, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc52:2.3.3
Pali: sati karaṇīye āmasati, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc52:2.3.4
Pali: ummattakassa, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc52:2.3.5
Pali: ādikammikassāti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc52:2.3.6
Pali: Aṅgulipatodakasikkhāpadaṁ niṭṭhitaṁ dutiyaṁ.

Pali segments

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc53:0.1
Pali: Theravāda Vinaya 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc53:0.2

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc53:0.3

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc53:0.4
Pali: Surāpānavagga 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc53:0.5
Pali: 53. Hasadhammasikkhāpada 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc53:1.1
Pali: Tena samayena buddho bhagavā sāvatthiyaṁ viharati jetavane anāthapiṇḍikassa ārāme. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc53:1.2
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena sattarasavaggiyā bhikkhū aciravatiyā nadiyā udake kīḷanti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc53:1.3
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena rājā pasenadi kosalo mallikāya deviyā saddhiṁ uparipāsādavaragato hoti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc53:1.4
Pali: Addasā kho rājā pasenadi kosalo sattarasavaggiye bhikkhū aciravatiyā nadiyā udake kīḷante. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc53:1.5
Pali: Disvāna mallikaṁ deviṁ etadavoca—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc53:1.6
Pali: “ete te, mallike, arahanto udake kīḷantī”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc53:1.7
Pali: “Nissaṁsayaṁ kho, mahārāja, bhagavatā sikkhāpadaṁ apaññattaṁ. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc53:1.8
Pali: Te vā bhikkhū appakataññuno”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc53:1.9
Pali: Atha kho rañño pasenadissa kosalassa etadahosi—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc53:1.10
Pali: “kena nu kho ahaṁ upāyena bhagavato ca na āroceyyaṁ, bhagavā ca jāneyya ime bhikkhū udake kīḷitā”ti? 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc53:1.11
Pali: Atha kho rājā pasenadi kosalo sattarasavaggiye bhikkhū pakkosāpetvā mahantaṁ guḷapiṇḍaṁ adāsi—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc53:1.12
Pali: “imaṁ, bhante, guḷapiṇḍaṁ bhagavato dethā”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc53:1.13
Pali: Sattarasavaggiyā bhikkhū taṁ guḷapiṇḍaṁ ādāya yena bhagavā tenupasaṅkamiṁsu; 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc53:1.14
Pali: upasaṅkamitvā bhagavantaṁ etadavocuṁ—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc53:1.15
Pali: “imaṁ, bhante, guḷapiṇḍaṁ rājā pasenadi kosalo bhagavato detī”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc53:1.16
Pali: “Kahaṁ pana tumhe, bhikkhave, rājā addasā”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc53:1.17
Pali: “Aciravatiyā nadiyā, bhagavā, udake kīḷante”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc53:1.18
Pali: Vigarahi buddho bhagavā …pe… 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc53:1.19
Pali: kathañhi nāma tumhe, moghapurisā, udake kīḷissatha. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc53:1.20
Pali: Netaṁ, moghapurisā, appasannānaṁ vā pasādāya …pe… 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc53:1.21
Pali: evañca pana, bhikkhave, imaṁ sikkhāpadaṁ uddiseyyātha—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc53:1.22.1
Pali: “Udake hasadhamme pācittiyan”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc53:2.1.1
Pali: Udake hasadhammo nāma 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc53:2.1.2
Pali: uparigopphake udake hasādhippāyo nimujjati vā ummujjati vā palavati vā, āpatti pācittiyassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc53:2.2.1
Pali: Udake hasadhamme hasadhammasaññī, āpatti pācittiyassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc53:2.2.2
Pali: Udake hasadhamme vematiko, āpatti pācittiyassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc53:2.2.3
Pali: Udake hasadhamme ahasadhammasaññī, āpatti pācittiyassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc53:2.2.4
Pali: Heṭṭhāgopphake udake kīḷati, āpatti dukkaṭassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc53:2.2.5
Pali: Udake nāvāya kīḷati, āpatti dukkaṭassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc53:2.2.6
Pali: Hatthena vā pādena vā kaṭṭhena vā kaṭhalāya vā udakaṁ paharati, āpatti dukkaṭassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc53:2.2.7
Pali: Bhājanagataṁ udakaṁ vā kañjikaṁ vā khīraṁ vā takkaṁ vā rajanaṁ vā passāvaṁ vā cikkhallaṁ vā kīḷati, āpatti dukkaṭassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc53:2.2.8
Pali: Udake ahasadhamme hasadhammasaññī, āpatti dukkaṭassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc53:2.2.9
Pali: Udake ahasadhamme vematiko, āpatti dukkaṭassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc53:2.2.10
Pali: Udake ahasadhamme ahasadhammasaññī, anāpatti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc53:2.3.1
Pali: Anāpatti—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc53:2.3.2
Pali: na hasādhippāyo, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc53:2.3.3
Pali: sati karaṇīye udakaṁ otaritvā nimujjati vā ummujjati vā palavati vā, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc53:2.3.4
Pali: pāraṁ gacchanto nimujjati vā ummujjati vā palavati vā, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc53:2.3.5
Pali: āpadāsu, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc53:2.3.6
Pali: ummattakassa, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc53:2.3.7
Pali: ādikammikassāti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc53:2.3.8
Pali: Hasadhammasikkhāpadaṁ niṭṭhitaṁ tatiyaṁ.

Pali: 54. Anādariyasikkhāpada 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc54:1.1
Pali: Tena samayena buddho bhagavā kosambiyaṁ viharati ghositārāme. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc54:1.2
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena āyasmā channo anācāraṁ ācarati. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc54:1.3
Pali: Bhikkhū evamāhaṁsu—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc54:1.4
Pali: “māvuso channa, evarūpaṁ akāsi. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc54:1.5
Pali: Netaṁ kappatī”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc54:1.6
Pali: So anādariyaṁ paṭicca karotiyeva. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc54:1.7
Pali: Ye te bhikkhū appicchā …pe… te ujjhāyanti khiyyanti vipācenti—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc54:1.8
Pali: “kathañhi nāma āyasmā channo anādariyaṁ karissatī”ti …pe… 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc54:1.9
Pali: “saccaṁ kira tvaṁ, channa, anādariyaṁ karosī”ti? 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc54:1.10
Pali: “Saccaṁ, bhagavā”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc54:1.11
Pali: Vigarahi buddho bhagavā …pe… 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc54:1.12
Pali: kathañhi nāma tvaṁ, moghapurisa, anādariyaṁ karissasi. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc54:1.13
Pali: Netaṁ, moghapurisa, appasannānaṁ vā pasādāya …pe… 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc54:1.14
Pali: evañca pana, bhikkhave, imaṁ sikkhāpadaṁ uddiseyyātha—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc54:1.15.1
Pali: “Anādariye pācittiyan”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc54:2.1.1
Pali: Anādariyaṁ nāma 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc54:2.1.2
Pali: dve anādariyāni— puggalānādariyañca dhammānādariyañca. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc54:2.1.3
Pali: Puggalānādariyaṁ nāma 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc54:2.1.4
Pali: upasampannena paññattena vuccamāno— “ayaṁ ukkhittako vā vambhito vā garahito vā, imassa vacanaṁ akataṁ bhavissatī”ti anādariyaṁ karoti, āpatti pācittiyassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc54:2.1.5
Pali: Dhammānādariyaṁ nāma 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc54:2.1.6
Pali: upasampannena paññattena vuccamāno— “kathāyaṁ nasseyya vā vinasseyya vā antaradhāyeyya vā”, taṁ vā na sikkhitukāmo anādariyaṁ karoti, āpatti pācittiyassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc54:2.2.1
Pali: Upasampanne upasampannasaññī anādariyaṁ karoti, āpatti pācittiyassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc54:2.2.2
Pali: Upasampanne vematiko anādariyaṁ karoti, āpatti pācittiyassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc54:2.2.3
Pali: Upasampanne anupasampannasaññī anādariyaṁ karoti, āpatti pācittiyassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc54:2.2.4
Pali: Apaññattena vuccamāno—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc54:2.2.5
Pali: “idaṁ na sallekhāya na dhutatthāya na pāsādikatāya na apacayāya na vīriyārambhāya saṁvattatī”ti anādariyaṁ karoti, āpatti dukkaṭassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc54:2.2.6
Pali: Anupasampannena paññattena vā apaññattena vā vuccamāno—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc54:2.2.7
Pali: “idaṁ na sallekhāya na dhutatthāya na pāsādikatāya na apacayāya na vīriyārambhāya saṁvattatī”ti anādariyaṁ karoti, āpatti dukkaṭassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc54:2.2.8
Pali: Anupasampanne upasampannasaññī āpatti dukkaṭassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc54:2.2.9
Pali: Anupasampanne vematiko, āpatti dukkaṭassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc54:2.2.10
Pali: Anupasampanne anupasampannasaññī, āpatti dukkaṭassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc54:2.3.1
Pali: Anāpatti—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc54:2.3.2
Pali: “evaṁ amhākaṁ ācariyānaṁ uggaho paripucchā”ti bhaṇati, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc54:2.3.3
Pali: ummattakassa, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc54:2.3.4

Pali: 55. Bhiṁsāpanasikkhāpada

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc55:1.3
Pali: Te bhiṁsāpīyamānā rodanti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc55:1.4
Pali: Bhikkhū evamāhaṁsu—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc55:1.5
Pali: “kissa tumhe, āvuso, rodathā”ti? 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc55:1.6
Pali: “Ime, āvuso, chabbaggiyā bhikkhū amhe bhiṁsāpentī”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc55:1.7
Pali: Ye te bhikkhū appicchā …pe… te ujjhāyanti khiyyanti vipācenti—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc55:1.8

Pali: “Saccaṁ, bhagavā”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc55:1.11
Pali: Vigarahi buddho bhagavā …pe… 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc55:1.12

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc55:1.13
Pali: Netaṁ, moghapurisā, appasannānaṁ vā pasādāya …pe… 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc55:1.14
Pali: evañca pana, bhikkhave, imaṁ sikkhāpadaṁ uddiseyyātha—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc55:1.15.1
Pali: “Yo pana bhikkhu bhikkhuṁ bhiṁsāpeyya, pācittiyan”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc55:2.1.1
Pali: Yo panāti 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc55:2.1.2
Pali: yo yādiso …pe… 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc55:2.1.3
Pali: bhikkhūti 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc55:2.1.4
Pali: …pe… ayaṁ imasmiṁ atthe adhippeto bhikkhūti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc55:2.1.5
Pali: Bhikkhunti 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc55:2.1.6
Pali: aññaṁ bhikkhuṁ. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc55:2.1.7
Pali: Bhiṁsāpeyyāti 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc55:2.1.8
Pali: upasampanno upasampannaṁ bhiṁsāpetukāmo rūpaṁ vā saddaṁ vā gandhaṁ vā rasaṁ vā phoṭṭhabbaṁ vā upasaṁharati. Bhāyeyya vā so na vā bhāyeyya, āpatti pācittiyassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc55:2.1.9
Pali: Corakantāraṁ vā vāḷakantāraṁ vā pisācakantāraṁ vā ācikkhati. Bhāyeyya vā so na vā bhāyeyya, āpatti pācittiyassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc55:2.2.1

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc55:2.2.2

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc55:2.2.3
Pali: Upasampanne anupasampannasaññī bhiṁsāpeti, āpatti pācittiyassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc55:2.2.4
Pali: Anupasampannaṁ bhiṁsāpetukāmo rūpaṁ vā saddaṁ vā gandhaṁ vā rasaṁ vā phoṭṭhabbaṁ vā upasaṁharati. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc55:2.2.5
Pali: Bhāyeyya vā so na vā bhāyeyya, āpatti dukkaṭassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc55:2.2.6
Pali: Corakantāraṁ vā vāḷakantāraṁ vā pisācakantāraṁ vā ācikkhati. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc55:2.2.7
Pali: Bhāyeyya vā so na vā bhāyeyya, āpatti dukkaṭassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc55:2.2.8
Pali: Anupasampanne upasampannasaññī, āpatti dukkaṭassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc55:2.2.9
Pali: Anupasampanne vematiko, āpatti dukkaṭassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc55:2.2.10
Pali: Anupasampanne anupasampannasaññī, āpatti dukkaṭassa.

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc55:2.3.2

Pali: Surāpānavagga 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc56:0.5
Pali: 56. Jotikasikkhāpada 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc56:1.1.1
Pali: Tena samayena buddho bhagavā bhaggesu viharati susumāragire bhesakaḷāvane migadāye. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc56:1.1.2
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena bhikkhū hemantike kāle aññataraṁ mahantaṁ susirakaṭṭhaṁ jotiṁ samādahitvā visibbesuṁ. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc56:1.1.3

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc56:1.1.4
Pali: Bhikkhū tahaṁ tahaṁ upadhāviṁsu.

Pali: Vigarahi buddho bhagavā …pe… 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc56:1.1.10

Pali: Netaṁ, bhikkhave, appasannānaṁ vā pasādāya …pe… 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc56:1.1.12
Pali: evañca pana, bhikkhave, imaṁ sikkhāpadaṁ uddiseyyātha—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc56:1.1.13.1
Pali: “Yo pana bhikkhu visibbanāpekkho jotiṁ samādaheyya vā samādahāpeyya vā, pācittiyan”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc56:1.1.14
Pali: Evañcidaṁ bhagavatā bhikkhūnaṁ sikkhāpadaṁ paññattaṁ hoti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc56:1.2.1
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena bhikkhū gilānā honti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc56:1.2.2
Pali: Gilānapucchakā bhikkhū gilāne bhikkhū etadavocuṁ—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc56:1.2.3
Pali: “kaccāvuso, khamanīyaṁ, kacci yāpanīyan”ti? 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc56:1.2.4
Pali: “Pubbe mayaṁ, āvuso, jotiṁ samādahitvā visibbema; 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc56:1.2.5
Pali: tena no phāsu hoti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc56:1.2.6
Pali: Idāni pana ‘bhagavatā paṭikkhittan’ti kukkuccāyantā na visibbema, tena no na phāsu hotī”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc56:1.2.7
Pali: Bhagavato etamatthaṁ ārocesuṁ …pe… 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc56:1.2.8
Pali: anujānāmi, bhikkhave, gilānena bhikkhunā jotiṁ samādahitvā vā samādahāpetvā vā visibbetuṁ. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc56:1.2.9
Pali: Evañca pana, bhikkhave, imaṁ sikkhāpadaṁ uddiseyyātha—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc56:1.2.10.1
Pali: “Yo pana bhikkhu agilāno visibbanāpekkho jotiṁ samādaheyya vā samādahāpeyya vā, pācittiyan”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc56:1.2.11
Pali: Evañcidaṁ bhagavatā bhikkhūnaṁ sikkhāpadaṁ paññattaṁ hoti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc56:2.1

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc56:2.2
Pali: Bhagavato etamatthaṁ ārocesuṁ …pe… 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc56:2.3
Pali: anujānāmi, bhikkhave, tathārūpappaccayā jotiṁ samādahituṁ samādahāpetuṁ. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc56:2.4
Pali: Evañca pana, bhikkhave, imaṁ sikkhāpadaṁ uddiseyyātha—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc56:2.5.1

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc56:3.1.1
Pali: Yo panāti 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc56:3.1.2

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc56:3.1.4
Pali: …pe… ayaṁ imasmiṁ atthe adhippeto bhikkhūti.

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc56:3.1.15

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc56:3.1.16
Pali: aññaṁ āṇāpeti, āpatti pācittiyassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc56:3.1.17

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc56:3.1.18
Pali: Aññatra tathā rūpappaccayāti 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc56:3.1.19
Pali: ṭhapetvā tathārūpappaccayaṁ. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc56:3.2.1
Pali: Agilāno agilānasaññī visibbanāpekkho jotiṁ samādahati vā samādahāpeti vā, aññatra tathārūpappaccayā, āpatti pācittiyassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc56:3.2.2
Pali: Agilāno vematiko visibbanāpekkho jotiṁ samādahati vā samādahāpeti vā, aññatra tathārūpappaccayā, āpatti pācittiyassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc56:3.2.3
Pali: Agilāno gilānasaññī visibbanāpekkho jotiṁ samādahati vā samādahāpeti vā, aññatra tathārūpappaccayā, āpatti pācittiyassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc56:3.2.4
Pali: Paṭilātaṁ ukkhipati, āpatti dukkaṭassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc56:3.2.5
Pali: Gilāno agilānasaññī, āpatti dukkaṭassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc56:3.2.6
Pali: Gilāno vematiko, āpatti dukkaṭassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc56:3.2.7
Pali: Gilāno gilānasaññī, anāpatti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc56:3.3.1
Pali: Anāpatti—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc56:3.3.2
Pali: gilānassa, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc56:3.3.3

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc56:3.3.4

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc56:3.3.5

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc56:3.3.6
Pali: āpadāsu, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc56:3.3.7
Pali: ummattakassa, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc56:3.3.8
Pali: ādikammikassāti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc56:3.3.9
Pali: Jotikasikkhāpadaṁ niṭṭhitaṁ chaṭṭhaṁ.

Pali: Surāpānavagga 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc57:0.5
Pali: 57. Nahānasikkhāpada 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc57:1.1
Pali: Tena samayena buddho bhagavā rājagahe viharati veḷuvane kalandakanivāpe. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc57:1.2
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena bhikkhū tapode nahāyanti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc57:1.3
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena rājā māgadho seniyo bimbisāro “sīsaṁ nahāyissāmī”ti tapodaṁ gantvā—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc57:1.4
Pali: “yāvāyyā nahāyantī”ti ekamantaṁ paṭimānesi. Bhikkhū yāva samandhakārā nahāyiṁsu. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc57:1.5
Pali: Atha kho rājā māgadho seniyo bimbisāro vikāle sīsaṁ nahāyitvā, nagaradvāre thakite bahinagare vasitvā, kālasseva asambhinnena vilepanena yena bhagavā tenupasaṅkami; 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc57:1.6
Pali: upasaṅkamitvā bhagavantaṁ abhivādetvā ekamantaṁ nisīdi. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc57:1.7
Pali: Ekamantaṁ nisinnaṁ kho rājānaṁ māgadhaṁ seniyaṁ bimbisāraṁ bhagavā etadavoca—“kissa tvaṁ, mahārāja, kālasseva āgato asambhinnena vilepanenā”ti? 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc57:1.8
Pali: Atha kho rājā māgadho seniyo bimbisāro bhagavato etamatthaṁ ārocesi. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc57:1.9
Pali: Atha kho bhagavā rājānaṁ māgadhaṁ seniyaṁ bimbisāraṁ dhammiyā kathāya sandassesi samādapesi samuttejesi sampahaṁsesi. Atha kho rājā māgadho seniyo bimbisāro bhagavatā dhammiyā kathāya sandassito samādapito samuttejito sampahaṁsito uṭṭhāyāsanā bhagavantaṁ abhivādetvā padakkhiṇaṁ katvā pakkāmi. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc57:1.10
Pali: Atha kho bhagavā etasmiṁ nidāne etasmiṁ pakaraṇe bhikkhusaṅghaṁ sannipātāpetvā bhikkhū paṭipucchi—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc57:1.11
Pali: “saccaṁ kira, bhikkhave, bhikkhū rājānampi passitvā na mattaṁ jānitvā nahāyantī”ti? 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc57:1.12
Pali: “Saccaṁ, bhagavā”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc57:1.13
Pali: Vigarahi buddho bhagavā …pe… 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc57:1.14
Pali: kathañhi nāma te, bhikkhave, moghapurisā rājānampi passitvā na mattaṁ jānitvā nahāyissanti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc57:1.15
Pali: Netaṁ, bhikkhave, appasannānaṁ vā pasādāya …pe… 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc57:1.16

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc57:1.17.1
Pali: “Yo pana bhikkhu orenaddhamāsaṁ nahāyeyya, pācittiyan”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc57:1.18
Pali: Evañcidaṁ bhagavatā bhikkhūnaṁ sikkhāpadaṁ paññattaṁ hoti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc57:2.1
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena bhikkhū uṇhasamaye pariḷāhasamaye kukkuccāyantā na nahāyanti, sedagatena gattena sayanti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc57:2.2
Pali: Cīvarampi senāsanampi dussati. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc57:2.3

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc57:2.5
Pali: Evañca pana, bhikkhave, imaṁ sikkhāpadaṁ uddiseyyātha—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc57:2.6.1

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc57:2.7
Pali: Tatthāyaṁ samayo. Diyaḍḍho māso seso gimhānanti vassānassa paṭhamo māso iccete aḍḍhateyyamāsā uṇhasamayo pariḷāhasamayo—ayaṁ tattha samayo”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc57:2.8

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc57:7.1.23

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc57:7.2.1
Pali: Ūnakaddhamāse ūnakasaññī, aññatra samayā, nahāyati, āpatti pācittiyassa.

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc57:7.3.3
Pali: addhamāsaṁ nahāyati, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc57:7.3.4
Pali: atirekaddhamāsaṁ nahāyati, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc57:7.3.5
Pali: pāraṁ gacchanto nahāyati, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc57:7.3.6
Pali: sabbapaccantimesu janapadesu, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc57:7.3.7
Pali: āpadāsu, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc57:7.3.8
Pali: ummattakassa, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc57:7.3.9
Pali: ādikammikassāti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc57:7.3.10
Pali: Nahānasikkhāpadaṁ niṭṭhitaṁ sattamaṁ.

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc58:0.1
Pali: Theravāda Vinaya 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc58:0.2
Pali: Mahāvibhaṅga 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc58:0.3
Pali: Pācittiyakaṇḍa 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc58:0.4
Pali: Surāpānavagga 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc58:0.5
Pali: 58. Dubbaṇṇakaraṇasikkhāpada 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc58:1.1
Pali: Tena samayena buddho bhagavā sāvatthiyaṁ viharati jetavane anāthapiṇḍikassa ārāme. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc58:1.2
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena sambahulā bhikkhū ca paribbājakā ca sāketā sāvatthiṁ addhānamaggappaṭipannā honti. Antarāmagge corā nikkhamitvā te acchindiṁsu. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc58:1.3
Pali: Sāvatthiyā rājabhaṭā nikkhamitvā te core sabhaṇḍe gahetvā bhikkhūnaṁ santike dūtaṁ pāhesuṁ—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc58:1.4
Pali: “āgacchantu, bhadantā, sakaṁ sakaṁ cīvaraṁ sañjānitvā gaṇhantū”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc58:1.5
Pali: Bhikkhū na sañjānanti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc58:1.6
Pali: Te ujjhāyanti khiyyanti vipācenti—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc58:1.7
Pali: “kathañhi nāma bhadantā attano attano cīvaraṁ na sañjānissantī”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc58:1.8
Pali: Assosuṁ kho bhikkhū tesaṁ manussānaṁ ujjhāyantānaṁ khiyyantānaṁ vipācentānaṁ. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc58:1.9
Pali: Atha kho te bhikkhū bhagavato etamatthaṁ ārocesuṁ. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc58:1.10
Pali: Atha kho bhagavā etasmiṁ nidāne etasmiṁ pakaraṇe bhikkhusaṅghaṁ sannipātāpetvā bhikkhūnaṁ tadanucchavikaṁ tadanulomikaṁ dhammiṁ kathaṁ katvā bhikkhū āmantesi—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc58:1.11
Pali: “tena hi, bhikkhave, bhikkhūnaṁ sikkhāpadaṁ paññapessāmi dasa atthavase paṭicca—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc58:1.12
Pali: saṅghasuṭṭhutāya, saṅghaphāsutāya …pe… 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc58:1.13
Pali: saddhammaṭṭhitiyā, vinayānuggahāya. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc58:1.14
Pali: Evañca pana, bhikkhave, imaṁ sikkhāpadaṁ uddiseyyātha—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc58:1.15.1
Pali: “Navaṁ pana bhikkhunā cīvaralābhena tiṇṇaṁ dubbaṇṇakaraṇānaṁ aññataraṁ dubbaṇṇakaraṇaṁ ādātabbaṁ—nīlaṁ vā kaddamaṁ vā kāḷasāmaṁ vā. Anādā ce bhikkhu tiṇṇaṁ dubbaṇṇakaraṇānaṁ aññataraṁ dubbaṇṇakaraṇaṁ navaṁ cīvaraṁ paribhuñjeyya, pācittiyan”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc58:2.1.1
Pali: Navaṁ nāma 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc58:2.1.2
Pali: akatakappaṁ vuccati. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc58:2.1.3
Pali: Cīvaraṁ nāma 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc58:2.1.4
Pali: channaṁ cīvarānaṁ aññataraṁ cīvaraṁ. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc58:2.1.5
Pali: Tiṇṇaṁ dubbaṇṇakaraṇānaṁ aññataraṁ dubbaṇṇakaraṇaṁ ādātabbanti 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc58:2.1.6
Pali: antamaso kusaggenapi ādātabbaṁ. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc58:2.1.7
Pali: Nīlaṁ nāma 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc58:2.1.8
Pali: dve nīlāni— kaṁsanīlaṁ, palāsanīlaṁ. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc58:2.1.9
Pali: Kaddamo nāma 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc58:2.1.10
Pali: odako vuccati. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc58:2.1.11
Pali: Kāḷasāmaṁ nāma 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc58:2.1.12
Pali: yaṁ kiñci kāḷasāmakaṁ. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc58:2.1.13
Pali: Anādā ce bhikkhu tiṇṇaṁ dubbaṇṇakaraṇānaṁ aññataraṁ dubbaṇṇakaraṇanti 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc58:2.1.14
Pali: antamaso kusaggenapi anādiyitvā tiṇṇaṁ dubbaṇṇakaraṇānaṁ aññataraṁ dubbaṇṇakaraṇaṁ navaṁ cīvaraṁ paribhuñjati, āpatti pācittiyassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc58:2.2.1
Pali: Anādinne anādinnasaññī paribhuñjati, āpatti pācittiyassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc58:2.2.2
Pali: Anādinne vematiko paribhuñjati, āpatti pācittiyassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc58:2.2.3
Pali: Anādinne ādinnasaññī paribhuñjati, āpatti pācittiyassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc58:2.2.4
Pali: Ādinne anādinnasaññī, āpatti dukkaṭassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc58:2.2.5
Pali: Ādinne vematiko, āpatti dukkaṭassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc58:2.2.6
Pali: Ādinne ādinnasaññī, anāpatti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc58:2.3.1
Pali: Anāpatti—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc58:2.3.2
Pali: ādiyitvā paribhuñjati, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc58:2.3.3
Pali: kappo naṭṭho hoti, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc58:2.3.4
Pali: kappakatokāso jiṇṇo hoti, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc58:2.3.5
Pali: kappakatena akappakataṁ saṁsibbitaṁ hoti, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc58:2.3.6
Pali: aggaḷe, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc58:2.3.7
Pali: anuvāte, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc58:2.3.8
Pali: paribhaṇḍe, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc58:2.3.9
Pali: ummattakassa, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc58:2.3.10
Pali: ādikammikassāti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc58:2.3.11
Pali: Dubbaṇṇakaraṇasikkhāpadaṁ niṭṭhitaṁ aṭṭhamaṁ.

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc59:1.11

Pali: Appaccuddhāraṇaṁ nāma 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc59:2.1.29

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc59:2.2.7

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc59:2.3.1
Pali: Anāpatti—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc59:2.3.2
Pali: so vā deti, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc59:2.3.3

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc59:2.3.4
Pali: ummattakassa, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc59:2.3.5
Pali: ādikammikassāti.

Pali: Upasampanne vematiko …pe… 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc60:2.2.3
Pali: upasampanne anupasampannasaññī pattaṁ vā cīvaraṁ vā nisīdanaṁ vā sūcigharaṁ vā kāyabandhanaṁ vā apanidheti vā apanidhāpeti vā, antamaso hasāpekkhopi, āpatti pācittiyassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc60:2.2.4
Pali: Aññaṁ parikkhāraṁ apanidheti vā apanidhāpeti vā, antamaso hasāpekkhopi, āpatti dukkaṭassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc60:2.2.5
Pali: Anupasampannassa pattaṁ vā cīvaraṁ vā aññaṁ vā parikkhāraṁ apanidheti vā apanidhāpeti vā, antamaso hasāpekkhopi, āpatti dukkaṭassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc60:2.2.6
Pali: Anupasampanne upasampannasaññī, āpatti dukkaṭassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc60:2.2.7
Pali: Anupasampanne vematiko, āpatti dukkaṭassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc60:2.2.8
Pali: Anupasampanne anupasampannasaññī, āpatti dukkaṭassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc60:2.3.1
Pali: Anāpatti—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc60:2.3.2
Pali: nahasādhippāyo, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc60:2.3.3
Pali: dunnikkhittaṁ paṭisāmeti, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc60:2.3.4
Pali: “dhammiṁ kathaṁ katvā dassāmī”ti paṭisāmeti, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc60:2.3.5
Pali: ummattakassa, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc60:2.3.6
Pali: ādikammikassāti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc60:2.3.7
Pali: Cīvaraapanidhānasikkhāpadaṁ niṭṭhitaṁ dasamaṁ. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc60:2.3.8
Pali: Surāpānavaggo chaṭṭho. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc60:2.3.9
Pali: Tassuddānaṁ 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc60:2.3.10
Pali: Surā aṅguli hāso ca, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc60:2.3.11
Pali: anādariyañca bhiṁsanaṁ; 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc60:2.3.12
Pali: Jotinahānadubbaṇṇaṁ, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc60:2.3.13
Pali: sāmaṁ apanidhena cāti.

Pali: 61. Sañciccasikkhāpada 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc61:1.1
Pali: Tena samayena buddho bhagavā sāvatthiyaṁ viharati jetavane anāthapiṇḍikassa ārāme. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc61:1.2
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena āyasmā udāyī issāso hoti, kākā cassa amanāpā honti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc61:1.3
Pali: So kāke vijjhitvā vijjhitvā sīsaṁ chinditvā sūle paṭipāṭiyā ṭhapesi. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc61:1.4
Pali: Bhikkhū evamāhaṁsu—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc61:1.5
Pali: “kenime, āvuso, kākā jīvitā voropitā”ti? 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc61:1.6
Pali: “Mayā, āvuso. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc61:1.7
Pali: Amanāpā me kākā”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc61:1.8
Pali: Ye te bhikkhū appicchā …pe… te ujjhāyanti khiyyanti vipācenti—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc61:1.9
Pali: “kathañhi nāma āyasmā udāyī sañcicca pāṇaṁ jīvitā voropessatī”ti …pe… 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc61:1.10
Pali: “saccaṁ kira tvaṁ, udāyi, sañcicca pāṇaṁ jīvitā voropesī”ti? 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc61:1.11
Pali: “Saccaṁ, bhagavā”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc61:1.12
Pali: Vigarahi buddho bhagavā …pe… 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc61:1.13
Pali: kathañhi nāma tvaṁ, moghapurisa, sañcicca pāṇaṁ jīvitā voropessasi. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc61:1.14
Pali: Netaṁ, moghapurisa, appasannānaṁ vā pasādāya …pe… 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc61:1.15
Pali: evañca pana, bhikkhave, imaṁ sikkhāpadaṁ uddiseyyātha—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc61:1.16.1
Pali: “Yo pana bhikkhu sañcicca pāṇaṁ jīvitā voropeyya, pācittiyan”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc61:2.1.1
Pali: Yo panāti 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc61:2.1.2
Pali: yo yādiso …pe… 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc61:2.1.3
Pali: bhikkhūti 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc61:2.1.4
Pali: …pe… ayaṁ imasmiṁ atthe adhippeto bhikkhūti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc61:2.1.5
Pali: Sañciccāti 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc61:2.1.6
Pali: jānanto sañjānanto cecca abhivitaritvā vītikkamo. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc61:2.1.7
Pali: Pāṇo nāma 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc61:2.1.8
Pali: tiracchānagatapāṇo vuccati. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc61:2.1.9
Pali: Jīvitā voropeyyāti 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc61:2.1.10
Pali: jīvitindriyaṁ upacchindati uparodheti santatiṁ vikopeti, āpatti pācittiyassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc61:2.2.1
Pali: Pāṇe pāṇasaññī jīvitā voropeti, āpatti pācittiyassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc61:2.2.2
Pali: Pāṇe vematiko jīvitā voropeti, āpatti dukkaṭassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc61:2.2.3
Pali: Pāṇe appāṇasaññī jīvitā voropeti, anāpatti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc61:2.2.4
Pali: Appāṇe pāṇasaññī, āpatti dukkaṭassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc61:2.2.5
Pali: Appāṇe vematiko, āpatti dukkaṭassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc61:2.2.6
Pali: Appāṇe appāṇasaññī, anāpatti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc61:2.3.1
Pali: Anāpatti—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc61:2.3.2
Pali: asañcicca, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc61:2.3.3
Pali: assatiyā, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc61:2.3.4
Pali: ajānantassa, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc61:2.3.5
Pali: namaraṇādhippāyassa, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc61:2.3.6
Pali: ummattakassa, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc61:2.3.7
Pali: ādikammikassāti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc61:2.3.8
Pali: Sañciccasikkhāpadaṁ niṭṭhitaṁ paṭhamaṁ.

Pali: Sappāṇakavagga 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc64:0.5
Pali: 64. Duṭṭhullasikkhāpada 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc64:1.1
Pali: Tena samayena buddho bhagavā sāvatthiyaṁ viharati jetavane anāthapiṇḍikassa ārāme. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc64:1.2
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena āyasmā upanando sakyaputto sañcetanikaṁ sukkavissaṭṭhiṁ āpattiṁ āpajjitvā bhātuno saddhivihārikassa bhikkhuno ārocesi—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc64:1.3
Pali: “ahaṁ, āvuso, sañcetanikaṁ sukkavissaṭṭhiṁ āpattiṁ āpanno. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc64:1.4
Pali: Mā kassaci ārocehī”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc64:1.5
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena aññataro bhikkhu sañcetanikaṁ sukkavissaṭṭhiṁ āpattiṁ āpajjitvā saṅghaṁ tassā āpattiyā parivāsaṁ yāci. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc64:1.6
Pali: Tassa saṅgho tassā āpattiyā parivāsaṁ adāsi. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc64:1.7
Pali: So parivasanto taṁ bhikkhuṁ passitvā etadavoca—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc64:1.8
Pali: “ahaṁ, āvuso, sañcetanikaṁ sukkavissaṭṭhiṁ āpattiṁ āpajjitvā saṅghaṁ tassā āpattiyā parivāsaṁ yāciṁ, tassa me saṅgho tassā āpattiyā parivāsaṁ adāsi, sohaṁ parivasāmi, vediyāmahaṁ, āvuso, vediyatīti maṁ āyasmā dhāretū”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc64:1.9
Pali: “Kiṁ nu kho, āvuso, yo aññopi imaṁ āpattiṁ āpajjati sopi evaṁ karotī”ti? 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc64:1.10
Pali: “Evamāvuso”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc64:1.11
Pali: “Ayaṁ, āvuso, āyasmā upanando sakyaputto sañcetanikaṁ sukkavissaṭṭhiṁ āpattiṁ āpajjitvā so me āroceti mā kassaci ārocehī”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc64:1.12
Pali: “Kiṁ pana tvaṁ, āvuso, paṭicchādesī”ti? 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc64:1.13
Pali: “Evamāvuso”ti.

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc64:1.15

Pali: “Saccaṁ, bhagavā”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc64:1.19
Pali: Vigarahi buddho bhagavā …pe… 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc64:1.20
Pali: kathañhi nāma tvaṁ, moghapurisa, bhikkhussa jānaṁ duṭṭhullaṁ āpattiṁ paṭicchādessasi. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc64:1.21
Pali: Netaṁ, moghapurisa, appasannānaṁ vā pasādāya …pe… 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc64:1.22
Pali: evañca pana, bhikkhave, imaṁ sikkhāpadaṁ uddiseyyātha—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc64:1.23.1
Pali: “Yo pana bhikkhu bhikkhussa jānaṁ duṭṭhullaṁ āpattiṁ paṭicchādeyya, pācittiyan”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc64:2.1.1
Pali: Yo panāti 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc64:2.1.2
Pali: yo yādiso …pe… 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc64:2.1.3
Pali: bhikkhūti 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc64:2.1.4
Pali: …pe… ayaṁ imasmiṁ atthe adhippeto bhikkhūti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc64:2.1.5
Pali: Bhikkhussāti 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc64:2.1.6
Pali: aññassa bhikkhussa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc64:2.1.7
Pali: Jānāti nāma 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc64:2.1.8
Pali: sāmaṁ vā jānāti aññe vā tassa ārocenti, so vā āroceti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc64:2.1.9
Pali: Duṭṭhullā nāma āpatti 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc64:2.1.10
Pali: cattāri ca pārājikāni terasa ca saṅghādisesā. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc64:2.1.11
Pali: Paṭicchādeyyāti 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc64:2.1.12
Pali: “imaṁ jānitvā codessanti, sāressanti khuṁsessanti, vambhessanti, maṅkuṁ karissanti nārocessāmī”ti dhuraṁ nikkhittamatte, āpatti pācittiyassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc64:2.2.1
Pali: Duṭṭhullāya āpattiyā duṭṭhullāpattisaññī paṭicchādeti, āpatti pācittiyassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc64:2.2.2
Pali: Duṭṭhullāya āpattiyā vematiko paṭicchādeti, āpatti dukkaṭassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc64:2.2.3
Pali: Duṭṭhullāya āpattiyā aduṭṭhullāpattisaññī paṭicchādeti, āpatti dukkaṭassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc64:2.2.4
Pali: Aduṭṭhullaṁ āpattiṁ paṭicchādeti, āpatti dukkaṭassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc64:2.2.5
Pali: Anupasampannassa duṭṭhullaṁ vā aduṭṭhullaṁ vā ajjhācāraṁ paṭicchādeti, āpatti dukkaṭassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc64:2.2.6
Pali: Aduṭṭhullāya āpattiyā duṭṭhullāpattisaññī, āpatti dukkaṭassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc64:2.2.7
Pali: Aduṭṭhullāya āpattiyā vematiko, āpatti dukkaṭassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc64:2.2.8
Pali: Aduṭṭhullāya āpattiyā aduṭṭhullāpattisaññī, āpatti dukkaṭassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc64:2.3.1
Pali: Anāpatti—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc64:2.3.2
Pali: “saṅghassa bhaṇḍanaṁ vā kalaho vā viggaho vā vivādo vā bhavissatī”ti nāroceti, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc64:2.3.3
Pali: “saṅghabhedo vā saṅgharāji vā bhavissatī”ti nāroceti, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc64:2.3.4
Pali: “ayaṁ kakkhaḷo pharuso jīvitantarāyaṁ vā brahmacariyantarāyaṁ vā karissatī”ti nāroceti, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc64:2.3.5
Pali: aññe patirūpe bhikkhū apassanto nāroceti, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc64:2.3.6
Pali: nachādetukāmo nāroceti, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc64:2.3.7
Pali: “paññāyissati sakena kammenā”ti nāroceti, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc64:2.3.8
Pali: ummattakassa, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc64:2.3.9
Pali: ādikammikassāti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc64:2.3.10
Pali: Duṭṭhullasikkhāpadaṁ niṭṭhitaṁ catutthaṁ.

Pali: Sappāṇakavagga 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc65:0.5
Pali: 65. Ūnavīsativassasikkhāpada 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc65:1.1
Pali: Tena samayena buddho bhagavā rājagahe viharati veḷuvane kalandakanivāpe. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc65:1.2
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena rājagahe sattarasavaggiyā dārakā sahāyakā honti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc65:1.3
Pali: Upālidārako tesaṁ pāmokkho hoti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc65:1.4
Pali: Atha kho upālissa mātāpitūnaṁ etadahosi—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc65:1.5
Pali: “kena nu kho upāyena upāli amhākaṁ accayena sukhañca jīveyya na ca kilameyyā”ti? 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc65:1.6
Pali: Atha kho upālissa mātāpitūnaṁ etadahosi—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc65:1.7
Pali: “sace kho upāli lekhaṁ sikkheyya, evaṁ kho upāli amhākaṁ accayena sukhañca jīveyya, na ca kilameyyā”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc65:1.8
Pali: Atha kho upālissa mātāpitūnaṁ etadahosi—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc65:1.9
Pali: “sace kho upāli lekhaṁ sikkhissati, aṅguliyo dukkhā bhavissanti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc65:1.10
Pali: Sace kho upāli gaṇanaṁ sikkheyya, evaṁ kho upāli amhākaṁ accayena sukhañca jīveyya na ca kilameyyā”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc65:1.11
Pali: Atha kho upālissa mātāpitūnaṁ etadahosi—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc65:1.12
Pali: “sace kho upāli gaṇanaṁ sikkhissati, urassa dukkho bhavissati. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc65:1.13
Pali: Sace kho upāli rūpaṁ sikkheyya, evaṁ kho upāli amhākaṁ accayena sukhañca jīveyya na ca kilameyyā”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc65:1.14
Pali: Atha kho upālissa mātāpitūnaṁ etadahosi—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc65:1.15
Pali: “sace kho upāli rūpaṁ sikkhissati, akkhīni dukkhā bhavissanti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc65:1.16
Pali: Ime kho samaṇā sakyaputtiyā sukhasīlā sukhasamācārā subhojanāni bhuñjitvā nivātesu sayanesu sayanti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc65:1.17
Pali: Sace kho upāli samaṇesu sakyaputtiyesu pabbajeyya, evaṁ kho upāli amhākaṁ accayena sukhañca jīveyya, na ca kilameyyā”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc65:1.18
Pali: Assosi kho upālidārako mātāpitūnaṁ imaṁ kathāsallāpaṁ. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc65:1.19
Pali: Atha kho upālidārako yena te dārakā tenupasaṅkami; upasaṅkamitvā te dārake etadavoca—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc65:1.20
Pali: “etha mayaṁ, ayyā, samaṇesu sakyaputtiyesu pabbajissāmā”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc65:1.21
Pali: “Sace kho tvaṁ, ayya, pabbajissasi, evaṁ mayampi pabbajissāmā”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc65:1.22
Pali: Atha kho te dārakā ekamekassa mātāpitaro upasaṅkamitvā etadavocuṁ—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc65:1.23
Pali: “anujānātha maṁ agārasmā anagāriyaṁ pabbajjāyā”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc65:1.24
Pali: Atha kho tesaṁ dārakānaṁ mātāpitaro—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc65:1.25
Pali: “sabbepime dārakā samānacchandā kalyāṇādhippāyā”ti anujāniṁsu. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc65:1.26
Pali: Te bhikkhū upasaṅkamitvā pabbajjaṁ yāciṁsu. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc65:1.27
Pali: Te bhikkhū pabbājesuṁ upasampādesuṁ. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc65:1.28
Pali: Te rattiyā paccūsasamayaṁ paccuṭṭhāya rodanti—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc65:1.29
Pali: “yāguṁ detha, bhattaṁ detha, khādanīyaṁ dethā”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc65:1.30
Pali: Bhikkhū evamāhaṁsu—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc65:1.31
Pali: “āgametha, āvuso, yāva ratti vibhāyati. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc65:1.32
Pali: Sace yāgu bhavissati, pivissatha. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc65:1.33
Pali: Sace bhattaṁ bhavissati, bhuñjissatha. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc65:1.34
Pali: Sace khādanīyaṁ bhavissati, khādissatha. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc65:1.35
Pali: No ce bhavissati yāgu vā bhattaṁ vā khādanīyaṁ vā, piṇḍāya caritvā bhuñjissathā”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc65:1.36
Pali: Evampi kho te bhikkhū bhikkhūhi vuccamānā rodantiyeva—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc65:1.37
Pali: “yāguṁ detha, bhattaṁ detha, khādanīyaṁ dethā”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc65:1.38
Pali: Senāsanaṁ ūhadantipi ummihantipi. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc65:1.39
Pali: Assosi kho bhagavā rattiyā paccūsasamayaṁ paccuṭṭhāya dārakasaddaṁ. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc65:1.40
Pali: Sutvāna āyasmantaṁ ānandaṁ āmantesi—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc65:1.41
Pali: “kiṁ nu kho so, ānanda, dārakasaddo”ti? 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc65:1.42
Pali: Atha kho āyasmā ānando bhagavato etamatthaṁ ārocesi. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc65:1.43
Pali: Atha kho bhagavā etasmiṁ nidāne etasmiṁ pakaraṇe bhikkhusaṅghaṁ sannipātāpetvā bhikkhū paṭipucchi—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc65:1.44
Pali: “saccaṁ kira, bhikkhave, bhikkhū jānaṁ ūnavīsativassaṁ puggalaṁ upasampādentī”ti? 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc65:1.45
Pali: “Saccaṁ, bhagavā”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc65:1.46
Pali: Vigarahi buddho bhagavā …pe… 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc65:1.47
Pali: kathañhi nāma te, bhikkhave, moghapurisā jānaṁ ūnavīsativassaṁ puggalaṁ upasampādessanti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc65:1.48
Pali: Ūnakavīsativasso, bhikkhave, puggalo akkhamo hoti sītassa uṇhassa jighacchāya pipāsāya ḍaṁsamakasavātātapasarīsapasamphassānaṁ duruttānaṁ durāgatānaṁ vacanapathānaṁ uppannānaṁ sārīrikānaṁ vedanānaṁ dukkhānaṁ tibbānaṁ kharānaṁ kaṭukānaṁ asātānaṁ amanāpānaṁ pāṇaharānaṁ anadhivāsakajātiko hoti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc65:1.49
Pali: Vīsativassova kho, bhikkhave, puggalo khamo hoti sītassa uṇhassa …pe… 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc65:1.50
Pali: pāṇaharānaṁ adhivāsakajātiko hoti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc65:1.51
Pali: Netaṁ, bhikkhave, appasannānaṁ vā pasādāya …pe… 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc65:1.52
Pali: evañca pana, bhikkhave, imaṁ sikkhāpadaṁ uddiseyyātha—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc65:1.53.1
Pali: “Yo pana bhikkhu jānaṁ ūnavīsativassaṁ puggalaṁ upasampādeyya, so ca puggalo anupasampanno, te ca bhikkhū gārayhā, idaṁ tasmiṁ pācittiyan”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc65:2.1.1
Pali: Yo panāti 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc65:2.1.2
Pali: yo yādiso …pe… 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc65:2.1.3
Pali: bhikkhūti 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc65:2.1.4
Pali: …pe… ayaṁ imasmiṁ atthe adhippeto bhikkhūti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc65:2.1.5
Pali: Jānāti nāma 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc65:2.1.6
Pali: sāmaṁ vā jānāti, aññe vā tassa ārocenti, so vā āroceti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc65:2.1.7
Pali: Ūnavīsativasso nāma 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc65:2.1.8
Pali: appattavīsativasso. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc65:2.1.9
Pali: “Upasampādessāmī”ti gaṇaṁ vā ācariyaṁ vā pattaṁ vā cīvaraṁ vā pariyesati, sīmaṁ vā sammannati, āpatti dukkaṭassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc65:2.1.10
Pali: Ñattiyā dukkaṭaṁ. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc65:2.1.11
Pali: Dvīhi kammavācāhi dukkaṭā. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc65:2.1.12
Pali: Kammavācāpariyosāne upajjhāyassa āpatti pācittiyassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc65:2.1.13
Pali: Gaṇassa ca ācariyassa ca āpatti dukkaṭassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc65:2.2.1
Pali: Ūnavīsativasse ūnavīsativassasaññī upasampādeti, āpatti pācittiyassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc65:2.2.2
Pali: Ūnavīsativasse vematiko upasampādeti, āpatti dukkaṭassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc65:2.2.3
Pali: Ūnavīsativasse paripuṇṇavīsativassasaññī upasampādeti, anāpatti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc65:2.2.4
Pali: Paripuṇṇavīsativasse ūnavīsativassasaññī, āpatti dukkaṭassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc65:2.2.5
Pali: Paripuṇṇavīsativasse vematiko, āpatti dukkaṭassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc65:2.2.6
Pali: Paripuṇṇavīsativasse paripuṇṇavīsativassasaññī, anāpatti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc65:2.3.1
Pali: Anāpatti—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc65:2.3.2
Pali: ūnavīsativassaṁ paripuṇṇavīsativassasaññī upasampādeti, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc65:2.3.3
Pali: paripuṇṇavīsativassaṁ paripuṇṇavīsativassasaññī upasampādeti, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc65:2.3.4
Pali: ummattakassa, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc65:2.3.5

Pali: Ūnavīsativassasikkhāpadaṁ niṭṭhitaṁ pañcamaṁ.

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc66:0.1
Pali: Theravāda Vinaya 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc66:0.2
Pali: Mahāvibhaṅga 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc66:0.3
Pali: Pācittiyakaṇḍa 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc66:0.4
Pali: Sappāṇakavagga 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc66:0.5
Pali: 66. Theyyasatthasikkhāpada 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc66:1.1
Pali: Tena samayena buddho bhagavā sāvatthiyaṁ viharati jetavane anāthapiṇḍikassa ārāme. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc66:1.2
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena aññataro sattho rājagahā paṭiyālokaṁ gantukāmo hoti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc66:1.3
Pali: Aññataro bhikkhu te manusse etadavoca—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc66:1.4
Pali: “ahampāyasmantehi saddhiṁ gamissāmī”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc66:1.5
Pali: “Mayaṁ kho, bhante, suṅkaṁ pariharissāmā”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc66:1.6
Pali: “Pajānāthāvuso”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc66:1.7
Pali: Assosuṁ kho kammiyā—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc66:1.8
Pali: “sattho kira suṅkaṁ pariharissatī”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc66:1.9
Pali: Te magge pariyuṭṭhiṁsu. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc66:1.10
Pali: Atha kho te kammiyā taṁ satthaṁ gahetvā acchinditvā taṁ bhikkhuṁ etadavocuṁ—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc66:1.11
Pali: “kissa tvaṁ, bhante, jānaṁ theyyasatthena saddhiṁ gacchasī”ti? 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc66:1.12
Pali: Palibundhetvā muñciṁsu. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc66:1.13
Pali: Atha kho so bhikkhu sāvatthiṁ gantvā bhikkhūnaṁ etamatthaṁ ārocesi. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc66:1.14
Pali: Ye te bhikkhū appicchā …pe… te ujjhāyanti khiyyanti vipācenti—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc66:1.15
Pali: “kathañhi nāma bhikkhu jānaṁ theyyasatthena saddhiṁ saṁvidhāya ekaddhānamaggaṁ paṭipajjissatī”ti …pe… 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc66:1.16
Pali: “saccaṁ kira tvaṁ, bhikkhu, jānaṁ theyyasatthena saddhiṁ saṁvidhāya ekaddhānamaggaṁ paṭipajjasī”ti? 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc66:1.17
Pali: “Saccaṁ, bhagavā”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc66:1.18
Pali: Vigarahi buddho bhagavā …pe… 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc66:1.19
Pali: kathañhi nāma tvaṁ, moghapurisa, jānaṁ theyyasatthena saddhiṁ saṁvidhāya ekaddhānamaggaṁ paṭipajjissasi. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc66:1.20
Pali: Netaṁ, moghapurisa, appasannānaṁ vā pasādāya …pe… 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc66:1.21
Pali: evañca pana, bhikkhave, imaṁ sikkhāpadaṁ uddiseyyātha—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc66:1.22.1
Pali: “Yo pana bhikkhu jānaṁ theyyasatthena saddhiṁ saṁvidhāya ekaddhānamaggaṁ paṭipajjeyya, antamaso gāmantarampi, pācittiyan”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc66:2.1.1
Pali: Yo panāti 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc66:2.1.2
Pali: yo yādiso …pe… 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc66:2.1.3
Pali: bhikkhūti 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc66:2.1.4
Pali: …pe… ayaṁ imasmiṁ atthe adhippeto bhikkhūti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc66:2.1.5
Pali: Jānāti nāma 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc66:2.1.6
Pali: sāmaṁ vā jānāti, aññe vā tassa ārocenti, so vā āroceti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc66:2.1.7
Pali: Theyyasattho nāma 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc66:2.1.8
Pali: corā katakammā vā honti akatakammā vā, rājānaṁ vā theyyaṁ gacchanti suṅkaṁ vā pariharanti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc66:2.1.9
Pali: Saddhinti 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc66:2.1.10
Pali: ekato. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc66:2.1.11
Pali: Saṁvidhāyāti—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc66:2.1.12
Pali: “gacchāmāvuso, gacchāma, bhante; gacchāma, bhante, gacchāmāvuso, ajja vā hiyyo vā pare vā gacchāmā”ti saṁvidahati, āpatti dukkaṭassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc66:2.1.13
Pali: Antamaso gāmantarampīti 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc66:2.1.14
Pali: kukkuṭasampāte gāme gāmantare gāmantare āpatti pācittiyassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc66:2.1.15
Pali: Agāmake araññe addhayojane addhayojane āpatti pācittiyassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc66:2.2.1
Pali: Theyyasatthe theyyasatthasaññī saṁvidhāya ekaddhānamaggaṁ paṭipajjati, antamaso gāmantarampi, āpatti pācittiyassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc66:2.2.2
Pali: Theyyasatthe vematiko saṁvidhāya ekaddhānamaggaṁ paṭipajjati, antamaso gāmantarampi, āpatti dukkaṭassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc66:2.2.3
Pali: Theyyasatthe atheyyasatthasaññī saṁvidhāya ekaddhānamaggaṁ paṭipajjati, antamaso gāmantarampi, anāpatti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc66:2.2.4
Pali: Bhikkhu saṁvidahati, manussā na saṁvidahanti, āpatti dukkaṭassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc66:2.2.5
Pali: Atheyyasatthe theyyasatthasaññī, āpatti dukkaṭassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc66:2.2.6
Pali: Atheyyasatthe vematiko, āpatti dukkaṭassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc66:2.2.7
Pali: Atheyyasatthe atheyyasatthasaññī anāpatti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc66:2.3.1
Pali: Anāpatti—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc66:2.3.2
Pali: asaṁvidahitvā gacchati, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc66:2.3.3
Pali: manussā saṁvidahanti bhikkhu na saṁvidahati, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc66:2.3.4
Pali: visaṅketena gacchati, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc66:2.3.5
Pali: āpadāsu, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc66:2.3.6
Pali: ummattakassa, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc66:2.3.7
Pali: ādikammikassāti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc66:2.3.8
Pali: Theyyasatthasikkhāpadaṁ niṭṭhitaṁ chaṭṭhaṁ.

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc67:0.1
Pali: Theravāda Vinaya 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc67:0.2

Pali: Pācittiyakaṇḍa 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc67:0.4
Pali: Sappāṇakavagga 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc67:0.5
Pali: 67. Saṁvidhānasikkhāpada 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc67:1.1
Pali: Tena samayena buddho bhagavā sāvatthiyaṁ viharati jetavane anāthapiṇḍikassa ārāme. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc67:1.2
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena aññataro bhikkhu kosalesu janapade sāvatthiṁ gacchanto aññatarena gāmadvārena atikkamati. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc67:1.3
Pali: Aññatarā itthī sāmikena saha bhaṇḍitvā gāmato nikkhamitvā taṁ bhikkhuṁ passitvā etadavoca—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc67:1.4
Pali: “kahaṁ, bhante, ayyo gamissatī”ti? 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc67:1.5
Pali: “Sāvatthiṁ kho ahaṁ, bhagini, gamissāmī”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc67:1.6
Pali: “Ahaṁ ayyena saddhiṁ gamissāmī”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc67:1.7
Pali: “Eyyāsi, bhaginī”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc67:1.8
Pali: Atha kho tassā itthiyā sāmiko gāmato nikkhamitvā manusse pucchi—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc67:1.9
Pali: “apāyyo, evarūpiṁ itthiṁ passeyyāthā”ti? 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc67:1.10
Pali: “Esāyyo, pabbajitena saha gacchatī”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc67:1.11
Pali: Atha kho so puriso anubandhitvā taṁ bhikkhuṁ gahetvā ākoṭetvā muñci. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc67:1.12
Pali: Atha kho so bhikkhu aññatarasmiṁ rukkhamūle padhūpento nisīdi. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc67:1.13
Pali: Atha kho sā itthī taṁ purisaṁ etadavoca—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc67:1.14
Pali: “nāyyo, so bhikkhu maṁ nippātesi; 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc67:1.15
Pali: api ca ahameva tena bhikkhunā saddhiṁ gacchāmi; 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc67:1.16
Pali: akārako so bhikkhu; 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc67:1.17
Pali: gaccha, naṁ khamāpehī”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc67:1.18
Pali: Atha kho so puriso taṁ bhikkhuṁ khamāpesi. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc67:1.19
Pali: Atha kho so bhikkhu sāvatthiṁ gantvā bhikkhūnaṁ etamatthaṁ ārocesi. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc67:1.20
Pali: Ye te bhikkhū appicchā …pe… te ujjhāyanti khiyyanti vipācenti—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc67:1.21
Pali: “kathañhi nāma bhikkhu mātugāmena saddhiṁ saṁvidhāya ekaddhānamaggaṁ paṭipajjissatī”ti …pe… 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc67:1.22
Pali: “saccaṁ kira tvaṁ, bhikkhu, mātugāmena saddhiṁ saṁvidhāya ekaddhānamaggaṁ paṭipajjasī”ti? 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc67:1.23
Pali: “Saccaṁ, bhagavā”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc67:1.24
Pali: Vigarahi buddho bhagavā …pe… 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc67:1.25
Pali: kathañhi nāma tvaṁ, moghapurisa, mātugāmena saddhiṁ saṁvidhāya ekaddhānamaggaṁ paṭipajjissasi. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc67:1.26
Pali: Netaṁ, moghapurisa, appasannānaṁ vā pasādāya …pe… 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc67:1.27
Pali: evañca pana, bhikkhave, imaṁ sikkhāpadaṁ, uddiseyyātha—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc67:1.28.1
Pali: “Yo pana bhikkhu mātugāmena saddhiṁ saṁvidhāya ekaddhānamaggaṁ paṭipajjeyya, antamaso gāmantarampi, pācittiyan”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc67:2.1.1
Pali: Yo panāti 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc67:2.1.2
Pali: yo yādiso …pe… 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc67:2.1.3
Pali: bhikkhūti 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc67:2.1.4
Pali: …pe… ayaṁ imasmiṁ atthe adhippeto bhikkhūti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc67:2.1.5
Pali: Mātugāmo nāma 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc67:2.1.6
Pali: manussitthī, na yakkhī na petī na tiracchānagatā viññū paṭibalā subhāsitadubbhāsitaṁ duṭṭhullāduṭṭhullaṁ ājānituṁ. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc67:2.1.7
Pali: Saddhinti 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc67:2.1.8
Pali: ekato. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc67:2.1.9
Pali: Saṁvidhāyāti—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc67:2.1.10
Pali: “gacchāma bhagini, gacchāmāyya, gacchāmāyya, gacchāma bhagini, ajja vā hiyyo vā pare vā gacchāmā”ti saṁvidahati, āpatti dukkaṭassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc67:2.1.11
Pali: Antamaso gāmantarampīti 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc67:2.1.12
Pali: kukkuṭasampāte gāme gāmantare gāmantare āpatti pācittiyassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc67:2.1.13
Pali: Agāmake araññe addhayojane addhayojane āpatti pācittiyassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc67:2.2.1
Pali: Mātugāme mātugāmasaññī saṁvidhāya ekaddhānamaggaṁ paṭipajjati, antamaso gāmantarampi, āpatti pācittiyassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc67:2.2.2
Pali: Mātugāme vematiko saṁvidhāya ekaddhānamaggaṁ paṭipajjati, antamaso gāmantarampi, āpatti pācittiyassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc67:2.2.3
Pali: Mātugāme amātugāmasaññī saṁvidhāya ekaddhānamaggaṁ paṭipajjati, antamaso gāmantarampi, āpatti pācittiyassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc67:2.2.4
Pali: Bhikkhu saṁvidahati mātugāmo na saṁvidahati, āpatti dukkaṭassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc67:2.2.5
Pali: Yakkhiyā vā petiyā paṇḍakena vā tiracchānagatamanussaviggahitthiyā vā saddhiṁ saṁvidhāya ekaddhānamaggaṁ paṭipajjati, antamaso gāmantarampi, āpatti dukkaṭassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc67:2.2.6
Pali: Amātugāme mātugāmasaññī, āpatti dukkaṭassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc67:2.2.7
Pali: Amātugāme vematiko, āpatti dukkaṭassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc67:2.2.8
Pali: Amātugāme amātugāmasaññī, anāpatti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc67:2.3.1
Pali: Anāpatti—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc67:2.3.2
Pali: asaṁvidahitvā gacchati, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc67:2.3.3
Pali: mātugāmo saṁvidahati bhikkhu na saṁvidahati, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc67:2.3.4
Pali: visaṅketena gacchati, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc67:2.3.5
Pali: āpadāsu, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc67:2.3.6
Pali: ummattakassa, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc67:2.3.7
Pali: ādikammikassāti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc67:2.3.8
Pali: Saṁvidhānasikkhāpadaṁ niṭṭhitaṁ sattamaṁ.
