Pali segments

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc68:0.1
Pali: Theravāda Vinaya 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc68:0.2
Pali: Mahāvibhaṅga 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc68:0.3
Pali: Pācittiyakaṇḍa 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc68:0.4
Pali: Sappāṇakavagga 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc68:0.5
Pali: 68. Ariṭṭhasikkhāpada 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc68:1.1
Pali: Tena samayena buddho bhagavā sāvatthiyaṁ viharati jetavane anāthapiṇḍikassa ārāme. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc68:1.2
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena ariṭṭhassa nāma bhikkhuno gaddhabādhipubbassa evarūpaṁ pāpakaṁ diṭṭhigataṁ uppannaṁ hoti—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc68:1.3
Pali: “tathāhaṁ bhagavatā dhammaṁ desitaṁ ājānāmi yathā yeme antarāyikā dhammā vuttā bhagavatā te paṭisevato nālaṁ antarāyāyā”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc68:1.4
Pali: Assosuṁ kho sambahulā bhikkhū—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc68:1.5
Pali: “ariṭṭhassa kira nāma bhikkhuno gaddhabādhipubbassa evarūpaṁ pāpakaṁ diṭṭhigataṁ uppannaṁ—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc68:1.6
Pali: ‘tathāhaṁ bhagavatā dhammaṁ desitaṁ ājānāmi, yathā yeme antarāyikā dhammā vuttā bhagavatā, te paṭisevato nālaṁ antarāyāyā’”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc68:1.7
Pali: Atha kho te bhikkhū yena ariṭṭho bhikkhu gaddhabādhipubbo tenupasaṅkamiṁsu; 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc68:1.8
Pali: upasaṅkamitvā ariṭṭhaṁ bhikkhuṁ gaddhabādhipubbaṁ etadavocuṁ—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc68:1.9
Pali: “saccaṁ kira te, āvuso ariṭṭha, evarūpaṁ pāpakaṁ diṭṭhigataṁ uppannaṁ—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc68:1.10
Pali: ‘tathāhaṁ bhagavatā dhammaṁ desitaṁ ājānāmi, yathā yeme antarāyikā dhammā vuttā bhagavatā, te paṭisevato nālaṁ antarāyāyā’”ti? 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc68:1.11
Pali: “Evaṁ byā kho ahaṁ, āvuso, bhagavatā dhammaṁ desitaṁ ājānāmi— ‘yathā yeme antarāyikā dhammā vuttā bhagavatā te paṭisevato nālaṁ antarāyāyā’”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc68:1.12
Pali: “Mā, āvuso ariṭṭha, evaṁ avaca. Mā bhagavantaṁ abbhācikkhi. Na hi sādhu bhagavato abbhakkhānaṁ. Na hi bhagavā evaṁ vadeyya. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc68:1.13
Pali: Anekapariyāyenāvuso ariṭṭha, antarāyikā dhammā antarāyikā vuttā bhagavatā. Alañca pana te paṭisevato antarāyāya. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc68:1.14
Pali: Appassādā kāmā vuttā bhagavatā bahudukkhā bahupāyāsā, ādīnavo ettha bhiyyo. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc68:1.15
Pali: Aṭṭhikaṅkalūpamā kāmā vuttā bhagavatā bahudukkhā bahupāyāsā, ādīnavo ettha bhiyyo. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc68:1.16
Pali: Maṁsapesūpamā kāmā vuttā bhagavatā …pe… 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc68:1.17
Pali: tiṇukkūpamā kāmā vuttā bhagavatā … 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc68:1.18
Pali: aṅgārakāsūpamā kāmā vuttā bhagavatā … 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc68:1.19
Pali: supinakūpamā kāmā vuttā bhagavatā … 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc68:1.20
Pali: yācitakūpamā kāmā vuttā bhagavatā … 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc68:1.21
Pali: rukkhaphalūpamā kāmā vuttā bhagavatā … 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc68:1.22
Pali: asisūnūpamā kāmā vuttā bhagavatā … 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc68:1.23
Pali: sattisūlūpamā kāmā vuttā bhagavatā … 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc68:1.24
Pali: sappasirūpamā kāmā vuttā bhagavatā bahudukkhā bahupāyāsā, ādīnavo ettha bhiyyo”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc68:1.25
Pali: Evampi kho ariṭṭho bhikkhu gaddhabādhipubbo tehi bhikkhūhi vuccamāno tatheva taṁ pāpakaṁ diṭṭhigataṁ thāmasā parāmāsā abhinivissa voharati—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc68:1.26
Pali: “evaṁ byā kho ahaṁ, āvuso, bhagavatā dhammaṁ desitaṁ ājānāmi— ‘yathā yeme antarāyikā dhammā vuttā bhagavatā, te paṭisevato nālaṁ antarāyāyā’”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc68:1.27
Pali: Yato ca kho te bhikkhū nāsakkhiṁsu ariṭṭhaṁ bhikkhuṁ gaddhabādhipubbaṁ etasmā pāpakā diṭṭhigatā vivecetuṁ, atha kho te bhikkhū yena bhagavā tenupasaṅkamiṁsu; upasaṅkamitvā bhagavato etamatthaṁ ārocesuṁ. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc68:1.28
Pali: Atha kho bhagavā etasmiṁ nidāne etasmiṁ pakaraṇe bhikkhusaṅghaṁ sannipātāpetvā ariṭṭhaṁ bhikkhuṁ gaddhabādhipubbaṁ paṭipucchi—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc68:1.29
Pali: “saccaṁ kira te, ariṭṭha, evarūpaṁ pāpakaṁ diṭṭhigataṁ uppannaṁ—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc68:1.30
Pali: ‘tathāhaṁ bhagavatā dhammaṁ desitaṁ ājānāmi yathā yeme antarāyikā dhammā vuttā bhagavatā te paṭisevato nālaṁ antarāyāyā’”ti? 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc68:1.31
Pali: “Evaṁ byā kho ahaṁ, bhante, bhagavatā dhammaṁ desitaṁ ājānāmi— ‘yathā yeme antarāyikā dhammā vuttā bhagavatā te paṭisevato nālaṁ antarāyāyā’”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc68:1.32
Pali: Kassa nu kho nāma tvaṁ, moghapurisa, mayā evaṁ dhammaṁ desitaṁ ājānāsi? 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc68:1.33
Pali: Nanu mayā, moghapurisa, anekapariyāyena antarāyikā dhammā antarāyikā vuttā. Alañca pana te paṭisevato antarāyāya. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc68:1.34
Pali: Appassādā kāmā vuttā mayā bahudukkhā bahupāyāsā, ādīnavo ettha bhiyyo. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc68:1.35
Pali: Aṭṭhikaṅkalūpamā kāmā vuttā mayā …pe… 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc68:1.36
Pali: maṁsapesūpamā kāmā vuttā mayā … 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc68:1.37
Pali: tiṇukkūpamā kāmā vuttā mayā … 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc68:1.38
Pali: aṅgārakāsūpamā kāmā vuttā mayā … 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc68:1.39
Pali: supinakūpamā kāmā vuttā mayā … 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc68:1.40
Pali: yācitakūpamā kāmā vuttā mayā … 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc68:1.41
Pali: rukkhaphalūpamā kāmā vuttā mayā … 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc68:1.42
Pali: asisūnūpamā kāmā vuttā mayā … 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc68:1.43
Pali: sattisūlūpamā kāmā vuttā mayā … 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc68:1.44
Pali: sappasirūpamā kāmā vuttā mayā bahudukkhā bahupāyāsā, ādīnavo ettha bhiyyo. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc68:1.45
Pali: Atha ca pana tvaṁ, moghapurisa, attanā duggahitena amhe ceva abbhācikkhasi, attānañca khaṇasi, bahuñca apuññaṁ pasavasi. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc68:1.46
Pali: Tañhi te, moghapurisa, bhavissati dīgharattaṁ ahitāya dukkhāya. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc68:1.47
Pali: Netaṁ, moghapurisa, appasannānaṁ vā pasādāya …pe… 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc68:1.48
Pali: evañca pana, bhikkhave, imaṁ sikkhāpadaṁ uddiseyyātha—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc68:1.49.1
Pali: “Yo pana bhikkhu evaṁ vadeyya—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc68:1.50
Pali: ‘tathāhaṁ bhagavatā dhammaṁ desitaṁ ājānāmi, yathā yeme antarāyikā dhammā vuttā bhagavatā, te paṭisevato nālaṁ antarāyāyā’ti 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc68:1.51
Pali: so bhikkhu bhikkhūhi evamassa vacanīyo—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc68:1.52
Pali: ‘māyasmā evaṁ avaca, mā bhagavantaṁ abbhācikkhi, na hi sādhu bhagavato abbhakkhānaṁ, na hi bhagavā evaṁ vadeyya, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc68:1.53
Pali: anekapariyāyenāvuso, antarāyikā dhammā antarāyikā vuttā bhagavatā, alañca pana te paṭisevato antarāyāyā’ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc68:1.54
Pali: Evañca so bhikkhu bhikkhūhi vuccamāno tatheva paggaṇheyya, so bhikkhu bhikkhūhi yāvatatiyaṁ samanubhāsitabbo tassa paṭinissaggāya. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc68:1.55
Pali: Yāvatatiyañce samanubhāsiyamāno taṁ paṭinissajjeyya, iccetaṁ kusalaṁ, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc68:1.56
Pali: no ce paṭinissajjeyya, pācittiyan”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc68:2.1.1
Pali: Yo panāti 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc68:2.1.2
Pali: yo yādiso …pe… 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc68:2.1.3
Pali: bhikkhūti 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc68:2.1.4
Pali: …pe… ayaṁ imasmiṁ atthe adhippeto bhikkhūti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc68:2.1.5
Pali: Evaṁ vadeyyāti—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc68:2.1.6
Pali: “tathāhaṁ bhagavatā dhammaṁ desitaṁ ājānāmi, yathā yeme antarāyikā dhammā vuttā bhagavatā te paṭisevato nālaṁ antarāyāyā”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc68:2.1.7
Pali: So bhikkhūti 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc68:2.1.8
Pali: yo so evaṁvādī bhikkhu. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc68:2.1.9
Pali: Bhikkhūhīti 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc68:2.1.10
Pali: aññehi bhikkhūhi. Ye passanti ye suṇanti tehi vattabbo—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc68:2.1.11
Pali: “māyasmā evaṁ avaca, mā bhagavantaṁ abbhācikkhi, na hi sādhu bhagavato abbhakkhānaṁ, na hi bhagavā evaṁ vadeyya, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc68:2.1.12
Pali: anekapariyāyenāvuso antarāyikā dhammā antarāyikā vuttā bhagavatā. Alañca pana te paṭisevato antarāyāyā”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc68:2.1.13
Pali: Dutiyampi vattabbo. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc68:2.1.14
Pali: Tatiyampi vattabbo. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc68:2.1.15
Pali: Sace paṭinissajjati, iccetaṁ kusalaṁ; 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc68:2.1.16
Pali: no ce paṭinissajjati, āpatti dukkaṭassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc68:2.1.17
Pali: Sutvā na vadanti, āpatti dukkaṭassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc68:2.1.18
Pali: So bhikkhu saṅghamajjhampi ākaḍḍhitvā vattabbo—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc68:2.1.19
Pali: “māyasmā evaṁ avaca, mā bhagavantaṁ abbhācikkhi, na hi sādhu bhagavato abbhakkhānaṁ, na hi bhagavā evaṁ vadeyya, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc68:2.1.20
Pali: anekapariyāyenāvuso antarāyikā dhammā antarāyikā vuttā bhagavatā. Alañca pana te paṭisevato antarāyāyā”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc68:2.1.21
Pali: Dutiyampi vattabbo. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc68:2.1.22
Pali: Tatiyampi vattabbo. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc68:2.1.23
Pali: Sace paṭinissajjati, iccetaṁ kusalaṁ. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc68:2.1.24
Pali: No ce paṭinissajjati, āpatti dukkaṭassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc68:2.1.25
Pali: So bhikkhu samanubhāsitabbo. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc68:2.1.26
Pali: “Evañca pana, bhikkhave, samanubhāsitabbo. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc68:2.1.27
Pali: Byattena bhikkhunā paṭibalena saṅgho ñāpetabbo—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc68:2.1.28
Pali: ‘Suṇātu me, bhante, saṅgho. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc68:2.1.29
Pali: Itthannāmassa bhikkhuno evarūpaṁ pāpakaṁ diṭṭhigataṁ uppannaṁ—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc68:2.1.30
Pali: “tathāhaṁ bhagavatā dhammaṁ desitaṁ ājānāmi, yathā yeme antarāyikā dhammā vuttā bhagavatā, te paṭisevato nālaṁ antarāyāyā”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc68:2.1.31
Pali: So taṁ diṭṭhiṁ na paṭinissajjati. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc68:2.1.32
Pali: Yadi saṅghassa pattakallaṁ, saṅgho itthannāmaṁ bhikkhuṁ samanubhāseyya—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc68:2.1.33
Pali: tassā diṭṭhiyā paṭinissaggāya. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc68:2.1.34
Pali: Esā ñatti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc68:2.1.35
Pali: Suṇātu me, bhante, saṅgho. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc68:2.1.36
Pali: Itthannāmassa bhikkhuno evarūpaṁ pāpakaṁ diṭṭhigataṁ uppannaṁ—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc68:2.1.37
Pali: “tathāhaṁ bhagavatā dhammaṁ desitaṁ ājānāmi, yathā yeme antarāyikā dhammā vuttā bhagavatā, te paṭisevato nālaṁ antarāyāyā”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc68:2.1.38
Pali: So taṁ diṭṭhiṁ na paṭinissajjati. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc68:2.1.39
Pali: Saṅgho itthannāmaṁ bhikkhuṁ samanubhāsati tassā diṭṭhiyā paṭinissaggāya. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc68:2.1.40
Pali: Yassāyasmato khamati itthannāmassa bhikkhuno samanubhāsanā, tassā diṭṭhiyā paṭinissaggāya, so tuṇhassa; 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc68:2.1.41
Pali: yassa nakkhamati, so bhāseyya. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc68:2.1.42
Pali: Dutiyampi etamatthaṁ vadāmi …pe… 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc68:2.1.43
Pali: tatiyampi etamatthaṁ vadāmi—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc68:2.1.44
Pali: suṇātu me, bhante, saṅgho. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc68:2.1.45
Pali: Itthannāmassa bhikkhuno evarūpaṁ pāpakaṁ diṭṭhigataṁ uppannaṁ—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc68:2.1.46
Pali: “tathāhaṁ bhagavatā dhammaṁ desitaṁ ājānāmi yathā yeme antarāyikā dhammā vuttā bhagavatā te paṭisevato nālaṁ antarāyāyā”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc68:2.1.47
Pali: So taṁ diṭṭhiṁ na paṭinissajjati. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc68:2.1.48
Pali: Saṅgho itthannāmaṁ bhikkhuṁ samanubhāsati tassā diṭṭhiyā paṭinissaggāya. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc68:2.1.49
Pali: Yassāyasmato khamati itthannāmassa bhikkhuno samanubhāsanā, tassā diṭṭhiyā paṭinissaggāya, so tuṇhassa; 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc68:2.1.50
Pali: yassa nakkhamati, so bhāseyya. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc68:2.1.51
Pali: Samanubhaṭṭho saṅghena itthannāmo bhikkhu, tassā diṭṭhiyā paṭinissaggāya. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc68:2.1.52
Pali: Khamati saṅghassa, tasmā tuṇhī, evametaṁ dhārayāmī’”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc68:2.1.53
Pali: Ñattiyā dukkaṭaṁ. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc68:2.1.54
Pali: Dvīhi kammavācāhi dukkaṭā. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc68:2.1.55
Pali: Kammavācāpariyosāne āpatti pācittiyassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc68:2.2.1
Pali: Dhammakamme dhammakammasaññī na paṭinissajjati, āpatti pācittiyassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc68:2.2.2
Pali: Dhammakamme vematiko na paṭinissajjati, āpatti pācittiyassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc68:2.2.3
Pali: Dhammakamme adhammakammasaññī na paṭinissajjati, āpatti pācittiyassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc68:2.2.4
Pali: Adhammakamme dhammakammasaññī, āpatti dukkaṭassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc68:2.2.5
Pali: Adhammakamme vematiko, āpatti dukkaṭassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc68:2.2.6
Pali: Adhammakamme adhammakammasaññī, āpatti dukkaṭassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc68:2.3.1
Pali: Anāpatti—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc68:2.3.2
Pali: asamanubhāsantassa, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc68:2.3.3
Pali: paṭinissajjantassa, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc68:2.3.4
Pali: ummattakassāti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc68:2.3.5
Pali: 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc68:2.3.6
Pali: Ariṭṭhasikkhāpadaṁ niṭṭhitaṁ aṭṭhamaṁ.

Pali: Sappāṇakavagga 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc69:0.5
Pali: 69. Ukkhittasambhogasikkhāpada 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc69:1.1
Pali: Tena samayena buddho bhagavā sāvatthiyaṁ viharati jetavane anāthapiṇḍikassa ārāme. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc69:1.2
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena chabbaggiyā bhikkhū jānaṁ tathāvādinā ariṭṭhena bhikkhunā akaṭānudhammena taṁ diṭṭhiṁ appaṭinissaṭṭhena saddhiṁ sambhuñjantipi saṁvasantipi sahāpi seyyaṁ kappenti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc69:1.3
Pali: Ye te bhikkhū appicchā …pe… te ujjhāyanti khiyyanti vipācenti—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc69:1.4
Pali: “kathañhi nāma chabbaggiyā bhikkhū jānaṁ tathāvādinā ariṭṭhena bhikkhunā akaṭānudhammena taṁ diṭṭhiṁ appaṭinissaṭṭhena saddhiṁ sambhuñjissantipi saṁvasissantipi sahāpi seyyaṁ kappessantī”ti …pe… 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc69:1.5
Pali: “saccaṁ kira tumhe, bhikkhave, jānaṁ tathāvādinā ariṭṭhena bhikkhunā akaṭānudhammena taṁ diṭṭhiṁ appaṭinissaṭṭhena saddhiṁ sambhuñjathāpi saṁvasathāpi sahāpi seyyaṁ kappethā”ti? 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc69:1.6
Pali: “Saccaṁ, bhagavā”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc69:1.7
Pali: Vigarahi buddho bhagavā …pe… 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc69:1.8
Pali: kathañhi nāma tumhe, moghapurisā, jānaṁ tathāvādinā ariṭṭhena bhikkhunā akaṭānudhammena taṁ diṭṭhiṁ appaṭinissaṭṭhena saddhiṁ sambhuñjissathāpi saṁvasissathāpi sahāpi seyyaṁ kappessatha. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc69:1.9
Pali: Netaṁ, moghapurisā, appasannānaṁ vā pasādāya …pe… 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc69:1.10
Pali: evañca pana, bhikkhave, imaṁ sikkhāpadaṁ uddiseyyātha—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc69:1.11.1
Pali: “Yo pana bhikkhu jānaṁ tathāvādinā bhikkhunā akaṭānudhammena taṁ diṭṭhiṁ appaṭinissaṭṭhena saddhiṁ sambhuñjeyya vā saṁvaseyya vā saha vā seyyaṁ kappeyya, pācittiyan”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc69:2.1.1
Pali: Yo panāti 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc69:2.1.2
Pali: yo yādiso …pe… 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc69:2.1.3
Pali: bhikkhūti 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc69:2.1.4
Pali: …pe… ayaṁ imasmiṁ atthe adhippeto bhikkhūti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc69:2.1.5
Pali: Jānāti nāma 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc69:2.1.6
Pali: sāmaṁ vā jānāti, aññe vā tassa ārocenti, so vā āroceti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc69:2.1.7
Pali: Tathāvādināti—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc69:2.1.8
Pali: “tathāhaṁ bhagavatā dhammaṁ desitaṁ ājānāmi, yathā yeme antarāyikā dhammā vuttā bhagavatā, te paṭisevato nālaṁ antarāyāyā”ti evaṁ vādinā. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc69:2.1.9
Pali: Akaṭānudhammo nāma 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc69:2.1.10
Pali: ukkhitto anosārito. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc69:2.1.11
Pali: Taṁ diṭṭhiṁ appaṭinissaṭṭhena saddhinti 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc69:2.1.12
Pali: etaṁ diṭṭhiṁ appaṭinissaṭṭhena saddhiṁ. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc69:2.1.13
Pali: Sambhuñjeyya vāti 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc69:2.1.14
Pali: sambhogo nāma dve sambhogā— āmisasambhogo ca dhammasambhogo ca. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc69:2.1.15
Pali: Āmisasambhogo nāma 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc69:2.1.16
Pali: āmisaṁ deti vā paṭiggaṇhāti vā, āpatti pācittiyassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc69:2.1.17
Pali: Dhammasambhogo nāma 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc69:2.1.18
Pali: uddisati vā uddisāpeti vā, padena uddisati vā uddisāpeti vā, pade pade āpatti pācittiyassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc69:2.1.19
Pali: Akkharāya uddisati vā uddisāpeti vā, akkharakkharāya āpatti pācittiyassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc69:2.1.20
Pali: Saṁvaseyya vāti 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc69:2.1.21
Pali: ukkhittakena saddhiṁ uposathaṁ vā pavāraṇaṁ vā saṅghakammaṁ vā karoti, āpatti pācittiyassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc69:2.1.22
Pali: Saha vā seyyaṁ kappeyyāti 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc69:2.1.23
Pali: ekacchanne ukkhittake nipanne bhikkhu nipajjati, āpatti pācittiyassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc69:2.1.24
Pali: Bhikkhu nipanne ukkhittako nipajjati, āpatti pācittiyassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc69:2.1.25
Pali: Ubho vā nipajjanti, āpatti pācittiyassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc69:2.1.26
Pali: Uṭṭhahitvā punappunaṁ nipajjanti, āpatti pācittiyassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc69:2.2.1
Pali: Ukkhittake ukkhittakasaññī sambhuñjati vā saṁvasati vā saha vā seyyaṁ kappeti, āpatti pācittiyassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc69:2.2.2
Pali: Ukkhittake vematiko sambhuñjati vā saṁvasati vā saha vā seyyaṁ kappeti, āpatti dukkaṭassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc69:2.2.3
Pali: Ukkhittake anukkhittakasaññī sambhuñjati vā saṁvasati vā saha vā seyyaṁ kappeti, anāpatti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc69:2.2.4
Pali: Anukkhittake ukkhittakasaññī, āpatti dukkaṭassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc69:2.2.5
Pali: Anukkhittake vematiko, āpatti dukkaṭassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc69:2.2.6
Pali: Anukkhittake anukkhittakasaññī, anāpatti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc69:2.3.1
Pali: Anāpatti—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc69:2.3.2
Pali: anukkhittoti jānāti, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc69:2.3.3
Pali: ukkhitto osāritoti jānāti, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc69:2.3.4
Pali: taṁ diṭṭhiṁ paṭinissaṭṭhoti jānāti, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc69:2.3.5
Pali: ummattakassa, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc69:2.3.6
Pali: ādikammikassāti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc69:2.3.7
Pali: Ukkhittasambhogasikkhāpadaṁ niṭṭhitaṁ navamaṁ.

Root: root/pli/ms/vinaya/pli-tv-bu-vb/pli-tv-bu-vb-pc/pli-tv-bu-vb-pc70_root-pli-ms.json

Chinese translations: 0

Pali segments

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc70:0.1
Pali: Theravāda Vinaya 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc70:0.2
Pali: Mahāvibhaṅga 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc70:0.3
Pali: Pācittiyakaṇḍa 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc70:0.4
Pali: Sappāṇakavagga 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc70:0.5
Pali: 70. Kaṇṭakasikkhāpada 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc70:1.1
Pali: Tena samayena buddho bhagavā sāvatthiyaṁ viharati jetavane anāthapiṇḍikassa ārāme. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc70:1.2
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena kaṇṭakassa nāma samaṇuddesassa evarūpaṁ pāpakaṁ diṭṭhigataṁ uppannaṁ hoti—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc70:1.3
Pali: “tathāhaṁ bhagavatā dhammaṁ desitaṁ ājānāmi, yathā yeme antarāyikā dhammā vuttā bhagavatā te paṭisevato nālaṁ antarāyāyā”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc70:1.4
Pali: Assosuṁ kho sambahulā bhikkhū kaṇṭakassa nāma kira samaṇuddesassa evarūpaṁ pāpakaṁ diṭṭhigataṁ uppannaṁ—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc70:1.5
Pali: “tathāhaṁ bhagavatā dhammaṁ desitaṁ ājānāmi, yathā yeme antarāyikā dhammā vuttā bhagavatā, te paṭisevato nālaṁ antarāyāyā”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc70:1.6
Pali: Atha kho te bhikkhū yena kaṇṭako samaṇuddeso tenupasaṅkamiṁsu; upasaṅkamitvā kaṇṭakaṁ samaṇuddesaṁ etadavocuṁ—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc70:1.7
Pali: “saccaṁ kira te, āvuso kaṇṭaka, evarūpaṁ pāpakaṁ diṭṭhigataṁ uppannaṁ—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc70:1.8
Pali: ‘tathāhaṁ bhagavatā dhammaṁ desitaṁ ājānāmi, yathā yeme antarāyikā dhammā vuttā bhagavatā te paṭisevato nālaṁ antarāyāyā’”ti? 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc70:1.9
Pali: “Evaṁ byā kho ahaṁ, bhante, bhagavatā dhammaṁ desitaṁ ājānāmi— ‘yathā yeme antarāyikā dhammā vuttā bhagavatā te paṭisevato nālaṁ antarāyāyā’”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc70:1.10
Pali: “Mā, āvuso kaṇṭaka, evaṁ avaca. Mā bhagavantaṁ abbhācikkhi. Na hi sādhu bhagavato abbhakkhānaṁ. Na hi bhagavā evaṁ vadeyya. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc70:1.11
Pali: Anekapariyāyenāvuso kaṇṭaka, antarāyikā dhammā antarāyikā vuttā bhagavatā. Alañca pana te paṭisevato antarāyāya. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc70:1.12
Pali: Appassādā kāmā vuttā bhagavatā bahudukkhā bahupāyāsā, ādīnavo ettha bhiyyo …pe… 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc70:1.13
Pali: evampi kho kaṇṭako samaṇuddeso tehi bhikkhūhi vuccamāno tatheva taṁ pāpakaṁ diṭṭhigataṁ thāmasā parāmāsā abhinivissa voharati—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc70:1.14
Pali: “evaṁ byā kho ahaṁ, bhante, bhagavatā dhammaṁ desitaṁ ājānāmi— ‘yathā yeme antarāyikā dhammā vuttā bhagavatā te paṭisevato nālaṁ antarāyāyā’”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc70:1.15
Pali: Yato ca kho te bhikkhū nāsakkhiṁsu kaṇṭakaṁ samaṇuddesaṁ etasmā pāpakā diṭṭhigatā vivecetuṁ, atha kho te bhikkhū yena bhagavā tenupasaṅkamiṁsu; upasaṅkamitvā bhagavato etamatthaṁ ārocesuṁ. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc70:1.16
Pali: Atha kho bhagavā etasmiṁ nidāne etasmiṁ pakaraṇe bhikkhusaṅghaṁ sannipātāpetvā kaṇṭakaṁ samaṇuddesaṁ paṭipucchi—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc70:1.17
Pali: “saccaṁ kira te, kaṇṭaka, evarūpaṁ pāpakaṁ diṭṭhigataṁ uppannaṁ—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc70:1.18
Pali: ‘tathāhaṁ bhagavatā dhammaṁ desitaṁ ājānāmi, yathā yeme antarāyikā dhammā vuttā bhagavatā te paṭisevato nālaṁ antarāyāyā’”ti? 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc70:1.19
Pali: “Evaṁ byā kho ahaṁ, bhante, bhagavatā dhammaṁ desitaṁ ājānāmi— ‘yathā yeme antarāyikā dhammā vuttā bhagavatā te paṭisevato nālaṁ antarāyāyā’”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc70:1.20
Pali: “Kassa nu kho nāma tvaṁ, moghapurisa, mayā evaṁ dhammaṁ desitaṁ ājānāsi? 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc70:1.21
Pali: Nanu mayā, moghapurisa, anekapariyāyena antarāyikā dhammā antarāyikā vuttā, alañca pana te paṭisevato antarāyāya? 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc70:1.22
Pali: Appassādā kāmā vuttā mayā bahudukkhā bahupāyāsā, ādīnavo ettha bhiyyo. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc70:1.23
Pali: Aṭṭhikaṅkalūpamā kāmā vuttā mayā …pe… 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc70:1.24
Pali: sappasirūpamā kāmā vuttā mayā bahudukkhā bahupāyāsā, ādīnavo ettha bhiyyo. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc70:1.25
Pali: Atha ca pana tvaṁ, moghapurisa, attanā duggahitena amhe ceva abbhācikkhasi attānañca khaṇasi bahuñca apuññaṁ pasavasi. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc70:1.26
Pali: Tañhi te, moghapurisa, bhavissati dīgharattaṁ ahitāya dukkhāya. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc70:1.27
Pali: Netaṁ, moghapurisa, appasannānaṁ vā pasādāya …pe… 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc70:1.28
Pali: pasannānañca ekaccānaṁ aññathattāyā”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc70:1.29
Pali: Vigarahitvā …pe… 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc70:1.30
Pali: dhammiṁ kathaṁ katvā bhikkhū āmantesi—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc70:1.31
Pali: “tena hi, bhikkhave, saṅgho kaṇṭakaṁ samaṇuddesaṁ nāsetu. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc70:1.32
Pali: Evañca pana, bhikkhave, nāsetabbo—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc70:1.33
Pali: ‘ajjatagge te, āvuso kaṇṭaka, na ceva so bhagavā satthā apadisitabbo. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc70:1.34
Pali: Yampi caññe samaṇuddesā labhanti bhikkhūhi saddhiṁ dirattatirattaṁ sahaseyyaṁ sāpi te natthi. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc70:1.35
Pali: Cara pire vinassā’”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc70:1.36
Pali: Atha kho saṅgho kaṇṭakaṁ samaṇuddesaṁ nāsesi. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc70:1.37
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena chabbaggiyā bhikkhū jānaṁ tathānāsitaṁ kaṇṭakaṁ samaṇuddesaṁ upalāpentipi upaṭṭhāpentipi sambhuñjantipi sahāpi seyyaṁ kappenti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc70:1.38
Pali: Ye te bhikkhū appicchā …pe… te ujjhāyanti khiyyanti vipācenti—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc70:1.39
Pali: “kathañhi nāma chabbaggiyā bhikkhū jānaṁ tathānāsitaṁ kaṇṭakaṁ samaṇuddesaṁ upalāpessantipi upaṭṭhāpessantipi sambhuñjissantipi sahāpi seyyaṁ kappessantī”ti …pe… 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc70:1.40
Pali: “saccaṁ kira tumhe, bhikkhave, jānaṁ tathānāsitaṁ kaṇṭakaṁ samaṇuddesaṁ upalāpethāpi upaṭṭhāpethāpi sambhuñjathāpi sahāpi seyyaṁ kappethā”ti? 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc70:1.41
Pali: “Saccaṁ, bhagavā”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc70:1.42
Pali: Vigarahi buddho bhagavā …pe… 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc70:1.43
Pali: kathañhi nāma tumhe, moghapurisā, jānaṁ tathānāsitaṁ kaṇṭakaṁ samaṇuddesaṁ upalāpessathāpi upaṭṭhāpessathāpi sambhuñjissathāpi sahāpi seyyaṁ kappessatha. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc70:1.44
Pali: Netaṁ, moghapurisā, appasannānaṁ vā pasādāya …pe… 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc70:1.45
Pali: evañca pana, bhikkhave, imaṁ sikkhāpadaṁ uddiseyyātha—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc70:1.46.1
Pali: “Samaṇuddesopi ce evaṁ vadeyya—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc70:1.47
Pali: ‘tathāhaṁ bhagavatā dhammaṁ desitaṁ ājānāmi, yathā yeme antarāyikā dhammā vuttā bhagavatā te paṭisevato nālaṁ antarāyāyā’ti, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc70:1.48
Pali: so samaṇuddeso bhikkhūhi evamassa vacanīyo—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc70:1.49
Pali: ‘māvuso samaṇuddesa, evaṁ avaca, mā bhagavantaṁ abbhācikkhi, na hi sādhu bhagavato abbhakkhānaṁ, na hi bhagavā evaṁ vadeyya. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc70:1.50
Pali: Anekapariyāyenāvuso samaṇuddesa, antarāyikā dhammā antarāyikā vuttā bhagavatā. Alañca pana te paṭisevato antarāyāyā’ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc70:1.51
Pali: Evañca so samaṇuddeso bhikkhūhi vuccamāno tatheva paggaṇheyya, so samaṇuddeso bhikkhūhi evamassa vacanīyo—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc70:1.52
Pali: ‘ajjatagge te, āvuso samaṇuddesa, na ceva so bhagavā satthā apadisitabbo. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc70:1.53
Pali: Yampi caññe samaṇuddesā labhanti bhikkhūhi saddhiṁ dirattatirattaṁ sahaseyyaṁ sāpi te natthi. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc70:1.54
Pali: Cara pire vinassā’ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc70:1.55
Pali: Yo pana bhikkhu jānaṁ tathānāsitaṁ samaṇuddesaṁ upalāpeyya vā upaṭṭhāpeyya vā sambhuñjeyya vā saha vā seyyaṁ kappeyya, pācittiyan”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc70:2.1.1
Pali: Samaṇuddeso nāma 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc70:2.1.2
Pali: sāmaṇero vuccati. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc70:2.1.3
Pali: Evaṁ vadeyyāti—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc70:2.1.4
Pali: “tathāhaṁ bhagavatā dhammaṁ desitaṁ ājānāmi, yathā yeme antarāyikā dhammā vuttā bhagavatā, te paṭisevato nālaṁ antarāyāyā”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc70:2.1.5
Pali: So samaṇuddesoti 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc70:2.1.6
Pali: yo so evaṁvādī samaṇuddeso. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc70:2.1.7
Pali: Bhikkhūhīti 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc70:2.1.8
Pali: aññehi bhikkhūhi, ye passanti ye suṇanti tehi vattabbo— “mā, āvuso samaṇuddesa, evaṁ avaca. Mā bhagavantaṁ abbhācikkhi. Na hi sādhu bhagavato abbhakkhānaṁ. Na hi bhagavā evaṁ vadeyya. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc70:2.1.9
Pali: Anekapariyāyenāvuso samaṇuddesa, antarāyikā dhammā antarāyikā vuttā bhagavatā. Alañca pana te paṭisevato antarāyāyā”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc70:2.1.10
Pali: Dutiyampi vattabbo … 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc70:2.1.11
Pali: tatiyampi vattabbo … 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc70:2.1.12
Pali: sace paṭinissajjati iccetaṁ kusalaṁ, no ce paṭinissajjati so samaṇuddeso bhikkhūhi evamassa vacanīyo—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc70:2.1.13
Pali: “ajjatagge te, āvuso samaṇuddesa, na ceva so bhagavā satthā apadisitabbo. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc70:2.1.14
Pali: Yampi caññe samaṇuddesā labhanti bhikkhūhi saddhiṁ dirattatirattaṁ sahaseyyaṁ sāpi te natthi. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc70:2.1.15
Pali: Cara pire vinassā”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc70:2.1.16
Pali: Yo panāti 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc70:2.1.17
Pali: yo yādiso …pe… 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc70:2.1.18
Pali: bhikkhūti 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc70:2.1.19
Pali: …pe… ayaṁ imasmiṁ atthe adhippeto bhikkhūti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc70:2.1.20
Pali: Jānāti nāma 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc70:2.1.21
Pali: sāmaṁ vā jānāti, aññe vā tassa ārocenti, so vā āroceti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc70:2.1.22
Pali: Tathānāsitanti 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc70:2.1.23
Pali: evaṁ nāsitaṁ. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc70:2.1.24
Pali: Samaṇuddeso nāma 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc70:2.1.25
Pali: sāmaṇero vuccati. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc70:2.1.26
Pali: Upalāpeyya vāti 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc70:2.1.27
Pali: tassa pattaṁ vā cīvaraṁ vā uddesaṁ vā paripucchaṁ vā dassāmīti upalāpeti, āpatti pācittiyassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc70:2.1.28
Pali: Upaṭṭhāpeyya vāti 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc70:2.1.29
Pali: tassa cuṇṇaṁ vā mattikaṁ vā dantakaṭṭhaṁ vā mukhodakaṁ vā sādiyati, āpatti pācittiyassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc70:2.1.30
Pali: Sambhuñjeyya vāti 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc70:2.1.31
Pali: sambhogo nāma dve sambhogā—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc70:2.1.32
Pali: āmisasambhogo ca dhammasambhogo ca. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc70:2.1.33
Pali: Āmisasambhogo nāma 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc70:2.1.34
Pali: āmisaṁ deti vā paṭiggaṇhāti vā, āpatti pācittiyassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc70:2.1.35
Pali: Dhammasambhogo nāma 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc70:2.1.36
Pali: uddisati vā uddisāpeti vā, padena uddisati vā uddisāpeti vā, pade pade āpatti pācittiyassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc70:2.1.37
Pali: Akkharāya uddisati vā uddisāpeti vā, akkharakkharāya āpatti pācittiyassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc70:2.1.38
Pali: Saha vā seyyaṁ kappeyyāti 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc70:2.1.39
Pali: ekacchanne nāsitake samaṇuddese nipanne bhikkhu nipajjati, āpatti pācittiyassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc70:2.1.40
Pali: Bhikkhu nipanne nāsitako samaṇuddeso nipajjati, āpatti pācittiyassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc70:2.1.41
Pali: Ubho vā nipajjanti, āpatti pācittiyassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc70:2.1.42
Pali: Uṭṭhahitvā punappunaṁ nipajjanti, āpatti pācittiyassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc70:2.2.1
Pali: Nāsitake nāsitakasaññī upalāpeti vā upaṭṭhāpeti vā sambhuñjati vā saha vā seyyaṁ kappeti, āpatti pācittiyassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc70:2.2.2
Pali: Nāsitake vematiko upalāpeti vā upaṭṭhāpeti vā sambhuñjati vā saha vā seyyaṁ kappeti, āpatti dukkaṭassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc70:2.2.3
Pali: Nāsitake anāsitakasaññī upalāpeti vā upaṭṭhāpeti vā sambhuñjati vā saha vā seyyaṁ kappeti, anāpatti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc70:2.2.4
Pali: Anāsitake nāsitakasaññī, āpatti dukkaṭassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc70:2.2.5
Pali: Anāsitake vematiko, āpatti dukkaṭassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc70:2.2.6
Pali: Anāsitake anāsitakasaññī, anāpatti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc70:2.3.1
Pali: Anāpatti—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc70:2.3.2
Pali: anāsitakoti jānāti; 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc70:2.3.3
Pali: taṁ diṭṭhiṁ paṭinissaṭṭhoti jānāti; 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc70:2.3.4
Pali: ummattakassa, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc70:2.3.5
Pali: ādikammikassāti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc70:2.3.6
Pali: Kaṇṭakasikkhāpadaṁ niṭṭhitaṁ dasamaṁ. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc70:2.3.7
Pali: Sappāṇakavaggo sattamo. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc70:2.3.8
Pali: Tassuddānaṁ 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc70:2.3.9
Pali: Sañciccavadhasappāṇaṁ, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc70:2.3.10
Pali: ukkoṭaṁ duṭṭhullachādanaṁ; 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc70:2.3.11
Pali: Ūnavīsati satthañca, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc70:2.3.12
Pali: saṁvidhānaṁ ariṭṭhakaṁ; 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc70:2.3.13
Pali: Ukkhittaṁ kaṇṭakañceva, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc70:2.3.14
Pali: dasa sikkhāpadā imeti.

Pali: 71. Sahadhammikasikkhāpada 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc71:1.1
Pali: Tena samayena buddho bhagavā kosambiyaṁ viharati ghositārāme.

Pali: Tena kho pana samayena āyasmā channo anācāraṁ ācarati. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc71:1.3
Pali: Bhikkhū evamāhaṁsu—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc71:1.4
Pali: “māvuso channa, evarūpaṁ akāsi. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc71:1.5
Pali: Netaṁ kappatī”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc71:1.6
Pali: So evaṁ vadeti—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc71:1.7
Pali: “na tāvāhaṁ, āvuso, etasmiṁ sikkhāpade sikkhissāmi yāva na aññaṁ bhikkhuṁ byattaṁ vinayadharaṁ paripucchāmī”ti.

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc71:1.11

Pali: Bhikkhūhīti

Pali: aññehi bhikkhūhi. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc71:2.1.7
Pali: Sahadhammikaṁ nāma 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc71:2.1.8
Pali: yaṁ bhagavatā paññattaṁ sikkhāpadaṁ etaṁ sahadhammikaṁ nāma. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc71:2.1.9
Pali: Tena vuccamāno evaṁ vadeti— “na tāvāhaṁ, āvuso, etasmiṁ sikkhāpade sikkhissāmi yāva na aññaṁ bhikkhuṁ byattaṁ vinayadharaṁ paripucchāmī”ti. Paṇḍitaṁ byattaṁ medhāviṁ bahussutaṁ dhammakathikaṁ paripucchāmīti bhaṇati, āpatti pācittiyassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc71:2.2.1
Pali: Upasampanne upasampannasaññī evaṁ vadeti, āpatti pācittiyassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc71:2.2.2
Pali: Upasampanne vematiko evaṁ vadeti, āpatti pācittiyassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc71:2.2.3
Pali: Upasampanne anupasampannasaññī evaṁ vadeti, āpatti pācittiyassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc71:2.2.4
Pali: Apaññattena vuccamāno—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc71:2.2.5
Pali: “idaṁ na sallekhāya na dhutatthāya na pāsādikatāya na apacayāya na vīriyārambhāya saṁvattatī”ti evaṁ vadeti, “na tāvāhaṁ, āvuso, etasmiṁ sikkhāpade sikkhissāmi yāva na aññaṁ bhikkhuṁ byattaṁ vinayadharaṁ paṇḍitaṁ medhāviṁ bahussutaṁ dhammakathikaṁ paripucchāmī”ti bhaṇati, āpatti dukkaṭassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc71:2.2.6
Pali: Anupasampannena paññattena vā apaññattena vā vuccamāno—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc71:2.2.7
Pali: “idaṁ na sallekhāya na dhutatthāya na pāsādikatāya na apacayāya na vīriyārambhāya saṁvattatī”ti evaṁ vadeti, “na tāvāhaṁ, āvuso, etasmiṁ sikkhāpade sikkhissāmi yāva na aññaṁ bhikkhuṁ byattaṁ vinayadharaṁ paṇḍitaṁ medhāviṁ bahussutaṁ dhammakathikaṁ paripucchāmī”ti bhaṇati, āpatti dukkaṭassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc71:2.2.8
Pali: Anupasampanne upasampannasaññī, āpatti dukkaṭassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc71:2.2.9
Pali: Anupasampanne vematiko, āpatti dukkaṭassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc71:2.2.10
Pali: Anupasampanne anupasampannasaññī, āpatti dukkaṭassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc71:2.2.11.1
Pali: Sikkhamānenāti 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc71:2.2.12
Pali: sikkhitukāmena. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc71:2.2.13
Pali: Aññātabbanti

Pali: jānitabbaṁ.

Pali: Paripucchitabbanti 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc71:2.2.16

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc71:2.2.17
Pali: Paripañhitabbanti 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc71:2.2.18
Pali: cintetabbaṁ tulayitabbaṁ.

Pali: Sahadhammikavagga 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc72:0.5
Pali: 72. Vilekhanasikkhāpada 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc72:1.1
Pali: Tena samayena buddho bhagavā sāvatthiyaṁ viharati jetavane anāthapiṇḍikassa ārāme. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc72:1.2
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena bhagavā bhikkhūnaṁ anekapariyāyena vinayakathaṁ katheti, vinayassa vaṇṇaṁ bhāsati, vinayapariyattiyā vaṇṇaṁ bhāsati, ādissa ādissa āyasmato upālissa vaṇṇaṁ bhāsati. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc72:1.3
Pali: Bhikkhūnaṁ etadahosi—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc72:1.4
Pali: “bhagavā kho anekapariyāyena vinayakathaṁ katheti, vinayassa vaṇṇaṁ bhāsati, vinayapariyattiyā vaṇṇaṁ bhāsati, ādissa ādissa āyasmato upālissa vaṇṇaṁ bhāsati. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc72:1.5
Pali: Handa mayaṁ, āvuso, āyasmato upālissa santike vinayaṁ pariyāpuṇāmā”ti, te ca bahū bhikkhū therā ca navā ca majjhimā ca āyasmato upālissa santike vinayaṁ pariyāpuṇanti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc72:1.6
Pali: Atha kho chabbaggiyānaṁ bhikkhūnaṁ etadahosi—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc72:1.7
Pali: “etarahi kho, āvuso, bahū bhikkhū therā ca navā ca majjhimā ca āyasmato upālissa santike vinayaṁ pariyāpuṇanti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc72:1.8
Pali: Sace ime vinaye pakataññuno bhavissanti amhe yenicchakaṁ yadicchakaṁ yāvadicchakaṁ ākaḍḍhissanti parikaḍḍhissanti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc72:1.9
Pali: Handa mayaṁ, āvuso, vinayaṁ vivaṇṇemā”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc72:1.10
Pali: Atha kho chabbaggiyā bhikkhū bhikkhū upasaṅkamitvā evaṁ vadanti—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc72:1.11
Pali: “kiṁ panimehi khuddānukhuddakehi sikkhāpadehi uddiṭṭhehi, yāvadeva kukkuccāya vihesāya vilekhāya saṁvattantī”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc72:1.12
Pali: Ye te bhikkhū appicchā …pe… te ujjhāyanti khiyyanti vipācenti—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc72:1.13
Pali: “kathañhi nāma chabbaggiyā bhikkhū vinayaṁ vivaṇṇessantī”ti …pe… 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc72:1.14
Pali: “saccaṁ kira tumhe, bhikkhave, vinayaṁ vivaṇṇethā”ti? 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc72:1.15
Pali: “Saccaṁ, bhagavā”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc72:1.16
Pali: Vigarahi buddho bhagavā …pe… 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc72:1.17
Pali: kathañhi nāma tumhe, moghapurisā, vinayaṁ vivaṇṇessatha. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc72:1.18
Pali: Netaṁ, moghapurisā, appasannānaṁ vā pasādāya …pe… 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc72:1.19
Pali: evañca pana, bhikkhave, imaṁ sikkhāpadaṁ uddiseyyātha—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc72:1.20.1
Pali: “Yo pana bhikkhu pātimokkhe uddissamāne evaṁ vadeyya—‘kiṁ panimehi khuddānukhuddakehi sikkhāpadehi uddiṭṭhehi, yāvadeva kukkuccāya vihesāya vilekhāya saṁvattantī’ti, sikkhāpadavivaṇṇake pācittiyan”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc72:2.1.1
Pali: Yo panāti 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc72:2.1.2
Pali: yo yādiso …pe… 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc72:2.1.3
Pali: bhikkhūti 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc72:2.1.4
Pali: …pe… ayaṁ imasmiṁ atthe adhippeto bhikkhūti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc72:2.1.5
Pali: Pātimokkhe uddissamāneti 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc72:2.1.6
Pali: uddisante vā uddisāpente vā sajjhāyaṁ vā karonte. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc72:2.1.7
Pali: Evaṁ vadeyyāti—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc72:2.1.8
Pali: “kiṁ panimehi khuddānukhuddakehi sikkhāpadehi uddiṭṭhehi, yāvadeva kukkuccāya vihesāya vilekhāya saṁvattantī”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc72:2.1.9
Pali: “Ye imaṁ pariyāpuṇanti tesaṁ kukkuccaṁ hoti, vihesā hoti, vilekhā hoti, ye imaṁ na pariyāpuṇanti tesaṁ kukkuccaṁ na hoti vihesā na hoti vilekhā na hoti. Anuddiṭṭhaṁ idaṁ varaṁ, anuggahitaṁ idaṁ varaṁ, apariyāpuṭaṁ idaṁ varaṁ, adhāritaṁ idaṁ varaṁ, vinayo vā antaradhāyatu, ime vā bhikkhū appakataññuno hontū”ti upasampannassa vinayaṁ vivaṇṇeti, āpatti pācittiyassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc72:2.2.1
Pali: Upasampanne upasampannasaññī vinayaṁ vivaṇṇeti, āpatti pācittiyassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc72:2.2.2
Pali: Upasampanne vematiko vinayaṁ vivaṇṇeti, āpatti pācittiyassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc72:2.2.3
Pali: Upasampanne anupasampannasaññī vinayaṁ vivaṇṇeti, āpatti pācittiyassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc72:2.2.4
Pali: Aññaṁ dhammaṁ vivaṇṇeti, āpatti dukkaṭassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc72:2.2.5
Pali: Anupasampannassa vinayaṁ vā aññaṁ vā dhammaṁ vivaṇṇeti, āpatti dukkaṭassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc72:2.2.6
Pali: Anupasampanne upasampannasaññī, āpatti dukkaṭassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc72:2.2.7
Pali: Anupasampanne vematiko, āpatti dukkaṭassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc72:2.2.8
Pali: Anupasampanne anupasampannasaññī, āpatti dukkaṭassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc72:2.3.1
Pali: Anāpatti—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc72:2.3.2
Pali: na vivaṇṇetukāmo, “iṅgha tvaṁ suttante vā gāthāyo vā abhidhammaṁ vā pariyāpuṇassu, pacchā vinayaṁ pariyāpuṇissasī”ti bhaṇati, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc72:2.3.3
Pali: ummattakassa, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc72:2.3.4
Pali: ādikammikassāti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc72:2.3.5
Pali: Vilekhanasikkhāpadaṁ niṭṭhitaṁ dutiyaṁ.

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc73:1.13

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc73:1.17
Pali: Tañce bhikkhuṁ aññe bhikkhū jāneyyuṁ nisinnapubbaṁ iminā bhikkhunā dvattikkhattuṁ pātimokkhe uddissamāne, ko pana vādo bhiyyo, na ca tassa bhikkhuno aññāṇakena mutti atthi, yañca tattha āpattiṁ āpanno tañca yathādhammo kāretabbo, uttari cassa moho āropetabbo—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc73:1.18
Pali: ‘tassa te, āvuso, alābhā, tassa te dulladdhaṁ, yaṁ tvaṁ pātimokkhe uddissamāne na sādhukaṁ aṭṭhiṁ katvā manasi karosī’ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc73:1.19
Pali: Idaṁ tasmiṁ mohanake pācittiyan”ti.

Pali: Yo panāti

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc73:2.1.12
Pali: “idāneva kho ahaṁ jānāmi, ayampi kira dhammo suttāgato suttapariyāpanno anvaddhamāsaṁ uddesaṁ āgacchatī”ti, āpatti dukkaṭassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc73:2.1.13
Pali: Tañce mohetukāmaṁ bhikkhuṁ aññe bhikkhū jāneyyuṁ nisinnapubbaṁ iminā bhikkhunā dvattikkhattuṁ pātimokkhe uddissamāne, ko pana vādo bhiyyo, na ca tassa bhikkhuno aññāṇakena mutti atthi, yañca tattha āpattiṁ āpanno, tañca yathādhammo kāretabbo, uttari cassa moho āropetabbo. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc73:2.1.14
Pali: “Evañca pana, bhikkhave, āropetabbo. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc73:2.1.15
Pali: Byattena bhikkhunā paṭibalena saṅgho ñāpetabbo—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc73:2.1.16
Pali: ‘Suṇātu me, bhante, saṅgho. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc73:2.1.17
Pali: Ayaṁ itthannāmo bhikkhu pātimokkhe uddissamāne na sādhukaṁ aṭṭhiṁ katvā manasi karoti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc73:2.1.18
Pali: Yadi saṅghassa pattakallaṁ, saṅgho itthannāmassa bhikkhuno mohaṁ āropeyya. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc73:2.1.19
Pali: Esā ñatti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc73:2.1.20
Pali: Suṇātu me, bhante, saṅgho. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc73:2.1.21
Pali: Ayaṁ itthannāmo bhikkhu pātimokkhe uddissamāne na sādhukaṁ aṭṭhiṁ katvā manasi karoti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc73:2.1.22
Pali: Saṅgho itthannāmassa bhikkhuno mohaṁ āropeti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc73:2.1.23
Pali: Yassāyasmato khamati itthannāmassa bhikkhuno mohassa āropanā, so tuṇhassa; 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc73:2.1.24
Pali: yassa nakkhamati, so bhāseyya. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc73:2.1.25
Pali: Āropito saṅghena itthannāmassa bhikkhuno moho. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc73:2.1.26
Pali: Khamati saṅghassa, tasmā tuṇhī, evametaṁ dhārayāmī’”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc73:2.1.27
Pali: Anāropite mohe moheti, āpatti dukkaṭassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc73:2.1.28
Pali: Āropite mohe moheti, āpatti pācittiyassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc73:2.2.1

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc73:2.2.2

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc73:2.2.4
Pali: Adhammakamme dhammakammasaññī, āpatti dukkaṭassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc73:2.2.5
Pali: Adhammakamme vematiko, āpatti dukkaṭassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc73:2.2.6
Pali: Adhammakamme adhammakammasaññī, āpatti dukkaṭassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc73:2.3.1
Pali: Anāpatti—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc73:2.3.2
Pali: na vitthārena sutaṁ hoti, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc73:2.3.3
Pali: ūnakadvattikkhattuṁ vitthārena sutaṁ hoti, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc73:2.3.4
Pali: na mohetukāmassa, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc73:2.3.5
Pali: ummattakassa, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc73:2.3.6
Pali: ādikammikassāti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc73:2.3.7

Pali: Tena kho pana samayena chabbaggiyā bhikkhū kupitā anattamanā sattarasavaggiyānaṁ bhikkhūnaṁ pahāraṁ denti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc74:1.3
Pali: Te rodanti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc74:1.4

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc74:1.6

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc74:1.10

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc74:1.14

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc74:1.15.1

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc74:2.1.4
Pali: …pe… ayaṁ imasmiṁ atthe adhippeto bhikkhūti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc74:2.1.5
Pali: Bhikkhussāti 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc74:2.1.6
Pali: aññassa bhikkhussa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc74:2.1.7
Pali: Kupito anattamanoti 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc74:2.1.8
Pali: anabhiraddho āhatacitto khilajāto. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc74:2.1.9
Pali: Pahāraṁ dadeyyāti 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc74:2.1.10
Pali: kāyena vā kāyapaṭibaddhena vā nissaggiyena vā antamaso uppalapattenapi pahāraṁ deti, āpatti pācittiyassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc74:2.2.1
Pali: Upasampanne upasampannasaññī kupito anattamano pahāraṁ deti, āpatti pācittiyassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc74:2.2.2
Pali: Upasampanne vematiko kupito anattamano pahāraṁ deti, āpatti pācittiyassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc74:2.2.3
Pali: Upasampanne anupasampannasaññī kupito anattamano pahāraṁ deti, āpatti pācittiyassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc74:2.2.4
Pali: Anupasampannassa kupito anattamano pahāraṁ deti, āpatti dukkaṭassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc74:2.2.5
Pali: Anupasampanne upasampannasaññī, āpatti dukkaṭassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc74:2.2.6
Pali: Anupasampanne vematiko, āpatti dukkaṭassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc74:2.2.7
Pali: Anupasampanne anupasampannasaññī, āpatti dukkaṭassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc74:2.3.1
Pali: Anāpatti—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc74:2.3.2

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc74:2.3.3
Pali: ummattakassa, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc74:2.3.4
Pali: ādikammikassāti.

Pali: Etadeva paccayaṁ karitvā, anaññanti

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc78:0.4
Pali: Sahadhammikavagga 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc78:0.5
Pali: 78. Upassutisikkhāpada 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc78:1.1
Pali: Tena samayena buddho bhagavā sāvatthiyaṁ viharati jetavane anāthapiṇḍikassa ārāme. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc78:1.2
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena chabbaggiyā bhikkhū pesalehi bhikkhūhi saddhiṁ bhaṇḍanti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc78:1.3
Pali: Pesalā bhikkhū evaṁ vadanti—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc78:1.4
Pali: “alajjino ime, āvuso, chabbaggiyā bhikkhū. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc78:1.5
Pali: Na sakkā imehi saha bhaṇḍitun”ti.

Pali: Chabbaggiyā bhikkhū evaṁ vadanti—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc78:1.7
Pali: “kissa tumhe, āvuso, amhe alajjivādena pāpethā”ti? 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc78:1.8
Pali: “Kahaṁ pana tumhe, āvuso, assutthā”ti? 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc78:1.9
Pali: “Mayaṁ āyasmantānaṁ upassutiṁ tiṭṭhamhā”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc78:1.10
Pali: Ye te bhikkhū appicchā …pe… te ujjhāyanti khiyyanti vipācenti—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc78:1.11
Pali: “kathañhi nāma chabbaggiyā bhikkhū bhikkhūnaṁ bhaṇḍanajātānaṁ kalahajātānaṁ vivādāpannānaṁ upassutiṁ tiṭṭhissantī”ti …pe… 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc78:1.12
Pali: “saccaṁ kira tumhe, bhikkhave, bhikkhūnaṁ bhaṇḍanajātānaṁ kalahajātānaṁ vivādāpannānaṁ upassutiṁ tiṭṭhathā”ti? 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc78:1.13
Pali: “Saccaṁ, bhagavā”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc78:1.14
Pali: Vigarahi buddho bhagavā …pe… 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc78:1.15
Pali: kathañhi nāma tumhe, moghapurisā, bhikkhūnaṁ bhaṇḍanajātānaṁ kalahajātānaṁ vivādāpannānaṁ upassutiṁ tiṭṭhissatha. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc78:1.16
Pali: Netaṁ, moghapurisā, appasannānaṁ vā pasādāya …pe… 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc78:1.17
Pali: evañca pana, bhikkhave, imaṁ sikkhāpadaṁ uddiseyyātha—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc78:1.18.1
Pali: “Yo pana bhikkhu bhikkhūnaṁ bhaṇḍanajātānaṁ kalahajātānaṁ vivādāpannānaṁ upassutiṁ tiṭṭheyya—‘yaṁ ime bhaṇissanti taṁ sossāmī’ti etadeva paccayaṁ karitvā anaññaṁ, pācittiyan”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc78:2.1.1
Pali: Yo panāti 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc78:2.1.2
Pali: yo yādiso …pe… 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc78:2.1.3
Pali: bhikkhūti 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc78:2.1.4
Pali: …pe… ayaṁ imasmiṁ atthe adhippeto bhikkhūti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc78:2.1.5
Pali: Bhikkhūnanti 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc78:2.1.6
Pali: aññesaṁ bhikkhūnaṁ. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc78:2.1.7
Pali: Bhaṇḍanajātānaṁ kalahajātānaṁ vivādāpannānanti 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc78:2.1.8
Pali: adhikaraṇajātānaṁ. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc78:2.1.9
Pali: Upassutiṁ tiṭṭheyyāti 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc78:2.1.10
Pali: “imesaṁ sutvā codessāmi sāressāmi paṭicodessāmi paṭisāressāmi maṅkū karissāmī”ti gacchati, āpatti dukkaṭassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc78:2.1.11
Pali: Yattha ṭhito suṇāti, āpatti pācittiyassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc78:2.1.12
Pali: Pacchato gacchanto turito gacchati sossāmīti, āpatti dukkaṭassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc78:2.1.13
Pali: Yattha ṭhito suṇāti, āpatti pācittiyassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc78:2.1.14
Pali: Purato gacchanto ohiyyati sossāmīti, āpatti dukkaṭassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc78:2.1.15
Pali: Yattha ṭhito suṇāti, āpatti pācittiyassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc78:2.1.16
Pali: Bhikkhussa ṭhitokāsaṁ vā nisinnokāsaṁ vā nipannokāsaṁ vā āgantvā mantentaṁ ukkāsitabbaṁ, vijānāpetabbaṁ, no ce ukkāseyya vā vijānāpeyya vā, āpatti pācittiyassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc78:2.1.17
Pali: Etadeva paccayaṁ karitvā anaññanti 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc78:2.1.18
Pali: na añño koci paccayo hoti upassutiṁ tiṭṭhituṁ. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc78:2.2.1
Pali: Upasampanne upasampannasaññī upassutiṁ tiṭṭhati, āpatti pācittiyassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc78:2.2.2
Pali: Upasampanne vematiko upassutiṁ tiṭṭhati, āpatti pācittiyassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc78:2.2.3
Pali: Upasampanne anupasampannasaññī upassutiṁ tiṭṭhati, āpatti pācittiyassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc78:2.2.4
Pali: Anupasampannassa upassutiṁ tiṭṭhati, āpatti dukkaṭassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc78:2.2.5
Pali: Anupasampanne upasampannasaññī, āpatti dukkaṭassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc78:2.2.6
Pali: Anupasampanne vematiko, āpatti dukkaṭassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc78:2.2.7
Pali: Anupasampanne anupasampannasaññī, āpatti dukkaṭassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc78:2.3.1
Pali: Anāpatti—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc78:2.3.2
Pali: “imesaṁ sutvā oramissāmi viramissāmi vūpasamissāmi attānaṁ parimocessāmī”ti gacchati, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc78:2.3.3
Pali: ummattakassa, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc78:2.3.4
Pali: ādikammikassāti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc78:2.3.5
Pali: Upassutisikkhāpadaṁ niṭṭhitaṁ aṭṭhamaṁ.

Pali: Sahadhammikavagga 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc79:0.5
Pali: 79. Kammapaṭibāhanasikkhāpada 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc79:1.1
Pali: Tena samayena buddho bhagavā sāvatthiyaṁ viharati jetavane anāthapiṇḍikassa ārāme. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc79:1.2
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena chabbaggiyā bhikkhū anācāraṁ ācaritvā ekamekassa kamme kayiramāne paṭikkosanti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc79:1.3
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena saṅgho sannipatito hoti kenacideva karaṇīyena. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc79:1.4
Pali: Chabbaggiyā bhikkhū cīvarakammaṁ karontā ekassa chandaṁ adaṁsu. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc79:1.5
Pali: Atha kho saṅgho—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc79:1.6
Pali: “ayaṁ, āvuso, chabbaggiyo bhikkhu ekako āgato, handassa mayaṁ kammaṁ karomā”ti tassa kammaṁ akāsi. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc79:1.7
Pali: Atha kho so bhikkhu yena chabbaggiyā bhikkhū tenupasaṅkami. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc79:1.8
Pali: Chabbaggiyā bhikkhū taṁ bhikkhuṁ etadavocuṁ—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc79:1.9
Pali: “kiṁ, āvuso, saṅgho akāsī”ti? 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc79:1.10
Pali: “Saṅgho me, āvuso, kammaṁ akāsī”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc79:1.11
Pali: “Na mayaṁ, āvuso, etadatthāya chandaṁ adamhā—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc79:1.12
Pali: ‘tuyhaṁ kammaṁ karissatī’ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc79:1.13
Pali: Sace ca mayaṁ jāneyyāma ‘tuyhaṁ kammaṁ karissatī’ti, na mayaṁ chandaṁ dadeyyāmā”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc79:1.14
Pali: Ye te bhikkhū appicchā …pe… te ujjhāyanti khiyyanti vipācenti—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc79:1.15
Pali: “kathañhi nāma chabbaggiyā bhikkhū dhammikānaṁ kammānaṁ chandaṁ datvā pacchā khīyanadhammaṁ āpajjissantī”ti …pe… 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc79:1.16
Pali: “saccaṁ kira tumhe, bhikkhave, dhammikānaṁ kammānaṁ chandaṁ datvā pacchā khīyanadhammaṁ āpajjathā”ti? 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc79:1.17
Pali: “Saccaṁ, bhagavā”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc79:1.18
Pali: Vigarahi buddho bhagavā …pe… 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc79:1.19
Pali: kathañhi nāma tumhe, moghapurisā, dhammikānaṁ kammānaṁ chandaṁ datvā pacchā khīyanadhammaṁ āpajjissatha. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc79:1.20
Pali: Netaṁ, moghapurisā, appasannānaṁ vā pasādāya …pe… 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc79:1.21
Pali: evañca pana, bhikkhave, imaṁ sikkhāpadaṁ uddiseyyātha—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc79:1.22.1
Pali: “Yo pana bhikkhu dhammikānaṁ kammānaṁ chandaṁ datvā pacchā khīyanadhammaṁ āpajjeyya, pācittiyan”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc79:2.1.1
Pali: Yo panāti 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc79:2.1.2
Pali: yo yādiso …pe… 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc79:2.1.3
Pali: bhikkhūti 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc79:2.1.4
Pali: …pe… ayaṁ imasmiṁ atthe adhippeto bhikkhūti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc79:2.1.5
Pali: Dhammikaṁ nāma kammaṁ 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc79:2.1.6
Pali: apalokanakammaṁ ñattikammaṁ ñattidutiyakammaṁ ñatticatutthakammaṁ dhammena vinayena satthusāsanena kataṁ, etaṁ dhammikaṁ nāma kammaṁ. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc79:2.1.7
Pali: Chandaṁ datvā khiyyati āpatti pācittiyassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc79:2.2.1
Pali: Dhammakamme dhammakammasaññī chandaṁ datvā khiyyati, āpatti pācittiyassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc79:2.2.2
Pali: Dhammakamme vematiko chandaṁ datvā khiyyati, āpatti dukkaṭassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc79:2.2.3
Pali: Dhammakamme adhammakammasaññī chandaṁ datvā khiyyati, anāpatti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc79:2.2.4
Pali: Adhammakamme dhammakammasaññī, āpatti dukkaṭassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc79:2.2.5
Pali: Adhammakamme vematiko, āpatti dukkaṭassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc79:2.2.6
Pali: Adhammakamme adhammakammasaññī, anāpatti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc79:2.3.1
Pali: Anāpatti—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc79:2.3.2
Pali: “adhammena vā vaggena vā na kammārahassa vā kammaṁ katan”ti jānanto khiyyati, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc79:2.3.3
Pali: ummattakassa, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc79:2.3.4
Pali: ādikammikassāti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc79:2.3.5
Pali: Kammapaṭibāhanasikkhāpadaṁ niṭṭhitaṁ navamaṁ.

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc80:0.5
Pali: 80. Chandaṁadatvāgamanasikkhāpada 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc80:1.1
Pali: Tena samayena buddho bhagavā sāvatthiyaṁ viharati jetavane anāthapiṇḍikassa ārāme. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc80:1.2
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena saṅgho sannipatito hoti kenacideva karaṇīyena. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc80:1.3
Pali: Chabbaggiyā bhikkhū cīvarakammaṁ karontā ekassa chandaṁ adaṁsu. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc80:1.4
Pali: Atha kho saṅgho “yassatthāya sannipatito taṁ kammaṁ karissāmī”ti ñattiṁ ṭhapesi. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc80:1.5
Pali: Atha kho so bhikkhu—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc80:1.6
Pali: “evamevime ekamekassa kammaṁ karonti, kassa tumhe kammaṁ karissathā”ti chandaṁ adatvā uṭṭhāyāsanā pakkāmi. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc80:1.7
Pali: Ye te bhikkhū appicchā …pe… te ujjhāyanti khiyyanti vipācenti—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc80:1.8
Pali: “kathañhi nāma bhikkhu saṅghe vinicchayakathāya vattamānāya chandaṁ adatvā uṭṭhāyāsanā pakkamissatī”ti …pe… 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc80:1.9
Pali: “saccaṁ kira tvaṁ, bhikkhu, saṅghe vinicchayakathāya vattamānāya chandaṁ adatvā uṭṭhāyāsanā pakkamasī”ti? 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc80:1.10
Pali: “Saccaṁ, bhagavā”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc80:1.11
Pali: Vigarahi buddho bhagavā …pe… 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc80:1.12
Pali: kathañhi nāma tvaṁ, moghapurisa, saṅghe vinicchayakathāya vattamānāya chandaṁ adatvā uṭṭhāyāsanā pakkamissasi. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc80:1.13
Pali: Netaṁ, moghapurisa, appasannānaṁ vā pasādāya …pe… 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc80:1.14
Pali: evañca pana, bhikkhave, imaṁ sikkhāpadaṁ uddiseyyātha—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc80:1.15.1
Pali: “Yo pana bhikkhu saṅghe vinicchayakathāya vattamānāya chandaṁ adatvā uṭṭhāyāsanā pakkameyya, pācittiyan”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc80:2.1.1
Pali: Yo panāti 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc80:2.1.2
Pali: yo yādiso …pe… 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc80:2.1.3
Pali: bhikkhūti 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc80:2.1.4
Pali: …pe… ayaṁ imasmiṁ atthe adhippeto bhikkhūti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc80:2.1.5
Pali: Saṅghe vinicchayakathā nāma 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc80:2.1.6
Pali: vatthu vā ārocitaṁ hoti avinicchitaṁ, ñatti vā ṭhapitā hoti, kammavācā vā vippakatā hoti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc80:2.1.7
Pali: Chandaṁ adatvā uṭṭhāyāsanā pakkameyyāti—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc80:2.1.8
Pali: “kathaṁ idaṁ kammaṁ kuppaṁ assa vaggaṁ assa na kareyyā”ti gacchati, āpatti dukkaṭassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc80:2.1.9
Pali: Parisāya hatthapāsaṁ vijahantassa āpatti dukkaṭassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc80:2.1.10
Pali: Vijahite āpatti pācittiyassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc80:2.2.1
Pali: Dhammakamme dhammakammasaññī chandaṁ adatvā uṭṭhāyāsanā pakkamati, āpatti pācittiyassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc80:2.2.2
Pali: Dhammakamme vematiko chandaṁ adatvā uṭṭhāyāsanā pakkamati, āpatti dukkaṭassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc80:2.2.3
Pali: Dhammakamme adhammakammasaññī chandaṁ adatvā uṭṭhāyāsanā pakkamati, anāpatti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc80:2.2.4
Pali: Adhammakamme dhammakammasaññī, āpatti dukkaṭassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc80:2.2.5
Pali: Adhammakamme vematiko, āpatti dukkaṭassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc80:2.2.6
Pali: Adhammakamme adhammakammasaññī, anāpatti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc80:2.3.1
Pali: Anāpatti—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc80:2.3.2
Pali: “saṅghassa bhaṇḍanaṁ vā kalaho vā viggaho vā vivādo vā bhavissatī”ti gacchati, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc80:2.3.3
Pali: “saṅghabhedo vā saṅgharāji vā bhavissatī”ti gacchati, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc80:2.3.4
Pali: “adhammena vā vaggena vā na kammārahassa vā kammaṁ karissatī”ti gacchati, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc80:2.3.5
Pali: gilāno gacchati, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc80:2.3.6
Pali: gilānassa karaṇīyena gacchati, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc80:2.3.7
Pali: uccārena vā passāvena vā pīḷito gacchati, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc80:2.3.8
Pali: “na kammaṁ kopetukāmo puna paccāgamissāmī”ti gacchati, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc80:2.3.9
Pali: ummattakassa, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc80:2.3.10
Pali: ādikammikassāti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc80:2.3.11
Pali: Chandaṁ adatvā gamanasikkhāpadaṁ niṭṭhitaṁ dasamaṁ.

Pali: Sahadhammikavagga 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc81:0.5
Pali: 81. Dubbalasikkhāpada 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc81:1.1
Pali: Tena samayena buddho bhagavā rājagahe viharati veḷuvane kalandakanivāpe. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc81:1.2
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena āyasmā dabbo mallaputto saṅghassa senāsanañca paññapeti bhattāni ca uddisati. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc81:1.3
Pali: So cāyasmā dubbalacīvaro hoti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc81:1.4
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena saṅghassa ekaṁ cīvaraṁ uppannaṁ hoti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc81:1.5
Pali: Atha kho saṅgho taṁ cīvaraṁ āyasmato dabbassa mallaputtassa adāsi. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc81:1.6
Pali: Chabbaggiyā bhikkhū ujjhāyanti khiyyanti vipācenti—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc81:1.7
Pali: “yathāsanthutaṁ bhikkhū saṅghikaṁ lābhaṁ pariṇāmentī”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc81:1.8
Pali: Ye te bhikkhū appicchā …pe… te ujjhāyanti khiyyanti vipācenti—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc81:1.9
Pali: “kathañhi nāma chabbaggiyā bhikkhū samaggena saṅghena cīvaraṁ datvā pacchā khīyanadhammaṁ āpajjissantī”ti …pe… 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc81:1.10
Pali: “saccaṁ kira tumhe, bhikkhave, samaggena saṅghena cīvaraṁ datvā pacchā khīyanadhammaṁ āpajjathā”ti? 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc81:1.11
Pali: “Saccaṁ, bhagavā”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc81:1.12
Pali: Vigarahi buddho bhagavā …pe… 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc81:1.13
Pali: kathañhi nāma tumhe, moghapurisā, samaggena saṅghena cīvaraṁ datvā pacchā khīyanadhammaṁ āpajjissatha. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc81:1.14
Pali: Netaṁ, moghapurisā, appasannānaṁ, vā pasādāya …pe… 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc81:1.15
Pali: evañca pana, bhikkhave, imaṁ sikkhāpadaṁ uddiseyyātha—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc81:1.16.1
Pali: “Yo pana bhikkhu samaggena saṅghena cīvaraṁ datvā pacchā khīyanadhammaṁ āpajjeyya ‘yathāsanthutaṁ bhikkhū saṅghikaṁ lābhaṁ pariṇāmentī’ti, pācittiyan”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc81:2.1.1
Pali: Yo panāti 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc81:2.1.2
Pali: yo yādiso …pe… 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc81:2.1.3
Pali: bhikkhūti 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc81:2.1.4
Pali: …pe… ayaṁ imasmiṁ atthe adhippeto bhikkhūti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc81:2.1.5
Pali: Samaggo nāma saṅgho 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc81:2.1.6
Pali: samānasaṁvāsako samānasīmāyaṁ ṭhito. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc81:2.1.7
Pali: Cīvaraṁ nāma 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc81:2.1.8
Pali: channaṁ cīvarānaṁ aññataraṁ cīvaraṁ vikappanupagaṁ pacchimaṁ. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc81:2.1.9
Pali: Datvāti 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc81:2.1.10
Pali: sayaṁ datvā. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc81:2.1.11
Pali: Yathāsanthutaṁ nāma 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc81:2.1.12
Pali: yathāmittatā yathāsandiṭṭhatā yathāsambhattatā yathāsamānupajjhāyakatā yathāsamānācariyakatā. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc81:2.1.13
Pali: Saṅghikaṁ nāma 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc81:2.1.14
Pali: saṅghassa dinnaṁ hoti pariccattaṁ. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc81:2.1.15
Pali: Lābho nāma 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc81:2.1.16
Pali: cīvarapiṇḍapātasenāsanagilānappaccayabhesajjaparikkhārā, antamaso cuṇṇapiṇḍopi, dantakaṭṭhampi, dasikasuttampi. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc81:2.1.17
Pali: Pacchā khīyanadhammaṁ āpajjeyyāti 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc81:2.1.18
Pali: upasampannassa saṅghena sammatassa senāsanapaññāpakassa vā bhattuddesakassa vā yāgubhājakassa vā phalabhājakassa vā khajjabhājakassa vā appamattakavissajjakassa vā cīvaraṁ dinne khiyyati, āpatti pācittiyassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc81:2.2.1
Pali: Dhammakamme dhammakammasaññī cīvaraṁ dinne khiyyati, āpatti pācittiyassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc81:2.2.2
Pali: Dhammakamme vematiko cīvaraṁ dinne khiyyati, āpatti pācittiyassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc81:2.2.3
Pali: Dhammakamme adhammakammasaññī cīvaraṁ dinne khiyyati, āpatti pācittiyassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc81:2.2.4
Pali: Aññaṁ parikkhāraṁ dinne khiyyati, āpatti dukkaṭassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc81:2.2.5
Pali: Upasampannassa saṅghena asammatassa senāsanapaññāpakassa vā bhattuddesakassa vā yāgubhājakassa vā phalabhājakassa vā khajjabhājakassa vā appamattakavissajjakassa vā cīvaraṁ vā aññaṁ vā parikkhāraṁ dinne khiyyati, āpatti dukkaṭassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc81:2.2.6
Pali: Anupasampannassa saṅghena sammatassa vā asammatassa vā senāsanapaññāpakassa vā bhattuddesakassa vā yāgubhājakassa vā phalabhājakassa vā khajjabhājakassa vā appamattakavissajjakassa vā cīvaraṁ vā aññaṁ vā parikkhāraṁ dinne khiyyati, āpatti dukkaṭassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc81:2.2.7
Pali: Adhammakamme dhammakammasaññī, āpatti dukkaṭassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc81:2.2.8
Pali: Adhammakamme vematiko, āpatti dukkaṭassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc81:2.2.9
Pali: Adhammakamme adhammakammasaññī, anāpatti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc81:2.3.1
Pali: Anāpatti—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc81:2.3.2
Pali: pakatiyā chandā dosā mohā bhayā karontaṁ “kvattho tassa dinnena laddhāpi vinipātessati na sammā upanessatī”ti khiyyati, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc81:2.3.3
Pali: ummattakassa, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc81:2.3.4
Pali: ādikammikassāti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc81:2.3.5
Pali: Dubbalasikkhāpadaṁ niṭṭhitaṁ ekādasamaṁ.

Pali segments

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc82:0.1
Pali: Theravāda Vinaya 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc82:0.2
Pali: Mahāvibhaṅga 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc82:0.3
Pali: Pācittiyakaṇḍa 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc82:0.4
Pali: Sahadhammikavagga 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc82:0.5
Pali: 82. Pariṇāmanasikkhāpada 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc82:1.1
Pali: Tena samayena buddho bhagavā sāvatthiyaṁ viharati jetavane anāthapiṇḍikassa ārāme. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc82:1.2
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena sāvatthiyaṁ aññatarassa pūgassa saṅghassa sacīvarabhattaṁ paṭiyattaṁ hoti—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc82:1.3
Pali: “bhojetvā cīvarena acchādessāmā”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc82:1.4
Pali: Atha kho chabbaggiyā bhikkhū yena so pūgo tenupasaṅkamiṁsu; 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc82:1.5
Pali: upasaṅkamitvā taṁ pūgaṁ etadavocuṁ—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc82:1.6
Pali: “dethāvuso, imāni cīvarāni imesaṁ bhikkhūnan”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc82:1.7
Pali: “Na mayaṁ, bhante, dassāma. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc82:1.8
Pali: Amhākaṁ saṅghassa anuvassaṁ sacīvarabhikkhā paññattā”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc82:1.9
Pali: “Bahū, āvuso, saṅghassa dāyakā, bahū saṅghassa bhattā. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc82:1.10
Pali: Ime tumhe nissāya tumhe sampassantā idha viharanti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc82:1.11
Pali: Tumhe ce imesaṁ na dassatha, atha ko carahi imesaṁ dassati? 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc82:1.12
Pali: Dethāvuso, imāni cīvarāni imesaṁ bhikkhūnan”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc82:1.13
Pali: Atha kho so pūgo chabbaggiyehi bhikkhūhi nippīḷiyamāno yathāpaṭiyattaṁ cīvaraṁ chabbaggiyānaṁ bhikkhūnaṁ datvā saṅghaṁ bhattena parivisi. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc82:1.14
Pali: Ye te bhikkhū jānanti saṅghassa sacīvarabhattaṁ paṭiyattaṁ “na ca jānanti chabbaggiyānaṁ bhikkhūnaṁ dinnan”ti te evamāhaṁsu—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc82:1.15
Pali: “oṇojethāvuso, saṅghassa cīvaran”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc82:1.16
Pali: “Natthi, bhante. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc82:1.17
Pali: Yathāpaṭiyattaṁ cīvaraṁ ayyā chabbaggiyā ayyānaṁ chabbaggiyānaṁ pariṇāmesun”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc82:1.18
Pali: Ye te bhikkhū appicchā …pe… te ujjhāyanti khiyyanti vipācenti—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc82:1.19
Pali: “kathañhi nāma chabbaggiyā bhikkhū jānaṁ saṅghikaṁ lābhaṁ pariṇataṁ puggalassa pariṇāmessantī”ti …pe… 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc82:1.20
Pali: “saccaṁ kira tumhe, bhikkhave, jānaṁ saṅghikaṁ lābhaṁ pariṇataṁ puggalassa pariṇāmethā”ti? 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc82:1.21
Pali: “Saccaṁ, bhagavā”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc82:1.22
Pali: Vigarahi buddho bhagavā …pe… 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc82:1.23
Pali: kathañhi nāma tumhe, moghapurisā, jānaṁ saṅghikaṁ lābhaṁ pariṇataṁ puggalassa pariṇāmessatha. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc82:1.24
Pali: Netaṁ, moghapurisā, appasannānaṁ vā pasādāya …pe… 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc82:1.25
Pali: evañca pana, bhikkhave, imaṁ sikkhāpadaṁ uddiseyyātha—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc82:1.26.1
Pali: “Yo pana bhikkhu jānaṁ saṅghikaṁ lābhaṁ pariṇataṁ puggalassa pariṇāmeyya, pācittiyan”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc82:2.1.1
Pali: Yo panāti 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc82:2.1.2
Pali: yo yādiso …pe… 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc82:2.1.3
Pali: bhikkhūti 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc82:2.1.4
Pali: …pe… ayaṁ imasmiṁ atthe adhippeto bhikkhūti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc82:2.1.5
Pali: Jānāti nāma 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc82:2.1.6
Pali: sāmaṁ vā jānāti, aññe vā tassa ārocenti, so vā āroceti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc82:2.1.7
Pali: Saṅghikaṁ nāma 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc82:2.1.8
Pali: saṅghassa dinnaṁ hoti pariccattaṁ. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc82:2.1.9
Pali: Lābho nāma 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc82:2.1.10
Pali: cīvarapiṇḍapātasenāsanagilānappaccayabhesajjaparikkhārā, antamaso cuṇṇapiṇḍopi, dantakaṭṭhampi, dasikasuttampi. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc82:2.1.11
Pali: Pariṇataṁ nāma 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc82:2.1.12
Pali: “dassāma karissāmā”ti vācā bhinnā hoti, taṁ puggalassa pariṇāmeti, āpatti pācittiyassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc82:2.2.1
Pali: Pariṇate pariṇatasaññī puggalassa pariṇāmeti, āpatti pācittiyassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc82:2.2.2
Pali: Pariṇate vematiko puggalassa pariṇāmeti, āpatti dukkaṭassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc82:2.2.3
Pali: Pariṇate apariṇatasaññī puggalassa pariṇāmeti, anāpatti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc82:2.2.4
Pali: Saṅghassa pariṇataṁ aññasaṅghassa vā cetiyassa vā pariṇāmeti, āpatti dukkaṭassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc82:2.2.5
Pali: Cetiyassa pariṇataṁ aññacetiyassa vā saṅghassa vā puggalassa vā pariṇāmeti, āpatti dukkaṭassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc82:2.2.6
Pali: Puggalassa pariṇataṁ aññapuggalassa vā saṅghassa vā cetiyassa vā pariṇāmeti, āpatti dukkaṭassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc82:2.2.7
Pali: Apariṇate pariṇatasaññī, āpatti dukkaṭassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc82:2.2.8
Pali: Apariṇate vematiko, āpatti dukkaṭassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc82:2.2.9
Pali: Apariṇate apariṇatasaññī, anāpatti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc82:2.3.1
Pali: Anāpatti—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc82:2.3.2
Pali: “kattha demā”ti pucchīyamāno—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc82:2.3.3
Pali: “yattha tumhākaṁ deyyadhammo paribhogaṁ vā labheyya paṭisaṅkhāraṁ vā labheyya ciraṭṭhitiko vā assa yattha vā pana tumhākaṁ cittaṁ pasīdati tattha dethā”ti bhaṇati, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc82:2.3.4
Pali: ummattakassa, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc82:2.3.5
Pali: ādikammikassāti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc82:2.3.6
Pali: Pariṇāmanasikkhāpadaṁ niṭṭhitaṁ dvādasamaṁ. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc82:2.3.7
Pali: Sahadhammikavaggo aṭṭhamo. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc82:2.3.8
Pali: Tassuddānaṁ 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc82:2.3.9
Pali: Sahadhamma vivaṇṇañca, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc82:2.3.10
Pali: mohāpanaṁ pahārakaṁ; 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc82:2.3.11
Pali: Talasatti amūlañca, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc82:2.3.12
Pali: sañcicca ca upassuti; 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc82:2.3.13
Pali: Paṭibāhana chandañca, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc82:2.3.14
Pali: dabbañca pariṇāmananti.

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc83
Root: root/pli/ms/vinaya/pli-tv-bu-vb/pli-tv-bu-vb-pc/pli-tv-bu-vb-pc83_root-pli-ms.json

Chinese translations: 0

Pali segments

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc83:0.1
Pali: Theravāda Vinaya 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc83:0.2
Pali: Mahāvibhaṅga 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc83:0.3
Pali: Pācittiyakaṇḍa 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc83:0.4
Pali: Ratanavagga 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc83:0.5
Pali: 83. Antepurasikkhāpada 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc83:1.1.1
Pali: Tena samayena buddho bhagavā sāvatthiyaṁ viharati jetavane anāthapiṇḍikassa ārāme. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc83:1.1.2
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena rājā pasenadi kosalo uyyānapālaṁ āṇāpesi—“gaccha, bhaṇe, uyyānaṁ sodhehi. Uyyānaṁ gamissāmā”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc83:1.1.3
Pali: “Evaṁ, devā”ti kho so uyyānapālo rañño pasenadissa kosalassa paṭissutvā uyyānaṁ sodhento addasa bhagavantaṁ aññatarasmiṁ rukkhamūle nisinnaṁ. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc83:1.1.4
Pali: Disvāna yena rājā pasenadi kosalo tenupasaṅkami; upasaṅkamitvā rājānaṁ pasenadiṁ kosalaṁ etadavoca—“suddhaṁ, deva, uyyānaṁ. Api ca bhagavā tattha nisinno”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc83:1.1.5
Pali: “Hotu, bhaṇe. Mayaṁ bhagavantaṁ payirupāsissāmā”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc83:1.1.6
Pali: Atha kho rājā pasenadi kosalo uyyānaṁ gantvā yena bhagavā tenupasaṅkami. Tena kho pana samayena aññataro upāsako bhagavantaṁ payirupāsanto nisinno hoti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc83:1.1.7
Pali: Addasā kho rājā pasenadi kosalo taṁ upāsakaṁ bhagavantaṁ payirupāsantaṁ nisinnaṁ. Disvāna bhīto aṭṭhāsi. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc83:1.1.8
Pali: Atha kho rañño pasenadissa kosalassa etadahosi—“nārahatāyaṁ puriso pāpo hotuṁ, yathā bhagavantaṁ payirupāsatī”ti. Yena bhagavā tenupasaṅkami; upasaṅkamitvā bhagavantaṁ abhivādetvā ekamantaṁ nisīdi. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc83:1.1.9
Pali: Atha kho so upāsako bhagavato gāravena rājānaṁ pasenadiṁ kosalaṁ neva abhivādesi na paccuṭṭhāsi. Atha kho rājā pasenadi kosalo anattamano ahosi—“kathañhi nāmāyaṁ puriso mayi āgate neva abhivādessati na paccuṭṭhessatī”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc83:1.1.10
Pali: Atha kho bhagavā rājānaṁ pasenadiṁ kosalaṁ anattamanaṁ viditvā rājānaṁ pasenadiṁ kosalaṁ etadavoca—“eso kho, mahārāja, upāsako bahussuto āgatāgamo kāmesu vītarāgo”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc83:1.1.11
Pali: Atha kho rañño pasenadissa kosalassa etadahosi—“nārahatāyaṁ upāsako orako hotuṁ, bhagavāpi imassa vaṇṇaṁ bhāsatī”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc83:1.1.12
Pali: Taṁ upāsakaṁ etadavoca—“vadeyyāsi, upāsaka, yena attho”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc83:1.1.13
Pali: “Suṭṭhu, devā”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc83:1.1.14
Pali: Atha kho bhagavā rājānaṁ pasenadiṁ kosalaṁ dhammiyā kathāya sandassesi samādapesi samuttejesi sampahaṁsesi. Atha kho rājā pasenadi kosalo bhagavatā dhammiyā kathāya sandassito samādapito samuttejito sampahaṁsito uṭṭhāyāsanā bhagavantaṁ abhivādetvā padakkhiṇaṁ katvā pakkāmi. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc83:1.1.15
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena rājā pasenadi kosalo uparipāsādavaragato hoti. Addasā kho rājā pasenadi kosalo taṁ upāsakaṁ rathikāya chattapāṇiṁ gacchantaṁ. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc83:1.1.16
Pali: Disvāna pakkosāpetvā etadavoca—“tvaṁ kira, upāsaka, bahussuto āgatāgamo. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc83:1.1.17
Pali: Sādhu, upāsaka, amhākaṁ itthāgāraṁ dhammaṁ vācehī”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc83:1.1.18
Pali: “Yamahaṁ, deva, jānāmi ayyānaṁ vāhasā, ayyāva devassa itthāgāraṁ dhammaṁ vācessantī”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc83:1.2.1
Pali: Atha kho rājā pasenadi kosalo—“saccaṁ kho upāsako āhā”ti yena bhagavā tenupasaṅkami; upasaṅkamitvā bhagavantaṁ abhivādetvā ekamantaṁ nisīdi. Ekamantaṁ nisinno kho rājā pasenadi kosalo bhagavantaṁ etadavoca—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc83:1.2.2
Pali: “sādhu, bhante, bhagavā ekaṁ bhikkhuṁ āṇāpetu yo amhākaṁ itthāgāraṁ dhammaṁ vācessatī”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc83:1.2.3
Pali: Atha kho bhagavā rājānaṁ pasenadiṁ kosalaṁ dhammiyā kathāya sandassesi …pe… padakkhiṇaṁ katvā pakkāmi. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc83:1.2.4
Pali: Atha kho bhagavā āyasmantaṁ ānandaṁ āmantesi—“tenahānanda, rañño itthāgāraṁ dhammaṁ vācehī”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc83:1.2.5
Pali: “Evaṁ, bhante”ti kho āyasmā ānando bhagavato paṭissutvā kālena kālaṁ pavisitvā rañño itthāgāraṁ dhammaṁ vāceti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc83:1.2.6
Pali: Atha kho āyasmā ānando pubbaṇhasamayaṁ nivāsetvā pattacīvaramādāya yena rañño pasenadissa kosalassa nivesanaṁ tenupasaṅkami. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc83:1.2.7
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena rājā pasenadi kosalo mallikāya deviyā saddhiṁ sayanagato hoti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc83:1.2.8
Pali: Addasā kho mallikā devī āyasmantaṁ ānandaṁ dūratova āgacchantaṁ. Disvāna sahasā vuṭṭhāsi; pītakamaṭṭhaṁ dussaṁ pabhassittha. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc83:1.2.9
Pali: Atha kho āyasmā ānando tatova paṭinivattitvā ārāmaṁ gantvā bhikkhūnaṁ etamatthaṁ ārocesi. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc83:1.2.10
Pali: Ye te bhikkhū appicchā …pe… te ujjhāyanti khiyyanti vipācenti—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc83:1.2.11
Pali: “kathañhi nāma āyasmā ānando pubbe appaṭisaṁvidito rañño antepuraṁ pavisissatī”ti …pe… 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc83:1.2.12
Pali: “saccaṁ kira tvaṁ, ānanda, pubbe appaṭisaṁvidito rañño antepuraṁ pavisasī”ti? 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc83:1.2.13
Pali: “Saccaṁ, bhagavā”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc83:1.2.14
Pali: Vigarahi buddho bhagavā …pe… 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc83:1.2.15
Pali: kathañhi nāma tvaṁ, ānanda, pubbe appaṭisaṁvidito rañño antepuraṁ pavisissasi. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc83:1.2.16
Pali: Netaṁ, ānanda, appasannānaṁ vā pasādāya …pe… 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc83:1.2.17
Pali: vigarahitvā …pe… 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc83:1.2.18
Pali: dhammiṁ kathaṁ katvā bhikkhū āmantesi—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc83:1.3.1
Pali: “Dasayime, bhikkhave, ādīnavā rājantepurappavesane. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc83:1.3.2
Pali: Katame dasa? 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc83:1.3.3
Pali: Idha, bhikkhave, rājā mahesiyā saddhiṁ nisinno hoti, tattha bhikkhu pavisati. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc83:1.3.4
Pali: Mahesī vā bhikkhuṁ disvā sitaṁ pātukaroti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc83:1.3.5
Pali: Bhikkhu vā mahesiṁ disvā sitaṁ pātukaroti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc83:1.3.6
Pali: Tattha rañño evaṁ hoti—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc83:1.3.7
Pali: ‘addhā imesaṁ kataṁ vā karissanti vā’ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc83:1.3.8
Pali: Ayaṁ, bhikkhave, paṭhamo ādīnavo rājantepurappavesane. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc83:1.3.9
Pali: Puna caparaṁ, bhikkhave, rājā bahukicco bahukaraṇīyo. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc83:1.3.10
Pali: Aññataraṁ itthiṁ gantvā nassarati. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc83:1.3.11
Pali: Sā tena gabbhaṁ gaṇhi. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc83:1.3.12
Pali: Tattha rañño evaṁ hoti—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc83:1.3.13
Pali: ‘na kho idha añño koci pavisati aññatra pabbajitena. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc83:1.3.14
Pali: Siyā nu kho pabbajitassa kamman’ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc83:1.3.15
Pali: Ayaṁ, bhikkhave, dutiyo ādīnavo rājantepurappavesane. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc83:1.3.16
Pali: Puna caparaṁ, bhikkhave, rañño antepure aññataraṁ ratanaṁ nassati. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc83:1.3.17
Pali: Tattha rañño evaṁ hoti—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc83:1.3.18
Pali: ‘na kho idha añño koci pavisati aññatra pabbajitena. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc83:1.3.19
Pali: Siyā nu kho pabbajitassa kamman’ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc83:1.3.20
Pali: Ayaṁ, bhikkhave, tatiyo ādīnavo rājantepurappavesane. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc83:1.3.21
Pali: Puna caparaṁ, bhikkhave, rañño antepure abbhantarā guyhamantā bahiddhā sambhedaṁ gacchanti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc83:1.3.22
Pali: Tattha rañño evaṁ hoti—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc83:1.3.23
Pali: ‘na kho idha añño koci pavisati aññatra pabbajitena. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc83:1.3.24
Pali: Siyā nu kho pabbajitassa kamman’ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc83:1.3.25
Pali: Ayaṁ, bhikkhave, catuttho ādīnavo rājantepurappavesane. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc83:1.3.26
Pali: Puna caparaṁ, bhikkhave, rañño antepure putto vā pitaraṁ pattheti pitā vā puttaṁ pattheti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc83:1.3.27
Pali: Tesaṁ evaṁ hoti—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc83:1.3.28
Pali: ‘na kho idha añño koci pavisati aññatra pabbajitena. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc83:1.3.29
Pali: Siyā nu kho pabbajitassa kamman’ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc83:1.3.30
Pali: Ayaṁ, bhikkhave, pañcamo ādīnavo rājantepurappavesane. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc83:1.3.31
Pali: Puna caparaṁ, bhikkhave, rājā nīcaṭṭhāniyaṁ ucce ṭhāne ṭhapeti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc83:1.3.32
Pali: Yesaṁ taṁ amanāpaṁ tesaṁ evaṁ hoti—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc83:1.3.33
Pali: ‘rājā kho pabbajitena saṁsaṭṭho. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc83:1.3.34
Pali: Siyā nu kho pabbajitassa kamman’ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc83:1.3.35
Pali: Ayaṁ, bhikkhave, chaṭṭho ādīnavo, rājantepurappavesane. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc83:1.3.36
Pali: Puna caparaṁ, bhikkhave, rājā uccaṭṭhāniyaṁ nīce ṭhāne ṭhapeti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc83:1.3.37
Pali: Yesaṁ taṁ amanāpaṁ tesaṁ evaṁ hoti—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc83:1.3.38
Pali: ‘rājā kho pabbajitena saṁsaṭṭho. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc83:1.3.39
Pali: Siyā nu kho pabbajitassa kamman’ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc83:1.3.40
Pali: Ayaṁ, bhikkhave, sattamo ādīnavo rājantepurappavesane. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc83:1.3.41
Pali: Puna caparaṁ, bhikkhave, rājā akāle senaṁ uyyojeti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc83:1.3.42
Pali: Yesaṁ taṁ amanāpaṁ tesaṁ evaṁ hoti—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc83:1.3.43
Pali: ‘rājā kho pabbajitena saṁsaṭṭho. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc83:1.3.44
Pali: Siyā nu kho pabbajitassa kamman’ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc83:1.3.45
Pali: Ayaṁ, bhikkhave, aṭṭhamo ādīnavo rājantepurappavesane. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc83:1.3.46
Pali: Puna caparaṁ, bhikkhave, rājā kāle senaṁ uyyojetvā antarāmaggato nivattāpeti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc83:1.3.47
Pali: Yesaṁ taṁ amanāpaṁ tesaṁ evaṁ hoti—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc83:1.3.48
Pali: ‘rājā kho pabbajitena saṁsaṭṭho. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc83:1.3.49
Pali: Siyā nu kho pabbajitassa kamman’ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc83:1.3.50
Pali: Ayaṁ, bhikkhave, navamo ādīnavo rājantepurappavesane. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc83:1.3.51
Pali: Puna caparaṁ, bhikkhave, rañño rājantepuraṁ hatthisammaddaṁ assasammaddaṁ rathasammaddaṁ rajanīyāni rūpasaddagandharasaphoṭṭhabbāni, yāni na pabbajitassa sāruppāni. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc83:1.3.52
Pali: Ayaṁ, bhikkhave, dasamo ādīnavo rājantepurappavesane. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc83:1.3.53
Pali: Ime kho, bhikkhave, dasa ādīnavā rājantepurappavesane”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc83:1.3.54
Pali: Atha kho bhagavā āyasmantaṁ ānandaṁ anekapariyāyena vigarahitvā dubbharatāya …pe… 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc83:1.3.55
Pali: evañca pana, bhikkhave, imaṁ sikkhāpadaṁ uddiseyyātha—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc83:1.3.56.1
Pali: “Yo pana bhikkhu rañño khattiyassa muddhāvasittassa anikkhantarājake aniggataratanake pubbe appaṭisaṁvidito indakhīlaṁ atikkāmeyya, pācittiyan”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc83:2.1.1
Pali: Yo panāti 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc83:2.1.2
Pali: yo yādiso …pe… 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc83:2.1.3
Pali: bhikkhūti 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc83:2.1.4
Pali: …pe… ayaṁ imasmiṁ atthe adhippeto bhikkhūti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc83:2.1.5
Pali: Khattiyo nāma 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc83:2.1.6
Pali: ubhato sujāto hoti, mātito ca pitito ca saṁsuddhagahaṇiko, yāva sattamā pitāmahayugā akkhitto anupakuṭṭho jātivādena. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc83:2.1.7
Pali: Muddhāvasitto nāma 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc83:2.1.8
Pali: khattiyābhisekena abhisitto hoti.

Pali: Anikkhantarājaketi

Pali: rājā sayanigharā anikkhanto hoti.

Pali: Aniggataratanaketi

Pali: mahesī sayanigharā anikkhantā hoti, ubho vā anikkhantā honti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc83:2.1.13
Pali: Pubbe appaṭisaṁviditoti 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc83:2.1.14

Pali: Indakhīlo nāma

Pali: sayanigharassa ummāro vuccati. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc83:2.1.17
Pali: Sayanigharaṁ nāma 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc83:2.1.18
Pali: yattha katthaci rañño sayanaṁ paññattaṁ hoti, antamaso sāṇipākāraparikkhittampi. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc83:2.1.19
Pali: Indakhīlaṁ atikkāmeyyāti 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc83:2.1.20
Pali: paṭhamaṁ pādaṁ ummāraṁ atikkāmeti, āpatti dukkaṭassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc83:2.1.21
Pali: Dutiyaṁ pādaṁ atikkāmeti, āpatti pācittiyassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc83:2.2.1
Pali: Appaṭisaṁvidite appaṭisaṁviditasaññī indakhīlaṁ atikkāmeti, āpatti pācittiyassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc83:2.2.2
Pali: Appaṭisaṁvidite vematiko indakhīlaṁ atikkāmeti, āpatti pācittiyassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc83:2.2.3
Pali: Appaṭisaṁvidite paṭisaṁviditasaññī indakhīlaṁ atikkāmeti, āpatti pācittiyassa.

Pali: Paṭisaṁvidite appaṭisaṁviditasaññī, āpatti dukkaṭassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc83:2.2.5
Pali: Paṭisaṁvidite vematiko, āpatti dukkaṭassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc83:2.2.6
Pali: Paṭisaṁvidite paṭisaṁviditasaññī, anāpatti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc83:2.3.1
Pali: Anāpatti—

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc83:2.3.2

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc83:2.3.7

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc83:2.3.8
Pali: na sayanighare, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc83:2.3.9
Pali: ummattakassa, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc83:2.3.10
Pali: ādikammikassāti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-pc83:2.3.11
Pali: Antepurasikkhāpadaṁ niṭṭhitaṁ paṭhamaṁ.

Pali: Theravāda Vinaya
