pli-tv-bu-vb-sk55:0.5
Pali: 55. Sāmisasikkhāpada 

pli-tv-bu-vb-sk55:1.1
Pali: Tena samayena buddho bhagavā bhaggesu viharati susumāragire bhesakaḷāvane migadāye. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-sk55:1.2
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena bhikkhū kokanade pāsāde sāmisena hatthena pānīyathālakaṁ paṭiggaṇhanti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-sk55:1.3
Pali: Manussā ujjhāyanti khiyyanti vipācenti—

pli-tv-bu-vb-sk55:1.4
Pali: “kathañhi nāma samaṇā sakyaputtiyā sāmisena hatthena pānīyathālakaṁ paṭiggahessanti, seyyathāpi gihī kāmabhogino”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-sk55:1.5
Pali: Assosuṁ kho bhikkhū tesaṁ manussānaṁ ujjhāyantānaṁ khiyyantānaṁ vipācentānaṁ. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-sk55:1.6
Pali: Ye te bhikkhū appicchā …pe… te ujjhāyanti khiyyanti vipācenti—

pli-tv-bu-vb-sk55:1.7
Pali: “kathañhi nāma bhikkhū sāmisena hatthena pānīyathālakaṁ paṭiggahessantī”ti …pe… 

pli-tv-bu-vb-sk55:1.8
Pali: “saccaṁ kira, bhikkhave, bhikkhū sāmisena hatthena pānīyathālakaṁ paṭiggaṇhantī”ti? 

pli-tv-bu-vb-sk55:1.9
Pali: “Saccaṁ, bhagavā”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-sk55:1.10
Pali: Vigarahi buddho bhagavā …pe… 

pli-tv-bu-vb-sk55:1.11
Pali: kathañhi nāma te, bhikkhave, moghapurisā sāmisena hatthena pānīyathālakaṁ paṭiggahessanti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-sk55:1.12
Pali: Netaṁ, bhikkhave, appasannānaṁ vā pasādāya …pe… 

pli-tv-bu-vb-sk55:1.13
Pali: evañca pana, bhikkhave, imaṁ sikkhāpadaṁ uddiseyyātha—

pli-tv-bu-vb-sk55:1.14.1
Pali: “Na sāmisena hatthena pānīyathālakaṁ paṭiggahessāmīti sikkhā karaṇīyā”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-sk55:1.15
Pali: Na sāmisena hatthena pānīyathālako paṭiggahetabbo. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-sk55:1.16
Pali: Yo anādariyaṁ paṭicca sāmisena hatthena pānīyathālakaṁ paṭiggaṇhāti, āpatti dukkaṭassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-sk55:1.17.1
Pali: Anāpatti—

pli-tv-bu-vb-sk55:1.18
Pali: asañcicca, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-sk55:1.19
Pali: assatiyā, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-sk55:1.20
Pali: ajānantassa, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-sk55:1.21
Pali: gilānassa, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-sk55:1.22
Pali: “dhovissāmī”ti vā “dhovāpessāmī”ti vā paṭiggaṇhāti, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-sk55:1.23
Pali: āpadāsu, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-sk55:1.24
Pali: ummattakassa, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-sk55:1.25
Pali: ādikammikassāti.

Pali: Pañcamasikkhāpadaṁ niṭṭhitaṁ.

Pali: Manussā ujjhāyanti khiyyanti vipācenti—

pli-tv-bu-vb-sk56:1.5

Pali: Netaṁ, bhikkhave, appasannānaṁ vā pasādāya …pe… 

pli-tv-bu-vb-sk56:1.13

pli-tv-bu-vb-sk56:1.14.1

Pali: gilānassa, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-sk56:1.22

pli-tv-bu-vb-sk56:1.23
Pali: āpadāsu, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-sk56:1.24

Pali: Tena samayena buddho bhagavā sāvatthiyaṁ viharati jetavane anāthapiṇḍikassa ārāme.

Pali: Tena kho pana samayena chabbaggiyā bhikkhū chattapāṇissa dhammaṁ desenti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-sk57:1.3
Pali: Ye te bhikkhū appicchā …pe… te ujjhāyanti khiyyanti vipācenti—

pli-tv-bu-vb-sk57:1.4
Pali: “kathañhi nāma chabbaggiyā bhikkhū chattapāṇissa dhammaṁ desessantī”ti …pe… 

pli-tv-bu-vb-sk57:1.5
Pali: “saccaṁ kira tumhe, bhikkhave, chattapāṇissa dhammaṁ desethā”ti? 

pli-tv-bu-vb-sk57:1.6
Pali: “Saccaṁ, bhagavā”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-sk57:1.7
Pali: Vigarahi buddho bhagavā …pe… 

pli-tv-bu-vb-sk57:1.8
Pali: kathañhi nāma tumhe, moghapurisā, chattapāṇissa dhammaṁ desessatha. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-sk57:1.9
Pali: Netaṁ, moghapurisā, appasannānaṁ vā pasādāya …pe… 

pli-tv-bu-vb-sk57:1.10
Pali: evañca pana, bhikkhave, imaṁ sikkhāpadaṁ uddiseyyātha—

pli-tv-bu-vb-sk57:1.11.1
Pali: “Na chattapāṇissa dhammaṁ desessāmīti sikkhā karaṇīyā”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-sk57:1.12
Pali: Evañcidaṁ bhagavatā bhikkhūnaṁ sikkhāpadaṁ paññattaṁ hoti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-sk57:2.1
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena bhikkhū chattapāṇissa gilānassa dhammaṁ desetuṁ kukkuccāyanti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-sk57:2.2.1
Pali: Manussā ujjhāyanti khiyyanti vipācenti—

pli-tv-bu-vb-sk57:2.3
Pali: “kathañhi nāma samaṇā sakyaputtiyā chattapāṇissa gilānassa dhammaṁ na desessantī”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-sk57:2.4
Pali: Assosuṁ kho bhikkhū tesaṁ manussānaṁ ujjhāyantānaṁ khiyyantānaṁ vipācentānaṁ. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-sk57:2.5
Pali: Atha kho te bhikkhū bhagavato etamatthaṁ ārocesuṁ. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-sk57:2.6
Pali: Atha kho bhagavā etasmiṁ nidāne etasmiṁ pakaraṇe dhammiṁ kathaṁ katvā bhikkhū āmantesi—

pli-tv-bu-vb-sk57:2.7
Pali: “anujānāmi, bhikkhave, chattapāṇissa gilānassa dhammaṁ desetuṁ. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-sk57:2.8
Pali: Evañca pana, bhikkhave, imaṁ sikkhāpadaṁ uddiseyyātha—

pli-tv-bu-vb-sk57:2.9.1
Pali: “Na chattapāṇissa agilānassa dhammaṁ desessāmīti sikkhā karaṇīyā”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-sk57:2.10.1
Pali: Chattaṁ nāma 

pli-tv-bu-vb-sk57:2.11
Pali: tīṇi chattāni— setacchattaṁ, kilañjacchattaṁ, paṇṇacchattaṁ maṇḍalabaddhaṁ salākabaddhaṁ. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-sk57:2.12
Pali: Dhammo nāma 

pli-tv-bu-vb-sk57:2.13
Pali: buddhabhāsito sāvakabhāsito isibhāsito devatābhāsito atthūpasañhito dhammūpasañhito. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-sk57:2.14
Pali: Deseyyāti 

pli-tv-bu-vb-sk57:2.15
Pali: padena deseti, pade pade āpatti dukkaṭassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-sk57:2.16
Pali: Akkharāya deseti, akkharakkharāya āpatti dukkaṭassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-sk57:2.17
Pali: Na chattapāṇissa agilānassa dhammo desetabbo. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-sk57:2.18
Pali: Yo anādariyaṁ paṭicca chattapāṇissa agilānassa dhammaṁ deseti, āpatti dukkaṭassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-sk57:2.19.1
Pali: Anāpatti—

pli-tv-bu-vb-sk57:2.20.1
Pali: asañcicca …pe… 

pli-tv-bu-vb-sk57:2.21
Pali: ādikammikassāti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-sk57:2.22
Pali: Sattamasikkhāpadaṁ niṭṭhitaṁ.

Pali: gilānassa, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-sk66:1.13

Pali: ummattakassa,

Pali: Tena samayena buddho bhagavā sāvatthiyaṁ viharati jetavane anāthapiṇḍikassa ārāme. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-sk69:1.2
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena chabbaggiyā bhikkhū nīce āsane nisīditvā ucce āsane nisinnassa dhammaṁ desenti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-sk69:1.3
Pali: Ye te bhikkhū appicchā …pe… te ujjhāyanti khiyyanti vipācenti—

pli-tv-bu-vb-sk69:1.4
Pali: “kathañhi nāma chabbaggiyā bhikkhū nīce āsane nisīditvā ucce āsane nisinnassa dhammaṁ desessantī”ti …pe… 

pli-tv-bu-vb-sk69:1.5
Pali: “saccaṁ kira tumhe, bhikkhave, nīce āsane nisīditvā ucce āsane nisinnassa dhammaṁ desethā”ti? 

pli-tv-bu-vb-sk69:1.6
Pali: “Saccaṁ, bhagavā”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-sk69:1.7
Pali: Vigarahi buddho bhagavā …pe… 

pli-tv-bu-vb-sk69:1.8
Pali: kathañhi nāma tumhe, moghapurisā, nīce āsane nisīditvā ucce āsane nisinnassa dhammaṁ desessatha. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-sk69:1.9
Pali: Netaṁ, moghapurisā, appasannānaṁ vā pasādāya …pe… 

pli-tv-bu-vb-sk69:1.10
Pali: vigarahitvā …pe… 

pli-tv-bu-vb-sk69:1.11
Pali: dhammiṁ kathaṁ katvā bhikkhū āmantesi—

pli-tv-bu-vb-sk69:1.12.1
Pali: “Bhūtapubbaṁ, bhikkhave, bārāṇasiyaṁ aññatarassa chapakassa pajāpati gabbhinī ahosi. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-sk69:1.13
Pali: Atha kho, bhikkhave, sā chapakī taṁ chapakaṁ etadavoca—

pli-tv-bu-vb-sk69:1.14
Pali: ‘gabbhinīmhi, ayyaputta. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-sk69:1.15
Pali: Icchāmi ambaṁ khāditun’ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-sk69:1.16
Pali: ‘Natthi ambaṁ, akālo ambassā’ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-sk69:1.17
Pali: ‘Sace na labhissāmi marissāmī’ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-sk69:1.18
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena rañño ambo dhuvaphalo hoti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-sk69:1.19
Pali: Atha kho, bhikkhave, so chapako yena so ambo tenupasaṅkami; upasaṅkamitvā taṁ ambaṁ abhiruhitvā nilīno acchi. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-sk69:1.20
Pali: Atha kho, bhikkhave, rājā purohitena brāhmaṇena saddhiṁ yena so ambo tenupasaṅkami; upasaṅkamitvā ucce āsane nisīditvā mantaṁ pariyāpuṇāti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-sk69:1.21
Pali: Atha kho, bhikkhave, tassa chapakassa etadahosi—

pli-tv-bu-vb-sk69:1.22
Pali: ‘yāva adhammiko ayaṁ rājā, yatra hi nāma ucce āsane nisīditvā mantaṁ pariyāpuṇissati. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-sk69:1.23
Pali: Ayañca brāhmaṇo adhammiko, yatra hi nāma nīce āsane nisīditvā ucce āsane nisinnassa mantaṁ vācessati. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-sk69:1.24
Pali: Ahañcamhi adhammiko, yohaṁ itthiyā kāraṇā rañño ambaṁ avaharāmi. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-sk69:1.25
Pali: Sabbamidaṁ carimaṁ katan’ti 

pli-tv-bu-vb-sk69:1.26
Pali: tattheva paripati. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-sk69:1.27.1
Pali: ‘Ubho atthaṁ na jānanti, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-sk69:1.28
Pali: ubho dhammaṁ na passare; 

pli-tv-bu-vb-sk69:1.29
Pali: Yo cāyaṁ mantaṁ vāceti, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-sk69:1.30
Pali: yo cādhammenadhīyati’. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-sk69:1.31.1
Pali: ‘Sālīnaṁ odano bhutto, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-sk69:1.32
Pali: sucimaṁsūpasecano; 

pli-tv-bu-vb-sk69:1.33
Pali: Tasmā dhamme na vattāmi, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-sk69:1.34
Pali: dhammo ariyebhi vaṇṇito’. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-sk69:1.35.1
Pali: ‘Dhiratthu taṁ dhanalābhaṁ, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-sk69:1.36
Pali: yasalābhañca brāhmaṇa; 

pli-tv-bu-vb-sk69:1.37
Pali: Yā vutti vinipātena, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-sk69:1.38
Pali: adhammacaraṇena vā. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-sk69:1.39
Pali: Paribbaja mahābrahme, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-sk69:1.40
Pali: pacantaññepi pāṇino; 

pli-tv-bu-vb-sk69:1.41
Pali: Mā tvaṁ adhammo ācarito, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-sk69:1.42
Pali: asmā kumbhamivābhidā’ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-sk69:1.43
Pali: Tadāpi me, bhikkhave, amanāpā nīce āsane nisīditvā ucce āsane nisinnassa mantaṁ vācetuṁ, kimaṅgaṁ pana etarahi na amanāpā bhavissati nīce āsane nisīditvā ucce āsane nisinnassa dhammaṁ desetuṁ. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-sk69:1.44
Pali: Netaṁ, bhikkhave, appasannānaṁ vā pasādāya …pe… 

pli-tv-bu-vb-sk69:1.45

pli-tv-bu-vb-sk69:1.46.1

Pali segments

pli-tv-bu-vb-sk75:0.1
Pali: Theravāda Vinaya 

pli-tv-bu-vb-sk75:0.2
Pali: Mahāvibhaṅga 

pli-tv-bu-vb-sk75:0.3
Pali: Sekhiyakaṇḍa 

pli-tv-bu-vb-sk75:0.4
Pali: Pādukavagga 

pli-tv-bu-vb-sk75:0.5
Pali: 75. Udakeuccārasikkhāpada 

pli-tv-bu-vb-sk75:1.1
Pali: Tena samayena buddho bhagavā sāvatthiyaṁ viharati jetavane anāthapiṇḍikassa ārāme. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-sk75:1.2
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena chabbaggiyā bhikkhū udake uccārampi passāvampi kheḷampi karonti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-sk75:1.3
Pali: Manussā ujjhāyanti khiyyanti vipācenti—

pli-tv-bu-vb-sk75:1.4
Pali: “kathañhi nāma samaṇā sakyaputtiyā udake uccārampi passāvampi kheḷampi karissanti, seyyathāpi gihī kāmabhogino”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-sk75:1.5
Pali: Assosuṁ kho bhikkhū tesaṁ manussānaṁ ujjhāyantānaṁ khiyyantānaṁ vipācentānaṁ. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-sk75:1.6
Pali: Ye te bhikkhū appicchā …pe… te ujjhāyanti khiyyanti vipācenti—

pli-tv-bu-vb-sk75:1.7
Pali: “kathañhi nāma chabbaggiyā bhikkhū udake uccārampi passāvampi kheḷampi karissantī”ti …pe… 

pli-tv-bu-vb-sk75:1.8
Pali: “saccaṁ kira tumhe, bhikkhave, udake uccārampi passāvampi kheḷampi karothā”ti? 

pli-tv-bu-vb-sk75:1.9
Pali: “Saccaṁ, bhagavā”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-sk75:1.10
Pali: Vigarahi buddho bhagavā …pe… 

pli-tv-bu-vb-sk75:1.11
Pali: kathañhi nāma tumhe, moghapurisā, udake uccārampi passāvampi kheḷampi karissatha. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-sk75:1.12
Pali: Netaṁ, moghapurisā, appasannānaṁ vā pasādāya …pe… 

pli-tv-bu-vb-sk75:1.13
Pali: evañca pana, bhikkhave, imaṁ sikkhāpadaṁ uddiseyyātha—

pli-tv-bu-vb-sk75:1.14.1
Pali: “Na udake uccāraṁ vā passāvaṁ vā kheḷaṁ vā karissāmīti sikkhā karaṇīyā”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-sk75:1.15
Pali: Evañcidaṁ bhagavatā bhikkhūnaṁ sikkhāpadaṁ paññattaṁ hoti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-sk75:2.1
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena gilānā bhikkhū udake uccārampi passāvampi kheḷampi kātuṁ kukkuccāyanti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-sk75:2.2
Pali: Bhagavato etamatthaṁ ārocesuṁ. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-sk75:2.3
Pali: Atha kho bhagavā etasmiṁ nidāne etasmiṁ pakaraṇe dhammiṁ kathaṁ katvā bhikkhū āmantesi—

pli-tv-bu-vb-sk75:2.4
Pali: “anujānāmi, bhikkhave, gilānena bhikkhunā udake uccārampi passāvampi kheḷampi kātuṁ. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-sk75:2.5
Pali: Evañca pana, bhikkhave, imaṁ sikkhāpadaṁ uddiseyyātha—

pli-tv-bu-vb-sk75:2.6.1
Pali: “Na udake agilāno uccāraṁ vā passāvaṁ vā kheḷaṁ vā karissāmīti sikkhā karaṇīyā”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-sk75:2.7
Pali: Na udake agilānena uccāro vā passāvo vā kheḷo vā kātabbo. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-sk75:2.8
Pali: Yo anādariyaṁ paṭicca udake agilāno uccāraṁ vā passāvaṁ vā kheḷaṁ vā karoti, āpatti dukkaṭassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-sk75:2.9.1
Pali: Anāpatti—

pli-tv-bu-vb-sk75:2.10
Pali: asañcicca, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-sk75:2.11
Pali: assatiyā, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-sk75:2.12
Pali: ajānantassa, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-sk75:2.13
Pali: gilānassa, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-sk75:2.14
Pali: thale kato udakaṁ ottharati, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-sk75:2.15
Pali: āpadāsu, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-sk75:2.16
Pali: ummattakassa, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-sk75:2.17
Pali: khittacittassa, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-sk75:2.18
Pali: vedanāṭṭassa, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-sk75:2.19
Pali: ādikammikassāti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-sk75:2.20
Pali: Pannarasamasikkhāpadaṁ niṭṭhitaṁ. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-sk75:2.21
Pali: Pādukavaggo sattamo. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-sk75:2.22
Pali: Uddiṭṭhā kho, āyasmanto, sekhiyā dhammā. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-sk75:2.23
Pali: Tatthāyasmante pucchāmi—

pli-tv-bu-vb-sk75:2.24
Pali: “kaccittha parisuddhā”? 

pli-tv-bu-vb-sk75:2.25
Pali: Dutiyampi pucchāmi—

pli-tv-bu-vb-sk75:2.26
Pali: “kaccittha parisuddhā”? 

pli-tv-bu-vb-sk75:2.27
Pali: Tatiyampi pucchāmi—

pli-tv-bu-vb-sk75:2.28
Pali: “kaccittha parisuddhā”? 

pli-tv-bu-vb-sk75:2.29
Pali: Parisuddhetthāyasmanto, tasmā tuṇhī, evametaṁ dhārayāmīti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-sk75:2.30
Pali: Sekhiyā niṭṭhitā. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-sk75:2.31
Pali: Sekhiyakaṇḍaṁ niṭṭhitaṁ.

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss1:0.1
Pali: Theravāda Vinaya 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss1:0.2
Pali: Mahāvibhaṅga 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss1:0.3
Pali: Saṅghādisesakaṇḍa 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss1:0.4
Pali: 1. Sukkavissaṭṭhisikkhāpada 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss1:0.5
Pali: Ime kho panāyasmanto terasa saṅghādisesā dhammā uddesaṁ āgacchanti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss1:1.1.1
Pali: Tena samayena buddho bhagavā sāvatthiyaṁ viharati jetavane anāthapiṇḍikassa ārāme. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss1:1.1.2
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena āyasmā seyyasako anabhirato brahmacariyaṁ carati. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss1:1.1.3
Pali: So tena kiso hoti lūkho dubbaṇṇo uppaṇḍuppaṇḍukajāto dhamanisanthatagatto. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss1:1.1.4
Pali: Addasa kho āyasmā udāyī āyasmantaṁ seyyasakaṁ kisaṁ lūkhaṁ dubbaṇṇaṁ uppaṇḍuppaṇḍukajātaṁ dhamanisanthatagattaṁ. Disvāna āyasmantaṁ seyyasakaṁ etadavoca—

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss1:1.1.5
Pali: “kissa tvaṁ, āvuso seyyasaka, kiso lūkho dubbaṇṇo uppaṇḍuppaṇḍukajāto dhamanisanthatagatto? 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss1:1.1.6
Pali: Kacci no tvaṁ, āvuso seyyasaka, anabhirato brahmacariyaṁ carasī”ti? 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss1:1.1.7
Pali: “Evamāvuso”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss1:1.1.8
Pali: “Tena hi tvaṁ, āvuso seyyasaka, yāvadatthaṁ bhuñja yāvadatthaṁ supa yāvadatthaṁ nhāya. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss1:1.1.9
Pali: Yāvadatthaṁ bhuñjitvā yāvadatthaṁ supitvā yāvadatthaṁ nhāyitvā yadā te anabhirati uppajjati rāgo cittaṁ anuddhaṁseti tadā hatthena upakkamitvā asuciṁ mocehī”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss1:1.1.10
Pali: “Kiṁ nu kho, āvuso, kappati evarūpaṁ kātun”ti? 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss1:1.1.11
Pali: “Āma, āvuso. Ahampi evaṁ karomī”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss1:1.1.12
Pali: Atha kho āyasmā seyyasako yāvadatthaṁ bhuñji yāvadatthaṁ supi yāvadatthaṁ nhāyi. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss1:1.1.13
Pali: Yāvadatthaṁ bhuñjitvā yāvadatthaṁ supitvā yāvadatthaṁ nhāyitvā yadā anabhirati uppajjati rāgo cittaṁ anuddhaṁseti tadā hatthena upakkamitvā asuciṁ mocesi. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss1:1.1.14
Pali: Atha kho āyasmā seyyasako aparena samayena vaṇṇavā ahosi pīṇindriyo pasannamukhavaṇṇo vippasannachavivaṇṇo. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss1:1.1.15
Pali: Atha kho āyasmato seyyasakassa sahāyakā bhikkhū āyasmantaṁ seyyasakaṁ etadavocuṁ—

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss1:1.1.16
Pali: “pubbe kho tvaṁ, āvuso seyyasaka, kiso ahosi lūkho dubbaṇṇo uppaṇḍuppaṇḍukajāto dhamanisanthatagatto. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss1:1.1.17
Pali: So dāni tvaṁ etarahi vaṇṇavā pīṇindriyo pasannamukhavaṇṇo vippasannachavivaṇṇo. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss1:1.1.18
Pali: Kiṁ nu kho tvaṁ, āvuso seyyasaka, bhesajjaṁ karosī”ti? 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss1:1.1.19
Pali: “Na kho ahaṁ, āvuso, bhesajjaṁ karomi. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss1:1.1.20
Pali: Api cāhaṁ yāvadatthaṁ bhuñjāmi yāvadatthaṁ supāmi yāvadatthaṁ nhāyāmi. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss1:1.1.21
Pali: Yāvadatthaṁ bhuñjitvā yāvadatthaṁ supitvā yāvadatthaṁ nhāyitvā yadā me anabhirati uppajjati rāgo cittaṁ anuddhaṁseti tadā hatthena upakkamitvā asuciṁ mocemī”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss1:1.2.1
Pali: “Kiṁ pana tvaṁ, āvuso seyyasaka, yeneva hatthena saddhādeyyaṁ bhuñjasi teneva hatthena upakkamitvā asuciṁ mocesī”ti? 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss1:1.2.2
Pali: “Evamāvuso”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss1:1.2.3
Pali: Ye te bhikkhū appicchā …pe… te ujjhāyanti khiyyanti vipācenti—

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss1:1.2.4
Pali: “kathañhi nāma āyasmā seyyasako hatthena upakkamitvā asuciṁ mocessatī”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss1:1.2.5
Pali: Atha kho te bhikkhū āyasmantaṁ seyyasakaṁ anekapariyāyena vigarahitvā bhagavato etamatthaṁ ārocesuṁ. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss1:1.2.6
Pali: Atha kho bhagavā etasmiṁ nidāne etasmiṁ pakaraṇe bhikkhusaṅghaṁ sannipātāpetvā āyasmantaṁ seyyasakaṁ paṭipucchi—

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss1:1.2.7
Pali: “saccaṁ kira tvaṁ, seyyasaka, hatthena upakkamitvā asuciṁ mocesī”ti? 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss1:1.2.8
Pali: “Saccaṁ, bhagavā”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss1:1.2.9
Pali: Vigarahi buddho bhagavā—

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss1:1.2.10
Pali: “ananucchavikaṁ, moghapurisa, ananulomikaṁ appatirūpaṁ assāmaṇakaṁ akappiyaṁ akaraṇīyaṁ. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss1:1.2.11
Pali: Kathañhi nāma tvaṁ, moghapurisa, hatthena upakkamitvā asuciṁ mocessasi. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss1:1.2.12
Pali: Nanu mayā, moghapurisa, anekapariyāyena virāgāya dhammo desito no sarāgāya, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss1:1.2.13
Pali: visaññogāya dhammo desito no saññogāya, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss1:1.2.14
Pali: anupādānāya dhammo desito no saupādānāya. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss1:1.2.15
Pali: Tattha nāma tvaṁ, moghapurisa, mayā virāgāya dhamme desite sarāgāya cetessasi, visaññogāya dhamme desite saññogāya cetessasi, anupādānāya dhamme desite saupādānāya cetessasi. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss1:1.2.16
Pali: Nanu mayā, moghapurisa, anekapariyāyena rāgavirāgāya dhammo desito, madanimmadanāya pipāsavinayāya ālayasamugghātāya vaṭṭupacchedāya taṇhākkhayāya virāgāya nirodhāya nibbānāya dhammo desito? 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss1:1.2.17
Pali: Nanu mayā, moghapurisa, anekapariyāyena kāmānaṁ pahānaṁ akkhātaṁ, kāmasaññānaṁ pariññā akkhātā, kāmapipāsānaṁ paṭivinayo akkhāto, kāmavitakkānaṁ samugghāto akkhāto, kāmapariḷāhānaṁ vūpasamo akkhāto? 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss1:1.2.18
Pali: Netaṁ, moghapurisa, appasannānaṁ vā pasādāya, pasannānaṁ vā bhiyyobhāvāya. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss1:1.2.19
Pali: Atha khvetaṁ, moghapurisa, appasannānañceva appasādāya, pasannānañca ekaccānaṁ aññathattāyā”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss1:1.2.20
Pali: Atha kho bhagavā āyasmantaṁ seyyasakaṁ anekapariyāyena vigarahitvā dubbharatāya …pe… 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss1:1.2.21
Pali: evañca pana, bhikkhave, imaṁ sikkhāpadaṁ uddiseyyātha—

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss1:1.2.22.1
Pali: “Sañcetanikā sukkavissaṭṭhi saṅghādiseso”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss1:1.2.23
Pali: Evañcidaṁ bhagavatā bhikkhūnaṁ sikkhāpadaṁ paññattaṁ hoti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss1:2.1.1
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena bhikkhū paṇītabhojanāni bhuñjitvā muṭṭhassatī asampajānā niddaṁ okkamanti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss1:2.1.2
Pali: Tesaṁ muṭṭhassatīnaṁ asampajānānaṁ niddaṁ okkamantānaṁ supinantena asuci muccati. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss1:2.1.3
Pali: Tesaṁ kukkuccaṁ ahosi—

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss1:2.1.4
Pali: “bhagavatā sikkhāpadaṁ paññattaṁ—

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss1:2.1.5
Pali: ‘sañcetanikā sukkavissaṭṭhi saṅghādiseso’ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss1:2.1.6
Pali: Amhākañca supinantena asuci muccati. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss1:2.1.7
Pali: Atthi cettha cetanā labbhati. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss1:2.1.8
Pali: Kacci nu kho mayaṁ saṅghādisesaṁ āpattiṁ āpannā”ti? 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss1:2.1.9
Pali: Bhagavato etamatthaṁ ārocesuṁ. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss1:2.1.10
Pali: “Atthesā, bhikkhave, cetanā; 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss1:2.1.11
Pali: sā ca kho abbohārikāti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss1:2.1.12
Pali: Evañca pana, bhikkhave, imaṁ sikkhāpadaṁ uddiseyyātha—

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss1:2.1.13.1
Pali: “Sañcetanikā sukkavissaṭṭhi aññatra supinantā saṅghādiseso”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss1:2.2.1
Pali: Sañcetanikāti 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss1:2.2.2
Pali: jānanto sañjānanto cecca abhivitaritvā vītikkamo. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss1:2.2.3
Pali: Sukkanti 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss1:2.2.4
Pali: dasa sukkāni—

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss1:2.2.5
Pali: nīlaṁ pītakaṁ lohitakaṁ odātaṁ takkavaṇṇaṁ dakavaṇṇaṁ telavaṇṇaṁ khīravaṇṇaṁ dadhivaṇṇaṁ sappivaṇṇaṁ. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss1:2.2.6
Pali: Vissaṭṭhīti 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss1:2.2.7
Pali: ṭhānato cāvanā vuccati vissaṭṭhīti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss1:2.2.8
Pali: Aññatra supinantāti 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss1:2.2.9
Pali: ṭhapetvā supinantaṁ. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss1:2.2.10
Pali: Saṅghādisesoti 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss1:2.2.11
Pali: saṅghova tassā āpattiyā parivāsaṁ deti, mūlāya paṭikassati, mānattaṁ deti, abbheti; na sambahulā, na ekapuggalo. Tena vuccati—“saṅghādiseso”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss1:2.2.12
Pali: Tasseva āpattinikāyassa nāmakammaṁ adhivacanaṁ. Tenapi vuccati—“saṅghādiseso”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss1:3.1.1
Pali: Ajjhattarūpe moceti, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss1:3.1.2
Pali: bahiddhārūpe moceti,

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss1:3.1.29
Pali: sappivaṇṇaṁ moceti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss1:3.2.1
Pali: Ajjhattarūpeti 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss1:3.2.2
Pali: ajjhattaṁ upādinne rūpe.

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss1:4.10
Pali: supinantena,

Pali: namocanādhippāyassa,

Pali: ummattakassa,

Pali: vedanāṭṭassa,

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss1:4.16
Pali: 1.1. Vinītavatthuuddānagāthā 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss1:4.17
Pali: Supinoccārapassāvo, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss1:4.18
Pali: vitakkuṇhodakena ca; 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss1:4.19
Pali: Bhesajjaṁ kaṇḍuvaṁ maggo, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss1:4.20
Pali: vatthi jantāgharupakkamo. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss1:4.21
Pali: Sāmaṇero ca sutto ca, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss1:4.22
Pali: ūru muṭṭhinā pīḷayi; 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss1:4.23
Pali: Ākāse thambhaṁ nijjhāyi, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss1:4.24
Pali: chiddaṁ kaṭṭhena ghaṭṭayi. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss1:4.25
Pali: Soto udañjalaṁ dhāvaṁ, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss1:4.26
Pali: pupphāvaliyaṁ pokkharaṁ; 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss1:4.27
Pali: Vālikā kaddamusseko, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss1:4.28
Pali: sayanaṅguṭṭhakena cāti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss1:5.1.0
Pali: 1.2. Vinītavatthu 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss1:5.1.1
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena aññatarassa bhikkhuno supinantena asuci mucci. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss1:5.1.2
Pali: Tassa kukkuccaṁ ahosi—

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss1:5.1.3
Pali: “bhagavatā sikkhāpadaṁ paññattaṁ, kacci nu kho ahaṁ saṅghādisesaṁ āpattiṁ āpanno”ti? 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss1:5.1.4
Pali: Bhagavato etamatthaṁ ārocesi. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss1:5.1.5
Pali: “Anāpatti, bhikkhu, supinantenā”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss1:5.2.1
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena aññatarassa bhikkhuno uccāraṁ karontassa asuci mucci. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss1:5.2.2
Pali: Tassa kukkuccaṁ ahosi …pe… 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss1:5.2.3
Pali: “kiṁcitto tvaṁ, bhikkhū”ti? 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss1:5.2.4
Pali: “Nāhaṁ, bhagavā, mocanādhippāyo”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss1:5.2.5
Pali: “Anāpatti, bhikkhu, namocanādhippāyassā”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss1:5.2.6
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena aññatarassa bhikkhuno passāvaṁ karontassa asuci mucci. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss1:5.2.7
Pali: Tassa kukkuccaṁ ahosi …pe…

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss1:5.9.1

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss1:5.9.2

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss1:5.9.3

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss1:5.9.4
Pali: Tasseva asuci mucci. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss1:5.9.5
Pali: Tassa kukkuccaṁ ahosi …pe… 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss1:5.9.6
Pali: “āpattiṁ tvaṁ, bhikkhu, āpanno saṅghādisesan”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss1:5.9.7

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss2:0.1
Pali: Theravāda Vinaya 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss2:0.2
Pali: Mahāvibhaṅga 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss2:0.3
Pali: Saṅghādisesakaṇḍa 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss2:0.4
Pali: 2. Kāyasaṁsaggasikkhāpada 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss2:1.1.1
Pali: Tena samayena buddho bhagavā sāvatthiyaṁ viharati jetavane anāthapiṇḍikassa ārāme. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss2:1.1.2
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena āyasmā udāyī araññe viharati. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss2:1.1.3
Pali: Tassāyasmato vihāro abhirūpo hoti dassanīyo pāsādiko, majjhegabbho, samantāpariyāgāro, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss2:1.1.4
Pali: supaññattaṁ mañcapīṭhaṁ bhisibibbohanaṁ, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss2:1.1.5
Pali: pānīyaṁ paribhojanīyaṁ sūpaṭṭhitaṁ, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss2:1.1.6
Pali: pariveṇaṁ susammaṭṭhaṁ. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss2:1.1.7
Pali: Bahū manussā āyasmato udāyissa vihārapekkhakā āgacchanti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss2:1.1.8
Pali: Aññataropi brāhmaṇo sapajāpatiko yenāyasmā udāyī tenupasaṅkami; upasaṅkamitvā āyasmantaṁ udāyiṁ etadavoca—

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss2:1.1.9
Pali: “icchāma mayaṁ bhoto udāyissa vihāraṁ pekkhitun”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss2:1.1.10
Pali: “Tena hi, brāhmaṇa, pekkhassū”ti, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss2:1.1.11
Pali: avāpuraṇaṁ ādāya ghaṭikaṁ ugghāṭetvā kavāṭaṁ paṇāmetvā vihāraṁ pāvisi. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss2:1.1.12
Pali: Sopi kho brāhmaṇo āyasmato udāyissa piṭṭhito pāvisi. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss2:1.1.13
Pali: Sāpi kho brāhmaṇī tassa brāhmaṇassa piṭṭhito pāvisi. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss2:1.1.14
Pali: Atha kho āyasmā udāyī ekacce vātapāne vivaranto ekacce vātapāne thakento gabbhaṁ anuparigantvā piṭṭhito āgantvā tassā brāhmaṇiyā aṅgamaṅgāni parāmasi. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss2:1.1.15
Pali: Atha kho so brāhmaṇo āyasmatā udāyinā saddhiṁ paṭisammoditvā agamāsi. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss2:1.1.16
Pali: Atha kho so brāhmaṇo attamano attamanavācaṁ nicchāresi—

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss2:1.1.17
Pali: “uḷārā ime samaṇā sakyaputtiyā ye ime evarūpe araññe viharanti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss2:1.1.18
Pali: Bhavampi udāyī uḷāro yo evarūpe araññe viharatī”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss2:1.1.19
Pali: Evaṁ vutte, sā brāhmaṇī taṁ brāhmaṇaṁ etadavoca—

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss2:1.1.20
Pali: “kuto tassa uḷārattatā. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss2:1.1.21
Pali: Yatheva me tvaṁ aṅgamaṅgāni parāmasi evameva me samaṇo udāyī aṅgamaṅgāni parāmasī”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss2:1.1.22
Pali: Atha kho so brāhmaṇo ujjhāyati khiyyati vipāceti—

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss2:1.1.23
Pali: “alajjino ime samaṇā sakyaputtiyā dussīlā musāvādino. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss2:1.1.24
Pali: Ime hi nāma dhammacārino samacārino brahmacārino saccavādino sīlavanto kalyāṇadhammā paṭijānissanti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss2:1.1.25
Pali: Natthi imesaṁ sāmaññaṁ natthi imesaṁ brahmaññaṁ, naṭṭhaṁ imesaṁ sāmaññaṁ naṭṭhaṁ imesaṁ brahmaññaṁ, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss2:1.1.26
Pali: kuto imesaṁ sāmaññaṁ kuto imesaṁ brahmaññaṁ, apagatā ime sāmaññā apagatā ime brahmaññā. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss2:1.1.27
Pali: Kathañhi nāma samaṇo udāyī mama bhariyāya aṅgamaṅgāni parāmasissati. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss2:1.1.28
Pali: Na hi sakkā kulitthīhi kuladhītāhi kulakumārīhi kulasuṇhāhi kuladāsīhi ārāmaṁ vā vihāraṁ vā gantuṁ. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss2:1.1.29
Pali: Sace kulitthiyo kuladhītaro kulakumāriyo kulasuṇhāyo kuladāsiyo ārāmaṁ vā vihāraṁ vā gaccheyyuṁ, tāpi samaṇā sakyaputtiyā dūseyyun”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss2:1.2.1
Pali: Assosuṁ kho bhikkhu tassa brāhmaṇassa ujjhāyantassa khiyyantassa vipācentassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss2:1.2.2
Pali: Ye te bhikkhū appicchā …pe… te ujjhāyanti khiyyanti vipācenti—

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss2:1.2.3
Pali: “kathañhi nāma āyasmā udāyī mātugāmena saddhiṁ kāyasaṁsaggaṁ samāpajjissatī”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss2:1.2.4
Pali: Atha kho te bhikkhū āyasmantaṁ udāyiṁ anekapariyāyena vigarahitvā bhagavato etamatthaṁ ārocesuṁ. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss2:1.2.5
Pali: Atha kho bhagavā etasmiṁ nidāne etasmiṁ pakaraṇe bhikkhusaṅghaṁ sannipātāpetvā āyasmantaṁ udāyiṁ paṭipucchi—

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss2:1.2.6
Pali: “saccaṁ kira tvaṁ, udāyi, mātugāmena saddhiṁ kāyasaṁsaggaṁ samāpajjasī”ti? 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss2:1.2.7
Pali: “Saccaṁ, bhagavā”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss2:1.2.8
Pali: Vigarahi buddho bhagavā—

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss2:1.2.9
Pali: “ananucchavikaṁ, moghapurisa, ananulomikaṁ appatirūpaṁ assāmaṇakaṁ akappiyaṁ akaraṇīyaṁ. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss2:1.2.10
Pali: Kathañhi nāma tvaṁ, moghapurisa, mātugāmena saddhiṁ kāyasaṁsaggaṁ samāpajjissasi. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss2:1.2.11
Pali: Nanu mayā, moghapurisa, anekapariyāyena virāgāya dhammo desito no sarāgāya …pe… 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss2:1.2.12
Pali: kāmapariḷāhānaṁ vūpasamo akkhāto. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss2:1.2.13
Pali: Netaṁ, moghapurisa, appasannānaṁ vā pasādāya …pe… 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss2:1.2.14
Pali: evañca pana, bhikkhave, imaṁ sikkhāpadaṁ uddiseyyātha—

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss2:1.2.15.1
Pali: “Yo pana bhikkhu otiṇṇo vipariṇatena cittena mātugāmena saddhiṁ kāyasaṁsaggaṁ samāpajjeyya hatthaggāhaṁ vā veṇiggāhaṁ vā aññatarassa vā aññatarassa vā aṅgassa parāmasanaṁ, saṅghādiseso”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss2:2.1.1
Pali: Yo panāti 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss2:2.1.2
Pali: yo yādiso …pe… 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss2:2.1.3
Pali: bhikkhūti 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss2:2.1.4
Pali: …pe… ayaṁ imasmiṁ atthe adhippeto bhikkhūti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss2:2.1.5
Pali: Otiṇṇo nāma 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss2:2.1.6
Pali: sāratto apekkhavā paṭibaddhacitto. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss2:2.1.7
Pali: Vipariṇatanti 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss2:2.1.8
Pali: rattampi cittaṁ vipariṇataṁ. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss2:2.1.9
Pali: Duṭṭhampi cittaṁ vipariṇataṁ. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss2:2.1.10
Pali: Mūḷhampi cittaṁ vipariṇataṁ. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss2:2.1.11
Pali: Api ca rattaṁ cittaṁ imasmiṁ atthe adhippetaṁ vipariṇatanti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss2:2.1.12
Pali: Mātugāmo nāma 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss2:2.1.13
Pali: manussitthī, na yakkhī na petī, na tiracchānagatā. Antamaso tadahujātāpi dārikā, pageva mahattarī. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss2:2.1.14
Pali: Saddhinti 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss2:2.1.15
Pali: ekato. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss2:2.1.16
Pali: Kāyasaṁsaggaṁ samāpajjeyyāti 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss2:2.1.17
Pali: ajjhācāro vuccati. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss2:2.1.18
Pali: Hattho nāma 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss2:2.1.19
Pali: kapparaṁ upādāya yāva agganakhā. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss2:2.1.20
Pali: Veṇī nāma 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss2:2.1.21
Pali: suddhakesā vā, suttamissā vā, mālāmissā vā, hiraññamissā vā, suvaṇṇamissā vā, muttāmissā vā, maṇimissā vā. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss2:2.1.22
Pali: Aṅgaṁ nāma 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss2:2.1.23
Pali: hatthañca veṇiñca ṭhapetvā avasesaṁ aṅgaṁ nāma. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss2:2.2.1
Pali: Āmasanā, parāmasanā, omasanā, ummasanā, olaṅghanā, ullaṅghanā, ākaḍḍhanā, patikaḍḍhanā, abhiniggaṇhanā, abhinippīḷanā, gahaṇaṁ, chupanaṁ.

Pali: Āmasanā nāma 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss2:2.2.3
Pali: āmaṭṭhamattā. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss2:2.2.4
Pali: Parāmasanā nāma 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss2:2.2.5
Pali: itocito ca sañcopanā.

Pali: Omasanā nāma 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss2:2.2.7

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss2:2.2.22

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss2:3.7.18

Pali: 3. Duṭṭhullavācāsikkhāpada 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss3:1.1.1
Pali: Tena samayena buddho bhagavā sāvatthiyaṁ viharati jetavane anāthapiṇḍikassa ārāme. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss3:1.1.2
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena āyasmā udāyī araññe viharati. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss3:1.1.3
Pali: Tassāyasmato vihāro abhirūpo hoti dassanīyo pāsādiko. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss3:1.1.4
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena sambahulā itthiyo ārāmaṁ āgamaṁsu vihārapekkhikāyo. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss3:1.1.5
Pali: Atha kho tā itthiyo yenāyasmā udāyī tenupasaṅkamiṁsu; 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss3:1.1.6
Pali: upasaṅkamitvā āyasmantaṁ udāyiṁ etadavocuṁ—

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss3:1.1.7
Pali: “icchāma mayaṁ, bhante, ayyassa vihāraṁ pekkhitun”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss3:1.1.8
Pali: Atha kho āyasmā udāyī tā itthiyo vihāraṁ pekkhāpetvā tāsaṁ itthīnaṁ vaccamaggaṁ passāvamaggaṁ ādissa vaṇṇampi bhaṇati avaṇṇampi bhaṇati yācatipi āyācatipi pucchatipi paṭipucchatipi ācikkhatipi anusāsatipi akkosatipi. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss3:1.1.9
Pali: Yā tā itthiyo chinnikā dhuttikā ahirikāyo tā āyasmatā udāyinā saddhiṁ uhasantipi ullapantipi ujjagghantipi uppaṇḍentipi. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss3:1.1.10
Pali: Yā pana tā itthiyo hirimanā tā nikkhamitvā bhikkhū ujjhāpenti—

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss3:1.1.11
Pali: “idaṁ, bhante, nacchannaṁ nappatirūpaṁ. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss3:1.1.12
Pali: Sāmikenapi mayaṁ evaṁ vuttā na iccheyyāma, kiṁ panāyyena udāyinā”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss3:1.2.1
Pali: Ye te bhikkhū appicchā …pe… te ujjhāyanti khiyyanti vipācenti—

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss3:1.2.2
Pali: “kathañhi nāma āyasmā udāyī mātugāmaṁ duṭṭhullāhi vācāhi obhāsissatī”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss3:1.2.3
Pali: Atha kho te bhikkhū āyasmantaṁ udāyiṁ anekapariyāyena vigarahitvā bhagavato etamatthaṁ ārocesuṁ. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss3:1.2.4
Pali: Atha kho bhagavā etasmiṁ nidāne etasmiṁ pakaraṇe bhikkhusaṅghaṁ sannipātāpetvā āyasmantaṁ udāyiṁ paṭipucchi—

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss3:1.2.5

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss3:1.2.6
Pali: “Saccaṁ, bhagavā”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss3:1.2.7

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss3:4.1.1
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena aññatarā itthī navarattaṁ kambalaṁ pārutā hoti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss3:4.1.2
Pali: Aññataro bhikkhu sāratto taṁ itthiṁ etadavoca—

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss3:4.1.3
Pali: “lohitaṁ kho te, bhaginī”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss3:4.1.4
Pali: Sā na paṭivijāni. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss3:4.1.5
Pali: “Āmāyya, navaratto kambalo”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss3:4.1.6
Pali: Tassa kukkuccaṁ ahosi “bhagavatā sikkhāpadaṁ paññattaṁ, kacci nu kho ahaṁ saṅghādisesaṁ āpattiṁ āpanno”ti? 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss3:4.1.7
Pali: Bhagavato etamatthaṁ ārocesi. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss3:4.1.8
Pali: “Anāpatti, bhikkhu, saṅghādisesassa; 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss3:4.1.9

Pali: Theravāda Vinaya

Pali: Mahāvibhaṅga

Pali: Saṅghādisesakaṇḍa 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss4:0.4
Pali: 4. Attakāmapāricariyasikkhāpada 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss4:1.1.1
Pali: Tena samayena buddho bhagavā sāvatthiyaṁ viharati jetavane anāthapiṇḍikassa ārāme. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss4:1.1.2
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena āyasmā udāyī sāvatthiyaṁ kulūpako hoti, bahukāni kulāni upasaṅkamati. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss4:1.1.3
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena aññatarā itthī matapatikā abhirūpā hoti dassanīyā pāsādikā. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss4:1.1.4
Pali: Atha kho āyasmā udāyī pubbaṇhasamayaṁ nivāsetvā pattacīvaramādāya yena tassā itthiyā nivesanaṁ tenupasaṅkami; upasaṅkamitvā paññatte āsane nisīdi. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss4:1.1.5
Pali: Atha kho sā itthī yenāyasmā udāyī tenupasaṅkami; upasaṅkamitvā āyasmantaṁ udāyiṁ abhivādetvā ekamantaṁ nisīdi. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss4:1.1.6
Pali: Ekamantaṁ nisinnaṁ kho taṁ itthiṁ āyasmā udāyī dhammiyā kathāya sandassesi samādapesi samuttejesi sampahaṁsesi. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss4:1.1.7
Pali: Atha kho sā itthī āyasmatā udāyinā dhammiyā kathāya sandassitā samādapitā samuttejitā sampahaṁsitā āyasmantaṁ udāyiṁ etadavoca—

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss4:1.1.8
Pali: “vadeyyātha, bhante, yena attho. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss4:1.1.9
Pali: Paṭibalā mayaṁ ayyassa dātuṁ yadidaṁ cīvarapiṇḍapātasenāsanagilānappaccayabhesajjaparikkhāran”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss4:1.1.10
Pali: “Na kho te, bhagini, amhākaṁ dullabhā yadidaṁ cīvarapiṇḍapātasenāsanagilānappaccayabhesajjaparikkhārā. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss4:1.1.11
Pali: Api ca yo amhākaṁ dullabho taṁ dehī”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss4:1.1.12
Pali: “Kiṁ, bhante”ti? 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss4:1.1.13
Pali: “Methunadhamman”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss4:1.1.14
Pali: “Attho, bhante”ti? 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss4:1.1.15
Pali: “Attho, bhaginī”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss4:1.1.16
Pali: “Ehi, bhante”ti, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss4:1.1.17
Pali: ovarakaṁ pavisitvā sāṭakaṁ nikkhipitvā mañcake uttānā nipajji. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss4:1.1.18
Pali: Atha kho āyasmā udāyī yena sā itthī tenupasaṅkami; upasaṅkamitvā—

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss4:1.1.19
Pali: “ko imaṁ vasalaṁ duggandhaṁ āmasissatī”ti, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss4:1.1.20
Pali: niṭṭhubhitvā pakkāmi. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss4:1.1.21
Pali: Atha kho sā itthī ujjhāyati khiyyati vipāceti—

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss4:1.1.22
Pali: “alajjino ime samaṇā sakyaputtiyā dussīlā musāvādino. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss4:1.1.23
Pali: Ime hi nāma dhammacārino samacārino brahmacārino saccavādino sīlavanto kalyāṇadhammā paṭijānissanti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss4:1.1.24
Pali: Natthi imesaṁ sāmaññaṁ natthi imesaṁ brahmaññaṁ, naṭṭhaṁ imesaṁ sāmaññaṁ naṭṭhaṁ imesaṁ brahmaññaṁ, kuto imesaṁ sāmaññaṁ kuto imesaṁ brahmaññaṁ, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss4:1.1.25
Pali: apagatā ime sāmaññā apagatā ime brahmaññā. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss4:1.1.26
Pali: Kathañhi nāma samaṇo udāyī maṁ sāmaṁ methunadhammaṁ yācitvā, ‘ko imaṁ vasalaṁ duggandhaṁ āmasissatī’ti niṭṭhubhitvā pakkamissati. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss4:1.1.27
Pali: Kiṁ me pāpakaṁ kiṁ me duggandhaṁ, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss4:1.1.28
Pali: kassāhaṁ kena hāyāmī”ti? 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss4:1.2.1
Pali: Aññāpi itthiyo ujjhāyanti khiyyanti vipācenti—

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss4:1.2.2

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss4:1.2.4
Pali: Kiṁ imissā pāpakaṁ kiṁ imissā duggandhaṁ, kassāyaṁ kena hāyatī”ti? 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss4:1.2.5
Pali: Assosuṁ kho bhikkhū tāsaṁ itthīnaṁ ujjhāyantīnaṁ khiyyantīnaṁ vipācentīnaṁ. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss4:1.2.6
Pali: Ye te bhikkhū appicchā …pe… te ujjhāyanti khiyyanti vipācenti—

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss4:1.2.7
Pali: “kathañhi nāma āyasmā udāyī mātugāmassa santike attakāmapāricariyāya vaṇṇaṁ bhāsissatī”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss4:1.2.8
Pali: Atha kho te bhikkhū āyasmantaṁ udāyiṁ anekapariyāyena vigarahitvā bhagavato etamatthaṁ ārocesuṁ. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss4:1.2.9
Pali: Atha kho bhagavā etasmiṁ nidāne etasmiṁ pakaraṇe bhikkhusaṅghaṁ sannipātāpetvā āyasmantaṁ udāyiṁ paṭipucchi—

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss4:1.2.10
Pali: “saccaṁ kira tvaṁ, udāyi, mātugāmassa santike attakāmapāricariyāya vaṇṇaṁ bhāsasī”ti? 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss4:1.2.11
Pali: “Saccaṁ, bhagavā”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss4:1.2.12
Pali: Vigarahi buddho bhagavā—

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss4:1.2.13
Pali: “ananucchavikaṁ, moghapurisa, ananulomikaṁ appatirūpaṁ assāmaṇakaṁ akappiyaṁ akaraṇīyaṁ. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss4:1.2.14
Pali: Kathañhi nāma tvaṁ, moghapurisa, mātugāmassa santike attakāmapāricariyāya vaṇṇaṁ bhāsissasi. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss4:1.2.15

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss4:1.2.16

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss4:1.2.17

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss4:1.2.18

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss4:1.2.19.1

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss5:0.4
Pali: 5. Sañcarittasikkhāpada 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss5:1.1.1
Pali: Tena samayena buddho bhagavā sāvatthiyaṁ viharati jetavane anāthapiṇḍikassa ārāme. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss5:1.1.2
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena āyasmā udāyī sāvatthiyaṁ kulūpako hoti. Bahukāni kulāni upasaṅkamati. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss5:1.1.3
Pali: Yattha passati kumārakaṁ vā apajāpatikaṁ, kumārikaṁ vā apatikaṁ, kumārakassa mātāpitūnaṁ santike kumārikāya vaṇṇaṁ bhaṇati—

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss5:1.1.4
Pali: “amukassa kulassa kumārikā abhirūpā dassanīyā pāsādikā paṇḍitā byattā medhāvinī dakkhā analasā. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss5:1.1.5
Pali: Channā sā kumārikā imassa kumārakassā”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss5:1.1.6
Pali: Te evaṁ vadanti—

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss5:1.1.7
Pali: “ete kho, bhante, amhe na jānanti—‘ke vā ime kassa vā’ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss5:1.1.8
Pali: Sace, bhante, ayyo dāpeyya āneyyāma mayaṁ taṁ kumārikaṁ imassa kumārakassā”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss5:1.1.9
Pali: Kumārikāya mātāpitūnaṁ santike kumārakassa vaṇṇaṁ bhaṇati—

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss5:1.1.10
Pali: “amukassa kulassa kumārako abhirūpo dassanīyo pāsādiko paṇḍito byatto medhāvī dakkho analaso. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss5:1.1.11
Pali: Channāyaṁ kumārikā tassa kumārakassā”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss5:1.1.12
Pali: Te evaṁ vadanti—

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss5:1.1.13
Pali: “ete kho, bhante, amhe na jānanti—‘ke vā ime kassa vā’ti, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss5:1.1.14
Pali: kismiṁ viya kumārikāya vattuṁ. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss5:1.1.15
Pali: Sace, bhante, ayyo yācāpeyya dajjeyyāma mayaṁ imaṁ kumārikaṁ tassa kumārakassā”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss5:1.1.16
Pali: Eteneva upāyena āvāhānipi kārāpeti, vivāhānipi kārāpeti, vāreyyānipi kārāpeti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss5:1.2.1
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena aññatarissā purāṇagaṇakiyā dhītā abhirūpā hoti dassanīyā pāsādikā. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss5:1.2.2
Pali: Tirogāmakā ājīvakasāvakā āgantvā taṁ gaṇakiṁ etadavocuṁ—

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss5:1.2.3
Pali: “dehāyye, imaṁ kumārikaṁ amhākaṁ kumārakassā”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss5:1.2.4
Pali: Sā evamāha—“ahaṁ khvayyo, tumhe na jānāmi—‘ke vā ime kassa vā’ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss5:1.2.5
Pali: Ayañca me ekadhītikā, tirogāmo ca gantabbo, nāhaṁ dassāmī”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss5:1.2.6
Pali: Manussā te ājīvakasāvake etadavocuṁ—

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss5:1.2.7
Pali: “kissa tumhe, ayyo, āgatatthā”ti? 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss5:1.2.8
Pali: “Idha mayaṁ, ayyo, amukaṁ nāma gaṇakiṁ dhītaraṁ yācimhā amhākaṁ kumārakassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss5:1.2.9
Pali: Sā evamāha—‘ahaṁ khvayyo, tumhe na jānāmi—ke vā ime kassa vā’ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss5:1.2.10
Pali: Ayañca me ekadhītikā, tirogāmo ca gantabbo, nāhaṁ dassāmī”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss5:1.2.11
Pali: “Kissa tumhe, ayyo, taṁ gaṇakiṁ dhītaraṁ yācittha? 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss5:1.2.12
Pali: Nanu ayyo udāyī vattabbo. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss5:1.2.13
Pali: Ayyo udāyī dāpessatī”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss5:1.2.14
Pali: Atha kho te ājīvakasāvakā yenāyasmā udāyī tenupasaṅkamiṁsu; upasaṅkamitvā āyasmantaṁ udāyiṁ etadavocuṁ—

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss5:1.2.15
Pali: “idha mayaṁ, bhante, amukaṁ nāma gaṇakiṁ dhītaraṁ yācimhā amhākaṁ kumārakassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss5:1.2.16
Pali: Sā evamāha—‘ahaṁ khvayyo, tumhe na jānāmi—ke vā ime kassa vāti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss5:1.2.17
Pali: Ayañca me ekadhītikā, tirogāmo ca gantabbo, nāhaṁ dassāmī’ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss5:1.2.18
Pali: Sādhu, bhante, ayyo taṁ gaṇakiṁ dhītaraṁ dāpetu amhākaṁ kumārakassā”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss5:1.2.19
Pali: Atha kho āyasmā udāyī yena sā gaṇakī tenupasaṅkami; upasaṅkamitvā taṁ gaṇakiṁ etadavoca—

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss5:1.2.20
Pali: “kissimesaṁ dhītaraṁ na desī”ti? 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss5:1.2.21
Pali: “Ahaṁ khvayya, ime na jānāmi—‘ke vā ime kassa vā’ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss5:1.2.22
Pali: Ayañca me ekadhītikā, tirogāmo ca gantabbo, nāhaṁ dassāmī”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss5:1.2.23
Pali: “Dehimesaṁ. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss5:1.2.24
Pali: Ahaṁ ime jānāmī”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss5:1.2.25
Pali: “Sace, bhante, ayyo jānāti, dassāmī”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss5:1.3.1
Pali: Atha kho sā gaṇakī tesaṁ ājīvakasāvakānaṁ dhītaraṁ adāsi. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss5:1.3.2
Pali: Atha kho te ājīvakasāvakā taṁ kumārikaṁ netvā māsaṁyeva suṇisabhogena bhuñjiṁsu. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss5:1.3.3
Pali: Tato aparena dāsibhogena bhuñjanti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss5:1.3.4
Pali: Atha kho sā kumārikā mātuyā santike dūtaṁ pāhesi—

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss5:1.3.5
Pali: “ahañhi duggatā dukkhitā, na sukhaṁ labhāmi. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss5:1.3.6
Pali: Māsaṁyeva maṁ suṇisabhogena bhuñjiṁsu. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss5:1.3.7
Pali: Tato aparena dāsibhogena bhuñjanti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss5:1.3.8
Pali: Āgacchatu me, mātā, maṁ nessatū”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss5:1.3.9
Pali: Atha kho sā gaṇakī yena te ājīvakasāvakā tenupasaṅkami; upasaṅkamitvā te ājīvakasāvake etadavoca—

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss5:1.3.10
Pali: “māyyo, imaṁ kumārikaṁ dāsibhogena bhuñjittha. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss5:1.3.11
Pali: Suṇisabhogena imaṁ kumārikaṁ bhuñjathā”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss5:1.3.12
Pali: Te evamāhaṁsu—

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss5:1.3.13
Pali: “natthamhākaṁ tayā saddhiṁ āhārūpahāro, samaṇena saddhiṁ amhākaṁ āhārūpahāro, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss5:1.3.14
Pali: gaccha tvaṁ, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss5:1.3.15
Pali: na mayaṁ taṁ jānāmā”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss5:1.3.16
Pali: Atha kho sā gaṇakī tehi ājīvakasāvakehi apasāditā punadeva sāvatthiṁ paccāgañchi. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss5:1.3.17
Pali: Dutiyampi kho sā kumārikā mātuyā santike dūtaṁ pāhesi—

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss5:1.3.18
Pali: “ahañhi duggatā dukkhitā, na sukhaṁ labhāmi. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss5:1.3.19
Pali: Māsaṁyeva maṁ suṇisabhogena bhuñjiṁsu. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss5:1.3.20
Pali: Tato aparena dāsibhogena bhuñjanti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss5:1.3.21
Pali: Āgacchatu me, mātā, maṁ nessatū”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss5:1.3.22
Pali: Atha kho sā gaṇakī yenāyasmā udāyī tenupasaṅkami; upasaṅkamitvā āyasmantaṁ udāyiṁ etadavoca—

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss5:1.3.23
Pali: “sā kira, bhante, kumārikā duggatā dukkhitā, na sukhaṁ labhati. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss5:1.3.24
Pali: Māsaṁyeva naṁ suṇisabhogena bhuñjiṁsu. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss5:1.3.25
Pali: Tato aparena dāsibhogena bhuñjanti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss5:1.3.26
Pali: Vadeyyātha, bhante—

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss5:1.3.27
Pali: ‘māyyo, imaṁ kumārikaṁ dāsibhogena bhuñjittha. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss5:1.3.28
Pali: Suṇisabhogena imaṁ kumārikaṁ bhuñjathā’”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss5:1.3.29
Pali: Atha kho āyasmā udāyī yena te ājīvakasāvakā tenupasaṅkami; upasaṅkamitvā te ājīvakasāvake etadavoca—

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss5:1.3.30
Pali: “māyyo, imaṁ kumārikaṁ dāsibhogena bhujjittha. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss5:1.3.31
Pali: Suṇisabhogena imaṁ kumārikaṁ bhuñjathā”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss5:1.3.32
Pali: Te evamāhaṁsu—

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss5:1.3.33
Pali: “natthamhākaṁ tayā saddhiṁ āhārūpahāro, gaṇakiyā saddhiṁ amhākaṁ āhārūpahāro. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss5:1.3.34
Pali: Samaṇena bhavitabbaṁ abyāvaṭena. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss5:1.3.35
Pali: Samaṇo assa susamaṇo, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss5:1.3.36
Pali: gaccha tvaṁ, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss5:1.3.37
Pali: na mayaṁ taṁ jānāmā”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss5:1.3.38
Pali: Atha kho āyasmā udāyī tehi ājīvakasāvakehi apasādito punadeva sāvatthiṁ paccāgañchi. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss5:1.3.39
Pali: Tatiyampi kho sā kumārikā mātuyā santike dūtaṁ pāhesi—

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss5:1.3.40
Pali: “ahañhi duggatā dukkhitā, na sukhaṁ labhāmi. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss5:1.3.41
Pali: Māsaṁyeva maṁ suṇisabhogena bhuñjiṁsu. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss5:1.3.42
Pali: Tato aparena dāsibhogena bhuñjanti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss5:1.3.43
Pali: Āgacchatu me, mātā, maṁ nessatū”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss5:1.3.44
Pali: Dutiyampi kho sā gaṇakī yenāyasmā udāyī tenupasaṅkami; upasaṅkamitvā āyasmantaṁ udāyiṁ etadavoca—

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss5:1.3.45
Pali: “sā kira, bhante, kumārikā duggatā dukkhitā, na sukhaṁ labhati. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss5:1.3.46
Pali: Māsaṁyeva naṁ suṇisabhogena bhuñjiṁsu. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss5:1.3.47
Pali: Tato aparena dāsibhogena bhuñjanti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss5:1.3.48
Pali: Vadeyyātha, bhante—

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss5:1.3.49
Pali: ‘māyyo, imaṁ kumārikaṁ dāsibhogena bhuñjittha, suṇisabhogena imaṁ kumārikaṁ bhuñjathā’”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss5:1.3.50
Pali: “Paṭhamampāhaṁ tehi ājīvakasāvakehi apasādito, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss5:1.3.51
Pali: gaccha tvaṁ, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss5:1.3.52
Pali: nāhaṁ gamissāmī”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss5:1.4.1
Pali: Atha kho sā gaṇakī ujjhāyati khiyyati vipāceti—

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss5:1.4.2
Pali: “evaṁ duggato hotu ayyo udāyī, evaṁ dukkhito hotu ayyo udāyī, evaṁ mā sukhaṁ labhatu ayyo udāyī, yathā me kumārikā duggatā dukkhitā na sukhaṁ labhati pāpikāya sassuyā pāpakena sasurena pāpakena sāmikenā”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss5:1.4.3
Pali: Sāpi kho kumārikā ujjhāyati khiyyati vipāceti—

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss5:1.4.4
Pali: “evaṁ duggato hotu ayyo udāyī, evaṁ dukkhito hotu ayyo udāyī, evaṁ mā sukhaṁ labhatu ayyo udāyī, yathāhaṁ duggatā dukkhitā na sukhaṁ labhāmi pāpikāya sassuyā pāpakena sasurena pāpakena sāmikenā”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss5:1.4.5
Pali: Aññāpi itthiyo asantuṭṭhā sassūhi vā sasurehi vā sāmikehi vā, tā evaṁ oyācanti—

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss5:1.4.6
Pali: “evaṁ duggato hotu ayyo udāyī, evaṁ dukkhito hotu ayyo udāyī, evaṁ mā sukhaṁ labhatu ayyo udāyī, yathā mayaṁ duggatā dukkhitā na sukhaṁ labhāma pāpikāhi sassūhi pāpakehi sasurehi pāpakehi sāmikehī”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss5:1.4.7
Pali: Yā pana tā itthiyo santuṭṭhā sassūhi vā sasurehi vā sāmikehi vā tā evaṁ āyācanti—

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss5:1.4.8
Pali: “evaṁ sukhito hotu ayyo udāyī, evaṁ sajjito hotu ayyo udāyī, evaṁ sukhamedho hotu ayyo udāyī, yathā mayaṁ sukhitā sajjitā sukhamedhā bhaddikāhi sassūhi bhaddakehi sasurehi bhaddakehi sāmikehī”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss5:1.5.1
Pali: Assosuṁ kho bhikkhū ekaccānaṁ itthīnaṁ oyācantīnaṁ ekaccānaṁ itthīnaṁ āyācantīnaṁ. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss5:1.5.2
Pali: Ye te bhikkhū appicchā …pe… te ujjhāyanti khiyyanti vipācenti—

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss5:1.5.3
Pali: “kathañhi nāma āyasmā udāyī sañcarittaṁ samāpajjissatī”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss5:1.5.4
Pali: Atha kho te bhikkhū āyasmantaṁ udāyiṁ anekapariyāyena vigarahitvā bhagavato etamatthaṁ ārocesuṁ. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss5:1.5.5
Pali: Atha kho bhagavā etasmiṁ nidāne etasmiṁ pakaraṇe bhikkhusaṅghaṁ sannipātāpetvā āyasmantaṁ udāyiṁ paṭipucchi—

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss5:1.5.6
Pali: “saccaṁ kira tvaṁ, udāyi, sañcarittaṁ samāpajjasī”ti? 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss5:1.5.7
Pali: “Saccaṁ, bhagavā”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss5:1.5.8
Pali: Vigarahi buddho bhagavā …pe… 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss5:1.5.9
Pali: kathañhi nāma tvaṁ, moghapurisa, sañcarittaṁ samāpajjissasi. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss5:1.5.10
Pali: Netaṁ, moghapurisa, appasannānaṁ vā pasādāya …pe… 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss5:1.5.11
Pali: evañca pana, bhikkhave, imaṁ sikkhāpadaṁ uddiseyyātha—

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss5:1.5.12.1
Pali: “Yo pana bhikkhu sañcarittaṁ samāpajjeyya, itthiyā vā purisamatiṁ purisassa vā itthimatiṁ, jāyattane vā jārattane vā, saṅghādiseso”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss5:1.5.13
Pali: Evañcidaṁ bhagavatā bhikkhūnaṁ sikkhāpadaṁ paññattaṁ hoti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss5:2.1.1
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena sambahulā dhuttā uyyāne paricārentā aññatarissā vesiyā santike dūtaṁ pāhesuṁ—

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss5:2.1.2
Pali: “āgacchatu uyyāne paricāressāmā”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss5:2.1.3
Pali: Sā evamāha—

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss5:2.1.4
Pali: “ahaṁ khvayyo, tumhe na jānāmi—‘ke vā ime kassa vā’ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss5:2.1.5
Pali: Ahañcamhi bahubhaṇḍā bahuparikkhārā, bahinagarañca gantabbaṁ. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss5:2.1.6
Pali: Nāhaṁ gamissāmī”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss5:2.1.7
Pali: Atha kho so dūto tesaṁ dhuttānaṁ etamatthaṁ ārocesi. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss5:2.1.8
Pali: Evaṁ vutte, aññataro puriso te dhutte etadavoca—

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss5:2.1.9
Pali: “kissa tumhe, ayyo, etaṁ vesiṁ yācittha? 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss5:2.1.10
Pali: Nanu ayyo udāyī vattabbo. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss5:2.1.11
Pali: Ayyo udāyī uyyojessatī”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss5:2.1.12
Pali: Evaṁ vutte, aññataro upāsako taṁ purisaṁ etadavoca—

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss5:2.1.13
Pali: “māyyo, evaṁ avaca. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss5:2.1.14
Pali: Na kappati samaṇānaṁ sakyaputtiyānaṁ evarūpaṁ kātuṁ. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss5:2.1.15
Pali: Nāyyo udāyī evaṁ karissatī”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss5:2.1.16
Pali: Evaṁ vutte, “karissati na karissatī”ti abbhutamakaṁsu. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss5:2.1.17
Pali: Atha kho te dhuttā yenāyasmā udāyī tenupasaṅkamiṁsu; upasaṅkamitvā āyasmantaṁ udāyiṁ etadavocuṁ—

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss5:2.1.18
Pali: “idha mayaṁ, bhante, uyyāne paricārentā asukāya nāma vesiyā santike dūtaṁ pahiṇimhā—

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss5:2.1.19
Pali: ‘āgacchatu uyyāne paricāressāmā’ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss5:2.1.20
Pali: Sā evamāha—‘ahaṁ khvayyo, tumhe na jānāmi—ke vā ime kassa vāti, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss5:2.1.21
Pali: ahañcamhi bahubhaṇḍā bahuparikkhārā, bahinagarañca gantabbaṁ. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss5:2.1.22
Pali: Nāhaṁ gamissāmī’ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss5:2.1.23
Pali: Sādhu, bhante, ayyo taṁ vesiṁ uyyojetū”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss5:2.1.24
Pali: Atha kho āyasmā udāyī yena sā vesī tenupasaṅkami; upasaṅkamitvā taṁ vesiṁ etadavoca—

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss5:2.1.25
Pali: “kissimesaṁ na gacchasī”ti? 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss5:2.1.26
Pali: “Ahaṁ khvayya, ime na jānāmi—‘ke vā ime kassa vā’ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss5:2.1.27
Pali: Ahañcamhi bahubhaṇḍā bahuparikkhārā, bahinagarañca gantabbaṁ. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss5:2.1.28
Pali: Nāhaṁ gamissāmī”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss5:2.1.29
Pali: “Gacchimesaṁ. Ahaṁ ime jānāmī”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss5:2.1.30
Pali: “Sace, bhante, ayyo jānāti ahaṁ gamissāmī”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss5:2.1.31
Pali: Atha kho te dhuttā taṁ vesiṁ ādāya uyyānaṁ agamaṁsu. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss5:2.2.1
Pali: Atha kho so upāsako ujjhāyati khiyyati vipāceti—

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss5:2.2.2
Pali: “kathañhi nāma ayyo udāyī taṅkhaṇikaṁ sañcarittaṁ samāpajjissatī”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss5:2.2.3
Pali: Assosuṁ kho bhikkhū tassa upāsakassa ujjhāyantassa khiyyantassa vipācentassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss5:2.2.4
Pali: Ye te bhikkhū appicchā …pe… te ujjhāyanti khiyyanti vipācenti—

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss5:2.2.5
Pali: “kathañhi nāma āyasmā udāyī taṅkhaṇikaṁ sañcarittaṁ samāpajjissatī”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss5:2.2.6
Pali: Atha kho te bhikkhū āyasmantaṁ udāyiṁ anekapariyāyena vigarahitvā bhagavato etamatthaṁ ārocesuṁ …pe… 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss5:2.2.7
Pali: “saccaṁ kira tvaṁ, udāyi, taṅkhaṇikaṁ sañcarittaṁ samāpajjasī”ti? 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss5:2.2.8
Pali: “Saccaṁ, bhagavā”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss5:2.2.9
Pali: Vigarahi buddho bhagavā …pe… 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss5:2.2.10
Pali: kathañhi nāma tvaṁ, moghapurisa, taṅkhaṇikaṁ sañcarittaṁ samāpajjissasi? 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss5:2.2.11
Pali: Netaṁ, moghapurisa, appasannānaṁ vā pasādāya …pe… 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss5:2.2.12
Pali: evañca pana, bhikkhave, imaṁ sikkhāpadaṁ uddiseyyātha—

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss5:2.2.13.1
Pali: “Yo pana bhikkhu sañcarittaṁ samāpajjeyya, itthiyā vā purisamatiṁ purisassa vā itthimatiṁ, jāyattane vā jārattane vā, antamaso taṅkhaṇikāyapi, saṅghādiseso”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss5:3.1
Pali: Yo panāti 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss5:3.2
Pali: yo yādiso …pe… 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss5:3.3
Pali: bhikkhūti 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss5:3.4
Pali: …pe… ayaṁ imasmiṁ atthe adhippeto bhikkhūti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss5:3.5
Pali: Sañcarittaṁ samāpajjeyyāti 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss5:3.6
Pali: itthiyā vā pahito purisassa santike gacchati, purisena vā pahito itthiyā santike gacchati. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss5:3.7
Pali: Itthiyā vā purisamatinti 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss5:3.8
Pali: purisassa matiṁ itthiyā āroceti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss5:3.9
Pali: Purisassa vā itthimatinti 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss5:3.10
Pali: itthiyā matiṁ purisassa āroceti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss5:3.11
Pali: Jāyattane vāti 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss5:3.12
Pali: jāyā bhavissasi. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss5:3.13
Pali: Jārattane vāti 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss5:3.14

Pali: Saṅghādisesoti 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss5:3.18

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss5:4.1.1
Pali: Dasa itthiyo— māturakkhitā piturakkhitā mātāpiturakkhitā bhāturakkhitā bhaginirakkhitā ñātirakkhitā gottarakkhitā dhammarakkhitā sārakkhā saparidaṇḍā. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss5:4.1.2
Pali: Dasa bhariyāyo— dhanakkītā chandavāsinī bhogavāsinī paṭavāsinī odapattakinī obhaṭacumbaṭā dāsī ca bhariyā ca kammakārī ca bhariyā ca dhajāhaṭā muhuttikā. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss5:4.2.1
Pali: Māturakkhitā nāma 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss5:4.2.2
Pali: mātā rakkhati gopeti issariyaṁ kāreti vasaṁ vatteti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss5:4.2.3
Pali: Piturakkhitā nāma 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss5:4.2.4
Pali: pitā rakkhati gopeti issariyaṁ kāreti vasaṁ vatteti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss5:4.2.5
Pali: Mātāpiturakkhitā nāma 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss5:4.2.6
Pali: mātāpitaro rakkhanti gopenti issariyaṁ kārenti vasaṁ vattenti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss5:4.2.7
Pali: Bhāturakkhitā nāma 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss5:4.2.8
Pali: bhātā rakkhati gopeti issariyaṁ kāreti vasaṁ vatteti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss5:4.2.9
Pali: Bhaginirakkhitā nāma 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss5:4.2.10
Pali: bhaginī rakkhati gopeti issariyaṁ kāreti vasaṁ vatteti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss5:4.2.11
Pali: Ñātirakkhitā nāma 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss5:4.2.12
Pali: ñātakā rakkhanti gopenti issariyaṁ kārenti vasaṁ vattenti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss5:4.2.13
Pali: Gottarakkhitā nāma 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss5:4.2.14
Pali: sagottā rakkhanti gopenti issariyaṁ kārenti vasaṁ vattenti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss5:4.2.15
Pali: Dhammarakkhitā nāma 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss5:4.2.16
Pali: sahadhammikā rakkhanti gopenti issariyaṁ kārenti vasaṁ vattenti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss5:4.2.17
Pali: Sārakkhā nāma 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss5:4.2.18
Pali: gabbhepi pariggahitā hoti— mayhaṁ esāti. Antamaso mālāguḷaparikkhittāpi. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss5:4.2.19
Pali: Saparidaṇḍā nāma 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss5:4.2.20
Pali: kehici daṇḍo ṭhapito hoti—yo itthannāmaṁ itthiṁ gacchati ettako daṇḍoti.

Pali: Dhanakkītā nāma 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss5:4.3.2

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss5:4.3.3
Pali: Chandavāsinī nāma 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss5:4.3.4

Pali: Paṭiggaṇhāti vīmaṁsati paccāharati, āpatti saṅghādisesassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss5:4.11.80

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss5:4.13.1

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss5:4.15.1

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss5:4.15.4

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss5:4.16.1
Pali: Anāpatti—

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss5:4.16.2

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss5:4.16.3
Pali: ummattakassa, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss5:4.16.4
Pali: ādikammikassāti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss5:4.16.5
Pali: 5.1. Vinītavatthuuddānagāthā 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss5:4.16.6
Pali: Suttā matā ca nikkhantā, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss5:4.16.7
Pali: anitthī itthipaṇḍakā; 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss5:4.16.8
Pali: Kalahaṁ katvāna sammodi, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss5:4.16.9
Pali: sañcarittañca paṇḍaketi. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss5:5.1.0
Pali: 5.2. Vinītavatthu 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss5:5.1.1
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena aññataro puriso aññataraṁ bhikkhuṁ āṇāpesi—

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss5:5.1.2
Pali: “gaccha, bhante, itthannāmaṁ itthiṁ vīmaṁsā”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss5:5.1.3
Pali: So gantvā manusse pucchi—

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss5:5.1.4
Pali: “kahaṁ itthannāmā”ti? 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss5:5.1.5
Pali: “Suttā, bhante”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss5:5.1.6
Pali: Tassa kukkuccaṁ ahosi—

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss5:5.1.7
Pali: “bhagavatā sikkhāpadaṁ paññattaṁ, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss5:5.1.8
Pali: kacci nu kho ahaṁ saṅghādisesaṁ āpattiṁ āpanno”ti? 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss5:5.1.9
Pali: Bhagavato etamatthaṁ ārocesi—

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss5:5.1.10
Pali: “Anāpatti, bhikkhu, saṅghādisesassa; 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss5:5.1.11
Pali: āpatti dukkaṭassā”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss5:5.2.1
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena aññataro puriso aññataraṁ bhikkhuṁ āṇāpesi—

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss5:5.2.2
Pali: “gaccha, bhante, itthannāmaṁ itthiṁ vīmaṁsā”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss5:5.2.3
Pali: So gantvā manusse pucchi—

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss5:5.2.4
Pali: “kahaṁ itthannāmā”ti? 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss5:5.2.5
Pali: “Matā, bhante”ti …pe… 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss5:5.2.6
Pali: “nikkhantā, bhante”ti … 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss5:5.2.7
Pali: “anitthī, bhante”ti … 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss5:5.2.8
Pali: “itthipaṇḍakā, bhante”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss5:5.2.9
Pali: Tassa kukkuccaṁ ahosi …pe… 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss5:5.2.10
Pali: “anāpatti, bhikkhu, saṅghādisesassa; 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss5:5.2.11
Pali: āpatti dukkaṭassā”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss5:5.3.1
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena aññatarā itthī sāmikena saha bhaṇḍitvā mātugharaṁ agamāsi. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss5:5.3.2
Pali: Kulūpako bhikkhu sammodanīyaṁ akāsi. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss5:5.3.3
Pali: Tassa kukkuccaṁ ahosi …pe… 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss5:5.3.4
Pali: “alaṁvacanīyā, bhikkhū”ti? 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss5:5.3.5
Pali: “Nālaṁvacanīyā, bhagavā”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss5:5.3.6
Pali: “Anāpatti, bhikkhu, nālaṁvacanīyāyā”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss5:5.4.1
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena aññataro bhikkhu paṇḍake sañcarittaṁ samāpajji. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss5:5.4.2
Pali: Tassa kukkuccaṁ ahosi …pe… 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss5:5.4.3
Pali: “anāpatti, bhikkhu, saṅghādisesassa; 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss5:5.4.4
Pali: āpatti thullaccayassā”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss5:5.4.5
Pali: Sañcarittasikkhāpadaṁ niṭṭhitaṁ pañcamaṁ.

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss6:0.4
Pali: 6. Kuṭikārasikkhāpada 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss6:1.1.1
Pali: Tena samayena buddho bhagavā rājagahe viharati veḷuvane kalandakanivāpe. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss6:1.1.2
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena āḷavakā bhikkhū saññācikāyo kuṭiyo kārāpenti assāmikāyo attuddesikāyo appamāṇikāyo. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss6:1.1.3
Pali: Tāyo na niṭṭhānaṁ gacchanti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss6:1.1.4
Pali: Te yācanabahulā viññattibahulā viharanti—

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss6:1.1.5
Pali: “purisaṁ detha, purisatthakaraṁ detha, goṇaṁ detha, sakaṭaṁ detha, vāsiṁ detha, parasuṁ detha, kuṭhāriṁ detha, kudālaṁ detha, nikhādanaṁ detha, valliṁ detha, veḷuṁ detha, muñjaṁ detha, pabbajaṁ detha, tiṇaṁ detha, mattikaṁ dethā”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss6:1.1.6
Pali: Manussā upaddutā yācanāya upaddutā viññattiyā bhikkhū disvā ubbijjantipi uttasantipi palāyantipi aññenapi gacchanti aññenapi mukhaṁ karonti dvārampi thakenti, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss6:1.1.7
Pali: gāvimpi disvā palāyanti bhikkhūti maññamānā. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss6:1.1.8
Pali: Atha kho āyasmā mahākassapo rājagahe vassaṁvuṭṭho yena āḷavī tena pakkāmi. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss6:1.1.9
Pali: Anupubbena yena āḷavī tadavasari. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss6:1.1.10
Pali: Tatra sudaṁ āyasmā mahākassapo āḷaviyaṁ viharati aggāḷave cetiye. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss6:1.1.11
Pali: Atha kho āyasmā mahākassapo pubbaṇhasamayaṁ nivāsetvā pattacīvaramādāya āḷaviṁ piṇḍāya pāvisi. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss6:1.1.12
Pali: Manussā āyasmantaṁ mahākassapaṁ passitvā ubbijjantipi uttasantipi palāyantipi aññenapi gacchanti aññenapi mukhaṁ karonti dvārampi thakenti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss6:1.1.13
Pali: Atha kho āyasmā mahākassapo āḷaviyaṁ piṇḍāya caritvā pacchābhattaṁ piṇḍapātapaṭikkanto bhikkhū āmantesi—

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss6:1.1.14
Pali: “pubbāyaṁ, āvuso, āḷavī subhikkhā ahosi sulabhapiṇḍā sukarā uñchena paggahena yāpetuṁ; 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss6:1.1.15
Pali: etarahi panāyaṁ āḷavī dubbhikkhā dullabhapiṇḍā, na sukarā uñchena paggahena yāpetuṁ. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss6:1.1.16
Pali: Ko nu kho, āvuso, hetu ko paccayo, yenāyaṁ āḷavī dubbhikkhā dullabhapiṇḍā, na sukarā uñchena paggahena yāpetun”ti? 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss6:1.1.17
Pali: Atha kho te bhikkhū āyasmato mahākassapassa etamatthaṁ ārocesuṁ. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss6:1.2.1
Pali: Atha kho bhagavā rājagahe yathābhirantaṁ viharitvā yena āḷavī tena cārikaṁ pakkāmi. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss6:1.2.2
Pali: Anupubbena cārikaṁ caramāno yena āḷavī tadavasari. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss6:1.2.3
Pali: Tatra sudaṁ bhagavā āḷaviyaṁ viharati aggāḷave cetiye. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss6:1.2.4
Pali: Atha kho āyasmā mahākassapo yena bhagavā tenupasaṅkami; upasaṅkamitvā bhagavantaṁ abhivādetvā ekamantaṁ nisīdi. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss6:1.2.5
Pali: Ekamantaṁ nisinno kho āyasmā mahākassapo bhagavato etamatthaṁ ārocesi. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss6:1.2.6
Pali: Atha kho bhagavā etasmiṁ nidāne etasmiṁ pakaraṇe bhikkhusaṅghaṁ sannipātāpetvā āḷavake bhikkhū paṭipucchi—

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss6:1.2.7
Pali: “saccaṁ kira tumhe, bhikkhave, saññācikāyo kuṭiyo kārāpetha assāmikāyo attuddesikāyo appamāṇikāyo. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss6:1.2.8
Pali: Tāyo na niṭṭhānaṁ gacchanti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss6:1.2.9
Pali: Te tumhe yācanabahulā viññattibahulā viharatha—

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss6:1.2.10
Pali: ‘purisaṁ detha purisatthakaraṁ detha …pe… tiṇaṁ detha mattikaṁ dethā’ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss6:1.2.11
Pali: Manussā upaddutā yācanāya upaddutā viññattiyā bhikkhū disvā ubbijjantipi uttasantipi palāyantipi aññenapi gacchanti aññenapi mukhaṁ karonti dvārampi thakenti, gāvimpi disvā palāyanti bhikkhūti maññamānā”ti? 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss6:1.2.12
Pali: “Saccaṁ, bhagavā”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss6:1.2.13
Pali: Vigarahi buddho bhagavā …pe… 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss6:1.2.14
Pali: kathañhi nāma tumhe, moghapurisā, saṁyācikāyo kuṭiyo kārāpessatha assāmikāyo attuddesikāyo appamāṇikāyo. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss6:1.2.15
Pali: Tāyo na niṭṭhānaṁ gacchanti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss6:1.2.16
Pali: Te tumhe yācanabahulā viññattibahulā viharissatha—

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss6:1.2.17
Pali: “purisaṁ detha purisatthakaraṁ detha …pe… tiṇaṁ detha mattikaṁ dethā”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss6:1.2.18
Pali: Netaṁ moghapurisā, appasannānaṁ vā pasādāya …pe… 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss6:1.2.19
Pali: vigarahitvā dhammiṁ kathaṁ katvā bhikkhū āmantesi—

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss6:1.3.1
Pali: “Bhūtapubbaṁ, bhikkhave, dve bhātaro isayo gaṅgaṁ nadiṁ upanissāya vihariṁsu. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss6:1.3.2
Pali: Atha kho, bhikkhave, maṇikaṇṭho nāgarājā gaṅgaṁ nadiṁ uttaritvā yena kaniṭṭho isi tenupasaṅkami; upasaṅkamitvā kaniṭṭhaṁ isiṁ sattakkhattuṁ bhogehi parikkhipitvā uparimuddhani mahantaṁ phaṇaṁ karitvā aṭṭhāsi. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss6:1.3.3
Pali: Atha kho, bhikkhave, kaniṭṭho isi tassa nāgassa bhayā kiso ahosi lūkho dubbaṇṇo uppaṇḍuppaṇḍukajāto dhamanisanthatagatto. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss6:1.3.4
Pali: Addasa kho, bhikkhave, jeṭṭho isi kaniṭṭhaṁ isiṁ kisaṁ lūkhaṁ dubbaṇṇaṁ uppaṇḍuppaṇḍukajātaṁ dhamanisanthatagattaṁ. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss6:1.3.5
Pali: Disvāna kaniṭṭhaṁ isiṁ etadavoca—

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss6:1.3.6
Pali: ‘kissa tvaṁ, bho, kiso lūkho dubbaṇṇo uppaṇḍuppaṇḍukajāto dhamanisanthatagatto’ti? 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss6:1.3.7
Pali: ‘Idha, bho, maṇikaṇṭho nāgarājā gaṅgaṁ nadiṁ uttaritvā yenāhaṁ tenupasaṅkami; upasaṅkamitvā maṁ sattakkhattuṁ bhogehi parikkhipitvā uparimuddhani mahantaṁ phaṇaṁ karitvā aṭṭhāsi. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss6:1.3.8
Pali: Tassāhaṁ, bho, nāgassa bhayā kiso lūkho dubbaṇṇo uppaṇḍuppaṇḍukajāto dhamanisanthatagatto’ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss6:1.3.9
Pali: ‘Icchasi pana tvaṁ, bho, tassa nāgassa anāgamanan’ti? 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss6:1.3.10
Pali: ‘Icchāmahaṁ, bho, tassa nāgassa anāgamanan’ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss6:1.3.11
Pali: ‘Api pana tvaṁ, bho, tassa nāgassa kiñci passasī’ti? 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss6:1.3.12
Pali: ‘Passāmahaṁ, bho, maṇimassa kaṇṭhe pilandhanan’ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss6:1.3.13
Pali: ‘Tena hi tvaṁ, bho, taṁ nāgaṁ maṇiṁ yāca—

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss6:1.3.14
Pali: “maṇiṁ me, bho, dehi; 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss6:1.3.15
Pali: maṇinā me attho”’ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss6:1.3.16
Pali: Atha kho, bhikkhave, maṇikaṇṭho nāgarājā gaṅgaṁ nadiṁ uttaritvā yena kaniṭṭho isi tenupasaṅkami; upasaṅkamitvā ekamantaṁ aṭṭhāsi. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss6:1.3.17
Pali: Ekamantaṁ ṭhitaṁ kho, bhikkhave, maṇikaṇṭhaṁ nāgarājānaṁ kaniṭṭho isi etadavoca—

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss6:1.3.18
Pali: ‘maṇiṁ me, bho, dehi; 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss6:1.3.19
Pali: maṇinā me attho’ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss6:1.3.20
Pali: Atha kho, bhikkhave, maṇikaṇṭho nāgarājā—

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss6:1.3.21
Pali: ‘bhikkhu maṇiṁ yācati, bhikkhussa maṇinā attho’ti khippaññeva agamāsi. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss6:1.3.22
Pali: Dutiyampi kho, bhikkhave, maṇikaṇṭho nāgarājā gaṅgaṁ nadiṁ uttaritvā yena kaniṭṭho isi tenupasaṅkami. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss6:1.3.23
Pali: Addasa kho, bhikkhave, kaniṭṭho isi maṇikaṇṭhaṁ nāgarājānaṁ dūratova āgacchantaṁ. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss6:1.3.24
Pali: Disvāna maṇikaṇṭhaṁ nāgarājānaṁ etadavoca—

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss6:1.3.25
Pali: ‘maṇiṁ me, bho, dehi; 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss6:1.3.26
Pali: maṇinā me attho’ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss6:1.3.27
Pali: Atha kho, bhikkhave, maṇikaṇṭho nāgarājā—

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss6:1.3.28
Pali: ‘bhikkhu maṇiṁ yācati, bhikkhussa maṇinā attho’ti tatova paṭinivatti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss6:1.3.29
Pali: Tatiyampi kho, bhikkhave, maṇikaṇṭho nāgarājā gaṅgaṁ nadiṁ uttarati. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss6:1.3.30
Pali: Addasa kho, bhikkhave, kaniṭṭho isi maṇikaṇṭhaṁ nāgarājānaṁ gaṅgaṁ nadiṁ uttarantaṁ. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss6:1.3.31
Pali: Disvāna maṇikaṇṭhaṁ nāgarājānaṁ etadavoca—

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss6:1.3.32
Pali: ‘maṇiṁ me, bho, dehi; 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss6:1.3.33
Pali: maṇinā me attho’ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss6:1.3.34
Pali: Atha kho, bhikkhave, maṇikaṇṭho nāgarājā kaniṭṭhaṁ isiṁ gāthāhi ajjhabhāsi—

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss6:1.3.35
Pali: ‘Mamannapānaṁ vipulaṁ uḷāraṁ, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss6:1.3.36
Pali: Uppajjatīmassa maṇissa hetu; 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss6:1.3.37
Pali: Taṁ te na dassaṁ atiyācakosi, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss6:1.3.38
Pali: Na cāpi te assamamāgamissaṁ. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss6:1.3.39
Pali: Susū yathā sakkharadhotapāṇī, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss6:1.3.40
Pali: Tāsesi maṁ selamāyācamāno; 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss6:1.3.41
Pali: Taṁ te na dassaṁ atiyācakosi, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss6:1.3.42
Pali: Na cāpi te assamamāgamissan’ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss6:1.3.43
Pali: Atha kho, bhikkhave, maṇikaṇṭho nāgarājā—

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss6:1.3.44
Pali: ‘bhikkhu maṇiṁ yācati, bhikkhussa maṇinā attho’ti pakkāmi. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss6:1.3.45
Pali: Tathā pakkantova ahosi, na puna paccāgañchi. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss6:1.3.46
Pali: Atha kho, bhikkhave, kaniṭṭho isi tassa nāgassa dassanīyassa adassanena bhiyyoso mattāya kiso ahosi lūkho dubbaṇṇo, uppaṇḍuppaṇḍukajāto dhamanisanthatagatto. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss6:1.3.47
Pali: Addasa kho, bhikkhave, jeṭṭho isi kaniṭṭhaṁ isiṁ bhiyyoso mattāya kisaṁ lūkhaṁ dubbaṇṇaṁ uppaṇḍuppaṇḍukajātaṁ dhamanisanthatagattaṁ. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss6:1.3.48
Pali: Disvāna kaniṭṭhaṁ isiṁ etadavoca—

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss6:1.3.49
Pali: ‘kissa tvaṁ, bho, bhiyyoso mattāya kiso lūkho dubbaṇṇo uppaṇḍuppaṇḍukajāto dhamanisanthatagatto’ti? 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss6:1.3.50
Pali: ‘Tassāhaṁ, bho, nāgassa dassanīyassa adassanena bhiyyoso mattāya kiso lūkho dubbaṇṇo uppaṇḍuppaṇḍukajāto dhamanisanthatagatto’ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss6:1.3.51
Pali: Atha kho, bhikkhave, jeṭṭho isi kaniṭṭhaṁ isiṁ gāthāya ajjhabhāsi—

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss6:1.3.52
Pali: ‘Na taṁ yāce yassapiyaṁ jigīse, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss6:1.3.53
Pali: Videsso hoti atiyācanāya; 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss6:1.3.54
Pali: Nāgo maṇiṁ yācito brāhmaṇena, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss6:1.3.55
Pali: Adassanaññeva tadajjhagamā’ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss6:1.3.56
Pali: Tesañhi nāma, bhikkhave, tiracchānagatānaṁ pāṇānaṁ amanāpā bhavissati yācanā amanāpā viññatti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss6:1.3.57
Pali: Kimaṅgaṁ pana manussabhūtānaṁ. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss6:1.4.1
Pali: Bhūtapubbaṁ, bhikkhave, aññataro bhikkhu himavantapasse viharati aññatarasmiṁ vanasaṇḍe. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss6:1.4.2
Pali: Tassa kho, bhikkhave, vanasaṇḍassa avidūre mahantaṁ ninnaṁ pallalaṁ. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss6:1.4.3
Pali: Atha kho, bhikkhave, mahāsakuṇasaṅgho tasmiṁ pallale divasaṁ gocaraṁ caritvā sāyaṁ taṁ vanasaṇḍaṁ vāsāya upagacchati. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss6:1.4.4
Pali: Atha kho, bhikkhave, so bhikkhu tassa sakuṇasaṅghassa saddena ubbāḷho yenāhaṁ tenupasaṅkami; upasaṅkamitvā maṁ abhivādetvā ekamantaṁ nisīdi. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss6:1.4.5
Pali: Ekamantaṁ nisinnaṁ kho ahaṁ, bhikkhave, taṁ bhikkhuṁ etadavoca—

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss6:1.4.6
Pali: ‘kacci, bhikkhu, khamanīyaṁ kacci yāpanīyaṁ 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss6:1.4.7
Pali: kaccisi appakilamathena addhānaṁ āgato? 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss6:1.4.8
Pali: Kuto ca tvaṁ, bhikkhu, āgacchasī’ti? 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss6:1.4.9
Pali: ‘Khamanīyaṁ, bhagavā, yāpanīyaṁ, bhagavā. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss6:1.4.10
Pali: Appakilamathena cāhaṁ, bhante, addhānaṁ āgato. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss6:1.4.11
Pali: Atthi, bhante, himavantapasse mahāvanasaṇḍo. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss6:1.4.12
Pali: Tassa kho pana, bhante, vanasaṇḍassa avidūre mahantaṁ ninnaṁ pallalaṁ. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss6:1.4.13
Pali: Atha kho, bhante, mahāsakuṇasaṅgho tasmiṁ pallale divasaṁ gocaraṁ caritvā sāyaṁ taṁ vanasaṇḍaṁ vāsāya upagacchati. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss6:1.4.14
Pali: Tato ahaṁ, bhagavā, āgacchāmi—

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss6:1.4.15
Pali: tassa sakuṇasaṅghassa saddena ubbāḷho’ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss6:1.4.16
Pali: ‘Icchasi pana tvaṁ, bhikkhu, tassa sakuṇasaṅghassa anāgamanan’ti? 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss6:1.4.17
Pali: ‘Icchāmahaṁ, bhagavā, tassa sakuṇasaṅghassa anāgamanan’ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss6:1.4.18
Pali: ‘Tena hi tvaṁ, bhikkhu, tattha gantvā taṁ vanasaṇḍaṁ ajjhogāhetvā rattiyā paṭhamaṁ yāmaṁ tikkhattuṁ saddamanussāvehi—

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss6:1.4.19
Pali: suṇantu me, bhonto sakuṇā, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss6:1.4.20
Pali: yāvatikā imasmiṁ vanasaṇḍe vāsaṁ upagatā, pattena me attho. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss6:1.4.21
Pali: Ekekaṁ me, bhonto, pattaṁ dadantū’ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss6:1.4.22
Pali: Rattiyā majjhimaṁ yāmaṁ … 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss6:1.4.23
Pali: rattiyā pacchimaṁ yāmaṁ tikkhattuṁ saddamanussāvehi—

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss6:1.4.24
Pali: ‘suṇantu me, bhonto sakuṇā, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss6:1.4.25
Pali: yāvatikā imasmiṁ vanasaṇḍe vāsaṁ upagatā, pattena me attho. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss6:1.4.26
Pali: Ekekaṁ me, bhonto, pattaṁ dadantū’ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss6:1.4.27
Pali: Atha kho, bhikkhave, so bhikkhu tattha gantvā taṁ vanasaṇḍaṁ ajjhogāhetvā rattiyā paṭhamaṁ yāmaṁ tikkhattuṁ saddamanussāvesi—

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss6:1.4.28
Pali: ‘suṇantu me, bhonto sakuṇā, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss6:1.4.29
Pali: yāvatikā imasmiṁ vanasaṇḍe vāsaṁ upagatā, pattena me attho. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss6:1.4.30
Pali: Ekekaṁ me, bhonto, pattaṁ dadantū’ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss6:1.4.31
Pali: Rattiyā majjhimaṁ yāmaṁ … 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss6:1.4.32
Pali: rattiyā pacchimaṁ yāmaṁ tikkhattuṁ saddamanussāvesi—

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss6:1.4.33
Pali: ‘suṇantu me, bhonto sakuṇā, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss6:1.4.34
Pali: yāvatikā imasmiṁ vanasaṇḍe vāsaṁ upagatā, pattena me attho. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss6:1.4.35
Pali: Ekekaṁ me, bhonto, pattaṁ dadantū’ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss6:1.4.36
Pali: Atha kho, bhikkhave, so sakuṇasaṅgho—

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss6:1.4.37
Pali: ‘bhikkhu pattaṁ yācati bhikkhussa pattena attho’ti 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss6:1.4.38
Pali: tamhā vanasaṇḍā pakkāmi. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss6:1.4.39
Pali: Tathā pakkantova ahosi na puna paccāgañchi. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss6:1.4.40
Pali: Tesañhi nāma, bhikkhave, tiracchānagatānaṁ pāṇānaṁ amanāpā bhavissati yācanā amanāpā viññatti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss6:1.4.41
Pali: Kimaṅgaṁ pana manussabhūtānaṁ. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss6:1.5.1
Pali: Bhūtapubbaṁ, bhikkhave, raṭṭhapālassa kulaputtassa pitā raṭṭhapālaṁ kulaputtaṁ gāthāya ajjhabhāsi—

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss6:1.5.2
Pali: ‘Apāhaṁ te na jānāmi, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss6:1.5.3
Pali: raṭṭhapāla bahū janā; 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss6:1.5.4
Pali: Te maṁ saṅgamma yācanti, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss6:1.5.5
Pali: kasmā maṁ tvaṁ na yācasī’ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss6:1.5.6
Pali: ‘Yācako appiyo hoti, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss6:1.5.7
Pali: yācaṁ adadamappiyo; 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss6:1.5.8
Pali: Tasmāhaṁ taṁ na yācāmi, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss6:1.5.9
Pali: mā me videssanā ahū’ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss6:1.5.10
Pali: So hi nāma, bhikkhave, raṭṭhapālo kulaputto sakaṁ pitaraṁ evaṁ vakkhati. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss6:1.5.11
Pali: Kimaṅgaṁ pana jano janaṁ. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss6:1.6.1
Pali: Gihīnaṁ, bhikkhave, dussaṁharāni bhogāni sambhatānipi durakkhiyāni. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss6:1.6.2
Pali: Tattha nāma tumhe, moghapurisā, evaṁ dussaṁharesu bhogesu sambhatesupi durakkhiyesu yācanabahulā viññattibahulā viharissatha—

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss6:1.6.3
Pali: ‘purisaṁ detha, purisatthakaraṁ detha, goṇaṁ detha, sakaṭaṁ detha, vāsiṁ detha, parasuṁ detha, kuṭhāriṁ detha, kudālaṁ detha, nikhādanaṁ detha, valliṁ detha, veḷuṁ detha, muñjaṁ detha, pabbajaṁ detha, tiṇaṁ detha, mattikaṁ dethā’ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss6:1.6.4
Pali: Netaṁ, moghapurisā, appasannānaṁ vā pasādāya …pe… 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss6:1.6.5
Pali: evañca pana, bhikkhave, imaṁ sikkhāpadaṁ uddiseyyātha—

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss6:1.6.6.1
Pali: “Saññācikāya pana bhikkhunā kuṭiṁ kārayamānena assāmikaṁ attuddesaṁ pamāṇikā kāretabbā. Tatridaṁ pamāṇaṁ—dīghaso dvādasa vidatthiyo, sugatavidatthiyā; tiriyaṁ sattantarā. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss6:1.6.7
Pali: Bhikkhū abhinetabbā vatthudesanāya. Tehi bhikkhūhi vatthu desetabbaṁ— anārambhaṁ saparikkamanaṁ. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss6:1.6.8
Pali: Sārambhe ce bhikkhu vatthusmiṁ aparikkamane saññācikāya kuṭiṁ kāreyya, bhikkhū vā anabhineyya vatthudesanāya, pamāṇaṁ vā atikkāmeyya, saṅghādiseso”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss6:2.1.1
Pali: Saññācikā nāma 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss6:2.1.2
Pali: sayaṁ yācitvā purisampi purisatthakarampi goṇampi sakaṭampi vāsimpi parasumpi kuṭhārimpi kudālampi nikhādanampi vallimpi veḷumpi muñjampi pabbajampi tiṇampi mattikampi. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss6:2.1.3
Pali: Kuṭi nāma 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss6:2.1.4
Pali: ullittā vā hoti avalittā vā ullittāvalittā vā. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss6:2.1.5
Pali: Kārayamānenāti 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss6:2.1.6
Pali: karonto vā kārāpento vā. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss6:2.1.7
Pali: Assāmikanti 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss6:2.1.8
Pali: na añño koci sāmiko hoti, itthī vā puriso vā gahaṭṭho vā pabbajito vā. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss6:2.1.9
Pali: Attuddesanti 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss6:2.1.10
Pali: attano atthāya. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss6:2.1.11
Pali: Pamāṇikā kāretabbā. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss6:2.1.12
Pali: Tatridaṁ pamāṇaṁ—dīghaso dvādasa vidatthiyo, sugatavidatthiyāti 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss6:2.1.13
Pali: bāhirimena mānena. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss6:2.1.14
Pali: Tiriyaṁ sattantarāti 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss6:2.1.15
Pali: abbhantarimena mānena. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss6:2.2.1
Pali: Bhikkhū abhinetabbā vatthudesanāyāti 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss6:2.2.2
Pali: tena kuṭikārakena bhikkhunā kuṭivatthuṁ sodhetvā saṅghaṁ upasaṅkamitvā ekaṁsaṁ uttarāsaṅgaṁ karitvā vuḍḍhānaṁ bhikkhūnaṁ pāde vanditvā ukkuṭikaṁ nisīditvā añjaliṁ paggahetvā evamassa vacanīyo—

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss6:2.2.3
Pali: “ahaṁ, bhante, saññācikāya kuṭiṁ kattukāmo assāmikaṁ attuddesaṁ. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss6:2.2.4
Pali: Sohaṁ, bhante, saṅghaṁ kuṭivatthuolokanaṁ yācāmī”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss6:2.2.5
Pali: Dutiyampi yācitabbā. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss6:2.2.6
Pali: Tatiyampi yācitabbā. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss6:2.2.7
Pali: Sace sabbo saṅgho ussahati kuṭivatthuṁ oloketuṁ, sabbena saṅghena oloketabbaṁ. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss6:2.2.8
Pali: No ce sabbo saṅgho ussahati kuṭivatthuṁ oloketuṁ, ye tattha honti bhikkhū byattā paṭibalā sārambhaṁ anārambhaṁ saparikkamanaṁ aparikkamanaṁ jānituṁ te yācitvā sammannitabbā. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss6:2.2.9
Pali: “Evañca pana, bhikkhave, sammannitabbā. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss6:2.2.10
Pali: Byattena bhikkhunā paṭibalena saṅgho ñāpetabbo—

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss6:2.2.11
Pali: ‘Suṇātu me, bhante, saṅgho. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss6:2.2.12
Pali: Ayaṁ itthannāmo bhikkhu saññācikāya kuṭiṁ kattukāmo assāmikaṁ attuddesaṁ. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss6:2.2.13
Pali: So saṅghaṁ kuṭivatthuolokanaṁ yācati. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss6:2.2.14
Pali: Yadi saṅghassa pattakallaṁ, saṅgho itthannāmañca itthannāmañca bhikkhū sammanneyya itthannāmassa bhikkhuno kuṭivatthuṁ oloketuṁ. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss6:2.2.15
Pali: Esā ñatti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss6:2.2.16
Pali: Suṇātu me, bhante, saṅgho. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss6:2.2.17
Pali: Ayaṁ itthannāmo bhikkhu saññācikāya kuṭiṁ kattukāmo assāmikaṁ attuddesaṁ. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss6:2.2.18
Pali: So saṅghaṁ kuṭivatthuolokanaṁ yācati. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss6:2.2.19
Pali: Saṅgho itthannāmañca itthannāmañca bhikkhū sammannati itthannāmassa bhikkhuno kuṭivatthuṁ oloketuṁ. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss6:2.2.20
Pali: Yassāyasmato khamati itthannāmassa ca itthannāmassa ca bhikkhūnaṁ sammuti itthannāmassa bhikkhuno kuṭivatthuṁ oloketuṁ, so tuṇhassa; 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss6:2.2.21
Pali: yassa nakkhamati, so bhāseyya. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss6:2.2.22
Pali: Sammatā saṅghena itthannāmo ca itthannāmo ca bhikkhū itthannāmassa bhikkhuno kuṭivatthuṁ oloketuṁ. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss6:2.2.23
Pali: Khamati saṅghassa, tasmā tuṇhī, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss6:2.2.24
Pali: evametaṁ dhārayāmī’”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss6:2.2.25
Pali: Tehi sammatehi bhikkhūhi tattha gantvā kuṭivatthu oloketabbaṁ, sārambhaṁ anārambhaṁ saparikkamanaṁ aparikkamanaṁ jānitabbaṁ. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss6:2.2.26
Pali: Sace sārambhaṁ hoti aparikkamanaṁ, “mā idha karī”ti vattabbo. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss6:2.2.27
Pali: Sace anārambhaṁ hoti saparikkamanaṁ, saṅghassa ārocetabbaṁ—

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss6:2.2.28
Pali: “anārambhaṁ saparikkamanan”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss6:2.2.29
Pali: Tena kuṭikārakena bhikkhunā saṅghaṁ upasaṅkamitvā ekaṁsaṁ uttarāsaṅgaṁ karitvā vuḍḍhānaṁ bhikkhūnaṁ pāde vanditvā ukkuṭikaṁ nisīditvā añjaliṁ paggahetvā evamassa vacanīyo—

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss6:2.2.30
Pali: “ahaṁ, bhante, saññācikāya kuṭiṁ kattukāmo assāmikaṁ attuddesaṁ. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss6:2.2.31
Pali: Sohaṁ, bhante, saṅghaṁ kuṭivatthudesanaṁ yācāmī”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss6:2.2.32
Pali: Dutiyampi yācitabbā. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss6:2.2.33
Pali: Tatiyampi yācitabbā. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss6:2.2.34
Pali: “Byattena bhikkhunā paṭibalena saṅgho ñāpetabbo—

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss6:2.2.35
Pali: ‘Suṇātu me, bhante, saṅgho. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss6:2.2.36
Pali: Ayaṁ itthannāmo bhikkhu saññācikāya kuṭiṁ kattukāmo assāmikaṁ attuddesaṁ. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss6:2.2.37
Pali: So saṅghaṁ kuṭivatthudesanaṁ yācati. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss6:2.2.38
Pali: Yadi saṅghassa pattakallaṁ, saṅgho itthannāmassa bhikkhuno kuṭivatthuṁ deseyya. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss6:2.2.39
Pali: Esā ñatti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss6:2.2.40
Pali: Suṇātu me, bhante, saṅgho. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss6:2.2.41
Pali: Ayaṁ itthannāmo bhikkhu saññācikāya kuṭiṁ kattukāmo assāmikaṁ attuddesaṁ. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss6:2.2.42
Pali: So saṅghaṁ kuṭivatthudesanaṁ yācati. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss6:2.2.43
Pali: Saṅgho itthannāmassa bhikkhuno kuṭivatthuṁ deseti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss6:2.2.44
Pali: Yassāyasmato khamati itthannāmassa bhikkhuno kuṭivatthussa desanā, so tuṇhassa; 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss6:2.2.45
Pali: yassa nakkhamati, so bhāseyya. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss6:2.2.46

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss6:2.2.47
Pali: Khamati saṅghassa, tasmā tuṇhī, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss6:2.2.48
Pali: evametaṁ dhārayāmī’”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss6:2.3.1
Pali: Sārambhaṁ nāma

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss6:3.7.4

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss6:3.7.5
Pali: anārambhaṁ aparikkamanaṁ, āpatti saṅghādisesena dukkaṭassa …pe… 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss6:3.7.6
Pali: anārambhaṁ saparikkamanaṁ, āpatti saṅghādisesassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss6:3.7.7
Pali: Bhikkhu samādisitvā pakkamati— “kuṭiṁ me karothā”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss6:3.7.8
Pali: Na ca samādisati— “pamāṇikā ca hotu anārambhā ca saparikkamanā cā”ti.

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss6:3.9.1
Pali: Bhikkhu samādisitvā pakkamati— “kuṭiṁ me karothā”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss6:3.9.2
Pali: Samādisati ca— “desitavatthukā ca hotu anārambhā ca saparikkamanā cā”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss6:3.9.3
Pali: Tassa kuṭiṁ karonti adesitavatthukaṁ sārambhaṁ aparikkamanaṁ. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss6:3.9.4
Pali: So suṇāti—“kuṭi kira me kayirati adesitavatthukā sārambhā aparikkamanā”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss6:3.9.5
Pali: Tena bhikkhunā sāmaṁ vā gantabbaṁ dūto vā pāhetabbo—

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss6:3.9.6
Pali: “desitavatthukā ca hotu anārambhā ca saparikkamanā cā”ti.

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss6:3.13.20
Pali: Samādisati ca— “desitavatthukā ca hotu pamāṇikā ca anārambhā ca saparikkamanā cā”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss6:3.13.21
Pali: Tassa kuṭiṁ karonti desitavatthukaṁ pamāṇikaṁ sārambhaṁ aparikkamanaṁ, āpatti kārukānaṁ dvinnaṁ dukkaṭānaṁ …pe… 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss6:3.13.22
Pali: sārambhaṁ saparikkamanaṁ, āpatti kārukānaṁ dukkaṭassa …pe… 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss6:3.13.23
Pali: anārambhaṁ aparikkamanaṁ, āpatti kārukānaṁ dukkaṭassa …pe… 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss6:3.13.24
Pali: anārambhaṁ saparikkamanaṁ, anāpatti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss6:3.14.1

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss6:3.14.2
Pali: Tassa kuṭiṁ karonti adesitavatthukaṁ sārambhaṁ aparikkamanaṁ. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss6:3.14.3
Pali: So ce vippakate āgacchati, tena bhikkhunā sā kuṭi aññassa vā dātabbā bhinditvā vā puna kātabbā. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss6:3.14.4
Pali: No ce aññassa vā dadeyya bhinditvā vā puna kāreyya, āpatti saṅghādisesena dvinnaṁ dukkaṭānaṁ.
