pli-tv-bu-vb-ss7:0.4
Pali: 7. Vihārakārasikkhāpada 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss7:1.1
Pali: Tena samayena buddho bhagavā kosambiyaṁ viharati ghositārāme. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss7:1.2
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena āyasmato channassa upaṭṭhāko gahapati āyasmantaṁ channaṁ etadavoca—

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss7:1.3
Pali: “vihāravatthuṁ, bhante, jānāhi ayyassa vihāraṁ kārāpessāmī”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss7:1.4
Pali: Atha kho āyasmā channo vihāravatthuṁ sodhento aññataraṁ cetiyarukkhaṁ chedāpesi gāmapūjitaṁ nigamapūjitaṁ nagarapūjitaṁ janapadapūjitaṁ raṭṭhapūjitaṁ. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss7:1.5
Pali: Manussā ujjhāyanti khiyyanti vipācenti—

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss7:1.6
Pali: “kathañhi nāma samaṇā sakyaputtiyā cetiyarukkhaṁ chedāpessanti gāmapūjitaṁ nigamapūjitaṁ nagarapūjitaṁ janapadapūjitaṁ raṭṭhapūjitaṁ. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss7:1.7
Pali: Ekindriyaṁ samaṇā sakyaputtiyā jīvaṁ viheṭhentī”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss7:1.8
Pali: Assosuṁ kho bhikkhū tesaṁ manussānaṁ ujjhāyantānaṁ khiyyantānaṁ vipācentānaṁ. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss7:1.9
Pali: Ye te bhikkhū appicchā …pe… te ujjhāyanti khiyyanti vipācenti—

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss7:1.10
Pali: “kathañhi nāma āyasmā channo cetiyarukkhaṁ chedāpessati gāmapūjitaṁ …pe… raṭṭhapūjitan”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss7:1.11
Pali: Atha kho te bhikkhū āyasmantaṁ channaṁ anekapariyāyena vigarahitvā bhagavato etamatthaṁ ārocesuṁ …pe… 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss7:1.12
Pali: “saccaṁ kira tvaṁ, channa, cetiyarukkhaṁ chedāpesi gāmapūjitaṁ …pe… raṭṭhapūjitan”ti? 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss7:1.13
Pali: “Saccaṁ, bhagavā”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss7:1.14
Pali: Vigarahi buddho bhagavā …pe… 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss7:1.15
Pali: kathañhi nāma tvaṁ, moghapurisa, cetiyarukkhaṁ chedāpessasi gāmapūjitaṁ nigamapūjitaṁ nagarapūjitaṁ janapadapūjitaṁ raṭṭhapūjitaṁ. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss7:1.16
Pali: Jīvasaññino hi, moghapurisa, manussā rukkhasmiṁ. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss7:1.17
Pali: Netaṁ, moghapurisa, appasannānaṁ vā pasādāya …pe… 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss7:1.18
Pali: evañca pana, bhikkhave, imaṁ sikkhāpadaṁ uddiseyyātha—

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss7:1.19.1
Pali: “Mahallakaṁ pana bhikkhunā vihāraṁ kārayamānena sassāmikaṁ attuddesaṁ bhikkhū abhinetabbā vatthudesanāya. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss7:1.20
Pali: Tehi bhikkhūhi vatthu desetabbaṁ anārambhaṁ saparikkamanaṁ. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss7:1.21
Pali: Sārambhe ce bhikkhu vatthusmiṁ aparikkamane mahallakaṁ vihāraṁ kāreyya bhikkhū vā anabhineyya vatthudesanāya, saṅghādiseso”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss7:2.1
Pali: Mahallako nāma vihāro 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss7:2.2
Pali: sassāmiko vuccati. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss7:2.3
Pali: Vihāro nāma 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss7:2.4
Pali: ullitto vā hoti avalitto vā ullittāvalitto vā. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss7:2.5
Pali: Kārayamānenāti 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss7:2.6
Pali: karonto vā kārāpento vā. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss7:2.7
Pali: Sassāmikanti 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss7:2.8
Pali: añño koci sāmiko hoti itthī vā puriso vā gahaṭṭho vā pabbajito vā. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss7:2.9
Pali: Attuddesanti 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss7:2.10
Pali: attano atthāya. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss7:2.11
Pali: Bhikkhū abhinetabbā vatthudesanāyāti 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss7:2.12
Pali: tena vihārakārakena bhikkhunā vihāravatthuṁ sodhetvā saṅghaṁ upasaṅkamitvā ekaṁsaṁ uttarāsaṅgaṁ karitvā vuḍḍhānaṁ bhikkhūnaṁ pāde vanditvā ukkuṭikaṁ nisīditvā añjaliṁ paggahetvā evamassa vacanīyo—

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss7:2.13
Pali: “ahaṁ, bhante, mahallakaṁ vihāraṁ kattukāmo sassāmikaṁ attuddesaṁ. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss7:2.14
Pali: Sohaṁ, bhante, saṅghaṁ vihāravatthuolokanaṁ yācāmī”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss7:2.15
Pali: Dutiyampi yācitabbā. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss7:2.16
Pali: Tatiyampi yācitabbā. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss7:2.17
Pali: Sace sabbo saṅgho ussahati vihāravatthuṁ oloketuṁ sabbena saṅghena oloketabbaṁ. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss7:2.18
Pali: No ce sabbo saṅgho ussahati vihāravatthuṁ oloketuṁ, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss7:2.19
Pali: ye tattha honti bhikkhū byattā paṭibalā sārambhaṁ anārambhaṁ saparikkamanaṁ aparikkamanaṁ jānituṁ te yācitvā sammannitabbā. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss7:2.20
Pali: “Evañca pana, bhikkhave, sammannitabbā. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss7:2.21
Pali: Byattena bhikkhunā paṭibalena saṅgho ñāpetabbo—

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss7:2.22
Pali: ‘Suṇātu me, bhante, saṅgho. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss7:2.23
Pali: Ayaṁ itthannāmo bhikkhu mahallakaṁ vihāraṁ kattukāmo sassāmikaṁ attuddesaṁ. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss7:2.24
Pali: So saṅghaṁ vihāravatthuolokanaṁ yācati. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss7:2.25
Pali: Yadi saṅghassa pattakallaṁ, saṅgho itthannāmañca itthannāmañca bhikkhū sammanneyya itthannāmassa bhikkhuno vihāravatthuṁ oloketuṁ. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss7:2.26
Pali: Esā ñatti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss7:2.27
Pali: Suṇātu me, bhante, saṅgho. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss7:2.28
Pali: Ayaṁ itthannāmo bhikkhu mahallakaṁ vihāraṁ kattukāmo sassāmikaṁ attuddesaṁ. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss7:2.29
Pali: So saṅghaṁ vihāravatthuolokanaṁ yācati. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss7:2.30
Pali: Saṅgho itthannāmañca itthannāmañca bhikkhū sammannati itthannāmassa bhikkhuno vihāravatthuṁ oloketuṁ. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss7:2.31
Pali: Yassāyasmato khamati itthannāmassa ca itthannāmassa ca bhikkhūnaṁ sammuti itthannāmassa bhikkhuno vihāravatthuṁ oloketuṁ, so tuṇhassa; 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss7:2.32
Pali: yassa nakkhamati, so bhāseyya. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss7:2.33
Pali: Sammatā saṅghena itthannāmo ca itthannāmo ca bhikkhū itthannāmassa bhikkhuno vihāravatthuṁ oloketuṁ. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss7:2.34
Pali: Khamati saṅghassa, tasmā tuṇhī, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss7:2.35
Pali: evametaṁ dhārayāmī’”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss7:2.36
Pali: Tehi sammatehi bhikkhūhi tattha gantvā vihāravatthu oloketabbaṁ; 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss7:2.37
Pali: sārambhaṁ anārambhaṁ saparikkamanaṁ aparikkamanaṁ jānitabbaṁ. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss7:2.38
Pali: Sace sārambhaṁ hoti aparikkamanaṁ, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss7:2.39
Pali: “māyidha karī”ti vattabbo. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss7:2.40
Pali: Sace anārambhaṁ hoti saparikkamanaṁ, saṅghassa ārocetabbaṁ—

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss7:2.41
Pali: “anārambhaṁ saparikkamanan”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss7:2.42
Pali: Tena vihārakārakena bhikkhunā saṅghaṁ upasaṅkamitvā ekaṁsaṁ uttarāsaṅgaṁ karitvā vuḍḍhānaṁ bhikkhūnaṁ pāde vanditvā ukkuṭikaṁ nisīditvā añjaliṁ paggahetvā evamassa vacanīyo—

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss7:2.43
Pali: “ahaṁ, bhante, mahallakaṁ vihāraṁ kattukāmo sassāmikaṁ attuddesaṁ. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss7:2.44
Pali: Sohaṁ, bhante, saṅghaṁ vihāravatthudesanaṁ yācāmī”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss7:2.45
Pali: Dutiyampi yācitabbā. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss7:2.46
Pali: Tatiyampi yācitabbā. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss7:2.47
Pali: Byattena bhikkhunā paṭibalena saṅgho ñāpetabbo—

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss7:2.48
Pali: “Suṇātu me, bhante, saṅgho. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss7:2.49
Pali: Ayaṁ itthannāmo bhikkhu mahallakaṁ vihāraṁ kattukāmo sassāmikaṁ attuddesaṁ. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss7:2.50
Pali: So saṅghaṁ vihāravatthudesanaṁ yācati. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss7:2.51
Pali: Yadi saṅghassa pattakallaṁ, saṅgho itthannāmassa bhikkhuno vihāravatthuṁ deseyya. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss7:2.52
Pali: Esā ñatti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss7:2.53
Pali: Suṇātu me, bhante, saṅgho. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss7:2.54
Pali: Ayaṁ itthannāmo bhikkhu mahallakaṁ vihāraṁ kattukāmo sassāmikaṁ attuddesaṁ. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss7:2.55
Pali: So saṅghaṁ vihāravatthudesanaṁ yācati. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss7:2.56
Pali: Saṅgho itthannāmassa bhikkhuno vihāravatthuṁ deseti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss7:2.57
Pali: Yassāyasmato khamati itthannāmassa bhikkhuno vihāravatthussa desanā, so tuṇhassa; 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss7:2.58
Pali: yassa nakkhamati, so bhāseyya. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss7:2.59
Pali: Desitaṁ saṅghena itthannāmassa bhikkhuno vihāravatthu.

Pali: Khamati saṅghassa, tasmā tuṇhī,

Pali: evametaṁ dhārayāmī”ti.

Pali segments

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss8:0.1
Pali: Theravāda Vinaya 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss8:0.2
Pali: Mahāvibhaṅga 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss8:0.3
Pali: Saṅghādisesakaṇḍa 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss8:0.4
Pali: 8. Duṭṭhadosasikkhāpada 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss8:1.1.1
Pali: Tena samayena buddho bhagavā rājagahe viharati veḷuvane kalandakanivāpe. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss8:1.1.2
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena āyasmatā dabbena mallaputtena jātiyā sattavassena arahattaṁ sacchikataṁ hoti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss8:1.1.3
Pali: Yaṁ kiñci sāvakena pattabbaṁ sabbaṁ tena anuppattaṁ hoti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss8:1.1.4
Pali: Natthi cassa kiñci uttari karaṇīyaṁ, katassa vā paticayo. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss8:1.1.5
Pali: Atha kho āyasmato dabbassa mallaputtassa rahogatassa paṭisallīnassa evaṁ cetaso parivitakko udapādi—

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss8:1.1.6
Pali: “mayā kho jātiyā sattavassena arahattaṁ sacchikataṁ. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss8:1.1.7
Pali: Yaṁ kiñci sāvakena pattabbaṁ sabbaṁ mayā anuppattaṁ. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss8:1.1.8
Pali: Natthi ca me kiñci uttari karaṇīyaṁ, katassa vā paticayo. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss8:1.1.9
Pali: Kiṁ nu kho ahaṁ saṅghassa veyyāvaccaṁ kareyyan”ti? 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss8:1.1.10
Pali: Atha kho āyasmato dabbassa mallaputtassa etadahosi—

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss8:1.1.11
Pali: “yannūnāhaṁ saṅghassa senāsanañca paññapeyyaṁ bhattāni ca uddiseyyan”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss8:1.2.1
Pali: Atha kho āyasmā dabbo mallaputto sāyanhasamayaṁ paṭisallānā vuṭṭhito yena bhagavā tenupasaṅkami; upasaṅkamitvā bhagavantaṁ abhivādetvā ekamantaṁ nisīdi. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss8:1.2.2
Pali: Ekamantaṁ nisinno kho āyasmā dabbo mallaputto bhagavantaṁ etadavoca—

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss8:1.2.3
Pali: “idha mayhaṁ, bhante, rahogatassa paṭisallīnassa evaṁ cetaso parivitakko udapādi mayā kho jātiyā sattavassena arahattaṁ sacchikataṁ, yaṁ kiñci sāvakena pattabbaṁ, sabbaṁ mayā anupattaṁ, natthi ca me kiñci uttari karaṇīyaṁ, katassa vā paticayo, kiṁ nu kho ahaṁ saṅghassa veyyāvaccaṁ kareyyanti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss8:1.2.4
Pali: Tassa mayhaṁ, bhante, etadahosi—

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss8:1.2.5
Pali: ‘yannūnāhaṁ saṅghassa senāsanañca paññapeyyaṁ bhattāni ca uddiseyyan’ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss8:1.2.6
Pali: Icchāmahaṁ, bhante, saṅghassa senāsanañca paññapetuṁ bhattāni ca uddisitun”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss8:1.2.7
Pali: “Sādhu sādhu, dabba. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss8:1.2.8
Pali: Tena hi tvaṁ, dabba, saṅghassa senāsanañca paññapehi bhattāni ca uddisā”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss8:1.2.9
Pali: “Evaṁ, bhante”ti kho āyasmā dabbo mallaputto bhagavato paccassosi. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss8:1.3.1
Pali: Atha kho bhagavā etasmiṁ nidāne etasmiṁ pakaraṇe dhammiṁ kathaṁ katvā bhikkhū āmantesi—

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss8:1.3.2
Pali: “tena hi, bhikkhave, saṅgho dabbaṁ mallaputtaṁ senāsanapaññāpakañca bhattuddesakañca sammannatu. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss8:1.3.3
Pali: Evañca pana, bhikkhave, sammannitabbo. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss8:1.3.4
Pali: Paṭhamaṁ dabbo mallaputto yācitabbo. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss8:1.3.5
Pali: Yācitvā byattena bhikkhunā paṭibalena saṅgho ñāpetabbo—

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss8:1.3.6
Pali: ‘Suṇātu me, bhante, saṅgho. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss8:1.3.7
Pali: Yadi saṅghassa pattakallaṁ saṅgho āyasmantaṁ dabbaṁ mallaputtaṁ senāsanapaññāpakañca bhattuddesakañca sammanneyya. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss8:1.3.8
Pali: Esā ñatti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss8:1.3.9
Pali: Suṇātu me, bhante, saṅgho. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss8:1.3.10
Pali: Saṅgho āyasmantaṁ dabbaṁ mallaputtaṁ senāsanapaññāpakañca bhattuddesakañca sammannati. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss8:1.3.11
Pali: Yassāyasmato khamati āyasmato dabbassa mallaputtassa senāsanapaññāpakassa ca bhattuddesakassa ca sammuti, so tuṇhassa; 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss8:1.3.12
Pali: yassa nakkhamati, so bhāseyya. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss8:1.3.13
Pali: Sammato saṅghena āyasmā dabbo mallaputto senāsanapaññāpako ca bhattuddesako ca. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss8:1.3.14
Pali: Khamati saṅghassa, tasmā tuṇhī, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss8:1.3.15
Pali: evametaṁ dhārayāmī’”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss8:1.4.1
Pali: Sammato ca panāyasmā dabbo mallaputto sabhāgānaṁ bhikkhūnaṁ ekajjhaṁ senāsanaṁ paññapeti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss8:1.4.2
Pali: Ye te bhikkhū suttantikā tesaṁ ekajjhaṁ senāsanaṁ paññapeti—

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss8:1.4.3
Pali: “te aññamaññaṁ suttantaṁ saṅgāyissantī”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss8:1.4.4
Pali: Ye te bhikkhū vinayadharā tesaṁ ekajjhaṁ senāsanaṁ paññapeti—

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss8:1.4.5
Pali: “te aññamaññaṁ vinayaṁ vinicchinissantī”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss8:1.4.6
Pali: Ye te bhikkhū dhammakathikā tesaṁ ekajjhaṁ senāsanaṁ paññapeti—

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss8:1.4.7
Pali: “te aññamaññaṁ dhammaṁ sākacchissantī”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss8:1.4.8
Pali: Ye te bhikkhū jhāyino tesaṁ ekajjhaṁ senāsanaṁ paññapeti—

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss8:1.4.9
Pali: “te aññamaññaṁ na byābādhissantī”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss8:1.4.10
Pali: Ye te bhikkhū tiracchānakathikā kāyadaḷhibahulā viharanti tesampi ekajjhaṁ senāsanaṁ paññapeti—

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss8:1.4.11
Pali: “imāyapime āyasmanto ratiyā acchissantī”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss8:1.4.12
Pali: Yepi te bhikkhū vikāle āgacchanti tesampi tejodhātuṁ samāpajjitvā teneva ālokena senāsanaṁ paññapeti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss8:1.4.13
Pali: Apisu bhikkhū sañcicca vikāle āgacchanti—

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss8:1.4.14
Pali: “mayaṁ āyasmato dabbassa mallaputtassa iddhipāṭihāriyaṁ passissāmā”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss8:1.4.15
Pali: Te āyasmantaṁ dabbaṁ mallaputtaṁ upasaṅkamitvā evaṁ vadanti—

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss8:1.4.16
Pali: “amhākaṁ, āvuso dabba, senāsanaṁ paññapehī”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss8:1.4.17
Pali: Te āyasmā dabbo mallaputto evaṁ vadeti—

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss8:1.4.18
Pali: “katthāyasmantā icchanti, kattha paññapemī”ti? 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss8:1.4.19
Pali: Te sañcicca dūre apadisanti—

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss8:1.4.20
Pali: “amhākaṁ, āvuso dabba, gijjhakūṭe pabbate senāsanaṁ paññapehi. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss8:1.4.21
Pali: Amhākaṁ, āvuso, corapapāte senāsanaṁ paññapehi. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss8:1.4.22
Pali: Amhākaṁ, āvuso, isigilipasse kāḷasilāyaṁ senāsanaṁ paññapehi. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss8:1.4.23
Pali: Amhākaṁ, āvuso, vebhārapasse sattapaṇṇiguhāyaṁ senāsanaṁ paññapehi. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss8:1.4.24
Pali: Amhākaṁ, āvuso, sītavane sappasoṇḍikapabbhāre senāsanaṁ paññapehi. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss8:1.4.25
Pali: Amhākaṁ, āvuso, gotamakakandarāyaṁ senāsanaṁ paññapehi. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss8:1.4.26
Pali: Amhākaṁ, āvuso, tindukakandarāyaṁ senāsanaṁ paññapehi. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss8:1.4.27
Pali: Amhākaṁ, āvuso, tapodakandarāyaṁ senāsanaṁ paññapehi. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss8:1.4.28
Pali: Amhākaṁ, āvuso, tapodārāme senāsanaṁ paññapehi. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss8:1.4.29
Pali: Amhākaṁ, āvuso, jīvakambavane senāsanaṁ paññapehi. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss8:1.4.30
Pali: Amhākaṁ, āvuso, maddakucchismiṁ migadāye senāsanaṁ paññapehī”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss8:1.4.31
Pali: Tesaṁ āyasmā dabbo mallaputto tejodhātuṁ samāpajjitvā aṅguliyā jalamānāya purato purato gacchati. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss8:1.4.32
Pali: Tepi teneva ālokena āyasmato dabbassa mallaputtassa piṭṭhito piṭṭhito gacchanti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss8:1.4.33
Pali: Tesaṁ āyasmā dabbo mallaputto evaṁ senāsanaṁ paññapeti—

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss8:1.4.34
Pali: “ayaṁ mañco, idaṁ pīṭhaṁ, ayaṁ bhisi, idaṁ bibbohanaṁ, idaṁ vaccaṭṭhānaṁ, idaṁ passāvaṭṭhānaṁ, idaṁ pānīyaṁ, idaṁ paribhojanīyaṁ, ayaṁ kattaradaṇḍo, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss8:1.4.35
Pali: idaṁ saṅghassa katikasaṇṭhānaṁ, imaṁ kālaṁ pavisitabbaṁ, imaṁ kālaṁ nikkhamitabban”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss8:1.4.36
Pali: Tesaṁ āyasmā dabbo mallaputto evaṁ senāsanaṁ paññapetvā punadeva veḷuvanaṁ paccāgacchati. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss8:1.5.1
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena mettiyabhūmajakā bhikkhū navakā ceva honti appapuññā ca. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss8:1.5.2
Pali: Yāni saṅghassa lāmakāni senāsanāni tāni tesaṁ pāpuṇanti lāmakāni ca bhattāni. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss8:1.5.3
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena rājagahe manussā icchanti therānaṁ bhikkhūnaṁ abhisaṅkhārikaṁ piṇḍapātaṁ dātuṁ sappimpi telampi uttaribhaṅgampi. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss8:1.5.4
Pali: Mettiyabhūmajakānaṁ pana bhikkhūnaṁ pākatikaṁ denti yathārandhaṁ kaṇājakaṁ bilaṅgadutiyaṁ. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss8:1.5.5
Pali: Te pacchābhattaṁ piṇḍapātapaṭikkantā there bhikkhū pucchanti—

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss8:1.5.6
Pali: “tumhākaṁ, āvuso, bhattagge kiṁ ahosi? Tumhākaṁ, āvuso, bhattagge kiṁ ahosī”ti? 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss8:1.5.7
Pali: Ekacce therā evaṁ vadanti—

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss8:1.5.8
Pali: “amhākaṁ, āvuso, sappi ahosi telaṁ ahosi uttaribhaṅgaṁ ahosī”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss8:1.5.9
Pali: Mettiyabhūmajakā pana bhikkhū evaṁ vadanti—

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss8:1.5.10
Pali: “amhākaṁ, āvuso, na kiñci ahosi, pākatikaṁ yathārandhaṁ kaṇājakaṁ bilaṅgadutiyan”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss8:1.6.1
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena kalyāṇabhattiko gahapati saṅghassa catukkabhattaṁ deti niccabhattaṁ. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss8:1.6.2
Pali: So bhattagge saputtadāro upatiṭṭhitvā parivisati. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss8:1.6.3
Pali: Aññe odanena pucchanti, aññe sūpena pucchanti, aññe telena pucchanti, aññe uttaribhaṅgena pucchanti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss8:1.6.4
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena kalyāṇabhattikassa gahapatino bhattaṁ svātanāya mettiyabhūmajakānaṁ bhikkhūnaṁ uddiṭṭhaṁ hoti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss8:1.6.5
Pali: Atha kho kalyāṇabhattiko gahapati ārāmaṁ agamāsi kenacideva karaṇīyena. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss8:1.6.6
Pali: So yenāyasmā dabbo mallaputto tenupasaṅkami; upasaṅkamitvā āyasmantaṁ dabbaṁ mallaputtaṁ abhivādetvā ekamantaṁ nisīdi. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss8:1.6.7
Pali: Ekamantaṁ nisinnaṁ kho kalyāṇabhattikaṁ gahapatiṁ āyasmā dabbo mallaputto dhammiyā kathāya sandassesi samādapesi samuttejesi sampahaṁsesi. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss8:1.6.8
Pali: Atha kho kalyāṇabhattiko gahapati āyasmatā dabbena mallaputtena dhammiyā kathāya sandassito samādapito samuttejito sampahaṁsito āyasmantaṁ dabbaṁ mallaputtaṁ etadavoca—

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss8:1.6.9
Pali: “kassa, bhante, amhākaṁ ghare svātanāya bhattaṁ uddiṭṭhan”ti? 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss8:1.6.10
Pali: “Mettiyabhūmajakānaṁ kho, gahapati, bhikkhūnaṁ tumhākaṁ ghare svātanāya bhattaṁ uddiṭṭhan”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss8:1.6.11
Pali: Atha kho kalyāṇabhattiko gahapati anattamano ahosi—

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss8:1.6.12
Pali: “kathañhi nāma pāpabhikkhū amhākaṁ ghare bhuñjissantī”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss8:1.6.13
Pali: Gharaṁ gantvā dāsiṁ āṇāpesi—

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss8:1.6.14
Pali: “ye, je, sve bhattikā āgacchanti te koṭṭhake āsanaṁ paññapetvā kaṇājakena bilaṅgadutiyena parivisā”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss8:1.6.15
Pali: “Evaṁ, ayyā”ti kho sā dāsī kalyāṇabhattikassa gahapatino paccassosi. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss8:1.7.1
Pali: Atha kho mettiyabhūmajakā bhikkhū—

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss8:1.7.2
Pali: “hiyyo kho, āvuso, amhākaṁ kalyāṇabhattikassa gahapatino bhattaṁ uddiṭṭhaṁ, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss8:1.7.3
Pali: sve amhe kalyāṇabhattiko gahapati saputtadāro upatiṭṭhitvā parivisissati; 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss8:1.7.4
Pali: aññe odanena pucchissanti, aññe sūpena pucchissanti, aññe telena pucchissanti, aññe uttaribhaṅgena pucchissantī”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss8:1.7.5
Pali: Te teneva somanassena na cittarūpaṁ rattiyā supiṁsu. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss8:1.7.6
Pali: Atha kho mettiyabhūmajakā bhikkhū pubbaṇhasamayaṁ nivāsetvā pattacīvaraṁ ādāya yena kalyāṇabhattikassa gahapatino nivesanaṁ tenupasaṅkamiṁsu. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss8:1.7.7
Pali: Addasā kho sā dāsī mettiyabhūmajake bhikkhū dūratova āgacchante. Disvāna koṭṭhake āsanaṁ paññapetvā mettiyabhūmajake bhikkhū etadavoca—

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss8:1.7.8
Pali: “nisīdatha, bhante”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss8:1.7.9
Pali: Atha kho mettiyabhūmajakānaṁ bhikkhūnaṁ etadahosi—

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss8:1.7.10
Pali: “nissaṁsayaṁ kho na tāva bhattaṁ siddhaṁ bhavissati. Yathā mayaṁ koṭṭhake nisīdeyyāmā”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss8:1.7.11
Pali: Atha kho sā dāsī kaṇājakena bilaṅgadutiyena upagacchi—

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss8:1.7.12
Pali: “bhuñjatha, bhante”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss8:1.7.13
Pali: “Mayaṁ kho, bhagini, niccabhattikā”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss8:1.7.14
Pali: “Jānāmi, ayyā, niccabhattikāti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss8:1.7.15
Pali: Api cāhaṁ hiyyova gahapatinā āṇattā— ‘ye, je, sve bhattikā āgacchanti te koṭṭhake āsanaṁ paññapetvā kaṇājakena bilaṅgadutiyena parivisā’ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss8:1.7.16
Pali: Bhuñjatha, bhante”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss8:1.7.17
Pali: Atha kho mettiyabhūmajakā bhikkhū—

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss8:1.7.18
Pali: “hiyyo kho, āvuso, kalyāṇabhattiko gahapati ārāmaṁ agamāsi dabbassa mallaputtassa santike. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss8:1.7.19
Pali: Nissaṁsayaṁ kho mayaṁ dabbena mallaputtena gahapatino antare paribhinnā”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss8:1.7.20
Pali: Te teneva domanassena na cittarūpaṁ bhuñjiṁsu. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss8:1.7.21
Pali: Atha kho mettiyabhūmajakā bhikkhū pacchābhattaṁ piṇḍapātapaṭikkantā ārāmaṁ gantvā pattacīvaraṁ paṭisāmetvā bahārāmakoṭṭhake saṅghāṭipallatthikāya nisīdiṁsu tuṇhībhūtā maṅkubhūtā pattakkhandhā adhomukhā pajjhāyantā appaṭibhānā. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss8:1.8.1
Pali: Atha kho mettiyā bhikkhunī yena mettiyabhūmajakā bhikkhū tenupasaṅkami; upasaṅkamitvā mettiyabhūmajake bhikkhū etadavoca—

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss8:1.8.2
Pali: “vandāmi, ayyā”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss8:1.8.3
Pali: Evaṁ vutte, mettiyabhūmajakā bhikkhū nālapiṁsu. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss8:1.8.4
Pali: Dutiyampi kho …pe… 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss8:1.8.5
Pali: tatiyampi kho mettiyā bhikkhunī mettiyabhūmajake bhikkhū etadavoca—

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss8:1.8.6
Pali: “vandāmi, ayyā”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss8:1.8.7
Pali: Tatiyampi kho mettiyabhūmajakā bhikkhū nālapiṁsu. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss8:1.8.8
Pali: “Kyāhaṁ ayyānaṁ aparajjhāmi? 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss8:1.8.9
Pali: Kissa maṁ ayyā nālapantī”ti? 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss8:1.8.10
Pali: “Tathā hi pana tvaṁ, bhagini, amhe dabbena mallaputtena viheṭhīyamāne ajjhupekkhasī”ti? 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss8:1.8.11
Pali: “Kyāhaṁ, ayyā, karomī”ti? 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss8:1.8.12
Pali: “Sace kho tvaṁ, bhagini, iccheyyāsi ajjeva bhagavā dabbaṁ mallaputtaṁ nāsāpeyyā”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss8:1.8.13
Pali: “Kyāhaṁ, ayyā, karomi, kiṁ mayā sakkā kātun”ti? 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss8:1.8.14
Pali: “Ehi tvaṁ, bhagini, yena bhagavā tenupasaṅkama; upasaṅkamitvā bhagavantaṁ evaṁ vadehi—

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss8:1.8.15
Pali: ‘idaṁ, bhante, nacchannaṁ nappatirūpaṁ. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss8:1.8.16
Pali: Yāyaṁ, bhante, disā abhayā anītikā anupaddavā sāyaṁ disā sabhayā saītikā saupaddavā. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss8:1.8.17
Pali: Yato nivātaṁ tato savātaṁ. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss8:1.8.18
Pali: Udakaṁ maññe ādittaṁ. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss8:1.8.19
Pali: Ayyenamhi dabbena mallaputtena dūsitā’”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss8:1.8.20
Pali: “Evaṁ, ayyā”ti kho mettiyā bhikkhunī mettiyabhūmajakānaṁ bhikkhūnaṁ paṭissutvā yena bhagavā tenupasaṅkami; upasaṅkamitvā bhagavantaṁ abhivādetvā ekamantaṁ aṭṭhāsi. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss8:1.8.21
Pali: Ekamantaṁ ṭhitā kho sā mettiyā bhikkhunī bhagavantaṁ etadavoca—

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss8:1.8.22
Pali: “idaṁ, bhante, nacchannaṁ nappatirūpaṁ. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss8:1.8.23
Pali: Yāyaṁ, bhante, disā abhayā anītikā anupaddavā sāyaṁ disā sabhayā saītikā saupaddavā. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss8:1.8.24
Pali: Yato nivātaṁ tato savātaṁ. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss8:1.8.25
Pali: Udakaṁ maññe ādittaṁ. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss8:1.8.26
Pali: Ayyenamhi dabbena mallaputtena dūsitā”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss8:1.9.1
Pali: Atha kho bhagavā etasmiṁ nidāne etasmiṁ pakaraṇe bhikkhusaṅghaṁ sannipātāpetvā āyasmantaṁ dabbaṁ mallaputtaṁ paṭipucchi—

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss8:1.9.2
Pali: “sarasi tvaṁ, dabba, evarūpaṁ kattā yathāyaṁ bhikkhunī āhā”ti? 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss8:1.9.3
Pali: “Yathā maṁ, bhante, bhagavā jānātī”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss8:1.9.4
Pali: Dutiyampi kho bhagavā …pe… 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss8:1.9.5
Pali: tatiyampi kho bhagavā āyasmantaṁ dabbaṁ mallaputtaṁ etadavoca—

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss8:1.9.6
Pali: “sarasi tvaṁ, dabba, evarūpaṁ kattā yathāyaṁ bhikkhunī āhā”ti? 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss8:1.9.7
Pali: “Yathā maṁ, bhante, bhagavā jānātī”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss8:1.9.8
Pali: “Na kho, dabba, dabbā evaṁ nibbeṭhenti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss8:1.9.9
Pali: Sace tayā kataṁ katanti vadehi, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss8:1.9.10
Pali: sace tayā akataṁ akatanti vadehī”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss8:1.9.11
Pali: “Yato ahaṁ, bhante, jāto nābhijānāmi supinantenapi methunaṁ dhammaṁ paṭisevitā, pageva jāgaro”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss8:1.9.12
Pali: Atha kho bhagavā bhikkhū āmantesi—

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss8:1.9.13
Pali: “tena hi, bhikkhave, mettiyaṁ bhikkhuniṁ nāsetha. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss8:1.9.14
Pali: Ime ca bhikkhū anuyuñjathā”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss8:1.9.15
Pali: Idaṁ vatvā bhagavā uṭṭhāyāsanā vihāraṁ pāvisi. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss8:1.9.16
Pali: Atha kho te bhikkhū mettiyaṁ bhikkhuniṁ nāsesuṁ. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss8:1.9.17
Pali: Atha kho mettiyabhūmajakā bhikkhū te bhikkhū etadavocuṁ—

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss8:1.9.18
Pali: “māvuso, mettiyaṁ bhikkhuniṁ nāsetha. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss8:1.9.19
Pali: Na sā kiñci aparajjhati. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss8:1.9.20
Pali: Amhehi sā ussāhitā kupitehi anattamanehi cāvanādhippāyehī”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss8:1.9.21
Pali: “Kiṁ pana tumhe, āvuso, āyasmantaṁ dabbaṁ mallaputtaṁ amūlakena pārājikena dhammena anuddhaṁsethā”ti? 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss8:1.9.22
Pali: “Evamāvuso”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss8:1.9.23
Pali: Ye te bhikkhū appicchā …pe… te ujjhāyanti khiyyanti vipācenti—

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss8:1.9.24
Pali: “kathañhi nāma mettiyabhūmajakā bhikkhū āyasmantaṁ dabbaṁ mallaputtaṁ amūlakena pārājikena dhammena anuddhaṁsessantī”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss8:1.9.25
Pali: Atha kho te bhikkhū mettiyabhūmajake bhikkhū anekapariyāyena vigarahitvā bhagavato etamatthaṁ ārocesuṁ …pe… 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss8:1.9.26
Pali: “saccaṁ kira tumhe, bhikkhave, dabbaṁ mallaputtaṁ amūlakena pārājikena dhammena anuddhaṁsethā”ti? 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss8:1.9.27
Pali: “Saccaṁ, bhagavā”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss8:1.9.28
Pali: Vigarahi buddho bhagavā …pe… 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss8:1.9.29
Pali: “kathañhi nāma tumhe, moghapurisā, dabbaṁ mallaputtaṁ amūlakena pārājikena dhammena anuddhaṁsessatha. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss8:1.9.30
Pali: Netaṁ, moghapurisā, appasannānaṁ vā pasādāya …pe… 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss8:1.9.31
Pali: evañca pana, bhikkhave, imaṁ sikkhāpadaṁ uddiseyyātha—

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss8:1.9.32.1
Pali: “Yo pana bhikkhu bhikkhuṁ duṭṭho doso appatīto amūlakena pārājikena dhammena anuddhaṁseyya—‘appeva nāma naṁ imamhā brahmacariyā cāveyyan’ti, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss8:1.9.33
Pali: tato aparena samayena samanuggāhīyamāno vā asamanuggāhīyamāno vā amūlakañceva taṁ adhikaraṇaṁ hoti bhikkhu ca dosaṁ patiṭṭhāti, saṅghādiseso”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss8:2.1
Pali: Yo panāti 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss8:2.2
Pali: yo yādiso …pe… 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss8:2.3
Pali: bhikkhūti 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss8:2.4

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss8:2.5
Pali: Bhikkhunti 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss8:2.6
Pali: aññaṁ bhikkhuṁ. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss8:2.7
Pali: Duṭṭho dosoti 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss8:2.8
Pali: kupito anattamano anabhiraddho āhatacitto khilajāto. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss8:2.9
Pali: Appatītoti 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss8:2.10
Pali: tena ca kopena tena ca dosena tāya ca anattamanatāya tāya ca anabhiraddhiyā appatīto hoti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss8:2.11
Pali: Amūlakaṁ nāma 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss8:2.12
Pali: adiṭṭhaṁ asutaṁ aparisaṅkitaṁ. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss8:2.13
Pali: Pārājikena dhammenāti 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss8:2.14
Pali: catunnaṁ aññatarena. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss8:2.15
Pali: Anuddhaṁseyyāti 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss8:2.16
Pali: codeti vā codāpeti vā. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss8:2.17
Pali: Appeva nāma naṁ imamhā brahmacariyā cāveyyanti 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss8:2.18
Pali: bhikkhubhāvā cāveyyaṁ, samaṇadhammā cāveyyaṁ, sīlakkhandhā cāveyyaṁ, tapoguṇā cāveyyaṁ. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss8:2.19
Pali: Tato aparena samayenāti 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss8:2.20
Pali: yasmiṁ khaṇe anuddhaṁsito hoti taṁ khaṇaṁ taṁ layaṁ taṁ muhuttaṁ vītivatte. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss8:2.21
Pali: Samanuggāhīyamānoti

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss8:2.23
Pali: Asamanuggāhīyamānoti 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss8:2.24
Pali: na kenaci vuccamāno. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss8:2.25
Pali: Adhikaraṇaṁ nāma

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss8:2.27
Pali: Bhikkhu ca dosaṁ patiṭṭhātīti 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss8:2.28

Pali: 9. Dutiyaduṭṭhadosasikkhāpada 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss9:1.1.1
Pali: Tena samayena buddho bhagavā rājagahe viharati veḷuvane kalandakanivāpe. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss9:1.1.2
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena mettiyabhūmajakā bhikkhū gijjhakūṭā pabbatā orohantā addasaṁsu chagalakaṁ ajikāya vippaṭipajjantaṁ. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss9:1.1.3
Pali: Disvāna evamāhaṁsu—

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss9:1.1.4
Pali: “handa mayaṁ, āvuso, imaṁ chagalakaṁ dabbaṁ mallaputtaṁ nāma karoma. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss9:1.1.5
Pali: Imaṁ ajikaṁ mettiyaṁ nāma bhikkhuniṁ karoma. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss9:1.1.6
Pali: Evaṁ mayaṁ voharissāma. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss9:1.1.7
Pali: Pubbe mayaṁ, āvuso, dabbaṁ mallaputtaṁ sutena avocumhā. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss9:1.1.8
Pali: Idāni pana amhehi sāmaṁ diṭṭho mettiyāya bhikkhuniyā vippaṭipajjanto”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss9:1.1.9

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss9:1.1.10

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss9:2.2.14

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss9:2.2.15

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss9:3.2.19
Pali: Tañce pārājikena codāpeti—

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss9:3.2.20
Pali: “assamaṇosi …pe… 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss9:3.2.21
Pali: evampi āpattaññabhāgiyaṁ hoti leso ca upādinno, āpatti vācāya, vācāya saṅghādisesassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss9:3.2.22
Pali: Bhikkhu pācittiyaṁ …pe… 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss9:3.2.23
Pali: pāṭidesanīyaṁ … 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss9:3.2.24
Pali: dukkaṭaṁ … 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss9:3.2.25
Pali: dubbhāsitaṁ ajjhāpajjanto diṭṭho hoti dubbhāsite dubbhāsitadiṭṭhi hoti …pe… 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss9:3.2.26
Pali: dubbhāsite saṅghādisesadiṭṭhi hoti … 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss9:3.2.27
Pali: thullaccayadiṭṭhi hoti … 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss9:3.2.28
Pali: pācittiyadiṭṭhi hoti … 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss9:3.2.29
Pali: pāṭidesanīyadiṭṭhi hoti … 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss9:3.2.30
Pali: dukkaṭadiṭṭhi hoti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss9:3.2.31
Pali: Tañce pārājikena codāpeti—

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss9:3.2.32
Pali: “assamaṇosi, asakyaputtiyosi, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss9:3.2.33
Pali: natthi tayā saddhiṁ uposatho vā pavāraṇā vā saṅghakammaṁ vā”ti, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss9:3.2.34
Pali: evampi āpattaññabhāgiyaṁ hoti leso ca upādinno, āpatti vācāya, vācāya saṅghādisesassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss9:3.3.1
Pali: Anāpatti—

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss9:3.3.2
Pali: tathāsaññī codeti vā codāpeti vā, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss9:3.3.3
Pali: ummattakassa, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss9:3.3.4
Pali: ādikammikassāti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss9:3.3.5
Pali: (Aññabhāgiya) Kiñcilesasikkhāpadaṁ niṭṭhitaṁ navamaṁ.

Pali: 10. Saṅghabhedasikkhāpada 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss10:1.1.1
Pali: Tena samayena buddho bhagavā rājagahe viharati veḷuvane kalandakanivāpe. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss10:1.1.2
Pali: Atha kho devadatto yena kokāliko kaṭamodakatissako khaṇḍadeviyā putto samuddadatto tenupasaṅkami; upasaṅkamitvā kokālikaṁ kaṭamodakatissakaṁ khaṇḍadeviyā puttaṁ samuddadattaṁ etadavoca—

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss10:1.1.3
Pali: “etha mayaṁ, āvuso, samaṇassa gotamassa saṅghabhedaṁ karissāma cakkabhedan”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss10:1.1.4
Pali: Evaṁ vutte, kokāliko devadattaṁ etadavoca—

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss10:1.1.5
Pali: “samaṇo kho, āvuso, gotamo mahiddhiko mahānubhāvo. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss10:1.1.6
Pali: Kathaṁ mayaṁ samaṇassa gotamassa saṅghabhedaṁ karissāma cakkabhedan”ti? 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss10:1.1.7
Pali: “Etha mayaṁ, āvuso, samaṇaṁ gotamaṁ upasaṅkamitvā pañca vatthūni yācissāma—

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss10:1.1.8
Pali: ‘bhagavā, bhante, anekapariyāyena appicchassa santuṭṭhassa sallekhassa dhutassa pāsādikassa apacayassa vīriyārambhassa vaṇṇavādī. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss10:1.1.9
Pali: Imāni, bhante, pañca vatthūni anekapariyāyena appicchatāya santuṭṭhiyā sallekhāya dhutatāya pāsādikatāya apacayāya vīriyārambhāya saṁvattanti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss10:1.1.10
Pali: Sādhu, bhante, bhikkhū 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss10:1.1.11
Pali: yāvajīvaṁ āraññikā assu; 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss10:1.1.12
Pali: yo gāmantaṁ osareyya, vajjaṁ naṁ phuseyya. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss10:1.1.13
Pali: Yāvajīvaṁ piṇḍapātikā assu; 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss10:1.1.14
Pali: yo nimantanaṁ sādiyeyya, vajjaṁ naṁ phuseyya. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss10:1.1.15
Pali: Yāvajīvaṁ paṁsukūlikā assu; 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss10:1.1.16
Pali: yo gahapaticīvaraṁ sādiyeyya, vajjaṁ naṁ phuseyya. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss10:1.1.17
Pali: Yāvajīvaṁ rukkhamūlikā assu; 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss10:1.1.18
Pali: yo channaṁ upagaccheyya, vajjaṁ naṁ phuseyya. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss10:1.1.19
Pali: Yāvajīvaṁ macchamaṁsaṁ na khādeyyuṁ; 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss10:1.1.20
Pali: yo macchamaṁsaṁ khādeyya, vajjaṁ naṁ phuseyyā’ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss10:1.1.21
Pali: Imāni samaṇo gotamo nānujānissati. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss10:1.1.22
Pali: Te mayaṁ imehi pañcahi vatthūhi janaṁ saññāpessāmāti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss10:1.1.23
Pali: Sakkā kho, āvuso, imehi pañcahi vatthūhi samaṇassa gotamassa saṅghabhedo kātuṁ cakkabhedo. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss10:1.1.24
Pali: Lūkhapasannā hi, āvuso, manussā”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss10:1.2.1
Pali: Atha kho devadatto sapariso yena bhagavā tenupasaṅkami; upasaṅkamitvā bhagavantaṁ abhivādetvā ekamantaṁ nisīdi. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss10:1.2.2

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss10:1.2.9
Pali: yāvajīvaṁ macchamaṁsaṁ na khādeyyuṁ, yo macchamaṁsaṁ khādeyya vajjaṁ naṁ phuseyyā”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss10:1.2.10
Pali: “Alaṁ, devadatta, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss10:1.2.11
Pali: yo icchati āraññiko hotu, yo icchati gāmante viharatu; 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss10:1.2.12

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss10:1.2.13
Pali: yo icchati paṁsukūliko hotu, yo icchati gahapaticīvaraṁ sādiyatu. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss10:1.2.14
Pali: Aṭṭhamāse kho mayā, devadatta, rukkhamūlasenāsanaṁ anuññātaṁ, tikoṭiparisuddhaṁ macchamaṁsaṁ—

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss10:1.2.15
Pali: adiṭṭhaṁ asutaṁ aparisaṅkitan”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss10:1.2.16

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss10:1.2.18
Pali: Atha kho devadatto sapariso rājagahaṁ pavisitvā pañcahi vatthūhi janaṁ saññāpesi—

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss10:1.3.1
Pali: Tattha ye te manussā assaddhā appasannā dubbuddhino te evamāhaṁsu—

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss10:1.3.2
Pali: “ime kho samaṇā sakyaputtiyā dhutā sallekhavuttino, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss10:1.3.3
Pali: samaṇo pana gotamo bāhulliko bāhullāya cetetī”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss10:1.3.4
Pali: Ye pana te manussā saddhā pasannā paṇḍitā byattā buddhimanto te ujjhāyanti khiyyanti vipācenti—

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss10:1.3.5
Pali: “kathañhi nāma devadatto bhagavato saṅghabhedāya parakkamissati cakkabhedāyā”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss10:1.3.6
Pali: Assosuṁ kho bhikkhū tesaṁ manussānaṁ ujjhāyantānaṁ khiyyantānaṁ vipācentānaṁ. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss10:1.3.7
Pali: Ye te bhikkhū appicchā …pe… te ujjhāyanti khiyyanti vipācenti—

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss10:1.3.8
Pali: “kathañhi nāma devadatto saṅghabhedāya parakkamissati cakkabhedāyā”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss10:1.3.9
Pali: Atha kho te bhikkhū devadattaṁ anekapariyāyena vigarahitvā bhagavato etamatthaṁ ārocesuṁ …pe… 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss10:1.3.10
Pali: “saccaṁ kira tvaṁ, devadatta, saṅghabhedāya parakkamasi cakkabhedāyā”ti? 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss10:1.3.11
Pali: “Saccaṁ, bhagavā”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss10:1.3.12
Pali: Vigarahi buddho bhagavā …pe… 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss10:1.3.13
Pali: kathañhi nāma tvaṁ, moghapurisa, saṅghabhedāya parakkamissasi cakkabhedāya. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss10:1.3.14
Pali: Netaṁ, moghapurisa, appasannānaṁ vā pasādāya …pe… 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss10:1.3.15
Pali: evañca pana, bhikkhave, imaṁ sikkhāpadaṁ uddiseyyātha—

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss10:1.3.16.1
Pali: “Yo pana bhikkhu samaggassa saṅghassa bhedāya parakkameyya, bhedanasaṁvattanikaṁ vā adhikaraṇaṁ samādāya paggayha tiṭṭheyya, so bhikkhu bhikkhūhi evamassa vacanīyo—

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss10:1.3.17
Pali: ‘māyasmā samaggassa saṅghassa bhedāya parakkami, bhedanasaṁvattanikaṁ vā adhikaraṇaṁ samādāya paggayha aṭṭhāsi. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss10:1.3.18
Pali: Sametāyasmā saṅghena. Samaggo hi saṅgho sammodamāno avivadamāno ekuddeso phāsu viharatī’ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss10:1.3.19
Pali: Evañca so bhikkhu bhikkhūhi vuccamāno tatheva paggaṇheyya, so bhikkhu bhikkhūhi yāvatatiyaṁ samanubhāsitabbo tassa paṭinissaggāya. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss10:1.3.20
Pali: Yāvatatiyañce samanubhāsiyamāno taṁ paṭinissajjeyya, iccetaṁ kusalaṁ; 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss10:1.3.21
Pali: no ce paṭinissajjeyya, saṅghādiseso”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss10:2.1
Pali: Yo panāti 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss10:2.2

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss10:2.3

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss10:2.4
Pali: …pe… ayaṁ imasmiṁ atthe adhippeto bhikkhūti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss10:2.5
Pali: Samaggo nāma saṅgho 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss10:2.6
Pali: samānasaṁvāsako samānasīmāyaṁ ṭhito.

Pali: Bhedāya parakkameyyāti—

Pali: Bhedanasaṁvattanikaṁ vā adhikaraṇanti

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss10:2.16

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss10:2.17
Pali: So bhikkhūti 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss10:2.18
Pali: yo so saṅghabhedako bhikkhu.

Pali: Bhikkhūhīti 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss10:2.20
Pali: aññehi bhikkhūhi. Ye passanti, ye suṇanti, tehi vattabbo—

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss10:2.21

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss10:2.22

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss10:2.23

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss10:2.24
Pali: Dutiyampi vattabbo. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss10:2.25

Pali: Sace paṭinissajjati, iccetaṁ kusalaṁ; 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss10:2.27
Pali: no ce paṭinissajjati, āpatti dukkaṭassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss10:2.28
Pali: Sutvā na vadanti, āpatti dukkaṭassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss10:2.29
Pali: So bhikkhu saṅghamajjhampi ākaḍḍhitvā vattabbo—

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss10:2.30
Pali: “māyasmā samaggassa saṅghassa bhedāya parakkami, bhedanasaṁvattanikaṁ vā adhikaraṇaṁ samādāya paggayha aṭṭhāsi. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss10:2.31

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss10:2.37

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss10:2.39
Pali: Byattena bhikkhunā paṭibalena saṅgho ñāpetabbo—

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss10:2.40
Pali: ‘Suṇātu me, bhante, saṅgho. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss10:2.41
Pali: Ayaṁ itthannāmo bhikkhu samaggassa saṅghassa bhedāya parakkamati. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss10:2.42
Pali: So taṁ vatthuṁ na paṭinissajjati. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss10:2.43
Pali: Yadi saṅghassa pattakallaṁ, saṅgho itthannāmaṁ bhikkhuṁ samanubhāseyya tassa vatthussa paṭinissaggāya. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss10:2.44
Pali: Esā ñatti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss10:2.45
Pali: Suṇātu me, bhante, saṅgho. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss10:2.46
Pali: Ayaṁ itthannāmo bhikkhu samaggassa saṅghassa bhedāya parakkamati. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss10:2.47
Pali: So taṁ vatthuṁ na paṭinissajjati. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss10:2.48
Pali: Saṅgho itthannāmaṁ bhikkhuṁ samanubhāsati tassa vatthussa paṭinissaggāya. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss10:2.49
Pali: Yassāyasmato khamati itthannāmassa bhikkhuno samanubhāsanā tassa vatthussa paṭinissaggāya, so tuṇhassa; 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss10:2.50
Pali: yassa nakkhamati, so bhāseyya. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss10:2.51
Pali: Dutiyampi etamatthaṁ vadāmi …pe… 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss10:2.52
Pali: tatiyampi etamatthaṁ vadāmi—

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss10:2.53
Pali: suṇātu me, bhante, saṅgho. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss10:2.54
Pali: Ayaṁ itthannāmo bhikkhu samaggassa saṅghassa bhedāya parakkamati. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss10:2.55
Pali: So taṁ vatthuṁ na paṭinissajjati. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss10:2.56
Pali: Saṅgho itthannāmaṁ bhikkhuṁ samanubhāsati tassa vatthussa paṭinissaggāya. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss10:2.57
Pali: Yassāyasmato khamati itthannāmassa bhikkhuno samanubhāsanā tassa vatthussa paṭinissaggāya, so tuṇhassa; 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss10:2.58
Pali: yassa nakkhamati, so bhāseyya. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss10:2.59
Pali: Samanubhaṭṭho saṅghena itthannāmo bhikkhu tassa vatthussa paṭinissaggāya. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss10:2.60
Pali: Khamati saṅghassa, tasmā tuṇhī, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss10:2.61
Pali: evametaṁ dhārayāmī’”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss10:2.62
Pali: Ñattiyā dukkaṭaṁ, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss10:2.63
Pali: dvīhi kammavācāhi thullaccayā, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss10:2.64
Pali: kammavācāpariyosāne āpatti saṅghādisesassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss10:2.65
Pali: Saṅghādisesaṁ ajjhāpajjantassa ñattiyā dukkaṭaṁ, dvīhi kammavācāhi thullaccayā paṭippassambhanti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss10:2.66
Pali: Saṅghādisesoti 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss10:2.67
Pali: …pe… tenapi vuccati saṅghādisesoti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss10:3.1.1
Pali: Dhammakamme dhammakammasaññī na paṭinissajjati, āpatti saṅghādisesassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss10:3.1.2
Pali: Dhammakamme vematiko na paṭinissajjati, āpatti saṅghādisesassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss10:3.1.3
Pali: Dhammakamme adhammakammasaññī na paṭinissajjati, āpatti saṅghādisesassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss10:3.1.4
Pali: Adhammakamme dhammakammasaññī, āpatti dukkaṭassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss10:3.1.5
Pali: Adhammakamme vematiko, āpatti dukkaṭassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss10:3.1.6
Pali: Adhammakamme adhammakammasaññī, āpatti dukkaṭassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss10:3.2.1
Pali: Anāpatti—

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss10:3.2.2
Pali: asamanubhāsantassa, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss10:3.2.3
Pali: paṭinissajjantassa, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss10:3.2.4
Pali: ummattakassa, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss10:3.2.5
Pali: khittacittassa, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss10:3.2.6
Pali: vedanāṭṭassa, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss10:3.2.7
Pali: ādikammikassāti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss10:3.2.8
Pali: Saṅghabhedasikkhāpadaṁ niṭṭhitaṁ dasamaṁ.

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss11:1.6

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss11:1.17
Pali: Netaṁ, bhikkhave, appasannānaṁ vā pasādāya …pe…

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss11:1.25

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss11:1.26

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss11:2.41

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss11:2.42
Pali: Te taṁ vatthuṁ na paṭinissajjanti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss11:2.43

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss11:2.44

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss11:2.45
Pali: Suṇātu me, bhante, saṅgho.

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss11:3.1.6

Pali: 12. Dubbacasikkhāpada 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss12:1.1
Pali: Tena samayena buddho bhagavā kosambiyaṁ viharati ghositārāme. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss12:1.2
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena āyasmā channo anācāraṁ ācarati.

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss12:1.8

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss12:1.9
Pali: Amhākaṁ buddho amhākaṁ dhammo

Pali: amhākaṁ ayyaputtena dhammo abhisamito. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss12:1.11
Pali: Seyyathāpi nāma mahāvāto vāyanto tiṇakaṭṭhapaṇṇasaṭaṁ ekato ussāreyya, seyyathā vā pana nadī pabbateyyā saṅkhasevālapaṇakaṁ ekato ussāreyya; 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss12:1.12
Pali: evameva tumhe nānānāmā nānāgottā nānājaccā nānākulā pabbajitā ekato ussāritā.

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss12:1.14
Pali: Ahaṁ kho nāma tumhe vadeyyaṁ. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss12:1.15
Pali: Amhākaṁ buddho amhākaṁ dhammo 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss12:1.16
Pali: amhākaṁ ayyaputtena dhammo abhisamito”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss12:1.17

Pali: Vigarahi buddho bhagavā …pe… 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss12:1.23
Pali: kathañhi nāma tvaṁ, moghapurisa, bhikkhūhi sahadhammikaṁ vuccamāno attānaṁ avacanīyaṁ karissasi. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss12:1.24
Pali: Netaṁ, moghapurisa, appasannānaṁ vā pasādāya …pe… 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss12:1.25
Pali: evañca pana, bhikkhave, imaṁ sikkhāpadaṁ uddiseyyātha—

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss12:1.26.1
Pali: “Bhikkhu paneva dubbacajātiko hoti uddesapariyāpannesu sikkhāpadesu bhikkhūhi sahadhammikaṁ vuccamāno attānaṁ avacanīyaṁ karoti—

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss12:1.27
Pali: ‘mā maṁ āyasmanto kiñci avacuttha kalyāṇaṁ vā pāpakaṁ vā, ahampāyasmante na kiñci vakkhāmi kalyāṇaṁ vā pāpakaṁ vā, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss12:1.28
Pali: viramathāyasmanto mama vacanāyā’ti, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss12:1.29
Pali: so bhikkhu bhikkhūhi evamassa vacanīyo—

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss12:1.30
Pali: ‘māyasmā attānaṁ avacanīyaṁ akāsi, vacanīyamevāyasmā attānaṁ karotu, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss12:1.31
Pali: āyasmāpi bhikkhū vadetu sahadhammena, bhikkhūpi āyasmantaṁ vakkhanti sahadhammena. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss12:1.32
Pali: Evaṁ saṁvaddhā hi tassa bhagavato parisā yadidaṁ aññamaññavacanena aññamaññavuṭṭhāpanenā’ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss12:1.33
Pali: Evañca so bhikkhu bhikkhūhi vuccamāno tatheva paggaṇheyya, so bhikkhu bhikkhūhi yāvatatiyaṁ samanubhāsitabbo tassa paṭinissaggāya. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss12:1.34
Pali: Yāvatatiyañce samanubhāsiyamāno taṁ paṭinissajjeyya, iccetaṁ kusalaṁ; 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss12:1.35
Pali: no ce paṭinissajjeyya, saṅghādiseso”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss12:2.1
Pali: Bhikkhū paneva dubbacajātiko hotīti 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss12:2.2
Pali: dubbaco hoti dovacassakaraṇehi dhammehi samannāgato akkhamo appadakkhiṇaggāhī anusāsaniṁ. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss12:2.3
Pali: Uddesapariyāpannesu sikkhāpadesūti 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss12:2.4
Pali: pātimokkhapariyāpannesu sikkhāpadesu. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss12:2.5
Pali: Bhikkhūhīti 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss12:2.6
Pali: aññehi bhikkhūhi. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss12:2.7
Pali: Sahadhammikaṁ nāma 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss12:2.8
Pali: yaṁ bhagavatā paññattaṁ sikkhāpadaṁ, etaṁ sahadhammikaṁ nāma. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss12:2.9
Pali: Tena vuccamāno attānaṁ avacanīyaṁ karoti—

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss12:2.10
Pali: “mā maṁ āyasmanto kiñci avacuttha kalyāṇaṁ vā pāpakaṁ vā, ahampāyasmante na kiñci vakkhāmi kalyāṇaṁ vā pāpakaṁ vā. Viramathāyasmanto mama vacanāyā”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss12:2.11
Pali: So bhikkhūti 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss12:2.12
Pali: yo so dubbacajātiko bhikkhu. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss12:2.13
Pali: Bhikkhūhīti 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss12:2.14
Pali: aññehi bhikkhūhi. Ye passanti ye suṇanti tehi vattabbo—

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss12:2.15
Pali: “māyasmā attānaṁ avacanīyaṁ akāsi. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss12:2.16
Pali: Vacanīyameva āyasmā attānaṁ karotu. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss12:2.17
Pali: Āyasmāpi bhikkhū vadetu sahadhammena, bhikkhūpi āyasmantaṁ vakkhanti sahadhammena. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss12:2.18
Pali: Evaṁ saṁvaddhā hi tassa bhagavato parisā yadidaṁ aññamaññavacanena aññamaññavuṭṭhāpanenā”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss12:2.19
Pali: Dutiyampi vattabbo. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss12:2.20
Pali: Tatiyampi vattabbo. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss12:2.21
Pali: Sace paṭinissajjati, iccetaṁ kusalaṁ; 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss12:2.22
Pali: no ce paṭinissajjati, āpatti dukkaṭassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss12:2.23
Pali: Sutvā na vadanti, āpatti dukkaṭassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss12:2.24
Pali: So bhikkhu saṅghamajjhampi ākaḍḍhitvā vattabbo—

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss12:2.25
Pali: “māyasmā attānaṁ avacanīyaṁ akāsi …pe… 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss12:2.26
Pali: aññamaññavuṭṭhāpanenā”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss12:2.27
Pali: Dutiyampi vattabbo. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss12:2.28
Pali: Tatiyampi vattabbo. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss12:2.29
Pali: Sace paṭinissajjati, iccetaṁ kusalaṁ; 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss12:2.30
Pali: no ce paṭinissajjati, āpatti dukkaṭassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss12:2.31
Pali: So bhikkhu samanubhāsitabbo. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss12:2.32
Pali: “Evañca pana, bhikkhave, samanubhāsitabbo. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss12:2.33
Pali: Byattena bhikkhunā paṭibalena saṅgho ñāpetabbo—

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss12:2.34
Pali: ‘Suṇātu me, bhante, saṅgho. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss12:2.35
Pali: Ayaṁ itthannāmo bhikkhu bhikkhūhi sahadhammikaṁ vuccamāno attānaṁ avacanīyaṁ karoti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss12:2.36
Pali: So taṁ vatthuṁ na paṭinissajjati. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss12:2.37
Pali: Yadi saṅghassa pattakallaṁ, saṅgho itthannāmaṁ bhikkhuṁ samanubhāseyya tassa vatthussa paṭinissaggāya. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss12:2.38
Pali: Esā ñatti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss12:2.39
Pali: Suṇātu me, bhante, saṅgho. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss12:2.40
Pali: Ayaṁ itthannāmo bhikkhu bhikkhūhi sahadhammikaṁ vuccamāno attānaṁ avacanīyaṁ karoti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss12:2.41
Pali: So taṁ vatthuṁ na paṭinissajjati. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss12:2.42
Pali: Saṅgho itthannāmaṁ bhikkhuṁ samanubhāsati tassa vatthussa paṭinissaggāya. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss12:2.43
Pali: Yassāyasmato khamati itthannāmassa bhikkhuno samanubhāsanā tassa vatthussa paṭinissaggāya, so tuṇhassa; 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss12:2.44
Pali: yassa nakkhamati, so bhāseyya. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss12:2.45
Pali: Dutiyampi etamatthaṁ vadāmi …pe… 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss12:2.46
Pali: tatiyampi etamatthaṁ vadāmi—

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss12:2.47
Pali: suṇātu me, bhante, saṅgho. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss12:2.48
Pali: Ayaṁ itthannāmo bhikkhu bhikkhūhi sahadhammikaṁ vuccamāno attānaṁ avacanīyaṁ karoti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss12:2.49
Pali: So taṁ vatthuṁ na paṭinissajjati. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss12:2.50
Pali: Saṅgho itthannāmaṁ bhikkhuṁ samanubhāsati tassa vatthussa paṭinissaggāya. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss12:2.51
Pali: Yassāyasmato khamati itthannāmassa bhikkhuno samanubhāsanā tassa vatthussa paṭinissaggāya, so tuṇhassa; 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss12:2.52
Pali: yassa nakkhamati, so bhāseyya. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss12:2.53
Pali: Samanubhaṭṭho saṅghena itthannāmo bhikkhu tassa vatthussa paṭinissaggāya. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss12:2.54
Pali: Khamati saṅghassa, tasmā tuṇhī, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss12:2.55
Pali: evametaṁ dhārayāmī’”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss12:2.56
Pali: Ñattiyā dukkaṭaṁ, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss12:2.57
Pali: dvīhi kammavācāhi thullaccayā, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss12:2.58
Pali: kammavācāpariyosāne āpatti saṅghādisesassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss12:2.59
Pali: Saṅghādisesaṁ ajjhāpajjantassa ñattiyā dukkaṭaṁ, dvīhi kammavācāhi thullaccayā paṭippassambhanti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss12:2.60
Pali: Saṅghādisesoti 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss12:2.61
Pali: …pe… tenapi vuccati “saṅghādiseso”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss12:3.1.1
Pali: Dhammakamme dhammakammasaññī na paṭinissajjati, āpatti saṅghādisesassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss12:3.1.2
Pali: Dhammakamme vematiko na paṭinissajjati, āpatti saṅghādisesassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss12:3.1.3
Pali: Dhammakamme adhammakammasaññī na paṭinissajjati, āpatti saṅghādisesassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss12:3.1.4
Pali: Adhammakamme dhammakammasaññī, āpatti dukkaṭassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss12:3.1.5
Pali: Adhammakamme vematiko, āpatti dukkaṭassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss12:3.1.6
Pali: Adhammakamme adhammakammasaññī, āpatti dukkaṭassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss12:3.2.1
Pali: Anāpatti—

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss12:3.2.2
Pali: asamanubhāsantassa, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss12:3.2.3
Pali: paṭinissajjantassa, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss12:3.2.4
Pali: ummattakassa, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss12:3.2.5
Pali: ādikammikassāti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss12:3.2.6
Pali: Dubbacasikkhāpadaṁ niṭṭhitaṁ dvādasamaṁ.

Pali: Theravāda Vinaya

Pali: Saṅghādisesakaṇḍa 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss13:0.4
Pali: 13. Kuladūsakasikkhāpada 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss13:1.1.1
Pali: Tena samayena buddho bhagavā sāvatthiyaṁ viharati jetavane anāthapiṇḍikassa ārāme. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss13:1.1.2
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena assajipunabbasukā nāma kīṭāgirismiṁ āvāsikā honti alajjino pāpabhikkhū. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss13:1.1.3
Pali: Te evarūpaṁ anācāraṁ ācaranti—

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss13:1.1.4
Pali: mālāvacchaṁ ropentipi ropāpentipi, siñcantipi siñcāpentipi, ocinantipi ocināpentipi, ganthentipi ganthāpentipi, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss13:1.1.5
Pali: ekatovaṇṭikamālaṁ karontipi kārāpentipi, ubhatovaṇṭikamālaṁ karontipi kārāpentipi, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss13:1.1.6
Pali: mañjarikaṁ karontipi kārāpentipi, vidhūtikaṁ karontipi kārāpentipi, vaṭaṁsakaṁ karontipi kārāpentipi, āveḷaṁ karontipi kārāpentipi, uracchadaṁ karontipi kārāpentipi. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss13:1.1.7
Pali: Te kulitthīnaṁ kuladhītānaṁ kulakumārīnaṁ kulasuṇhānaṁ kuladāsīnaṁ ekatovaṇṭikamālaṁ harantipi harāpentipi, ubhatovaṇṭikamālaṁ harantipi harāpentipi, mañjarikaṁ harantipi harāpentipi, vidhūtikaṁ harantipi harāpentipi, vaṭaṁsakaṁ harantipi harāpentipi, āveḷaṁ harantipi harāpentipi, uracchadaṁ harantipi harāpentipi. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss13:1.1.8
Pali: Te kulitthīhi kuladhītāhi kulakumārīhi kulasuṇhāhi kuladāsīhi saddhiṁ ekabhājanepi bhuñjanti, ekathālakepi pivanti, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss13:1.1.9
Pali: ekāsanepi nisīdanti, ekamañcepi tuvaṭṭenti, ekattharaṇāpi tuvaṭṭenti, ekapāvuraṇāpi tuvaṭṭenti, ekattharaṇapāvuraṇāpi tuvaṭṭenti, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss13:1.1.10
Pali: vikālepi bhuñjanti, majjampi pivanti, mālāgandhavilepanampi dhārenti, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss13:1.1.11
Pali: naccantipi gāyantipi vādentipi lāsentipi, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss13:1.1.12
Pali: naccantiyāpi naccanti, naccantiyāpi gāyanti, naccantiyāpi vādenti, naccantiyāpi lāsenti, gāyantiyāpi naccanti, gāyantiyāpi gāyanti, gāyantiyāpi vādenti, gāyantiyāpi lāsenti, vādentiyāpi naccanti, vādentiyāpi gāyanti, vādentiyāpi vādenti, vādentiyāpi lāsenti, lāsentiyāpi naccanti, lāsentiyāpi gāyanti, lāsentiyāpi vādenti, lāsentiyāpi lāsenti; 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss13:1.2.1
Pali: aṭṭhapadepi kīḷanti, dasapadepi kīḷanti, ākāsepi kīḷanti, parihārapathepi kīḷanti, santikāyapi kīḷanti, khalikāyapi kīḷanti, ghaṭikāyapi kīḷanti, salākahatthenapi kīḷanti, akkhenapi kīḷanti, paṅgacīrenapi kīḷanti, vaṅkakenapi kīḷanti, mokkhacikāyapi kīḷanti, ciṅgulakenapi kīḷanti, pattāḷhakenapi kīḷanti, rathakenapi kīḷanti, dhanukenapi kīḷanti, akkharikāyapi kīḷanti, manesikāyapi kīḷanti, yathāvajjenapi kīḷanti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss13:1.2.2
Pali: Hatthismimpi sikkhanti, assasmimpi sikkhanti, rathasmimpi sikkhanti, dhanusmimpi sikkhanti, tharusmimpi sikkhanti, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss13:1.2.3
Pali: hatthissapi purato dhāvanti, assassapi purato dhāvanti, rathassapi purato dhāvantipi ādhāvantipi, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss13:1.2.4
Pali: usseḷentipi, apphoṭentipi, nibbujjhantipi, muṭṭhīhipi yujjhanti, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss13:1.2.5
Pali: raṅgamajjhepi saṅghāṭiṁ pattharitvā naccakiṁ evaṁ vadanti—“idha, bhagini, naccassū”ti, nalāṭikampi denti, vividhampi anācāraṁ ācaranti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss13:1.3.1
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena aññataro bhikkhu kāsīsu vassaṁvuṭṭho sāvatthiṁ gacchanto bhagavantaṁ dassanāya, yena kīṭāgiri tadavasari. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss13:1.3.2
Pali: Atha kho so bhikkhu pubbaṇhasamayaṁ nivāsetvā pattacīvaramādāya kīṭāgiriṁ piṇḍāya pāvisi 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss13:1.3.3
Pali: pāsādikena abhikkantena paṭikkantena ālokitena vilokitena samiñjitena pasāritena okkhittacakkhu iriyāpathasampanno. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss13:1.3.4
Pali: Manussā taṁ bhikkhuṁ passitvā evamāhaṁsu—“kvāyaṁ abalabalo viya mandamando viya bhākuṭikabhākuṭiko viya? Ko imassa upagatassa piṇḍakaṁ dassati? Amhākaṁ pana ayyā assajipunabbasukā saṇhā sakhilā sukhasambhāsā mihitapubbaṅgamā ehisvāgatavādino abbhākuṭikā uttānamukhā pubbabhāsino. Tesaṁ kho nāma piṇḍo dātabbo”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss13:1.3.5
Pali: Addasā kho aññataro upāsako taṁ bhikkhuṁ kīṭāgirismiṁ piṇḍāya carantaṁ. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss13:1.3.6
Pali: Disvāna yena so bhikkhu tenupasaṅkami; upasaṅkamitvā taṁ bhikkhuṁ abhivādetvā etadavoca—“api, bhante, piṇḍo labbhatī”ti? 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss13:1.3.7
Pali: “Na kho, āvuso, piṇḍo labbhatī”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss13:1.3.8
Pali: “Ehi, bhante, gharaṁ gamissāmā”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss13:1.4.1
Pali: Atha kho so upāsako taṁ bhikkhuṁ gharaṁ netvā bhojetvā etadavoca—

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss13:1.4.2
Pali: “kahaṁ, bhante, ayyo gamissatī”ti? 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss13:1.4.3
Pali: “Sāvatthiṁ kho ahaṁ, āvuso, gamissāmi bhagavantaṁ dassanāyā”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss13:1.4.4
Pali: “Tena hi, bhante, mama vacanena bhagavato pāde sirasā vanda, evañca vadehi—

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss13:1.4.5
Pali: ‘duṭṭho, bhante, kīṭāgirismiṁ āvāso. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss13:1.4.6
Pali: Assajipunabbasukā nāma kīṭāgirismiṁ āvāsikā alajjino pāpabhikkhū. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss13:1.4.7
Pali: Te evarūpaṁ anācāraṁ ācaranti—

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss13:1.4.8
Pali: mālāvacchaṁ ropentipi ropāpentipi, siñcantipi siñcāpentipi …pe… vividhampi anācāraṁ ācaranti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss13:1.4.9
Pali: Yepi te, bhante, manussā pubbe saddhā ahesuṁ pasannā tepi etarahi assaddhā appasannā. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss13:1.4.10
Pali: Yānipi tāni saṅghassa pubbe dānapathāni tānipi etarahi upacchinnāni. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss13:1.4.11
Pali: Riñcanti pesalā bhikkhū, nivasanti pāpabhikkhū. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss13:1.4.12
Pali: Sādhu, bhante, bhagavā kīṭāgiriṁ bhikkhū pahiṇeyya yathāyaṁ kīṭāgirismiṁ āvāso saṇṭhaheyyā’”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss13:1.5.1
Pali: “Evamāvuso”ti kho so bhikkhu tassa upāsakassa paṭissutvā yena sāvatthi tena pakkāmi. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss13:1.5.2
Pali: Anupubbena yena sāvatthi jetavanaṁ anāthapiṇḍikassa ārāmo yena bhagavā tenupasaṅkami; upasaṅkamitvā bhagavantaṁ abhivādetvā ekamantaṁ nisīdi. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss13:1.5.3
Pali: Āciṇṇaṁ kho panetaṁ buddhānaṁ bhagavantānaṁ āgantukehi bhikkhūhi saddhiṁ paṭisammodituṁ. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss13:1.5.4
Pali: Atha kho bhagavā taṁ bhikkhuṁ etadavoca—

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss13:1.5.5
Pali: “kacci, bhikkhu, khamanīyaṁ kacci yāpanīyaṁ, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss13:1.5.6
Pali: kaccisi appakilamathena addhānaṁ āgato, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss13:1.5.7
Pali: kuto ca tvaṁ, bhikkhu, āgacchasī”ti? 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss13:1.5.8
Pali: “Khamanīyaṁ, bhagavā, yāpanīyaṁ, bhagavā. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss13:1.5.9
Pali: Appakilamathena cāhaṁ, bhante, addhānaṁ āgato. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss13:1.5.10
Pali: Idhāhaṁ, bhante, kāsīsu vassaṁvuṭṭho sāvatthiṁ āgacchanto bhagavantaṁ dassanāya yena kīṭāgiri tadavasariṁ. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss13:1.5.11
Pali: Atha khvāhaṁ, bhante, pubbaṇhasamayaṁ nivāsetvā pattacīvaramādāya kīṭāgiriṁ piṇḍāya pāvisiṁ. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss13:1.5.12
Pali: Addasā kho maṁ, bhante, aññataro upāsako kīṭāgirismiṁ piṇḍāya carantaṁ. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss13:1.5.13
Pali: Disvāna yenāhaṁ tenupasaṅkami; upasaṅkamitvā maṁ abhivādetvā etadavoca—‘api, bhante, piṇḍo labbhatī’ti? 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss13:1.5.14
Pali: ‘Na kho, āvuso, piṇḍo labbhatī’ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss13:1.5.15
Pali: ‘Ehi, bhante, gharaṁ gamissāmā’ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss13:1.5.16
Pali: Atha kho, bhante, so upāsako maṁ gharaṁ netvā bhojetvā etadavoca—

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss13:1.5.17
Pali: ‘kahaṁ, bhante, ayyo gamissatī’ti? 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss13:1.5.18
Pali: ‘Sāvatthiṁ kho ahaṁ, āvuso, gamissāmi bhagavantaṁ dassanāyā’ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss13:1.5.19
Pali: Tena hi, bhante, mama vacanena bhagavato pāde sirasā vanda, evañca vadehi—

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss13:1.5.20
Pali: ‘duṭṭho, bhante, kīṭāgirismiṁ āvāso, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss13:1.5.21
Pali: assajipunabbasukā nāma kīṭāgirismiṁ āvāsikā alajjino pāpabhikkhū. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss13:1.5.22
Pali: Te evarūpaṁ anācāraṁ ācaranti—

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss13:1.5.23
Pali: mālāvacchaṁ ropentipi ropāpentipi, siñcantipi siñcāpentipi …pe… vividhampi anācāraṁ ācaranti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss13:1.5.24
Pali: Yepi te, bhante, manussā pubbe saddhā ahesuṁ pasannā tepi etarahi assaddhā appasannā, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss13:1.5.25
Pali: yānipi tāni saṅghassa pubbe dānapathāni tānipi etarahi upacchinnāni, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss13:1.5.26
Pali: riñcanti pesalā bhikkhū nivasanti pāpabhikkhū. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss13:1.5.27
Pali: Sādhu, bhante, bhagavā kīṭāgiriṁ bhikkhū pahiṇeyya yathāyaṁ kīṭāgirismiṁ āvāso saṇṭhaheyyā’ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss13:1.5.28
Pali: Tato ahaṁ, bhagavā, āgacchāmī”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss13:1.6.1
Pali: Atha kho bhagavā etasmiṁ nidāne etasmiṁ pakaraṇe bhikkhusaṅghaṁ sannipātāpetvā bhikkhū paṭipucchi—

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss13:1.6.2
Pali: “saccaṁ kira, bhikkhave, assajipunabbasukā nāma kīṭāgirismiṁ āvāsikā alajjino pāpabhikkhū te evarūpaṁ anācāraṁ ācaranti—

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss13:1.6.3
Pali: mālāvacchaṁ ropentipi ropāpentipi, siñcantipi siñcāpentipi …pe… vividhampi anācāraṁ ācaranti, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss13:1.6.4
Pali: yepi te, bhikkhave, manussā pubbe saddhā ahesuṁ pasannā tepi etarahi assaddhā appasannā; 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss13:1.6.5
Pali: yānipi tāni saṅghassa pubbe dānapathāni tānipi etarahi upacchinnāni; 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss13:1.6.6
Pali: riñcanti pesalā bhikkhū nivasanti pāpabhikkhū”ti? 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss13:1.6.7
Pali: “Saccaṁ, bhagavā”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss13:1.6.8
Pali: Vigarahi buddho bhagavā …pe… 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss13:1.6.9
Pali: kathañhi nāma te, bhikkhave, moghapurisā evarūpaṁ anācāraṁ ācarissanti—

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss13:1.6.10
Pali: mālāvacchaṁ ropessantipi ropāpessantipi, sañcissantipi siñcāpessantipi, ocinissantipi ocināpessantipi, ganthissantipi ganthāpessantipi, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss13:1.6.11
Pali: ekatovaṇṭikamālaṁ karissantipi kārāpessantipi, ubhatovaṇṭikamālaṁ karissantipi kārāpessantipi, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss13:1.6.12
Pali: mañjarikaṁ karissantipi kārāpessantipi, vidhūtikaṁ karissantipi kārāpessantipi, vaṭaṁsakaṁ karissantipi kārāpessantipi, āveḷaṁ karissantipi kārāpessantipi, uracchadaṁ karissantipi kārāpessantipi. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss13:1.6.13
Pali: Te kulitthīnaṁ kuladhītānaṁ kulakumārīnaṁ kulasuṇhānaṁ kuladāsīnaṁ ekatovaṇṭikamālaṁ harissantipi hārāpessantipi, ubhatovaṇṭikamālaṁ harissantipi hārāpessantipi, mañjarikaṁ harissantipi hārāpessantipi, vidhūtikaṁ harissantipi hārāpessantipi, vaṭaṁsakaṁ harissantipi hārāpessantipi, āveḷaṁ harissantipi hārāpessantipi, uracchadaṁ harissantipi hārāpessantipi. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss13:1.6.14
Pali: Te kulitthīhi kuladhītāhi kulakumārīhi kulasuṇhāhi kuladāsīhi saddhiṁ ekabhājanepi bhuñjissanti, ekathālakepi pivissanti, ekāsanepi nisīdissanti, ekamañcepi tuvaṭṭissanti, ekattharaṇāpi tuvaṭṭissanti, ekapāvuraṇāpi tuvaṭṭissanti, ekattharaṇapāvuraṇāpi tuvaṭṭissanti, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss13:1.6.15
Pali: vikālepi bhuñjissanti, majjampi pivissanti, mālāgandhavilepanampi dhārissanti 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss13:1.6.16
Pali: naccissantipi gāyissantipi vādessantipi lāsessantipi, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss13:1.6.17
Pali: naccantiyāpi naccissanti naccantiyāpi gāyissanti naccantiyāpi vādessanti naccantiyāpi lāsessanti, gāyantiyāpi naccissanti gāyantiyāpi gāyissanti gāyantiyāpi vādessanti gāyantiyāpi lāsessanti, vādentiyāpi naccissanti vādentiyāpi gāyissanti vādentiyāpi vādessanti vādentiyāpi lāsessanti, lāsentiyāpi naccissanti lāsentiyāpi gāyissanti lāsentiyāpi vādessanti lāsentiyāpi lāsessanti 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss13:1.6.18
Pali: aṭṭhapadepi kīḷissanti dasapadepi kīḷissanti, ākāsepi kīḷissanti, parihārapathepi kīḷissanti, santikāyapi kīḷissanti, khalikāyapi kīḷissanti, ghaṭikāyapi kīḷissanti, salākahatthenapi kīḷissanti, akkhenapi kīḷissanti, paṅgacīrenapi kīḷissanti, vaṅkakenapi kīḷissanti, mokkhacikāyapi kīḷissanti, ciṅgulakenapi kīḷissanti, pattāḷhakenapi kīḷissanti, rathakenapi kīḷissanti, dhanukenapi kīḷissanti, akkharikāyapi kīḷissanti, manesikāyapi kīḷissanti, yathāvajjenapi kīḷissanti, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss13:1.6.19
Pali: hatthismimpi sikkhissanti, assasmimpi sikkhissanti, rathasmimpi sikkhissanti, dhanusmimpi sikkhissanti, tharusmimpi sikkhissanti, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss13:1.6.20
Pali: hatthissapi purato dhāvissanti, assassapi purato dhāvissanti, rathassapi purato dhāvissantipi ādhāvissantipi 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss13:1.6.21
Pali: usseḷessantipi, apphoṭessantipi, nibbujjhissantipi, muṭṭhīhipi yujjhissanti, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss13:1.6.22
Pali: raṅgamajjhepi saṅghāṭiṁ pattharitvā naccakiṁ evaṁ vakkhanti “idha, bhagini, naccassū”ti nalāṭikampi dassanti, vividhampi anācāraṁ ācarissanti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss13:1.6.23
Pali: Netaṁ, bhikkhave, appasannānaṁ vā pasādāya …pe… 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss13:1.6.24
Pali: vigarahitvā dhammiṁ kathaṁ katvā sāriputtamoggallāne āmantesi—

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss13:1.6.25
Pali: “gacchatha tumhe, sāriputtā, kīṭāgiriṁ gantvā assajipunabbasukānaṁ bhikkhūnaṁ kīṭāgirismā pabbājanīyakammaṁ karotha. Tumhākaṁ ete saddhivihārikā”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss13:1.6.26
Pali: “Kathaṁ mayaṁ, bhante, assajipunabbasukānaṁ bhikkhūnaṁ kīṭāgirismā pabbājanīyakammaṁ karoma? Caṇḍā te bhikkhū pharusā”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss13:1.6.27
Pali: “Tena hi tumhe, sāriputtā, bahukehi bhikkhūhi saddhiṁ gacchathā”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss13:1.6.28
Pali: “Evaṁ, bhante”ti kho sāriputtamoggallānā bhagavato paccassosuṁ. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss13:1.7.1
Pali: “Evañca pana, bhikkhave, kātabbaṁ. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss13:1.7.2
Pali: Paṭhamaṁ assajipunabbasukā bhikkhū codetabbā. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss13:1.7.3
Pali: Codetvā sāretabbā. Sāretvā āpattiṁ ropetabbā. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss13:1.7.4
Pali: Āpattiṁ ropetvā byattena bhikkhunā paṭibalena saṅgho ñāpetabbo—

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss13:1.7.5
Pali: ‘Suṇātu me, bhante, saṅgho. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss13:1.7.6
Pali: Ime assajipunabbasukā bhikkhū kuladūsakā pāpasamācārā. Imesaṁ pāpakā samācārā dissanti ceva suyyanti ca. Kulāni ca imehi duṭṭhāni dissanti ceva suyyanti ca. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss13:1.7.7
Pali: Yadi saṅghassa pattakallaṁ, saṅgho assajipunabbasukānaṁ bhikkhūnaṁ kīṭāgirismā pabbājanīyakammaṁ kareyya—“na assajipunabbasukehi bhikkhūhi kīṭāgirismiṁ vatthabban”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss13:1.7.8
Pali: Esā ñatti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss13:1.7.9
Pali: Suṇātu me, bhante, saṅgho. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss13:1.7.10
Pali: Ime assajipunabbasukā bhikkhū kuladūsakā pāpasamācārā. Imesaṁ pāpakā samācārā dissanti ceva suyyanti ca. Kulāni ca imehi duṭṭhāni dissanti ceva suyyanti ca. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss13:1.7.11
Pali: Saṅgho assajipunabbasukānaṁ bhikkhūnaṁ kīṭāgirismā pabbājanīyakammaṁ karoti—“na assajipunabbasukehi bhikkhūhi kīṭāgirismiṁ vatthabban”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss13:1.7.12
Pali: Yassāyasmato khamati assajipunabbasukānaṁ bhikkhūnaṁ kīṭāgirismā pabbājanīyakammassa karaṇaṁ—“na assajipunabbasukehi bhikkhūhi kīṭāgirismiṁ vatthabban”ti, so tuṇhassa; 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss13:1.7.13
Pali: yassa nakkhamati, so bhāseyya. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss13:1.7.14
Pali: Dutiyampi etamatthaṁ vadāmi …pe… 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss13:1.7.15
Pali: tatiyampi etamatthaṁ vadāmi—suṇātu me, bhante, saṅgho …pe… so bhāseyya. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss13:1.7.16
Pali: Kataṁ saṅghena assajipunabbasukānaṁ bhikkhūnaṁ kīṭāgirismā pabbājanīyakammaṁ—“na assajipunabbasukehi bhikkhūhi kīṭāgirismiṁ vatthabban”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss13:1.7.17
Pali: Khamati saṅghassa, tasmā tuṇhī, evametaṁ dhārayāmī’”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss13:1.8.1
Pali: Atha kho sāriputtamoggallānappamukho bhikkhusaṅgho kīṭāgiriṁ gantvā assajipunabbasukānaṁ bhikkhūnaṁ kīṭāgirismā pabbājanīyakammaṁ akāsi—“na assajipunabbasukehi bhikkhūhi kīṭāgirismiṁ vatthabban”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss13:1.8.2
Pali: Te saṅghena pabbājanīyakammakatā na sammā vattanti, na lomaṁ pātenti, na netthāraṁ vattanti, na bhikkhū khamāpenti, akkosanti paribhāsanti chandagāmitā dosagāmitā mohagāmitā bhayagāmitā pāpenti, pakkamantipi, vibbhamantipi. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss13:1.8.3
Pali: Ye te bhikkhū appicchā …pe… te ujjhāyanti khiyyanti vipācenti—

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss13:1.8.4
Pali: “kathañhi nāma assajipunabbasukā bhikkhū saṅghena pabbājanīyakammakatā na sammā vattissanti, na lomaṁ pātessanti, na netthāraṁ vattissanti, na bhikkhū khamāpessanti, akkosissanti paribhāsissanti, chandagāmitā dosagāmitā mohagāmitā bhayagāmitā pāpessanti pakkamissantipi vibbhamissantipī”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss13:1.8.5
Pali: Atha kho te bhikkhū assajipunabbasuke bhikkhū anekapariyāyena vigarahitvā bhagavato etamatthaṁ ārocesuṁ …pe… 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss13:1.8.6
Pali: “saccaṁ kira, bhikkhave, assajipunabbasukā bhikkhū saṅghena pabbājanīyakammakatā na sammā vattanti …pe… vibbhamantipī”ti? 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss13:1.8.7
Pali: “Saccaṁ, bhagavā”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss13:1.8.8
Pali: Vigarahi buddho bhagavā …pe… 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss13:1.8.9
Pali: evañca pana, bhikkhave, imaṁ sikkhāpadaṁ uddiseyyātha—

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss13:1.8.10.1
Pali: “Bhikkhu paneva aññataraṁ gāmaṁ vā nigamaṁ vā upanissāya viharati kuladūsako pāpasamācāro. Tassa kho pāpakā samācārā dissanti ceva suyyanti ca, kulāni ca tena duṭṭhāni dissanti ceva suyyanti ca. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss13:1.8.11
Pali: So bhikkhu bhikkhūhi evamassa vacanīyo—

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss13:1.8.12
Pali: ‘āyasmā kho kuladūsako pāpasamācāro, āyasmato kho pāpakā samācārā dissanti ceva suyyanti ca, kulāni cāyasmatā duṭṭhāni dissanti ceva suyyanti ca. Pakkamatāyasmā imamhā āvāsā. Alaṁ te idha vāsenā’ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss13:1.8.13
Pali: Evañca so bhikkhu bhikkhūhi vuccamāno te bhikkhū evaṁ vadeyya—

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss13:1.8.14
Pali: ‘chandagāmino ca bhikkhū dosagāmino ca bhikkhū mohagāmino ca bhikkhū bhayagāmino ca bhikkhū tādisikāya āpattiyā ekaccaṁ pabbājenti ekaccaṁ na pabbājentī’ti, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss13:1.8.15
Pali: so bhikkhu bhikkhūhi evamassa vacanīyo—

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss13:1.8.16
Pali: ‘māyasmā evaṁ avaca. Na ca bhikkhū chandagāmino. Na ca bhikkhū dosagāmino. Na ca bhikkhū mohagāmino. Na ca bhikkhū bhayagāmino. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss13:1.8.17
Pali: Āyasmā kho kuladūsako pāpasamācāro. Āyasmato kho pāpakā samācārā dissanti ceva suyyanti ca. Kulāni cāyasmatā duṭṭhāni dissanti ceva suyyanti ca. Pakkamatāyasmā imamhā āvāsā. Alaṁ te idha vāsenā’ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss13:1.8.18
Pali: Evañca so bhikkhu bhikkhūhi vuccamāno tatheva paggaṇheyya, so bhikkhu bhikkhūhi yāvatatiyaṁ samanubhāsitabbo tassa paṭinissaggāya. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss13:1.8.19
Pali: Yāvatatiyañce samanubhāsiyamāno taṁ paṭinissajjeyya, iccetaṁ kusalaṁ; 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss13:1.8.20
Pali: no ce paṭinissajjeyya, saṅghādiseso”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss13:2.1
Pali: Bhikkhu paneva aññataraṁ gāmaṁ vā nigamaṁ vāti 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss13:2.2
Pali: gāmopi nigamopi nagarampi gāmo ceva nigamo ca. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss13:2.3
Pali: Upanissāya viharatīti 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss13:2.4
Pali: tattha paṭibaddhā honti cīvarapiṇḍapātasenāsanagilānappaccayabhesajjaparikkhārā. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss13:2.5
Pali: Kulaṁ nāma 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss13:2.6
Pali: cattāri kulāni—khattiyakulaṁ, brāhmaṇakulaṁ, vessakulaṁ, suddakulaṁ. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss13:2.7
Pali: Kuladūsakoti 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss13:2.8
Pali: kulāni dūseti pupphena vā phalena vā cuṇṇena vā mattikāya vā dantakaṭṭhena vā veḷuyā vejjikāya vā jaṅghapesanikena vā. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss13:2.9
Pali: Pāpasamācāroti 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss13:2.10
Pali: mālāvacchaṁ ropetipi ropāpetipi, siñcatipi siñcāpetipi, ocinātipi ocināpetipi, ganthetipi ganthāpetipi. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss13:2.11
Pali: Dissanti ceva suyyanti cāti 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss13:2.12
Pali: ye saṁmukhā te passanti, ye tirokkhā te suṇanti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss13:2.13
Pali: Kulāni ca tena duṭṭhānīti 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss13:2.14
Pali: pubbe saddhā hutvā taṁ āgamma assaddhā honti, pasannā hutvā appasannā honti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss13:2.15
Pali: Dissanti ceva suyyanti cāti 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss13:2.16
Pali: ye saṁmukhā te passanti, ye tirokkhā te suṇanti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss13:2.17
Pali: So bhikkhūti 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss13:2.18
Pali: yo so kuladūsako bhikkhu. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss13:2.19
Pali: Bhikkhūhīti 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss13:2.20
Pali: aññehi bhikkhūhi. Ye passanti ye suṇanti. Tehi vattabbo—

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss13:2.21
Pali: “āyasmā kho kuladūsako pāpasamācāro. Āyasmato kho pāpakā samācārā dissanti ceva suyyanti ca. Kulāni cāyasmatā duṭṭhāni dissanti ceva suyyanti ca. Pakkamatāyasmā imamhā āvāsā. Alaṁ te idha vāsenā”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss13:2.22
Pali: Evañca so bhikkhu bhikkhūhi vuccamāno te bhikkhū evaṁ vadeyya—“chandagāmino ca bhikkhū, dosagāmino ca bhikkhū, mohagāmino ca bhikkhū, bhayagāmino ca bhikkhū. Tādisikāya āpattiyā ekaccaṁ pabbājenti ekaccaṁ na pabbājentī”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss13:2.23
Pali: So bhikkhūti 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss13:2.24
Pali: yo so kammakato bhikkhu. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss13:2.25
Pali: Bhikkhūhīti 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss13:2.26
Pali: aññehi bhikkhūhi. Ye passanti ye suṇanti. Tehi vattabbo—

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss13:2.27
Pali: “māyasmā evaṁ avaca. Na ca bhikkhū chandagāmino, na ca bhikkhū dosagāmino, na ca bhikkhū mohagāmino, na ca bhikkhū bhayagāmino. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss13:2.28
Pali: Āyasmā kho kuladūsako pāpasamācāro. Āyasmato kho pāpakā samācārā dissanti ceva suyyanti ca. Kulāni cāyasmatā duṭṭhāni dissanti ceva suyyanti ca. Pakkamatāyasmā imamhā āvāsā. Alaṁ te idha vāsenā”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss13:2.29
Pali: Dutiyampi vattabbo. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss13:2.30
Pali: Tatiyampi vattabbo. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss13:2.31
Pali: Sace paṭinissajjati, iccetaṁ kusalaṁ. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss13:2.32
Pali: No ce paṭinissajjati, āpatti dukkaṭassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss13:2.33
Pali: Sutvā na vadanti, āpatti dukkaṭassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss13:2.34
Pali: So bhikkhu saṅghamajjhampi ākaḍḍhitvā vattabbo—

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss13:2.35
Pali: “māyasmā evaṁ avaca. Na ca bhikkhū chandagāmino, na ca bhikkhū dosagāmino, na ca bhikkhū mohagāmino, na ca bhikkhū bhayagāmino. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss13:2.36
Pali: Āyasmā kho kuladūsako pāpasamācāro. Āyasmato kho pāpakā samācārā dissanti ceva suyyanti ca. Kulāni cāyasmatā duṭṭhāni dissanti ceva suyyanti ca. Pakkamatāyasmā imamhā āvāsā. Alaṁ te idha vāsenā”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss13:2.37
Pali: Dutiyampi vattabbo. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss13:2.38
Pali: Tatiyampi vattabbo. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss13:2.39
Pali: Sace paṭinissajjati, iccetaṁ kusalaṁ. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss13:2.40
Pali: No ce paṭinissajjati, āpatti dukkaṭassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss13:2.41
Pali: So bhikkhu samanubhāsitabbo. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss13:2.42
Pali: “Evañca pana, bhikkhave, samanubhāsitabbo. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss13:2.43
Pali: Byattena bhikkhunā paṭibalena saṅgho ñāpetabbo—

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss13:2.44
Pali: ‘Suṇātu me, bhante, saṅgho. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss13:2.45
Pali: Ayaṁ itthannāmo bhikkhu saṅghena pabbājanīyakammakato bhikkhū chandagāmitā dosagāmitā mohagāmitā bhayagāmitā pāpeti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss13:2.46
Pali: So taṁ vatthuṁ na paṭinissajjati. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss13:2.47
Pali: Yadi saṅghassa pattakallaṁ, saṅgho itthannāmaṁ bhikkhuṁ samanubhāseyya tassa vatthussa paṭinissaggāya. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss13:2.48
Pali: Esā ñatti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss13:2.49
Pali: Suṇātu me, bhante, saṅgho. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss13:2.50
Pali: Ayaṁ itthannāmo bhikkhu saṅghena pabbājanīyakammakato bhikkhū chandagāmitā dosagāmitā mohagāmitā bhayagāmitā pāpeti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss13:2.51
Pali: So taṁ vatthuṁ na paṭinissajjati. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss13:2.52
Pali: Saṅgho itthannāmaṁ bhikkhuṁ samanubhāsati tassa vatthussa paṭinissaggāya. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss13:2.53
Pali: Yassāyasmato khamati itthannāmassa bhikkhuno samanubhāsanā tassa vatthussa paṭinissaggāya, so tuṇhassa; yassa nakkhamati, so bhāseyya. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss13:2.54
Pali: Dutiyampi etamatthaṁ vadāmi …pe… 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss13:2.55
Pali: tatiyampi etamatthaṁ vadāmi …pe…. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss13:2.56
Pali: Samanubhaṭṭho saṅghena itthannāmo bhikkhu tassa vatthussa paṭinissaggāya. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss13:2.57
Pali: Khamati saṅghassa, tasmā tuṇhī, evametaṁ dhārayāmī’”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss13:2.58
Pali: Ñattiyā dukkaṭaṁ, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss13:2.59
Pali: dvīhi kammavācāhi thullaccayā, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss13:2.60
Pali: kammavācāpariyosāne āpatti saṅghādisesassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss13:2.61
Pali: Saṅghādisesaṁ ajjhāpajjantassa ñattiyā dukkaṭaṁ, dvīhi kammavācāhi thullaccayā paṭippassambhanti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss13:2.62
Pali: Saṅghādisesoti 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss13:2.63
Pali: saṅghova tassā āpattiyā parivāsaṁ deti, mūlāya paṭikassati, mānattaṁ deti, abbheti; na sambahulā, na ekapuggalo. Tena vuccati—“saṅghādiseso”ti, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss13:2.64
Pali: tasseva āpattinikāyassa nāmakammaṁ adhivacanaṁ. Tenapi vuccati “saṅghādiseso”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss13:3.1.1
Pali: Dhammakamme dhammakammasaññī na paṭinissajjati, āpatti saṅghādisesassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss13:3.1.2
Pali: Dhammakamme vematiko na paṭinissajjati, āpatti saṅghādisesassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss13:3.1.3
Pali: Dhammakamme adhammakammasaññī na paṭinissajjati, āpatti saṅghādisesassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss13:3.1.4
Pali: Adhammakamme dhammakammasaññī, āpatti dukkaṭassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss13:3.1.5
Pali: Adhammakamme vematiko, āpatti dukkaṭassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss13:3.1.6
Pali: Adhammakamme adhammakammasaññī, āpatti dukkaṭassa. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss13:3.2.1
Pali: Anāpatti—

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss13:3.2.2
Pali: asamanubhāsantassa, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss13:3.2.3
Pali: paṭinissajjantassa, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss13:3.2.4
Pali: ummattakassa, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss13:3.2.5
Pali: ādikammikassāti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss13:3.2.6
Pali: Kuladūsakasikkhāpadaṁ niṭṭhitaṁ terasamaṁ. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss13:3.2.7
Pali: “Uddiṭṭhā kho, āyasmanto, terasa saṅghādisesā dhammā, nava paṭhamāpattikā, cattāro yāvatatiyakā. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss13:3.2.8
Pali: Yesaṁ bhikkhu aññataraṁ vā aññataraṁ vā āpajjitvā yāvatīhaṁ jānaṁ paṭicchādeti tāvatīhaṁ tena bhikkhunā akāmā parivattabbaṁ. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss13:3.2.9
Pali: Parivutthaparivāsena bhikkhunā uttari chārattaṁ bhikkhumānattāya paṭipajjitabbaṁ. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss13:3.2.10
Pali: Ciṇṇamānatto bhikkhu yattha siyā vīsatigaṇo bhikkhusaṅgho tattha so bhikkhu abbhetabbo. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss13:3.2.11
Pali: Ekenapi ce ūno vīsatigaṇo bhikkhusaṅgho taṁ bhikkhuṁ abbheyya, so ca bhikkhu anabbhito, te ca bhikkhū gārayhā, ayaṁ tattha sāmīci. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss13:3.2.12
Pali: Tatthāyasmante pucchāmi—‘kaccittha parisuddhā’? 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss13:3.2.13
Pali: Dutiyampi pucchāmi—‘kaccittha parisuddhā’? 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss13:3.2.14
Pali: Tatiyampi pucchāmi—‘kaccittha parisuddhā’? 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss13:3.2.15
Pali: Parisuddhetthāyasmanto. Tasmā tuṇhī, evametaṁ dhārayāmī”ti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss13:3.2.16
Pali: Terasakaṁ niṭṭhitaṁ. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss13:3.2.17
Pali: Tassuddānaṁ 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss13:3.2.18
Pali: Vissaṭṭhi kāyasaṁsaggaṁ, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss13:3.2.19
Pali: duṭṭhullaṁ attakāmañca; 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss13:3.2.20
Pali: Sañcarittaṁ kuṭī ceva, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss13:3.2.21
Pali: vihāro ca amūlakaṁ. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss13:3.2.22
Pali: Kiñcilesañca bhedo ca, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss13:3.2.23
Pali: tasseva anuvattakā; 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss13:3.2.24
Pali: Dubbacaṁ kuladūsañca, 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss13:3.2.25
Pali: saṅghādisesā terasāti. 

pli-tv-bu-vb-ss13:3.2.26
Pali: Saṅghādisesakaṇḍaṁ niṭṭhitaṁ.
